name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Fake News Lying About Us
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fake_news_lying_about_us&n=1)
---
## Fake News Lying About Us
### Tuesday, March 22nd, 2022
Friend, There's an old saying: "you know you are over the target when you start catching flak!" The Political Class is freaking out about us. They didn't expect you and me to be so organized, so dedicated to liberty, that we'd show up and be successful! In fact, our side is doing so well that Medical Freedom Champion Mark Bishofsky just won the GOP Endorsement in Stillwater this last weekend by a **whopping 82% of the vote**! [](https://www.action4liberty.com/mark_bishofsy_wins_gop_endorsement?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fake_news_lying_about_us&n=2) You may remember Mark Bishofsky from last fall. He's the one who put together the massive "Stop the Mandate" rallies at the Capitol that attracted thousands of people. He also left his career as a respiratory therapist of 22 years because he refused to comply with the vaccine mandate.
## That's a fighter!
But the Political Class doesn't like the fact that the messages of liberty and freedom from guys like Mark are resonating with new Republican delegates. This poses a huge threat to their status quo of growing government/limiting freedoms through thousand page, unconstitutional omnibus bills. So now the Political Class has their favorite fake news reporter targeting us. In his morning email he labels you and me as "fringe" and says "it’s time for Republicans to call out Action for Liberty." I think it's time for us to **double down on our efforts!** We WILL NOT back down from our effort to pass the Never Again Bill, Stop Vaccine Mandates and give every penny of the $12 Billion surplus back to you. Anyone standing in the way of these important issues, will be in our crosshairs. Speaking of YOUR surplus...did you see that Erik Mortensen is **the only legislator** who hasn't voted to spend a dime of your surplus money so far! [](https://www.action4liberty.com/mortensen_hasn_t_spent_your_surplus?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fake_news_lying_about_us&n=3) **There's a week left of local conventions. Please continue showing up and let your voice be heard. You are making a difference. We here at Action 4 Liberty HQ don't mind catching the flak on your behalf - we're used to it.** But we are powerless without you!
## **[ATTEND YOUR CONVENTIONS](https://www.action4liberty.com/delegate_process?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fake_news_lying_about_us&n=4)**
## **Jake Duesenberg**
**Action 4 Liberty** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fake_news_lying_about_us&n=5 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fake_news_lying_about_us&n=5)
---

You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fake_news_lying_about_us&n=7).

body:

| [](https://go.dscc.org/go/7137?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220322-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220322-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=3434%2E9716520%2E53vYE9)

Hi there -- When I looked through our past survey responses, I was very impressed with your level of enthusiasm. In fact, you were **more active than 92 percent of Democrats in our database!**

As one of our **_most active supporters_** , you're who we NEED to hear from to lock in our strategy to defend President Biden's Democratic Senate majority.

[**That’s why I’m proud to offer you my personal invitation to become a Senior Democratic Strategist and join an _exclusive_ focus group. Click here to start >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/7137?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220322-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220322-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=3434%2E9716520%2E53vYE9)

| | [START THE FOCUS GROUP](https://go.dscc.org/go/7137?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220322-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220322-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=3434%2E9716520%2E53vYE9)

This high-priority focus group is ONLY open to Democrats who've proven their commitment to winning -- **fewer than 8% of our supporters made the cut, and you're one of them.**

Listening to our most active supporters was the most impactful decision we made in the last election. Your critical input helped us elect Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff, flip the Senate, and kick Donald Trump out of office -- and now we need you again to help finalize Senate Democrats’ official strategy to expand our razor-thin majority.

**So please, accept your invitation right away and join our focus group exclusively for Senior Democratic Strategists:**
**[www.dscc.org/SeniorDemocraticStrategists/members/#9716520](https://go.dscc.org/go/7137?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220322-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220322-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=3434%2E9716520%2E53vYE9)**

I'm excited to have you on the team!

Christie
Executive Director, DSCC
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. As one of our most active supporters , you're who we NEED to hear from to lock in our strategy to defend President Biden's Democratic Senate majority. | | This high-priority focus group is ONLY open to Democrats who've proven their commitment to winning -- fewer than 8% of our supporters made the cut, and you're one of them. Listening to our most active supporters was the most impactful decision we made in the last election. Your critical input helped us elect Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff, flip the Senate, and kick Donald Trump out of office -- and now we need you again to help finalize Senate Democrats’ official strategy to expand our razor-thin majority. So please, accept your invitation right away and join our focus group exclusively for Senior Democratic Strategists: I'm excited to have you on the team! Christie Executive Director, DSCC The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please . to receive fewer emails. to unsubscribe. name: Yesli Vega
subject: Vega Update: The Dishonest Media & Another Busy Week on the Campaign Trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yesli Vega for Virginia
body:
|
---
It was another busy week on the campaign trail. Before we recap, I want to touch on an issue that’s of paramount importance to our republic - and that is the dishonesty of our supposedly ‘mainstream’ media.

Seventeen months after the New York Post [**blew the lid off of the Biden family’s corrupt dealings**](http://links.yeslivega.com/u/click?_t=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_m=99d210fb248a409c8cd757bc75fab530&_e=B8dlLIdvWKqinqin5rNLEoufxbewgJVCNZQp7swmqaYLb5AVdmEgK1uTfo9FU-ag3RW4xnX8iX-YMBITITTaloP1ui9FWjNs_k1h6BcBArVBnWvax6duyCbik9RgVZCFOdWmmkP1INSsWV3-xAKLLn-IqsGrR3z1oBoHj_3JebE8Y5IEWDfypnBMye4kV4zlRxwVG9MGxdCNJC2fAgGl9A_zv-O6mThw_um6wEk9lz4tUdYTchhHsZPNbug5wcoC0u6YV_wy-GgX1cuC6E-b4nrZabKuxPNtgLBTK1kwyKAfQl8MHSGOPeHqNCCUdks0pFJmRAYLICOfpUW6d4MlQAGzigi1lCXbfx06FEFl0RI%3D) with the Ukrainian gas company, Burisma, the New York Times and the rest of the dishonest conglomerate that makes up today’s mainstream media finally confirmed the story as true. The Times and the MSM of course wanted no part of this story seventeen months ago as its knowledge to the masses would have undoubtedly cast doubt on Joe Biden’s ethics and likely changed the outcome of an election that was decided by only 40,000 votes in three states. Worse yet, the Times and [**51 dishonest, activist “Intelligence” officers from the CIA and elsewhere**](http://links.yeslivega.com/u/click?_t=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_m=99d210fb248a409c8cd757bc75fab530&_e=B8dlLIdvWKqinqin5rNLEqSGDoKc8uuDY0gCZMVCX1-wtYiLkpuhWG7ZWowsEMIL4hDkAwTS8-ZQljQVfN2-UJyhlpqNvPE5e7uf4aXw4kfCEPxWARIoQqn94NXTGA_F3YImRIMam7QbC4jB0HxJyw1NLRAGL1yMYUQ601wNW6Cpi_tWURKArruNyhKrz1ZnSvESYLEnYL87PnpOs6-m8JJWb_nhRQPiRoLR6-rG6cOmobX0jDY-uU0BHpHDGpmThCbCU0RGBRC-b_4-zD7PP6Icdbtl9RX8LeVMqgOmHgkN0uG-AZwW8ImOEOgdL5jpAnbf0U2ZVVcxBby2dMkpbwlXcEltt7H62yKpFQq_xY6Zu8p5jLJpaDRpsSWApItS) lied and routinely called this information, verified in October of 2020, “Russian disinformation.” Pot, meet Kettle. The purposeful dishonesty and cover up of this story likely changed the outcome of our last federal election. We must not allow such dishonest propagandists dedicated to a decidedly liberal narrative to impact this midterm. With the world ablaze and record inflation, the stakes are just too high.

While their motivation may not be influencing an election, the media’s dishonest reporting and lack of intellectual curiosity surrounding women’s sports also took center stage this past week.

Of course, [**I’m referring to biological male, William “Lia” Thomas, dominating the world of women’s collegiate swimming**](http://links.yeslivega.com/u/click?_t=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_m=99d210fb248a409c8cd757bc75fab530&_e=B8dlLIdvWKqinqin5rNLEu6f6HuyGU8OKGQYTGLQGEulOVMO1uDdFMIE2RHMMttFcqLccRB_D6C_JR_nvMKrG0k1S1mf4KmiVN_jB-6tXkBqmyzTDg9NkngF54fzvSaEU-etQA2RPRGUanLNdci6OTuYVcWL6p1CN_lx3E9CatT3ZM8dv7MUOWYpQP56K8pCTSx0-jleRXrPpBdiOApYBrE4ScTojsqGd2tkSufiB7yESlnn7yOxo9kMtz9SAojAU5GmFE8nmrtOPVnAyFzOqp6xlBiC_HX7Wp7Pc0_o2A__VPZmaxErJOsAm8It_yqqR916_fJY1wYhIZNXiuIh4KZt_zIQTNYobrL22P15naI%3D) this past season, culminating in winning the Division One 500-yard freestyle national championship on Thursday.

Despite their pearl clutching when it comes to defending the American national anthem protesters on the U.S. Women’s National Soccer team, no similar outrage occurred in defense of the young women who have invested countless hours and trained their entire lives for such a time as this past week.

Biological males, by an overwhelming average, are stronger than biological females. And it has an influence on competition. The previously noted U.S. Women’s soccer team famously lost an exhibition game to a 15-year old boys team a couple years back. As a former athlete and girls soccer coach, I’m not delusional, and am able to admit this fact.

Why the media cannot acknowledge the absurdity of this situation and the fundamental lack of fairness this presents our young girls is unfathomable to me.

Even noted liberal feminist, Martina Navratilova, who has fought for years to advance the cause of women’s sports said Thomas’s unsurprising performance should have an asterisk placed next to it.

As disheartening as the media’s willful ignorance of science and human biology may be, what’s even worse is that we have elected officials actually pushing to destroy women’s sports and make what happened this past week enshrined into federal law.

My far-left, Democrat opponent, Congresswoman Abigail Spanberger, voted just last year for the so-called “Equality Act” which would have mandated allowing males to compete in women's sports across all levels.

While it may be Mrs. Spanberger’s gut reaction to continually cave into the woke, politically correct mob on every occasion ([**she famously votes with Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi 100% of the time**](http://links.yeslivega.com/u/click?_t=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_m=99d210fb248a409c8cd757bc75fab530&_e=B8dlLIdvWKqinqin5rNLEowaEVCGSSZWBceZHbx1Fi2x6wOPtfqKQAKWzKjFO3KY2oedNDvqbGeEx6KwoCCwjylsmN87nJJi1j9Xg_Bb9OCtXaCL0IopUE_itOKwQ2lU1WOzCQt4DIpwgjD7SrF0Zg8p4TDl9apGOBHAFhFXQNBoISnMIXkQt7St56kvgXRXiofe0hvdwaogUR3VFxz25hozMAtJzZ3S_AwkOQ4YB7HKNMvYyRfBDyHgy46SL2AT7G5RN1BtEF7XJ2uyXJedWXkUwOBsT9gNTqELAPeFs0ALo196lwozwHnEH9FNO-6zbCo3NlaKyPBGfTpzmjEefA%3D%3D)) **_the defense of our young girls and this difference in worldview will absolutely be on the ballot for everyone to see this November._**
**On the Campaign Trail

LifeFirst Pregnancy Center**
Again, it was another very busy week on the campaign trail.

After taking Sunday to recharge, I hit the ground running Monday morning with a tour of the LifeFirst (formerly CareNet) pregnancy center. While our family had financially supported this fine organization before, I had never received an in-depth, up close and personal tour of the amazing, and, literally, life saving work they do in helping young mothers and fathers choose life over the alternative.

In the last year alone, LifeFirst, with love and compassion, guided the parents of 117 babies who are with us today to choose the miracle of life. In contrast with Congresswoman Abigail Spanberger, [**who just last year voted to override virtually all state restrictions on abortions and legalize the barbaric practice all the way up to the moment of birth**](http://links.yeslivega.com/u/click?_t=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_m=99d210fb248a409c8cd757bc75fab530&_e=B8dlLIdvWKqinqin5rNLEu6f6HuyGU8OKGQYTGLQGEsCLbCKwYJb1XDbnJcguaapy8_6XKOoDLH0oKVOMURD9gI51mydKjsf-dJrWWoHQIvLqhM2f3zNXyboijbXCz7Kol3wUkxxgOWwyfMSSq7s5UtJj5zcHawTAXI9MMsHwx7l31wWeyPGhT0WpsQM_sRWcdgmgQQNkYkF8lr_GAYisBLBw_64oUUvPW4DZn4pjKUIzhwLjFcbQMwOYgvSvTMjpq7kKHqujGwHRG4IVG5ALZIaBkUHY0aPtV0iVaf3ULO5AEyJ89LU5fttitEZ8N2hFg01S9ssXeVKft3r3dtN7PmaLtH71T9kZY0EopQXcyk%3D), I will be a pro-life champion and advocate standing for the unborn and with their parents during these difficult times. We cannot expect to live in a civilized society for long when we treat the most innocent among us in such a manner.
**Lake of the Woods Republican Club**
That evening, I joined the Lake of the Woods Republican Club in Orange County for their monthly gathering. It was great to see so many wonderful patriots taking time out of their evening to listen to and measure up those who wish to represent them in Congress. Orange County is going to be critical to our victory in June and in November and I’m extremely grateful for the opportunity to have spoken before such an active and committed group of Republican residents.
**Madison County Republican Women’s Club**
On Tuesday, the Prince William Board of County Supervisors had a public hearing to listen to feedback on the proposed residential tax hikes and meals tax being pushed by Democrat colleagues. Thankfully, the overwhelming majority of residents who turned out acknowledged that they were taxed enough already and came out in opposition to the tone-deaf proposed increases. Unfortunately, I was unable to join the fine ladies of the Madison County Republican Women’s Club that evening, but Team Vega was still on the scene and we thank all the ladies who signed our petition to help us get on the primary ballot!
**Celebrating Liberty and Free-Enterprise**
On Wednesday, we celebrated the blessings of liberty and free-enterprise throughout the Seventh District. First, I attended a ribbon cutting ceremony at the opening of a new Todos Supermarket in Woodbridge. Todos’ founder, Carlos Castro, has been a longtime friend and supporter and I was honored to be part of this celebration of free-enterprise in Prince William County. Despite the issues that our grocery stores and other small businesses are facing with government induced labor shortages and inflation; we will get through this and return back to our previously thriving economy when the adults are put back in charge in Washington.

That evening, I had the privilege of speaking to the Mama Bears of the Stafford Moms for Liberty group. Let me tell you - if you’re not inspired to fight for your Country after meeting these ladies, you never will be. Last year, Moms across the Commonwealth rose up, largely on opposition to the divisive, political, racial, and social rhetoric their children were being taught in school. It’s great to see that their enthusiasm has not subsided. After taking Virginia last fall, they’re fired up and ready to take back their Country in 2022. Thank you to the Stafford Moms for Liberty for allowing me to speak.
**Saint Patty’s Day**
On Thursday, I joined Seventh district residents at The Harbor Grille in Woodbridge for their Saint Patrick’s Day Celebration!
**Woodbridge Event**
On Friday night I was overwhelmed and humbled by the attendance of over 70 Seventh district citizens at our first meet and greet fundraiser in Woodbridge at The Electric Palm. The feeling in the room was, well, electric! It was a true blessing to have the support of so many longtime partyactivists and officeholders, ranging from Prince William County County BOCS Chair and 2018 Senate nominee, Corey Stewart to former Congressman and two-time NRCC Chair, Tom Davis. They know that not only am I the candidate most committed to fighting for our conservative principles in Washington, but also the most electable against Abigail Spanberger.

Special thanks to my Woodbridge District GOP Chair, Rob Hartwell, and great friend and supporter, Carlton Phillips, for hosting such a wonderful event.
**Veterans for Vega Coalition**
Finally, we rolled out our first installment of the Veterans for Vega Coalition this past week. On Thursday, we announced the following warriors and American heroes would be joining our team as part of our Veterans Advisory Board:
**Brigadier General John F. DePue, U.S. Army (Ret.)
Colonel Jon G. Doering, USMC (Ret.)
Colonel Joseph Fontanella, U.S. Army (Ret.)
Captain William “Bill” Milne, U.S. Coast Guard (Ret.)
Colonel Stephen Walters, USAFR (Ret.)**

They join our Chairman of Veterans for Vega, retired Army Colonel, former Under Secretary of Defense for President Trump, and 2021 Republican nominee for Governor, Sergio de la Peña, as the first members of the Veterans for Vega team.

On Saturday morning, we hit the ground running with this team and other veterans from the Seventh District at our first Veterans Roundtable discussion. As the wife of a U.S. Army veteran, I’ve been able to see up close and personal the sacrifices these heroes who put on the uniform make for us every day as well as the challengers they face readjusting to civilian life. As your next member of Congress, you can bet your last dollar that I will have the backs of those who have served us, whether by holding the VA accountable to their promises of quality service and care or by taking a pragmatic and measured approach to when and where we send our soldiers off to battle. Those who have put on the uniform are our national treasure and deserve only the best.

Team Vega was also present at the Stafford County GOP meeting on Monday. Since I had already committed to speaking to the Lake of the Woods Republican Club I was unable to make it but look forward to joining our Republican Patriots in Stafford next month.

We’ll have some more exciting news and updates from the campaign trail this upcoming week. Please feel free to like and follow us on [**Facebook**](http://links.yeslivega.com/u/click?_t=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_m=99d210fb248a409c8cd757bc75fab530&_e=B8dlLIdvWKqinqin5rNLEvMyLQh2fJo0dRsjbQxJ5LTX1F-a2tUSk-B6KBfCDQNuGdQ35F50L45cKuQ9UMnmszehbc-5xk-WnEE4wUiRdpbAKj8yoHCy2d59-diF_lt8Ev1RflOUNUz6j0TwcYe1eDK8pYBrF5Y4ExShq8RVqXu5tbkgQ6e8bFb85MBubg8ViEqeNlifzpw6UXefdEVhm_iuB3ZYglOrBUMB-BP8CcrGcNJrOfStRZncmoiPVVNN5VK6KNrIl9tMe7jx5iqKEg%3D%3D) and [**Twitter**](http://links.yeslivega.com/u/click?_t=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_m=99d210fb248a409c8cd757bc75fab530&_e=B8dlLIdvWKqinqin5rNLEoY1bYdcfWjIr5RLl8eTw0sSZm0UE-N-sUjnaztfZcsKwOfgOKwIcxblH1lhA29CQjn2XUT70yYzmS34_co5Wg3Z1bgoN-XsFI86rIZ9u6KeiZcGMcaLJx_VSq5B4t7pNPOuFOrhA_mUXtmLINLyYG5cORS1ObhF-tbdO9t_4TMkizbVZZwZyh7N5MJcI_6OBnrni7n-ZhO4L7H81D-5FQyG_ulv-UXwXWyj8rHNWIMceS8vJB36ch1a-PvYYYpm3bM1JuOvlAJpxkQWCTiCAH_UevcA8rG0R22thLH_Y-8eKrt6KGPquxKFcXO_o0a9Sg%3D%3D), as well as our website, [**YesliVega.com**](http://links.yeslivega.com/u/click?_t=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_m=99d210fb248a409c8cd757bc75fab530&_e=B8dlLIdvWKqinqin5rNLElrllRrXc6GTM0xezC7jes5m0JX-n_Zsy0sBcr9_02TvR9Gk9OrXVGdhGoEo5rY5vLSZqE-1Qft8qZxamtxHGeY2JktvDpNEs8QG11gN_oDvQVn9bLjdzn10V-jrPq2wwU0z3lS8vEr1MYFlp8jObwvnB2TJDmkh9ZqOUL6xNWyFWbQwnanblJFmV8agYLKrt637_bqbpHJ0g1jvySTQNHDj3S7kpixoY9F7gYsqDQAR) for the most up-to-date news and happenings.

Until next week.

For Liberty,

Yesli Vega
_Conservative Republican for Congress_
_Virginia's 7th District_

[](http://links.yeslivega.com/u/click?_t=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_m=99d210fb248a409c8cd757bc75fab530&_e=B8dlLIdvWKqinqin5rNLEvMyLQh2fJo0dRsjbQxJ5LR29b612b1bPaAsuv7lJp7U71wxzzMCogexkJCRztnBo8ZkAnv673Z2xk458utKDFLUsyWIqxYqpAYDYFFI5lJ66ycOr7pHu9D7vt-L2v_mBbW4xaCTNLyFbsEeJ8ExnQSE_eV-O-179z4N8iDZeuVPsmadnHyDVy0eunYcvotWmIv7YmXFx9cqE8W3yF5hnR-zlwK8LvU_qfOVXg_q41yPOW1a4CuAkayLuI-F2C3wLQ%3D%3D)[](http://links.yeslivega.com/u/click?_t=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_m=99d210fb248a409c8cd757bc75fab530&_e=B8dlLIdvWKqinqin5rNLEtz3IUgDu7JkVUDWSDCLJ6zQfEIU1CzLSmGnHBm6o5gwFDUR_BxJK_YgTKsMy6O4oQ0HmGCgueEC1rSJV0lhBLIcgBnyznY3w-pYS4jYuYw4x8qU931fCSPRA-INwNCSAD3s86gpYYveixdDfxn4HrtIDHzj_ik5MoR5sxzUS1eleRwvs-aKu2tHcvQrziFnzmLojeDQR5wM7LzTKBHcaj1WU-o6PJGWf1RWSI3gvgvpcCh5rANJE2Nl36WEHJtMeg%3D%3D) | **Military Wife. Mother. Law Enforcement Officer.**

name: Shahid Buttar
subject: The Senate plays football with the law

body:
The Senate confirmation hearings of Judge Kentanji Brown Jackson included craven attacks from GOP Senators. A conservative columnist described one of them as the “meritless to the point of demagoguery.” | | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yRkW_Sw2xr1MvIXEt6jooTbMnsVYqhUO8Xwt4ORz78ORT8Pt3SALA3pMGVDypeKbyy2kgsjsCmnmy8k7FgsqB6wuCJ9K2SYervuUQSBWz0O892xvbOncO-OfYTI61NRaBDGr9DLt-qcRTPoiTuUJwa2golnytHuRqxUq6rnUwuNTa8xV7FBea4y83ttSGwclAfl4jxna-1P_4qj0TMV41nV5DcDxpigXEEUKdVvOpIp70n44-oMs9QIf6OUL5-eTQojXDl06o6aXlhyCIKCQ5eO7floDTyfDB2Glqk1-5iGB4a14easVVX5rwkW6Q-4kYH36P4AUrpzmdKoJo1EInColvewdnJ_E0ed1UTpQ6lSWjxl_ieNB-fPTEQK-bDpYihKzQHhGYfoAPellOCAGr8rppdR66NXTGQvxbY1KLM7g/3kl/azxY2JbvRLqkonnDai1M2Q/h0/PFg_pnowuQ-kiwBjVqzQHUQ4XYwMSiX4GsS1ZpvTM2k)
| | Dear Peter, **** This week’s Senate confirmation hearings for Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson have offered a window into our broken judicial nominations process. I’m no stranger to it, having worked from 2005-2008 for the American Constitution Society for Law & Policy in Washington. 15 years ago, we prepared a pipeline of potential appointees for the next Democratic president. After President Obama took office, it was frustrating to see him nominate only one of them—Goodwin Lui, who went on to serve on the California Supreme Court—before abandoning his nomination when it proved controversial in the Senate. From that point forward, Obama nominated mostly government prosecutors and corporate lawyers. His administration was careful to diversify their ranks, but they came largely from the same professional backgrounds as the GOP nominees who today dominate the bench. [**Can you join us today to help send me back to Washington to continue pushing visionary ideas? I can do even more for the future from Congress than I have as an advocate and organizer.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MJHDSkQBW6Jd5a9lSqr63wAy74xmXdP3Je331FiN463sAVV71aE3EDH1T3fVsw-LAdE-vQM0yc4ZOZAa0RMUqKA257oMYDZ-GrKb7Oyhm3gTWDxmQbMYEabrU4oPz9MFOuWXtjYvPeakBPYiMbPXIlgF1obJMRmQfwpSHCfnzVvJwu9M-d3pNtk1xekvU9bXbJv7UVCQwgECtYc62OYC9vMZ4qvZ67WoWNXNecNDt5PlDoUuFxUGfSxuirzi6GyjAt_FXQIufoAiW_oupw4eaEaT5FihIn33-oRh3hJdFcWNzQsLaRz-Z-eVnKW_16Y6RdKT_ovV4WNCOavWKm4KiHKQegIp2iataOg8SJGhMZvKA/3kl/azxY2JbvRLqkonnDai1M2Q/h1/-EWnXkjdiCrAoA2yIhcDOo1eXFdQf92_SOKNy9ijz_A) That pattern is much of why I’m so excited about Judge Jackson’s nomination, and eager to see it confirmed by the Senate. The most common pathway to the federal bench is serving as a prosecutor. It’s ironic, bizarre—and frankly a constitutional problem, because it subverts the independence of the judiciary. Alexander Hamilton described judicial independence in the Federalist Papers No. 78 as a crux on which liberty rests. The problem of former prosecutors serving as judges, and subverting judicial independence by sitting in judgment over their former colleagues, is especially acute at the U.S. Supreme Court. That’s why Judge Jackson, if she is confirmed and sworn in as Justice Jackson, could play such a tremendous role. If confirmed, Judge Jackson would be not only the Supreme Court’s first Black woman, but also its first public defender. Each of those dimensions of her representation—demographic, and professional—render her poised to make a contribution to an institution that frankly needs her voice. A Justice Jackson would be the Court’s first public defender, the only one on a panel that remains dominated by former Justice Department lawyers. Her addition to the bench would help introduce a crucial—and notably absent—perspective of someone who has battled the leviathan of mass incarceration. There has been no balance on the Court for decades. [I wrote about that problem in 2009 in a 4-part series published on Huffington Post](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDMFtjoYduL1DUlcCFDClUn4qrIaqsT8Qjxjv32vINIvP-3Fg_2pYX94yTiuPhdTQiYNQkBWavDBydB_rl0dqMnGjSgCTF03nC6GNtfq9JD0CEp8Ko6Va0cKYcgOawvKpOVaES7I7CZuipfW9CauN7eSZlxa0hCy2v-VYb7_2kF8lNHCmA1B33Up-3ngbPMMxEettF5MFCIN5uUz6Z8zo8hmDv7pytubhLxeAM16vxTOIWhIRZf04rI11pke2Cqh4ai21BO9eQiU_uHMG4VpHjRXGT7UeLcgqnANkSeYs1NELWrAXzYejKtArW96kBozxee8tRs7a-DB3TrbWn-ubV9FCXYKpTD6LfeYs7e5yBnLXgzc54qIT5f5C9Fb93eY5mQ/3kl/azxY2JbvRLqkonnDai1M2Q/h2/wUBin0oYOkApA7jXamtbaHybmD7e1ictChUr4CwxxFI). [**Did you learn anything from this message? If so, please help us bring my voice to more voters by supporting our campaign today!**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MJHDSkQBW6Jd5a9lSqr63wAy74xmXdP3Je331FiN463sAVV71aE3EDH1T3fVsw-LAcym_XfQa6wkD6X9jsjBSFrZMhmD0WDaRPRH_ns2fsgJim_s2WIPjZZwa3U7N7_uGnY_FCnLau7pV3RIqJlvvAwnbPUIEVPVBgF-DbjJ8VM0_JtTUSwZucKY4OxLL53_itA95Yl_8PrzuaG0dCbXC8ZimeYiupsIbADn6tKJoaNg3WtLmYJVxFx3g_DKxXihT97W5MHWkrYS4YCt_iFFOfzFL3ue_zEksyM4LP20DDtSVMJk9waLqIHJ3ZU4oQHhj9b9ZNEnHP9_BeijzSiwDp1Ehjzv2G0hfj9XF1rzNSxFQ/3kl/azxY2JbvRLqkonnDai1M2Q/h3/PB6ypw-sabbm6X1CisoReIEiz1fGQ-mj8mbSLxvZhbg) It’s no surprise to see GOP Senators come out of the woodwork to oppose Judge Jackson’s nomination, even though the depths to which they were willing to sink may have been surprising—even for them! For instance, Senator Josh Hawley (R-MO) disingenuously accused Judge Jackson of being soft on people convicted of child pornography. His attacks were so baseless that even conservative _National Review_ columnist Andrew McCarthy was moved to write that Hawley’s “allegation appears meritless to the point of demagoguery.” [**I’ve faced my own share of demagoguery, though sadly more from Democrats than the GOP. Can you join us today to help us fight back against continuing attacks from across the political spectrum ultimately serving the same corporate establishment?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MJHDSkQBW6Jd5a9lSqr63wAy74xmXdP3Je331FiN463sAVV71aE3EDH1T3fVsw-LAcCK5VNR0iOby_jQjlUVNY2kTnJFNEqK2mIK7CmO3ZXrAYISOzun4tLQ4lTn5HQuQe3kSBLfkeuPEpsSzKm_t71a9cqC1tOtpCO5srvdQ6XM0iPsOuGbk6Hh82gbbsqBSU_5gz5DFIkLxj5YMtXq9EL3dFLU3It4B4WAHD3zuyhSKEV6C67UEorvWgYw-6HR5fz_FG1NFJWpri_fcm8XFx8CSAW7t1RD_BVlKHjXq-k7JZjDbxIYEufNxZgMAkTdnXdJlFQgxVPyHoQxxvMQxujZUiKogk_j4moLkymU6jU2Q/3kl/azxY2JbvRLqkonnDai1M2Q/h4/grT2HdIcBpVWDOln_-xyURsDogSG7kFxcW5iB4bfHPE) We’re glad to see voices from across the political spectrum rallying around Judge Jackson’s nomination. She not only deserves Senate confirmation, but the Court frankly needs her to help address its own crumbling legitimacy. With your support, I hope to work across the street from Justice Jackson in Washington. Thanks for helping me get there! Your voice, Shahid |
---|---|---
|

name: Jake Bequette
subject: I'm in this to WIN – Thank You for Joining!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BEQUETTE FOR ARKANSAS
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8fef6bc01533e51d9c32df07ccef91c9/38553/8e284bb30924098d/7850d43c6c2fa52fc3d6b838967d376c/38553)
---
Friend, Thank you for joining the team! I’m grateful to have you on board. We’re working hard to grow the strongest conservative grassroots movement Arkansas has ever seen. Our state needs a true leader in Washington who won’t go along to get along – and who will stand up for our values 100% of the time. As a subscriber to my email list, you’ll receive regular updates as we move forward, and have opportunities to share your opinion and get more involved. To make sure our emails reach your inbox, take this one quick action today: _Add [info@jakebequette.com ](mailto:info@jakebequette.com)to your email address book, contacts list, or safe senders list.This will help keep our emails out of your “Junk” or “Spam” folder._ Friend, I’m a native Arkansan who grew up in Little Rock. I played defensive end for the Razorbacks and I went on to win a Super Bowl with Tom Brady as a New England Patriot. After leaving the NFL, I served my country as an infantry officer in the Army's 101st Airborne Division and completed a tour of duty in Iraq. _**Now I’m ready to serve my country in the U.S. Senate and help take back America from the radical left.**_
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8fef6bc01533e51d9c32df07ccef91c9/38553/8e284bb30924098d/d1f35cd54d40c8b7c3d6b838967d376c/38553)
---
I’m a God-fearing Christian conservative who’s 100% pro-life. I oppose illegal immigration. I support our police. I aim to take on the invisible career politicians who refuse to fight for us, Friend. We need a WARRIOR to push back against the Biden agenda, not another empty suit who will just sit on the sidelines. Thank you again for signing on, Friend. For Arkansas and America, Jake BequetteRepublican Candidate for U.S. Senate _PS: If you believe you’ve received this email message in error - or do not wish to receive future updates from me or my team for any reason - you can[click here to unsubscribe.](https://ci.criticalimpact.com/app6-5/apps/messages/http://ci.criticalimpact.com/unsubscribe1.cfm?eid=8fef6bc01533e51d9c32df07ccef91c9&c=38553&jid=8e284bb30924098d)_

name: Tim Ryan
subject: I'm sweating
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2893%2E3611125%2E2yF95V ][IMG]

Folks, is it hot in here or is it just this dead heat Senate race?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9623?t=1007&akid=2893%2E3611125%2E2yF95V ]Tim doing yoga

I just finished up some hot yoga, but it’s not the only thing that’s got
me sweating lately.

My millionaire opponents and their billionaire backers are mobilizing
against our grassroots campaign.

If we’re going to win this race, we’ve got to take a deep breath and keep
our balance so we can be ready at a moment's notice for whatever they
throw our way.

That means we’ve got to stretch every campaign dollar to maximize our
impact and come out on top.

Look, I'm bending over backwards for Ohio workers, but I'm going to need
your help to make sure we have the resources to flip this Senate seat
blue.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9623?t=1008&akid=2893%2E3611125%2E2yF95V ]Can I count on you to chip in to fight back against the big money
entering this race and outwork our GOP opponents to win in Ohio?

Thanks for your support.

Tim

name: Jason Martin
subject: Get to Know My Policies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee
body:
I am releasing my policy platform and how I plan to address the issues most concerning to Tennesseans
**Dr. Martin Releases Campaign Policy Platform**
Hi Peter,
I am releasing how I plan to address the issues most concerning to Tennesseans [on my campaign website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43263101/336453469/-1900482041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWU3YWQ0Mi00MmFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydH3vjLSRLS2Rwstq0pMcovNlsyVdVo2-HaSy_IpQXs=&emci=9f4c7391-3faa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3ee7ad42-42aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9304149).
I believe that the values uniting Tennesseans are more powerful than the politics that seek to divide us. I know that together, we THRIVE. That means having a more efficient government that works for all people to help us solve big problems.
Soon after announcing my run to become Tennessee’s 51st governor, our campaign team traveled to each of our state’s 95 counties to hear what issues Tennesseans are facing each and every day. [Our policy platform](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43263102/336453470/-1900482041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWU3YWQ0Mi00MmFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydH3vjLSRLS2Rwstq0pMcovNlsyVdVo2-HaSy_IpQXs=&emci=9f4c7391-3faa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3ee7ad42-42aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9304149) reflects the voices in each of Tennessee’s 95 counties.
No matter your zip code, the color of your skin, or how much money you have in the bank, Tennessee should be the home of opportunity, the home of safe communities, and the home of a nimble, lean and efficient government that helps people solve problems together.
Thanks,
Dr. Jason Martin
Candidate for Tennessee Governor

Show your support for #TeamMartin and help move Tennessee forward!
[**Donate to Dr. Martin's campaign**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43263103/336453471/-712102320?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWU3YWQ0Mi00MmFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydH3vjLSRLS2Rwstq0pMcovNlsyVdVo2-HaSy_IpQXs=)

Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee. Keith Maune, Treasurer
Dr. Jason Martin for TN
1831 12th Avenue S #175
Nashville, TN 37203
United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Joe=20Kent?=
subject: We can never have a repeat of what happened in the 2020 election.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Joe Kent for Congress
body:
Our very existence as a nation depends on it. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8c0278b5fb55/we-can-never-have-a-repeat-of-what-happened-in-the-2020-election?e=00856e661d)
---
|
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend,

# We can never have a repeat of what happened in the 2020 election.
Our very existence as a nation depends on it.

The voting Americans of our country know what happened. They know it was rife with fraud. Most importantly, they know that President Donald Trump should have been the duly elected President of the United States. Americans across the country know they are living under a corrupt impostor regime.

The establishment elites don’t care–in fact, they were either in support of it or helped **orchestrate it themselves.** After all, President Trump’s mission was to take down the **corrupt establishment** plaguing our government–and the **corrupt establishment** made it their mission to take him down.

It’s not just the leftist Democrats and their corrupt cabal of politicians, special interests, legal groups and tech companies–swamp RINOs _in our own party_ are complicit as well. That’s why I have made it my mission to **defeat Jaime Herrera Beutler** and bring the _**voice of the PEOPLE**_ back to our nation’s capital.
---

Thank you for your support, patriot.

Joe Kent

| | Because of your amazing support, I am proud to announce that I am the first Democratic candidate running for Congress this year in the entire state of Florida to qualify for the ballot via petitions! Not only did we qualify first out of every Democratic candidate for Congress in Florida, but we did so with voter support from every single one of Florida's 67 counties \- something no candidate has accomplished in modern history! I want to give you my...
---

To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | But the GOP is doing EVERYTHING in their power to pass voter suppression bills and STOP Democrats from winning in the midterms. If we’re going to save our Majorities in November, we need to protect the right to vote and pass Automatic Voter Registration!! Ever since Trump’s humiliating defeat in 2020, Republicans have been working around the clock to suppress the right to vote. They know that when Americans vote, [!!!!!] Thanks for signing, Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? name: =?utf-8?Q?Zama=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Zama outperforms most of the field in Butler County Endorsement meeting!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zama for PA
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6ad8e36cfafc/tune-in-for-tonights-debate-6767762?e=fe97fe84cf)
---
| | [ ](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e0968883c931118cab22122d&id=d4024c450d&e=fe97fe84cf)
---
| |
---
On Saturday, the Butler County Republican Committee met to endorse a candidate for Governor. After 3 rounds of voting, it came down to myself and one other candidate. While we did not win the endorsement, I am proud to have had a strong 2nd place showing in a field of 9 candidates - most of whom have spent years or even decades in politics and have spent up to ten times the amount on their campaigns as I.

Our campaign is a grassroots movement. We have no special interests backing us. My only interests are those of the people of Pennsylvania who I wish to serve. However, I cannot do this without you!

At the end of this month, we have to file our 2nd campaign finance report and we need to be able to demonstrate the financial viability of this campaign. I would greatly appreciate it if you considered donating $100, $50 or even $20 to help us get our message out.

clean_body: | | | | | | | On Saturday, the Butler County Republican Committee met to endorse a candidate for Governor. After 3 rounds of voting, it came down to myself and one other candidate. While we did not win the endorsement, I am proud to have had a strong 2nd place showing in a field of 9 candidates - most of whom have spent years or even decades in politics and have spent up to ten times the amount on their campaigns as I. Our campaign is a grassroots movement. We have no special interests backing us. My only interests are those of the people of Pennsylvania who I wish to serve. However, I cannot do this without you! At the end of this month, we have to file our 2nd campaign finance report and we need to be able to demonstrate the financial viability of this campaign. I would greatly appreciate it if you considered donating $100, $50 or even $20 to help us get our message out. | | "Donate" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Zama for PA | | Copyright © 2022 Zama for Governor, All rights reserved.

name: Jason Lee, Beto for Texas
subject: A single-digit race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

The latest polls in the Texas Governor’s race show Beto narrowing the gap
and quickly catching up to Greg Abbott. It's great news, but it doesn't
tell the whole story.

In a moment I'll explain more, but first I have to ask: [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54105?refcode=ema20220322-181631&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=181631%2E444211%2EcnLCQD ]Would you
consider chipping in $3 or more today to our people-powered
movement to elect Beto and end Abbott's failed time in office?

The truth is, polls only capture a snapshot of the population, in a moment
of time. They aren't a 100% accurate predictor of how a race will turn
out. And as we've all seen before, they can be off.

Case in point: Beto's 2018 Senate run against Ted Cruz where we came
closer to winning statewide than any Democrat had in decades. Before the
election, Cruz was polling on average 6.8 points ahead of Beto. But on
Election Day, Beto came within 2.6 points of winning.

Our people-powered movement shocked the country. Pollsters and pundits
didn't know what to make of the fact that over 3 million more voters came
out in 2018 compared to the 2014 midterms — and that Beto not only
received votes from Democrats but also first-time voters, Independents,
and Republicans.

The
bottom line is that polls, like a recent one that showed Beto and Abbott
in a single-digit race, are one great validator that we can win this race.
But they can't tell you about the historic and unifying momentum we're
seeing grow across the state, across communities, and across party lines.

Beto's been on the road traveling this past month, and we've seen it with
our own eyes: We're building a one-of-a-kind grassroots coalition that's
capable of defying expectations and changing the status quo in Texas.

We have what it takes to elect a real fighter for the people of Texas as
our next Governor. By working together, we can keep closing the gaps in
polling, shock the pundits on Election Day, and defeat Abbott once and for
all.

Texas is ready for Beto's positive, unifying vision, but we're up against
Abbott's corporate mega-donors, so I hope we can count on your support
today. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54105?refcode=ema20220322-181631&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=181631%2E444211%2EcnLCQD ]Please, will you contribute $3 or more right now
to help Beto fight for the people of Texas as our next Governor?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54105?refcode=ema20220322-181631&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=181631%2E444211%2EcnLCQD ]Contribute $3

Let's make history.

Thank you,

Jason Lee
Deputy Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=181631%2E444211%2EcnLCQD

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Hi Peter,
Can I take a minute to tell you more about or friend and inspiration Congresswoman Katie Porter , Peter?
Katie is a force to be reckoned with. She’s a fearless advocate for working families, and one of our champions in the fight for paid family leave. You do know about her white board, right?
She’s also at serious risk of losing her House seat.
Here’s why: The GOP listed her as a top target in the midterm elections. They are determined to retake the House majority and in order to do so, they need to flip Katie’s seat.
Can you please rush a donation to support her re-election campaign today? We promised her that Moms for Katie Porter could raise her $10,000 by the end of this month and we are so close. We are counting on you to chip in to help us close the gap. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatieporter?refcode=0920]
In 2018, Katie was the underdog and narrowly flipped her district blue. If she’s going to keep her seat next year, she’ll need supporters like you and organizations like us to power her campaign.
None of this work would be possible without you.
With gratitude,
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director
Moms in Office

body:
Hi Peter, today is National Agriculture Day. Our farmers are a vital part of our economy here in Wisconsin. From dairy to corn, to soybeans, to cranberries, Wisconsin benefits greatly from our hardworking farmers.
Peter,**Today is National Agriculture Day. Our farmers are a vital part of our economy here in Wisconsin.** From dairy to corn, to soybeans, to cranberries, Wisconsin benefits greatly from our hardworking farmers.

**However, they have been hit hard by the rise in prices and the failed economic policies of the Democrats.**_Nitrogen and phosphate fertilizers, crops, and other important farming equipment have risen in price and are hurting our farmers ' ability to produce and stay afloat._We need to support our farmers. **[If you agree that we need to support our farmers, please consider making a donation to our campaign today. I will continue to fight for our farmers in Wisconsin but I need your help. We need your support to help defeat the Democrats in November and turn Wisconsin red.](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zhiirz-idtjvlhlh-r/)** Thank you,Bryan

Congressman [Help Us Fight Back](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zhiirz-idtjvlhlh-y/) [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zhiirz-idtjvlhlh-j/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zhiirz-idtjvlhlh-t/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zhiirz-idtjvlhlh-i/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-zhiirz-l-h) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

subject: Unleash American Energy!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaanqgmkoburgpvak0l65crsjnhria8aie112afo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1h69or6cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65shmmqrb6pjiceo7csdlcuqeapj3m3gn8cb7m2r74dr5m4orad72cup72chmm8rrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup30pjkc2pm9ptiedj35c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
I “love” paying premium prices for regular gas. Don’t you?

| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zboigaitbv2e8stis28jedasm2q8rnvo5s0vthgo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1h69or6cjh2bs)
---

Folks,

**I “love” paying premium prices for regular gas about as much as you do.** So glad Joe Biden put our US citizens and taxpayers out of work so we can enjoy this feeling of luxury purchases...NOT!

When I studied for my economics classes, way back when, I learned that if you reduce supply with the same level of demand, the price goes up. **_[Can you believe that, Joe?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpcltive6l01ntvqcvm8tjel85imb4iooktufff8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1h69or6cjh2bs)_**

**On Day 1,** President Biden restricted the supply from our resources.

[**Rush a contribution to UNLEASH American Energy and get us out of this mess!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6t750inlcnqh3l0tu1mjrt8i5h1j5l1e4ntno38_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1h69or6cjh2bs)
| [**RUSH $25 TO UNLEASH AMERICAN ENERGY**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7vovjq7ssam73v13elbj4tg9n3p517i433hfrko_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1h69or6cjh2bs)

---

name: Sean Themea
subject: I'm embarrassed to email you but I have no choice
body:
I’m sorry to be so urgent, but I have to ask for your immediate reply today. My name is Sean Themea and I’m Chief of Staff
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1onllug3pnu6ejn6v2opvfs3l7fmd2tku38nvqg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrj6c3jmhrmfdr6e8oeeohkciom0odnmlrb4t34e5p6fdpiclqb1phimgq7cdlgsv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66ljjac37maomcs9imdg6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5ge0oj4sdj60oh5u)
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4dm6spm36fl4hfe5lt87vkdnlc3td0a12mr5r10_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1h69or6c1h2bs)

Hey Friend,

I'm sorry to be so urgent, but I have to ask for your immediate reply today.

My name is Sean Themea and I'm Chief of Staff at Young Americans for Liberty Inc. (YAL), the most active and effective youth organization advancing liberty on college campuses and around the country.

The 2022 primary elections are unfolding and so much is at stake.

Things like:
1. **Inflation**. It's at a 40 year high, and it's only projected to continue spiking.
2. **Critical Race Theory**. Racism should not be taught in the classroom, and parents who try to stop it should not be called "terrorists."
3. **War in Ukraine**. Tensions are erupting across the globe. It's crucial American leaders remain calm and not rush to join an unconstitutional war.

That's why I am humbly asking you to sponsor a student door knocker and help us **Make Liberty Win**. I've set a goal to raise $33,000 before April, to send 300 students out.

[_**Will you donate $10, $20.22, $50, $100 or even $210 and sponsor an activist? Click here to donate >>>**_](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zltfa8r8i2qtk81b4hdslc2gji1rjgio98kn0rog_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1h69or6c1h2bs)

**Operation Win at the Door (OWD)** recruits top student door knockers to key districts. There they knock doors, connect with voters, and educate the public on the important liberty issues.

Everyone suspects a _Redwave_ this election. _**But don 't let these predictions fool you...**_

Friend, the primaries are critical to stopping establishment hacks.

I need your help to recruit boots on the ground for key battleground districts across the country. The voice of liberty has never been more important.

These are people who will defend your freedom. We ONLY support candidates who believe in the Second Amendment, believe in an America-First foreign policy, support tax cuts & School Choice, and free markets.

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl2fo91vlbqqakp0stjatq3lsskql7vqhpj25veo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1h69or6c1h2bs)

Our major accomplishments include:
* Electing 182 liberty candidates to state legislatures across the country
* Helping pass School Choice legislation in Kentucky and Missouri
* Helping pass Constitutional Carry in Texas
* Abolishing 83 unconstitutional "free speech codes" on college campuses
* Recruiting TENS of THOUSANDS of students to the cause of liberty

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkgpo23hu26jere3puo1iq0si9ofeiafkd0ks0j0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1h69or6c1h2bs)
The YAL formula for success is working and is one of our most promising paths to spreading the message of liberty to younger generations.

These students need your support. **Click any link below to donate.**

[_**Donate $20.22 >>>**_](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zj3ea788qats4et2bk60sc0n3p210crkgfvb8868_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1h69or6c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3b3a3uitm4sjjn8c204u8kkkcdd9m46esrdd700_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1h69or6c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $110 and help sponsor 1 student >>>**_](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zksnsht4j2bou77r6667n7fb0hi8cm6umgcmnfmo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1h69or6c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $220 and help sponsor 2 students >>>**_](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zevqnoi3egejr6u3n6rda4hj3iocepngnkc82ggo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1h69or6c1h2bs)
[_**_**Donate $1,100 and help sponsor 10 students >>>**_**_](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zt8b2tcivqctah9t365rf33nc1kui076upjiq8t8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1h69or6c1h2bs)
[_**_**Donate $2,200 and help sponsor 20 students >>>**_**_](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkfanr89mfgkv6e8o6mmb0l6c6avu08ur8rc5kl0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1h69or6c1h2bs)
[_**_**Donate $5,500 and help sponsor 50 students >>>**_**_](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3m2nuatqtutnlt3a4vaukvg9t3gl5gqj32b4sb0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1h69or6c1h2bs)
[_**_**Donate Any Amount**_ >>>**_](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z891906bc5pa0vhgsq4i40k1ee3pv9686nuvbif8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1h69or6c1h2bs)

Thank you for being a Liberty Champion, Friend.

_****_
Sean Themea
Chief of Staff
Young Americans for Liberty

name: Jim DeMint
subject: Citizens and Criminals
body:
The woke, socialist Left has been running Washington for a year now, and the whole country is feeling the pain. Inflation. Supply-chain breakdowns. Tyrants abroad are emboldened, and here at home, liberal politicians are abusing taxpayers, parents, and kids. Murder rates, illegal immigration, and the national debt are out of control. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9760%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=SIFjteYOAouy%2fCDdLdnlsw&sysid=1)
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Patriot: The woke, socialist Left has been running Washington for a year now, and the whole country is feeling the pain. Inflation. Supply-chain breakdowns. Tyrants abroad are emboldened, and here at home, liberal politicians are abusing taxpayers, parents, and kids. Murder rates, illegal immigration, and the national debt are out of control.
The problem with progressives today is very simple: _**they treat citizens like criminals and criminals like citizens.**_
On the border, illegal immigrants are invited into the country, bused, and flown to wherever they want. Joe Biden’s Department of Homeland Security even lets them use arrest warrants as IDs to get on planes! He let in dozens of Afghans with security red flags in their backgrounds. Drugs and criminals are pouring into our country.
But they somehow think the real problem is people who want to control the border and deport criminals!
**[Watch this short video to learn how we're doing it!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26136%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ETLbefstXYm5%2f8MXgpu1ZQ&sysid=1)**
On our streets, elite leftists have linked arms with the insane “defund the police” policy and anti-American Black Lives Matter movement. One BLM activist was arrested for shooting a Louisville mayoral candidate! BLM riots burned and looted. San Francisco basically legalized shoplifting. Left-wing prosecutors across the country are refusing to prosecute hardened criminals. And crime rates rise.
But to them, the _real problem_ is the police and law-abiding citizens who support them.
In our classrooms, liberal policymakers have parroted the lies of Critical Race Theory and abusively masked children without any scientific reason. Test scores are down. Kids’ mental health is in crisis. Learning loss is catastrophic.
But the Justice Department thinks parents who complain are “domestic terrorists.”
At every turn, progressives from President Biden on down treat criminals like heroes and patriotic citizens like criminals. Mask mandates. Vaccine mandates. Social media censorship. Doxxing and canceling. Media smearing. These weapons of the establishment are all reserved for honorable patriots.
**[Help us stand up to the Woke Left - support CPI with a one-time or monthly donation today!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26137%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ktP5bVreqp4qV1NpaJrcwA&sysid=1)**
Public support for the liberal agenda is crumbling; these policies are failing everywhere. But the progressives won’t back down. That’s why they won’t surrender Covid emergency powers and want to rig all future elections. They've gotten a taste of tyranny and don’t want to give it up.
That's why we can’t compromise or negotiate. **[We have to fight.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26138%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xMnLYt%2bBFGwUiDSN%2fnOS0Q&sysid=1)**
Inside Washington, the Conservative Partnership Institute is _**leading**_ that fight. We don’t work for a party - we work for patriots, in Congress, in the conservative movement, and within the grassroots around the country. True conservatives already know how to fight. _**We teach them how to win.**_
Liberals think **Americans** are the problem. Conservatives know that **YOU** are the solution.
**[Help us put America First by putting Americans First.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26139%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hK0OjnvI7voIof%2bMRXI3Lw&sysid=1)**
Thank you for standing strong for freedom and for doing so much to help fight for our future. For Freedom,
---
---
Jim DeMint
CPI Chairman
---
|
---
---
**CONSERVATIVE PARTNERSHIP INSTITUTE**
300 Independence Ave SE

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zpdn6anvm2atmgjt5pjrastc14hscmlk49tag2vo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1h69or3cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqct9hmcp7acdkmgprcd9m6kpr2sjk66pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s5kc4qmcddn6do75db76sqb1dr6mgpr5c9lcdp32d3n63jbfdhje9qjbdj4cerrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3appl61jr5cb6e4obbcr7m2qmash5u)
| This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z6f9oepjufb57kib6ri07s5lrnu5eqm43927c8vo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1h69or3cdh2bs)
---|---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zts2bnd4j7bvoom4hmobvtergug3rgu24jtgas20_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1h69or3cdh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z69t75tp4if3ogdvmln16epde5c9dsn17irqjm6o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1h69or3cdh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Jessica Anderson, Heritage Action
subject: re: bureaucracies are a poor substitute for loving parents.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America |
body:
Fellow Conservative, the liberal media just can't get enough of Florida. The latest thing driving them wild is Florida's Par
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk9ghbs5ce7k465jom95s3ulp7fhh6g466ddfv48_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfcpthe9q74p70e1pbepljegr70t77ceq6csbhmlrr8c72cupj8plncpijep74s1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8o6ct32mdj30slhcoqm1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdgm1o36cpj68ob24no)
| | | |
---
| | _**[Fellow Conservative, PARENTS HAVE RIGHTS!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsbj6ttku0mdo3h3da881hrb4lhop2lt41vgidm8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1j6cpj4c5h2bs)**_
---
|
---
|
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgeunbjn3l9k08nuq7e0gevg61ghiev1fnfrspr8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1j6cpj4c5h2bs)
---
Fellow Conservative, the liberal media just can't get enough of Florida. The latest thing driving them wild is Florida's Parental Rights in Education bill. You've probably heard us talk about it already—our activists supported the bill as it worked its way through the Florida legislature.

And you’ve probably heard the mainstream media talk about it too - except they’ve been purposely pushing the lies and talking points from Left-wing activist groups (_[which we’ve already debunked](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9m5b6s432hd4dq65fomiu8en970k7tsen025sho_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1j6cpj4c5h2bs)_). Let's be clear about what the bill REALLY does:
* Ensures grades K-3 are not subject to sexualized instruction.
* Bolsters parents’ rights to access school health records regarding their children.
* Directs schools to “encourage a student to discuss issues relating to his or her well-being with his or her parent.”

It does NOT:
* Ban the word “gay” or censor private conversations.

Put simply, the bill makes sure curricula remain age appropriate and that PARENTS, who have the primary responsibility for their kid’s education, are not shut out from their children’s lives. Government bureaucracies are a very poor substitute for loving parents—so it’s important that parents be kept informed of what happens at school. Heritage Action applauds Florida’s legislators for getting this important legislation across the finish line to protect children and protect parental rights. **But the Left hates this bill,** because it stops them from pushing their radical gender ideology on young children. They want to be able to indoctrinate kids at an early age, and they don’t want the policies in this bill to spread to other states. It’s why they lied and lobbied so hard against it. **Here’s why Conservatives are winning >>>** In 2022, conservative states have been dealing blow after blow to the radical Left-wing agenda. On school curriculum, election integrity, and on pro-life issues. Heritage Action activists have been doing double duty this year, blocking bad policies at the federal level, while working in the states to advance conservative policies.

And once conservative policies pass in one or two states, they spread to more. It’s a chain reaction. **That’s what we’ve seen with Election Integrity.** In 2021, our conservative activists backed big reforms in states like Texas, Florida, and Georgia. Now in 2022, other states are picking up the ball and running with it. Now that conservatives have won big in Florida with a parental rights bill, other states will look to it as a model for what can be done. This issue is far from over, but now there's some real momentum on our side. And all of this is building momentum and a policy agenda for conservatives at the federal level too. Fellow Conservative, I know the news out of Washington can seem depressing—gridlock, executive overreach, and a Congress controlled by socialists. But the pendulum of power will swing, and when it does, conservatives in Washington will be able to draw on policy victories from the states for their agenda.

I assure you that there has never been a more critical time to support Heritage Action and the conservative grassroots. The victories we’re winning today are building to even more and bigger victories in the future. But only if we put in the effort and do the hard work today...
**Let’s keep winning in the states and build an agenda for conservatives in Washington.** Help us recruit and train more activists. Give the support needed to reach even more people.
---

clean_body: Fellow Conservative, the liberal media just can't get enough of Florida. The latest thing driving them wild is Florida's Par | | | | | | | | Fellow Conservative, the liberal media just can't get enough of Florida. The latest thing driving them wild is Florida's Parental Rights in Education bill. You've probably heard us talk about it already—our activists supported the bill as it worked its way through the Florida legislature. And you’ve probably heard the mainstream media talk about it too - except they’ve been purposely pushing the lies and talking points from Left-wing activist groups (). Let's be clear about what the bill REALLY does: Ensures grades K-3 are not subject to sexualized instruction. Bolsters parents’ rights to access school health records regarding their children. Directs schools to “encourage a student to discuss issues relating to his or her well-being with his or her parent.” It does NOT: Ban the word “gay” or censor private conversations. Put simply, the bill makes sure curricula remain age appropriate and that PARENTS, who have the primary responsibility for their kid’s education, are not shut out from their children’s lives. Government bureaucracies are a very poor substitute for loving parents—so it’s important that parents be kept informed of what happens at school. Heritage Action applauds Florida’s legislators for getting this important legislation across the finish line to protect children and protect parental rights. But the Left hates this bill, because it stops them from pushing their radical gender ideology on young children. They want to be able to indoctrinate kids at an early age, and they don’t want the policies in this bill to spread to other states. It’s why they lied and lobbied so hard against it. Here’s why Conservatives are winning >>> In 2022, conservative states have been dealing blow after blow to the radical Left-wing agenda. On school curriculum, election integrity, and on pro-life issues. Heritage Action activists have been doing double duty this year, blocking bad policies at the federal level, while working in the states to advance conservative policies. And once conservative policies pass in one or two states, they spread to more. It’s a chain reaction. That’s what we’ve seen with Election Integrity. In 2021, our conservative activists backed big reforms in states like Texas, Florida, and Georgia. Now in 2022, other states are picking up the ball and running with it. Now that conservatives have won big in Florida with a parental rights bill, other states will look to it as a model for what can be done. This issue is far from over, but now there's some real momentum on our side. And all of this is building momentum and a policy agenda for conservatives at the federal level too. Fellow Conservative, I know the news out of Washington can seem depressing—gridlock, executive overreach, and a Congress controlled by socialists. But the pendulum of power will swing, and when it does, conservatives in Washington will be able to draw on policy victories from the states for their agenda. I assure you that there has never been a more critical time to support Heritage Action and the conservative grassroots. The victories we’re winning today are building to even more and bigger victories in the future. But only if we put in the effort and do the hard work today... Let’s keep winning in the states and build an agenda for conservatives in Washington. Help us recruit and train more activists. Give the support needed to reach even more people. Thank you, Fellow Conservative. Jessica Anderson Executive DirectorHeritage Action for America | | | | Heritage Action for America is a 501(c)4 non-profit organization. name: Hala Ayala
subject: Why I'm running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hala For Virginia P
body:
I can't wait to have you on our team Peter!

| Hi Peter, I am so thrilled to reach out to you today with an incredible announcement! It is my greatest pleasure to tell you, my friends and longtime supporters, that I am running for the Virginia State Senate, to represent the great communities of District 33 in Prince William and Fairfax Counties. I was humbled to be your Democratic nominee for Lieutenant Governor in 2021. And before that, I was honored to serve our community for two terms as a member of the Virginia House of Delegates. As the Chief Deputy Whip, I helped lead the fight to ratify the Equal Rights Amendment, I fought to ensure that we protect an individual’s right to choose, and I was a deciding vote to expand Medicaid - giving over 500,000 Virginians access to affordable healthcare. We made so much progress in our Commonwealth in just four years, but we still have so much to do to ensure a just and prosperous future for all Virginians. Right now, so many Virginia families are feeling squeezed due to the regressive and obstructionist policies spearheaded by Republicans. This is not the time to sit on the sidelines. And that is why I have decided to run for Virginia State Senate: to tackle our biggest challenges and to get our Commonwealth moving forward. [**Can you help us kick off our campaign by donating $25 or more today? Our Commonwealth needs a leader who will bridge the divide and keep Virginia moving forward, and I intend to be that voice in Richmond. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43267698/336474619/1510701484?refcode=HASS_EM1_Launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDNhN2RlYy1hMGFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-0l8w_p2Hxik5gFuwzIvkvmD8ENgqt-RP2Nnga1JuCQ=) Our Commonwealth needs leaders who will prioritize Virginia families by protecting our healthcare, fully funding our public schools, and strengthening our economy for all. As your State Senator, I will work tirelessly to keep Virginia moving forward. [**But first, we need to win this campaign. I hope you will join me in launching our campaign with a generous $25 contribution. Thank you for your support! **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43267699/336474620/1510701484?refcode=HASS_EM1_Launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDNhN2RlYy1hMGFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-0l8w_p2Hxik5gFuwzIvkvmD8ENgqt-RP2Nnga1JuCQ=) Thank you, Peter,

****

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Why Am I For The US Senate In Oklahoma? - Jackson Lahmeyer
body:
The Reasons I Am Running For The US Senate In Oklahoma It's been one year since I made the decision to run for the US Senate in Oklahoma to challenge
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5469727.4647.1.87750d3bf0da66ea172153dad75d282b) |
---
## The Reasons I Am Running For The US Senate In Oklahoma
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5469727.4648.1.70c034568575d87b9a0621889c6a49d0)
---
It's been one year since I made the decision to run for the US Senate in Oklahoma to challenge and replace [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5469727.4649.1.1c2cd87b9c37f288af9751b7931c4e68).
I had _no idea_ what I was jumping into. Running for a statewide political office was not in the plan.
I love being the Pastor of [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5469727.4650.1.6baf86aa752e1269e9adae3a2be9e84d) in Tulsa, OK as well as running the business that my wife, Kendra, and I oversee. However, I am beyond glad that I made the decision to run for the US Senate.
I get asked quite often, "_Why are you running_?"
**I am running to finish President Trump's border wall.**
[James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5469727.4651.1.73ac05a2f6e1d453d5b1a1f34e1fe4d1) mocked President Trump's border wall.
**I am running against Joe Boden's socialist agenda.**
[James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5469727.4652.1.3cd0d98ad7e29718528d9695c47eff8c) votes with the Biden Administration over 51% of the time.
**I am running to defend the Second Amendment.**
[James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5469727.4653.1.f8e7843e236052ed692e37589eaaa5ce) has an "F rating" from Gun Owners of America.
**I am running against the radical Left's cancel culture.**
[James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5469727.4654.1.4c5cf23b26340bbe26df061eb65f6356) caved to the radical Left and proposed renaming our military bases.
**I am running to investigate the 2020 election.**
[James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5469727.4655.1.7a05beaa02f64bc59189d3ab7f3de82f) voted to certify the 2020 election.
**I am running to put AMERICA FIRST!**
▪ Jackson Lahmeyer
▪ | Jackson Lahmeyer
---|---
Follow me on [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5469727.4656.1.1788baa7e0aef1853eb2f874458c6f06), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5469727.4657.1.af6aefa273e0740db16a035aaee56731), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5469727.4658.1.2c60f3761e29294928b05c975e22117a), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5469727.4659.1.18bf16af300a375c9cff72376065a0f3), TruthSocial, GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5469727.4660.1.48c6480f6e7f1ecfdada68294865e074)).
| | [ Support The America First Agenda ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5469727.4661.1.69d32483978077a66b69cdbdfc5cb1bc)
---
---
## Meet Eric Trump, General Flynn and others...
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5469727.4662.1.d026c11310a843096cdb11e1b34fe70b)
---
We have **exciting news** to share:
We have a drawing for a **FREE** round trip to attend any one of the **ReAwaken America Tour** stops.
This trip includes a **VIP Ticket** to hear and potentially meet **Eric Trump** , **General Flynn** , **Roger Stone** , **Mike Lindell** and others. As well as **flight and hotel** to whichever city you choose.
Options:
May 13-14: Myrtle Beach, SC
July 8-9: Virgina Beach, VA
To enter into the drawing all you have to do is **make a donation of $25 or more** to the [#LahmeyerForSenate](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5469727.4663.1.9e4acbb3b74320045ff06f9c22222e3f) campaign between March 1 through March 31.
For every $25 donated during the month of march that will result in one new entry into the drawing for the FREE ReAwaken America trip.
You can enter into the drawing by visiting [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/donate](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5469727.4664.1.21fc8d4038dea3b02845b1b96ee518f8)
Winner will be announced on April 2, 2022
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5469727.4665.1.15fc22a8e11522a609ce7d1ade448857)
---
---

©2022 Lahmeyer For Senate INC. | 3939 S Harvard Ave #140 Tulsa, OK 74135
---

name: Glenn Beck
subject: Emergency request for Ukraine:
body:
When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous. Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6742%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=j3mxW7m3usVqTTTEDJ4m2w&sysid=1)
| | | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69477%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YwXfgWi89JxszGhU549K0Q&sysid=1)
---
|
---
Friend,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine - and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69478%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WEuO4WYo5lMQm9PRDLkT7Q&sysid=1)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69470%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9HWsX4SIcsSL%2bny54JOnfg&sysid=1)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69471%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DtPX5ZPVPk0HJ%2bBdktsNAQ&sysid=1)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69470%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9HWsX4SIcsSL%2bny54JOnfg&sysid=1)
