body:
| |
---
| | | **ATTN: Your Republican Membership has EXPIRED**
For the last **2 years** , you have consistently stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen, **but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to have to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though. I spoke with leadership about this special circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59919482:Jd41Pko_N:m:1:3299561967:6FD90E7B46A650F17445558013970AFB:r "11:59 PM
TONIGHT.")**

**[Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustaining Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59919482:Jd41Pko_N:m:1:3299561967:6FD90E7B46A650F17445558013970AFB:r "Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustain Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the
Left and you are going to let your streak fade away? ")**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59919482:Jd41Pko_N:m:1:3299561967:6FD90E7B46A650F17445558013970AFB:r "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59919482:Jd41Pko_N:m:1:3299561967:6FD90E7B46A650F17445558013970AFB:r)
---

**The Democrats raised over $130 MILLION last year alone.** We're already behind, but with your help, we can close the gap, and take back the Conservative Majority in Congress.

Hello,
We’ll cut straight to it: [**We’re about to ask if you can make a donation to help Admiral Mike Franken defeat Chuck Grassley before his first end-of-quarter FEC deadline of the year at midnight on March 31st.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43269498/336481483/-42398318?refcode=em20220323am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjIxYzEyZC1hOWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U4X4OdO1qdmhll6p5dOjun0UyATFmiWMRem26zlE4l0=)
But first, can you give us a minute to explain why this deadline in particular is so important?
After March 31st, federal law requires Mike’s campaign against Grassley to pull together a report of how much we’ve raised and how many people have donated. That report then becomes _public_.
Reporters and political pundits will dig into the report, and they’ll use the numbers they find to judge the size and the strength of our people-powered campaign. **But it’s not just reporters who will be scrutinizing our FEC report.**
Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are going to be pouring over our numbers to see if Chuck Grassley is in as much danger as the latest polls show he is. The national Democratic party, the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC), and other progressive and advocacy groups are going to be looking to see if there is enough grassroots support that they should start prioritizing Mike’s campaign and Iowa’s critical Senate race as well.
And this is the _last chance_ for grassroots donors like you to show Admiral Mike Franken that you are 100% in and behind him to help him defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue this November.
We’re about to be under a microscope like we’ve never been before, so we need a show of financial strength unlike any we’ve ever had.
That’s why we’ve set our largest goal ever: **Raising another $1,000,000 from grassroots donors before this first FEC deadline to show reporters, Mitch McConnell, his Republican Super PACs, and the entire Democratic establishment that we’re all-in to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue.**
It’s a big goal, but that’s how important things are accomplished: By setting big goals and working together to hit them. **We’re so close to hitting this goal, and with your support now, we’ll be able to show everyone the strength of our campaign and help Admiral Mike Franken defeat Chuck Grassley this November.**
Mike Franken isn’t taking money from corporate PACs or special interests like Chuck Grassley is. Instead, he’s building a people-powered campaign funded by grassroots donors like you. People from all over the country who read emails like this one and give what they can, when they can.
[**Please, if you are able to, will you click here right now and give whatever you can afford to before Mike’s first end-of-quarter FEC deadline of the year at midnight March 31st to help him hit this huge goal and defeat Chuck Grassley? Every dollar you give now will go directly to Mike Franken’s campaign to turn Iowa blue and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43269502/336481489/-42398318?refcode=em20220323am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjIxYzEyZC1hOWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U4X4OdO1qdmhll6p5dOjun0UyATFmiWMRem26zlE4l0=)

name: Fair Fight Action
subject: Are you still in this fight?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
Last week, Georgia Republicans passed another restrictive anti-voter bill based on the same lies and conspiracies of voter fraud from previous elections.
Fair Fight |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43270017/336484068/1793776944?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTMwMjNlMS1hOWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pkE-Tpn7vPdcFqlgfJCpVdsapaYgQPHWwmozvHbkwnM=&emci=750fc6f8-9daa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=613023e1-a9aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1037277)

| | Friend, Last week, Georgia House Republicans passed another restrictive anti-voter bill based on the same lies and conspiracies of voter fraud from previous elections. The new Republican-backed **House Bill 1464 doubles-down on anti-voter tactics that limit the ability of voters—particularly voters of color—to cast their ballot.** With the bill now being heard in the Senate Ethics Committee, time is running out to stop this harmful legislation before it gets to Kemp’s desk.
* After SB 202 already limited vote-by-mail options, HB 1464 would limit basic, requisite requirements for voting machines in polling places.
* Only two years after Georgians waited in excruciating 8-hour lines, these changes could dramatically worsen wait times—making it even harder for voters to easily cast their ballot—by removing requirements for adequate voting machines.
* This legislation also risks intimidating voters and election workers, giving the Georgia Bureau of Investigation sweeping new authority that will not help make our elections safer.

[**Would you donate $10, $25 or $50 today to help us fight other anti-voter bills, such as HB 1464, from passing in other states around the country?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43270018/336484069/402066511?refcode=321email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTMwMjNlMS1hOWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pkE-Tpn7vPdcFqlgfJCpVdsapaYgQPHWwmozvHbkwnM=) These new HB 1464 provisions are on top of 2021’s SB202, which limited ballot drop boxes, required more voter ID for absentee voting and allowed state takeovers of county election offices. Instead of giving counties the resources they need, Republicans are rushing through a bill to appease conspiracy theorists, dramatically undermining confidence in our elections while doing nothing to make them more secure. Because of you, Fair Fight Action has mitigated or blocked some of Georgia’s worst anti-voter bills. And thanks to your help, we made SB 202 less harmful by protecting early and weekend voting, voting by mail, automatic voter registration, and repealing discriminatory signature match. [**Now, we’re asking for your help again. Are you still in this fight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43270019/336484070/402066511?refcode=321email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTMwMjNlMS1hOWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pkE-Tpn7vPdcFqlgfJCpVdsapaYgQPHWwmozvHbkwnM=) In solidarity, Team Fair Fight Action |
---|---|---

clean_body: Last week, Georgia Republicans passed another restrictive anti-voter bill based on the same lies and conspiracies of voter fraud from previous elections. Fair Fight | | | Friend, Last week, Georgia House Republicans passed another restrictive anti-voter bill based on the same lies and conspiracies of voter fraud from previous elections. The new Republican-backed House Bill 1464 doubles-down on anti-voter tactics that limit the ability of voters—particularly voters of color—to cast their ballot. With the bill now being heard in the Senate Ethics Committee, time is running out to stop this harmful legislation before it gets to Kemp’s desk. After SB 202 already limited vote-by-mail options, HB 1464 would limit basic, requisite requirements for voting machines in polling places. Only two years after Georgians waited in excruciating 8-hour lines, these changes could dramatically worsen wait times—making it even harder for voters to easily cast their ballot—by removing requirements for adequate voting machines. * This legislation also risks intimidating voters and election workers, giving the Georgia Bureau of Investigation sweeping new authority that will not help make our elections safer. = These new HB 1464 provisions are on top of 2021’s SB202, which limited ballot drop boxes, required more voter ID for absentee voting and allowed state takeovers of county election offices. Instead of giving counties the resources they need, Republicans are rushing through a bill to appease conspiracy theorists, dramatically undermining confidence in our elections while doing nothing to make them more secure. Because of you, Fair Fight Action has mitigated or blocked some of Georgia’s worst anti-voter bills. And thanks to your help, we made SB 202 less harmful by protecting early and weekend voting, voting by mail, automatic voter registration, and repealing discriminatory signature match. = In solidarity, Team Fair Fight Action | ---|---|--- | 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-430 Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2021 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. Contributions to Fair Fight Action are not tax-deductible. | | Paid for by Fair Fight Action

Friend,

I want you to hear this directly from me: I cannot win in Florida without you. **And right now, as I'm coming up short of my fundraising goal, I have nowhere else to turn. **
A poll of my race shows the numbers are close (I'm just 2 points behind Marco Rubio!). I need to surge _ahead_ , friend – _ _ and the only way to do it is by hitting my $25,000 grassroots fundraising goal. Missing this goal isn't an option.
Running a campaign in Florida is expensive – and Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 points (_10,033 votes_), so every dollar will make a difference. With Marco Rubio and the Senate Republican campaign arm pulling in a combined $32 million last quarter, **missing my goal could cost Floridians and our country a meaningful win.**
Grassroots supporters like you propelled my campaign launch to historic heights. _Your_ support fueled The Cook Political Report to increase my odds of winning. And this grassroots team is the reason political pundits across the board are saying I have what it takes to defeat Sen. Marco Rubio.
So, friend, here I am, writing to you again. I know you hear a lot from me, but it's only because I _trust_ you and _believe_ that I can't do this without you. Please, if you can spare any donation before midnight to close our fundraising gap, it would mean the world to me.

Val Demings

_And there’s no doubt about it: if I lose this $2.7 BILLION lawsuit, I will be _ruined_. _

Thanks to the generosity of patriots like you, I’ve overcome every single thing the Deep State has thrown at me.

---
**And despite the ongoing attacks and harassment I’ve been subjected to, our opponents have not been able to find a SINGLE crime to charge me with.**

body:
You’ve been such an important part of our mission to take back the House, and President Trump has noticed.

Fellow American, You’ve been such an important part of our mission to take back the House, and President Trump has noticed.

**[Enter today to win a once in a lifetime trip to Mar-a-Lago to meet President Trump!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4ng3499eitpt7cn7ua0v4jqon0u7f0kgjlmvq5o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1gm0ob2cth2bs)** [**ENTER NOW >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z21rs91m5502e6sh9q1g390iirhkc8d7i0ii49i8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1gm0ob2cth2bs) In Service, [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbbi083l1tgas496a7vnp0ogdbk94bffkoo612k0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1gm0ob2cth2bs) Col. Special Forces Green Beret

subject: President Trump doesn’t stop winning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| | | | | | Peter,

_**Wow. President Trump wins and wins.**_
The 45th President of the United States, Donald J. Trump, did it _again._
President Trump's brand new _**Social Media Platform TRUTH Social**_ is an instant hit. Over one million patriots have signed up, and TRUTH Social secured a _**staggering $1 BILLION investment.**_ The Left could not be more upset.
**Peter,** we need you to step up and join the fight to restore Trump's Majority.
Our team commissioned an _**exclusive Trump Social Media poll,**_ and we specifically reached out to YOU because we only rely on our top America First patriots.
_So, we just have to know, Peter, are you going to join President Trump 's BRAND NEW SOCIAL MEDIA site, or do you **LIKE being censored? **_
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59917863:6Sm8fkoNK:m:1:3317145305:9DEF9871C8BC5A46159A224AF75C6EDA:r)
Our LIVE **Trump Social Media Poll** is only active for a few more minutes, Peter. We really want to get as many responses as possible to show the Left that the American people still support OUR President.

name: Ron Johnson
subject: Just your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion.
|
---
| | | Peter,

I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children's future.

Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn't good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama's extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014.

As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama's administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort.

By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration.

During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife's--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats' complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future.

Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government's failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans' lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart.

As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations.

President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.

I believe America is in peril. Much as I'd like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don't feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don't want you to hear.

In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn't your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven't made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don't expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail.

Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win.

So I will humbly ask, Peter, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA.
---
| | | [ENDORSE RON JOHNSON](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59918343:69XyfkoNn:m:1:3253819041:0C07FECF6EE0F66F5B3C69A577610167:r "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON")
---
Thank you,
Ron Johnson
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59918344:69XyfkoNn:m:1:3253819041:0C07FECF6EE0F66F5B3C69A577610167:r "RonJon Announcement")
---
| Peter, It's Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59918344:69XyfkoNn:m:1:3253819041:0C07FECF6EE0F66F5B3C69A577610167:r "Please click here to donate now")**
---

Peter,

We must stop paying out of pocket for the radical left's pipe dreams.. While the federal government and state governments across the country continue to raise taxes on the people they represent to pay for their failing spending programs and policies, I joined a number of freedom fighting legislators in New Hampshire to lower taxes for hardworking families and small business owners. I voted in favor of $8 million worth of tax cuts to put more money in the pockets of New Hampshirites. I was one of 99 legislators to vote against the leadership of both parties and support cutting taxes for small businesses. I supported reducing the business profits tax rate from 7.6% to 7.5% and the business enterprise tax from 0.55% to 0.50%. I was one of 100 legislators who voted against using taxpayer money to further expand Medicaid in New Hampshire. I voted AGAINST using taxpayer funds to pay for a commuter rail from Boston to southern New Hampshire. I'm running for Congress because Washington has a spending problem. My record proves that I'm willing to stand up for the people I represent against those who want drain our savings accounts for their own personal and political gain. subject: we need to talk, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Can we talk about something important?
| | |
---
**Hey, sorry to bother you — can we talk about something important?**
1\. The GOP only needs to flip _one_ seat to take back the Senate, and they've got their sights set on Maggie's, funneling MILLIONS into attack ads against her.

2\. _The New York Times_ is reporting that Maggie is one of the most vulnerable Democrats up for reelection this year. **If Maggie loses, we will lose the Senate. **

3\. If we're going to fight against GOP attacks and reelect Maggie, we cannot fall short of our fundraising goals. If we do, it could invite more GOP dark money into this race — **and that could be the difference between winning and losing in November.**
The future of the Democratic Senate majority — and all the progress we've made — is on the line in New Hampshire. **And with a recent poll showing Maggie statistically tied with her GOP opponent, we can't afford to miss a single fundraising goal. We're counting on you to get us back on track now.**
**[_Please, friend, will you give $5 or more right now to help us get back on track to fight back against McConnell and the GOP? name: Glenn Beck
subject: Emergency request for Ukraine:
body:
When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous. Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentime
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zql2t9juftts29a342gbdhqbgogpltucv1qc7gh8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1gm2o36chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t3jeoo69p3ledq7ctj6e1r7bcjledr6as76e2qr7cpme1qn4sr1c1qbao5h6pgefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup30pjkcsqr4ptmcdj31c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhnk6tuilrok8dbugme7o8qie7mkdc71mn7htpr0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1gm2o36chh2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3e8coddj8ja518jtb115ao53osm95n9s76p3jgg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1gm2o36chh2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf31bc92npntajtgb05pi66fu8iek2gueq4gbfvg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1gm2o36chh2bs)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5k8rahrb8rrbmec39i7kmssdlpoctivv1n1psd0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1gm2o36chh2bs)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ziqn1m56irigv5r40gd3bjk8thos0rke5ohorito_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1gm2o36chh2bs)

The 45th President of the United States, Donald J. Trump, did it _again._

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Another Sellout
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
Fellow Conservative:

They did it again.
Democrats needed Republican votes to fund the government. Senate Republican leaders had the leverage to fight for real reforms - building a border wall, boosting U.S. energy production, defunding unconstitutional vaccine mandates.
And what did they do? Nothing.
Mitch McConnell and his lackeys not only worked with Democrats to pass the $1.5 trillion bill. They brought back earmarks, too - 4,000 of them! As usual, establishment Republicans sold out their principles, their constituents, and our children.
What did we get? More spending, more debt, and more fuel to the inflation fire.
You and I both know that these outrageous Senate votes will not change until the Senators do.
Let's dump the Senate establishment to save America!
The Senate Conservatives Fund (SCF) is committed to creating a conservative majority in the U.S. Senate. No more corporate cronies! No more party hacks! No more McConnell lapdogs!
In 2022, we can stop the Washington Mono-Party by electing true conservatives to Senate seats across the country:

MO BROOKS in Alabama;
JOSH MANDEL in Ohio;
TED BUDD in North Carolina;
ADAM LAXALT in Nevada; and
Senators MIKE LEE, RAND PAUL, and RON JOHNSON.

Fighting, principled conservatives like them - joining America First leaders like Ted Cruz, Josh Hawley, and others - can change the Senate, Washington, and America.
SCF exists to leverage activist energy around the country and concentrates it on the most critical Senate races every cycle. This year, these races will determine not only whether the Senate goes Republican or Democrat but whether it will even matter.
Help us stop the endless Senate Sellouts by supporting SCF and our priority candidates today!
You can donate directly to multiple candidates with one transaction, and SCF will pay all processing fees so those candidates can spend 100% of your contributions on voter contact.
If moderate Republicans take these seats, conservatives will be left on the outside looking in, regardless of which party wins the majority. Only by nominating and electing tough, tenacious patriots will they have a chance to take on the Swamp next year.
Let's make this latest sellout the last one we ever see.
Thank you for considering this important request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,

Matt Hoskins
Senior Advisor
Senate Conservatives Fund

 

PRIORITY SENATE CANDIDATES

END OF THE MONTH
COUNTDOWN

 

 

DONATE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003

 

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the name, mailing address, occupation and
employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

 

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM

| All we need is for you to bring this same type of energy in the final days leading up to the Primary Election. Our support on the ground keeps on growing, but that only puts a larger target on my back.
It's crunch time, and we need all hands on deck.
I'm simply asking that you help me, help you! I am one of you, unlike some of the others in this race who have used their fortunes to get ahead. I know the issues that are important to Pennsylvanians, and how the politics of D.C. hurt the wallets of the hardworking people of this state.

subject: Dinner Update

body:
---
| | | Patriot,

Are you really turning down the chance of a lifetime to have dinner with President Trump? We're SHOCKED!

We thought you were a top supporter of President Trump and House Conservatives, but our records show you _**DECLINED your chance to have dinner in Dallas with President Trump. **_

You MUST correct the record now, or we will offer your spot to the next Patriot on our list!
* * *
** SUPPORTER: _[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59921031:JwnTnkoBN:m:1:3299561967:C881A97BFF1BCDE17F187F9D5383EB89:r "dpwillis67@gmail.com")_
RSVP: DECLINED**
* * *
_**[RSVP NOW to enter to win a trip of a lifetime that includes travel arrangements, a hotel stay, and dinner with the President himself!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59921031:JwnTnkoBN:m:1:3299561967:C881A97BFF1BCDE17F187F9D5383EB89:r "RSVP NOW to enter
to win a trip of a lifetime that includes travel arrangements, a hotel stay, and dinner with the President himself!")**_

Thank you,

Trump Dinner Reservations

---
| |
* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59921032:JwnTnkoBN:m:1:3299561967:C881A97BFF1BCDE17F187F9D5383EB89:r "Red Wave Image
Link")

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59921032:JwnTnkoBN:m:1:3299561967:C881A97BFF1BCDE17F187F9D5383EB89:r "Can we count on you to step up?")** ****************

---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

---

To enter by making a contribution use this form. Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Wednesday, March 9th, 2022 at 12:00 am Eastern Time and ends on Sunday, May 1st, 2022 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time. All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on Sunday, May 1st, 2022. One winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) tickets to the May 9th NRCC 2022 Majority Dinner; transportation for two (2), made at the discretion of the NRCC, within the continental United States to event location and from winners home location, with an approximate retail value of $1,500; one (1) one-night hotel stay at a Dallas, Texas hotel, with an approximate retail value of $500. The total approximate retail value of the prize is $2,500. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Team, since Wes launched his campaign for governor last June, he’s amassed an incredible number of endorsements from trusted leaders and organizations across the state. In fact, did you know **Wes has been endorsed by more members of the Maryland General Assembly than any other candidate?** It’s true! Plus, last week, **Wes joined the likes of Stacey Abrams and Rev. Raphael Warnock when he was endorsed by Collective PAC,** the largest organization dedicated to electing Black leadership in the country. name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Reminder: The reviews are in -- Geoff Diehl and Leah Cole Allen are a winning Republican ticket!
body:
| | | |
---
| Dear Friend,
Our campaign has been getting lots of positive attention for yesterday's announcement by Leah Cole Allen that she will be my running mate.
Boston Herald reporter Meghan Ottolini has full coverage in today's paper:
---
|
---
| |
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DP8TjEHmYl6C8zTUZOgHiPB3PmzzJ64-73sMgPaYKJBcXoGVE3a5fA1zsr64jCPnSjA5vQSTclLi6BfsPnrbihKe3QbuOVbTvgtiQUuHQ3kVWEzGZLR47BYNGso1UDPtn27kGI-42u-4jwD2B8-HZRNLBUPZSArKwo5Ctv8iIZVPrQgFg9yXtnMG2dHzTA8ugpzMFmC9Jzuczrw6urx8_4KYTDmG1EL-7NHqmLTU4LK1dfrpMGRUx91QfEH7xgWa&c=h4Yv2jWm0O3LVe61okHCqwGeQJFTcQCwt1I72YMjcJ_AJeN7LfzJXw==&ch=_5jpL4iIeOEau91N2sLIcHrlNI8ES4BTJLklC7wkUs6rZ6G-9QSSug==)
---
| |
---
|
---
| Why is Leah running for Lieutenant Governor, and why is she supporting me for Governor? She summed it up pretty well herself yesterday:

* She believes we are the best choice to protect your liberty. "Personal freedoms, autonomy, standing against the vaccine mandate. I was proud to join [Geoff Diehl] on that," she said.

* She's a leader in the fight against inflation and high taxes. "I believe every tax cut is a pay raise," she said.

---
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DP8TjEHmYl6C8zTUZOgHiPB3PmzzJ64-73sMgPaYKJBcXoGVE3a5fKZ8AzatCm-zVozmJUUUC-J0yTVRufRS48caIovoeplOn4uWT891bnlS_bIlSuaGVmrr3mY5s9e0F85kt-v9IbKRPBIPEHScnw==&c=h4Yv2jWm0O3LVe61okHCqwGeQJFTcQCwt1I72YMjcJ_AJeN7LfzJXw==&ch=_5jpL4iIeOEau91N2sLIcHrlNI8ES4BTJLklC7wkUs6rZ6G-9QSSug==)
---
| | [Visit Leah's Website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DP8TjEHmYl6C8zTUZOgHiPB3PmzzJ64-73sMgPaYKJBcXoGVE3a5fKZ8AzatCm-z6oVM6iWHSxRZMrFiI7qPk9g0k969bssktnIfaJMIzMDL0DnKzfdPUEWJI4BzJMjlEq_8IrARQvFej_VEPhQd1w==&c=h4Yv2jWm0O3LVe61okHCqwGeQJFTcQCwt1I72YMjcJ_AJeN7LfzJXw==&ch=_5jpL4iIeOEau91N2sLIcHrlNI8ES4BTJLklC7wkUs6rZ6G-9QSSug==)
---
| | [Leah's Facebook Page](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DP8TjEHmYl6C8zTUZOgHiPB3PmzzJ64-73sMgPaYKJBcXoGVE3a5fKZ8AzatCm-zxXV2DXO4uhfOM8JHtiFvQmE9ZlC8JQv_K6tRB5diVLEgiutFaDF9tUA1_tZjmovq4xlgC_rKEpiAsvybQplZzA0imeSa5v5fI3h1FCn1TvY=&c=h4Yv2jWm0O3LVe61okHCqwGeQJFTcQCwt1I72YMjcJ_AJeN7LfzJXw==&ch=_5jpL4iIeOEau91N2sLIcHrlNI8ES4BTJLklC7wkUs6rZ6G-9QSSug==)
---
|
---
| I am proud to have Leah as part of our team, and I value her partnership in this campaign. We intend to earn your vote and to serve you with pride and integrity.
Thank you for your support.
Sincerely,
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---

name: Rep. Val Demings
subject: This email is quite personal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I hope you'll give it a read
| | |
---
Friend: This is a longer and especially important email about why I'm running for Senate. It's important for me to share my story with you and why this campaign means so much to me. I hope you'll give it a read.
I was raised in Jacksonville, Florida – and I've got to say, when you grow up in the South poor, Black and female, you've _got_ to have faith. It's something I learned from my parents. Mom was a maid, Dad was a janitor, and my goodness they worked _hard._ And although we didn't have a lot of money – although life was tough sometimes – we had each other. We had love. We had _faith. _I've carried that spirit with me my entire career.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43283939/336533390/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2718-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2IxNGJhMy1iYWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=omD0IZRyEt09bjlZWgKufgOIJQ0vMB31v-m-WAXmREo=)
That faith that things can get better, that we can do some good in the world, inspired me to get into public service. In fact, my mom used to say to me, "Never grow tired of doing good, Val – _never_ tire." And so for me, growing tired was never an option. It's what pushed me to become the first in my family to graduate college. It's also what pushed me to serve 27 years in the Orlando Police Department, where eventually I became the first woman to lead the department. And it pushed me to run for Congress and represent my community.
**[I will never tire of the opportunities to do good or the challenges to tackle before me, and I'm asking you to do the same. Pitch in a contribution of $5 or more now to help me defeat Marco Rubio, win in Florida and defend our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43283941/336533396/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2718-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2IxNGJhMy1iYWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=omD0IZRyEt09bjlZWgKufgOIJQ0vMB31v-m-WAXmREo=)**
_Never tire._ These are the words that resonate in my mind each and every day that I serve the people of Florida's 10th District in Congress. They've stuck with me as I've fought to put an end to gun violence, especially as the horror of that violence struck our district at Pulse Nightclub in Orlando. We mourned, deeply. But we resolved to fight for change, to never tire – and I won't stop until long-overdue action on gun violence is finally realized.
_Never tire,_ I said to myself as I took on a habitual offender who occupied the most powerful office in the world: President Donald Trump. Unlike some in Washington, I _never tire_ of standing up for what I believe is right, and I carried that with me as I fought to impeach him, because no one is above the law.
This is my story, friend: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the '60s, have a story so filled with opportunities like these. Now, I'm ready to meet a new moment, to do more good for Floridians.** ****I am ready to be the next U.S. senator for Florida – and together, with you never tiring alongside me, I know we can win.**
[**So I need your support, friend. This campaign is a battle of many things, and an unfortunate reality among them is** _resources._**The Republican Party is already proving they will spend whatever it takes to protect Marco Rubio, so if you're with me, if you want to elect Florida's first Black senator and defend our majority in the Senate, please donate $5 or whatever you can right now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43283944/336533398/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2718-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2IxNGJhMy1iYWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=omD0IZRyEt09bjlZWgKufgOIJQ0vMB31v-m-WAXmREo=)
Thank you for being in this with me. _Never tire._

Val Demings
| | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, **[click here if you’re on mobile](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43283948/336533400/1417698435?refcode=jtk2718-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2IxNGJhMy1iYWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=omD0IZRyEt09bjlZWgKufgOIJQ0vMB31v-m-WAXmREo=&emci=0e0b195b-29a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=a7b14ba3-baaa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100) or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates.**

clean_body: I hope you'll give it a read | | | Friend: This is a longer and especially important email about why I'm running for Senate. It's important for me to share my story with you and why this campaign means so much to me. I hope you'll give it a read. I was raised in Jacksonville, Florida – and I've got to say, when you grow up in the South poor, Black and female, you've got to have faith. It's something I learned from my parents. Mom was a maid, Dad was a janitor, and my goodness they worked hard. And although we didn't have a lot of money – although life was tough sometimes – we had each other. We had love. We had faith. I've carried that spirit with me my entire career. = That faith that things can get better, that we can do some good in the world, inspired me to get into public service. In fact, my mom used to say to me, "Never grow tired of doing good, Val – never tire." And so for me, growing tired was never an option. It's what pushed me to become the first in my family to graduate college. It's also what pushed me to serve 27 years in the Orlando Police Department, where eventually I became the first woman to lead the department. And it pushed me to run for Congress and represent my community. = Never tire. These are the words that resonate in my mind each and every day that I serve the people of Florida's 10th District in Congress. They've stuck with me as I've fought to put an end to gun violence, especially as the horror of that violence struck our district at Pulse Nightclub in Orlando. We mourned, deeply. But we resolved to fight for change, to never tire – and I won't stop until long-overdue action on gun violence is finally realized. Never tire, I said to myself as I took on a habitual offender who occupied the most powerful office in the world: President Donald Trump. Unlike some in Washington, I never tire of standing up for what I believe is right, and I carried that with me as I fought to impeach him, because no one is above the law. This is my story, friend: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the '60s, have a story so filled with opportunities like these. Now, I'm ready to meet a new moment, to do more good for Floridians. I am ready to be the next U.S. senator for Florida – and together, with you never tiring alongside me, I know we can win. = Thank you for being in this with me. Never tire. Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. You can also click here to or click here to . Val Demings for U.S. Senate P. O. Box 536926 Orlando, FL 32853 United States Paid for by Val Demings for U.S. Senate

subject: Protecting Girls in Sports
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY DR
body:
Don't sacrifice their opportunity | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen.com/protecting-girls-in-sports?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

Our campaign has led on the issues: from protecting personal freedoms, to parental rights, to educational freedom. We will continue to lead when hard conversations must be had. That's my promise to you if I'm your next governor. There's been a crisis of leadership and we cannot have politicians who put their fingers in the air to determine what the right path is.

The latest assault based on political correctness is on our female athletes. As your Governor and with Matt Birk as your Lt. Governor, our administration will do everything in our power to make sure biological men cannot participate in female athletics. This does not mean we are not compassionate toward transgender individuals. It warrants a REAL conversation. **Please watch our message on the issue by clicking the thumbnail below:**
---
| [ ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=1f78b71421&e=33b11688c1)
---
| I have compassion for transgender people, but biologic men should not be able to compete in sports with women. We are sacrificing opportunities for our young girls at the altar of politics. Minnesota will be a state that protects female athletes if I'm governor. We will continue to lead on the issues, no matter how difficult the conversation.

In Freedom,
Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Governor

There's been a crisis of leadership and we cannot have politicians who put their fingers in the air to determine what the right path is. The latest assault based on political correctness is on our female athletes. As your Governor and with Matt Birk as your Lt. Governor, our administration will do everything in our power to make sure biological men cannot participate in female athletics. This does not mean we are not compassionate toward transgender individuals. It warrants a REAL conversation. Please watch our message on the issue by clicking the thumbnail below: | | I have compassion for transgender people, but biologic men should not be able to compete in sports with women. We are sacrificing opportunities for our young girls at the altar of politics. Minnesota will be a state that protects female athletes if I'm governor. We will continue to lead on the issues, no matter how difficult the conversation. In Freedom, Dr. Scott Jensen Republican Candidate for Governor | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Dr Scott Jensen for Governor, All rights reserved. PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY DR. SCOTT JENSEN FOR GOVERNOR.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ozzie=20Gonzalez?=
subject: FW: Win Dinner with Joe Kent
body:
Dear Supporter,

Did you see the email below? We're eager to meet the lucky winner of the contest to get dinner with Joe and attend one of our rallies in the district.

By participating in this contest, you'll help us meet our end of the quarter fundraising goal.

Our opponent, Jaime Herrera Beutler, is raising millions from corporate interests in DC at chummy fundraising events while refusing to do any in-person town halls with the people she's supposed to represent. We're counting on you to help us even the playing field.

You can help us defeat her and also win a free trip out to Washington State where you'll have dinner with Joe Kent and attend one of our rallies by making a contribution today at https://www.joekentforcongress.com/contest.

Good luck and God Bless,

Ozzie Gonzalez
Campaign Manager
Joe Kent for Congress

-----Original Message-----
From: Joe Kent <joe@joekentforcongress.com>
Sent: Saturday, March 19, 2022 5:11 PM
Subject: Win Dinner with Joe Kent

Dear Supporter,

The quarterly deadline is coming up at the end of the month and we need every contribution we can get to help us overcome the millions of dollars my RINO, Trump-Impeaching opponent Jaime Herrera Beutler is collecting from corporate lobbyists.

To help us meet our goals, we're offering you the chance to win dinner with me in Washington State. We will fly the contest winner out to my district where you'll join me for a meal and then attend one of our campaign rallies. We provide all necessary accommodations, too.

To enter, please donate whatever you can afford by March 31st at https://www.joekentforcongress.com/contest.

Thank you and I look forward to meeting the winner as we get closer to victory!

Respectfully,

Joe Kent

PS - Enter today to win a trip to Washington State to have dinner with me and attend a campaign rally. Donate what you can at https://www.joekentforcongress.com/contest for a chance to win.

==============================================

body:

| [ ](https://www.electrepublicans.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYkhf8Ah1OEOdLEYEQfbD4X2z6CxkGYMsGXWPvR6tV5n1dskfpybIcjb4ureEokbCuw_Ej8EJ0zDy8NmGlJ21BgCLQAVsLAbOT4iqrOxdRtqWEjqt5ZlF6Me1OSuj9qN5ovvDusxrkoBign6spsuun4Djkw6ffqYA0wSSaGkTH5_u8Gx6TCxIICG6TfLxvrUXa-iKqP6iFf2u80oNChNiphwr9xgJvAEMN1FqVjVn_4UkjE7CLSx6c3IKMxdsGTIyh34ykxFbrMe1XTcKWz8Jpm3t1rS4pVmUid1g9dSF-Urz2_4MJFjmIMb2LEUkmG2Ch3_rQspE15DQNCp1ILuV1pB4yK_wKvQXfwzKkOcHiyl4&e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=665978305292723708&n=1) [**DO YOU MISS MELANIA TRUMP??**](https://www.electrepublicans.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYkhf8Ah1OEOdLEYEQfbD4X2z6CxkGYMsGXWPvR6tV5n1dskfpybIcjb4ureEokbCu2SnYgf5rbhfCzSau3vJwK3WxTRj3qc7zVcWA0Y-mS2WWsm0oX04c-lTptGdrVZ7yGKSAXg__WwKGyKcswTsMx-HCHiGxNJwkYTNxm8Pxki6sfN4AFS2teaSOTJv_Z9JoBZXZBpfgFdaYRPmK9bNBuI15NoCBwytsln24GZ40yB-e4QObWKCBT6aBj8pgxbwYwIzdt-tD1OCMuq6lXiMppRTmKGPxoGQgL8c_8KTW94hslgnS9AGA3FryjW-_V9qQlSFriTN4NbRsDdxQybJ_cd6MrCJ-pB_nuut7xZB9v-A&e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=665978305292723708&n=2) Peter, Melania Trump was an _**absolutely amazing**_ First Lady. It’s such a shame to see how the media mistreated her at every turn! subject: This is absurd…
body:
[](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyauylt-bjututkitk-r/) Friends,Politicians in the swamp are currently tripping over themselves to prove who loves Ukraine more. And, they're sending billions of our taxpayer dollars overseas just to show it.Case in point: they are apparently more concerned with securing Ukraine's border than our own southern border!**So, we want to know ...which do you think is more important: securing Ukraine's border or securing our southern border?** [](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyauylt-bjututkitk-y/) The priorities of politicians in the swamp are clearly not the priorities of the American people. That's why we _NEED_ you to fill out this survey to provide concrete numbers to refute their backwards goals.Can we count on you? [SHARE YOUR OPINION NOW](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyauylt-bjututkitk-j/) Thank you in advance,

name: Glenn Beck
subject: We are not powerless in the Ukraine crisis.
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWTcX9_HNm

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWTcX9_HNm

"

Friend,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes
more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and
within moments, terror and despair took over our television
screens.

Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine,
where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people
are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand
with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian
aid and medical care on the border of Ukraine - and I am reaching
out with an urgent request for your help.

As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as
large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.

The Russia hoax comes full circle

DONATE NOW

Last
year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over
$40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from
Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted
Christians.

To have
been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such
magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it
was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even
more effective in the future.

And the
future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave
people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.

So
please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis
in Ukraine

Thank you
for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn
Beck
Founder,
Mercury One

DONATE
NOW

name: Ohio Senate Update
subject: our first FEC deadline
body:
Derek,
Here are three quick things you need to know about the most competitive Senate election this year:
*
The
Wall
Street
Journal
names
Tim
Ryan
as
the
Democrats’
most
important
candidate
running
in
2022
and
CNN
ranks
the
Ohio
Senate
seat
as
one
of
the
likeliest
seats
to
flip.
*
Polls
show
Tim
neck-and-neck
with
his
GOP
opponents.
That
makes
Ohio
our
best
chance
to
flip
a
Senate
seat
blue
and
expand
the
Senate
majority
for
Democrats.
*
But
Tim
is
running
against
millionaires
backed
by
billionaires.
The
GOP
is
already
spending
$80
MILLION
to
defeat
our
campaign.
Reaching our first FEC end-of-quarter goal next week is absolutely critical to ensuring we have the resources to build a campaign that can fight back and flip this Senate seat. If you can, will you split a contribution between our campaign and CommonGood of $25 to help us meet our goal and expand the Senate? body:

name: Team Lamb
subject: What is there to discuss?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONOR LAMB FOR SENATE Conor Lamb for Senate
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43288359/336550039/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmM1M2IyMS1jNWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=swrYBR6S9MK_JRPrlZULucl87kBgDKpKr4ieJM2gVgQ=)

Friend,

You'd think a serious candidate who's running to represent Pennsylvania – in _the biggest Senate race in the country, no less_ – would be willing to show up for a debate.

**But for one of our opponents, John Fetterman, showing up for Pennsylvanians on the debate stage is a matter of discussion...**
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43288360/336550040/-993140480?refcode=em22_220323_fetterman&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmM1M2IyMS1jNWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=swrYBR6S9MK_JRPrlZULucl87kBgDKpKr4ieJM2gVgQ=)
---

**[Friend, Conor is ready to take the debate stage to stand up for Pennsylvanians and working families, and we think John Fetterman should be, too. Will you also take a stand for our communities and chip in $5 to fuel our grassroots movement?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43288361/336550041/-993140480?refcode=em22_220323_fetterman&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmM1M2IyMS1jNWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=swrYBR6S9MK_JRPrlZULucl87kBgDKpKr4ieJM2gVgQ=)**

There is too much at stake in this race to sit back or slow down. That's not how you win against the GOP – it’s certainly not how Conor flipped a district that Trump won by 19 points, and then won in another Republican district — twice.

A lot of hardworking people in Pennsylvania and across the country are counting on us to beat the Republicans in November and flip this Senate seat. They deserve a nominee who isn’t afraid to show up, say where they stand on the issues, and talk about what they’ll do to win the biggest race in the country.

Conor will keep showing up and putting in the work whether John Fetterman joins him or not, and **[we’re counting on you to support our grassroots campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43288362/336550042/-993140480?refcode=em22_220323_fetterman&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmM1M2IyMS1jNWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=swrYBR6S9MK_JRPrlZULucl87kBgDKpKr4ieJM2gVgQ=)**

Thanks for sticking with us,

Team Lamb
[MAKE A MONTHLY DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43288363/336550043/-993140480?refcode=em22_220323_fetterman&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmM1M2IyMS1jNWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=swrYBR6S9MK_JRPrlZULucl87kBgDKpKr4ieJM2gVgQ=)
[DONATE ONCE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43288364/336550044/-993140480?refcode=em22_220323_fetterman&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmM1M2IyMS1jNWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=swrYBR6S9MK_JRPrlZULucl87kBgDKpKr4ieJM2gVgQ=)

body:
TODAY at 9am, Bill McSwain will join fellow candidates to discuss issues important to the PA business community. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us5.campaign-archive.com/?e=b1ec95759b&u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=bad752bc54)

| |
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**March 23, 2022
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
|
# Watch Live: Manufacturer & Business Association Candidate Forum
_Live on PCN at 9am _ **Friend, **

Today at 9am, Bill McSwain will join the Manufacturer & Business Association for a gubernatorial candidate forum to discuss the issues most important to Pennsylvania's economy and business community.

Follow the conversation by tuning in LIVE TODAY on PCN or via PCN.com by [clicking here](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=fd7ccb571b&e=b1ec95759b).

Can't watch the livestream? Be on the lookout for videos and highlights in your inbox later this week!

Our campaign to restore Liberty to our great Commonwealth is growing every day because of supporters like you. This is only the beginning!

Yours in the fight,

Bill McSwain
_Republican Candidate for Governor
U.S. Marine Commander
U.S. Attorney appointed by Trump_

clean_body: Peter, My 11-point plan to Rescue America is making waves. Socialists are shaking in their boots. Chuck Schumer’s terrified. But proud patriots like YOU are standing alongside us. My team and I may have written this plan, but I can guarantee that it’s nothing without your support. I will never let cowards or socialists stop me from fulfilling my duty to the American people, Peter. When I came to Washington, I promised to bring conservative solutions that work for hardworking patriots like YOU. Now, it’s time to put those solutions into action. We’ve spent too long as Republicans wandering aimlessly without a plan. I want to put the pedal to the metal and GET TO WORK for the American people. Thank You, Rick Scott Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: 2022 Membership Services
subject: We need you to STAY on our team. Renew your 2022 Membership today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| |
---
| | | Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 2 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59922027:695TXkoNT:m:1:3317145305:65F18158711F6A9456CAF3B29ED5EAEB:r "RENEW MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections is the toughest battle we've seen yet. This sets the stage for what's to come for Republicans in 2024. If we fail to win back a Republican Majority in Congress, we will never take back the White House.

Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team, **[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2022 Republican Membership.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59922027:695TXkoNT:m:1:3317145305:65F18158711F6A9456CAF3B29ED5EAEB:r "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2022 Republican Membership.")**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59922027:695TXkoNT:m:1:3317145305:65F18158711F6A9456CAF3B29ED5EAEB:r "RENEW MEMBERSHIP")
---

You've fought with us for two consecutive years, and we need you to stick back our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't win this fight without you. **[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59922027:695TXkoNT:m:1:3317145305:65F18158711F6A9456CAF3B29ED5EAEB:r "Renew your membership before it’s too late >>>")**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59922027:695TXkoNT:m:1:3317145305:65F18158711F6A9456CAF3B29ED5EAEB:r "RENEW MEMBERSHIP")
---

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2022 Membership Services
Date: Tues, March 22, 2022 at 11:32 AM
Subject: **We hate to see you go.**

**ATTN: Your Republican Membership has EXPIRED**
For the last **2 years** , you have consistently stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen, **but we have bad news for you.**

**It pains me to have to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though. I spoke with leadership about this special circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **[11:59 PM TONIGHT](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59922027:695TXkoNT:m:1:3317145305:65F18158711F6A9456CAF3B29ED5EAEB:r "11:59 PM
TONIGHT")**.

**[Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustain Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59922027:695TXkoNT:m:1:3317145305:65F18158711F6A9456CAF3B29ED5EAEB:r "Are you going
to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustain Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are
going to let your streak fade away?")**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59922027:695TXkoNT:m:1:3317145305:65F18158711F6A9456CAF3B29ED5EAEB:r "RENEW
MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59922027:695TXkoNT:m:1:3317145305:65F18158711F6A9456CAF3B29ED5EAEB:r)
---

We're approaching the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections will be the toughest election we've seen yet, and we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

**The Democrats raised over $130 MILLION last year alone.** We're already behind, but with your help, we can close the gap, and take back the Conservative Majority in Congress.

You only have until **[11:59 PM](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59922027:695TXkoNT:m:1:3317145305:65F18158711F6A9456CAF3B29ED5EAEB:r "11:59
PM")** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **[Renew before it's too late >>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59922027:695TXkoNT:m:1:3317145305:65F18158711F6A9456CAF3B29ED5EAEB:r "Renew before
it’s too late >>>")**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

---

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59922028:695TXkoNT:m:1:3317145305:65F18158711F6A9456CAF3B29ED5EAEB:r "Red Wave Image
Link")

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59922028:695TXkoNT:m:1:3317145305:65F18158711F6A9456CAF3B29ED5EAEB:r "Can we count

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michelle=20Benson?=
subject: My mom and dad didn't have running water until they were teenagers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR MINNESOTA COMMITTEE
body:
I understand the struggle Minnesotans face | | | | [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=ae4ec62096&e=9d6926af69)
---
| | | This week is National Agriculture Week. As the only farm kid in the race, **I understand the struggles and triumphs Minnesota families face everyday.** My Mom and Dad didn't have running water until they were teenagers and **my grandmother sold eggs for grocery money.**

At a forum earlier this year, I shared the story of my family and thanks to the freedom and opportunity we have in this country I am able to run for Governor.

**[I recently wrote about my experiences growing up on a farm and living in rural Minnesota](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=55cd26a350&e=9d6926af69)**. I'd like you to take a moment to read it.

If you get a chance, **[here's the video from the forum](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=18d933caff&e=9d6926af69)** (and you can hear what my grandma got as a wedding gift. You'll be surprised!)

[](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=73365f9876&e=9d6926af69)

Sincerely,
[](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=9a8cf1efdc&e=9d6926af69)
**Michelle Benson **
[Candidate for Minnesota Governor](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=df0047f94c&e=9d6926af69)
---
|
---

Things are changing quickly on the ground in Battleground North Carolina, with the Midterm Election landscape evolving every day. We need your help to stay ready for anything. If we stay focused on unified around our America First Agenda, we can hold our Republican US Senate seat and GAIN a seat in the House of Representatives. That could make the difference, Peter. | MARCH 2022 Deadline Goal EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #05966106 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM on MARCH 31 SUGGESTED GIFT: $5 or more | | | | | | | The Democrats are prepared to do, say, and spend whatever it takes to win in November. But if we stand together and hold our ground, we’ll build on 2020 and reclaim the Republican Majority in Washington. Thank you. State Republican Campaign Team

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Good news for the USPS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Good news, Peter --

The Senate passed the Postal Service Reform Act with bipartisan support, and it's now headed to the president's desk for his signature. I know many of you signed our petition in support of this legislation, so I want to say thank you for helping make this victory possible!

I'm proud to share that this bill will save the United States Postal Service $50 billion in the next decade and put it on the path toward financial stability. It will also help ensure that the USPS continues serving Washingtonians and all Americans from every zip code.

**[Now, we need President Joe Biden to sign this legislation into law without delay. Please join me in showing support for the Postal Service Reform Act today by adding your name.](https://act.myngp.com/el/R_Ap3vTK8vvLHpjCizh3OmOIT8WTchJqiMAXaQA05MQ=/wjqLUffhjvQv9tnRbzPIVXAUibNY4ImZExzk3WXhsH4=?ms=em22_220323_psra_esrv_gq_act___dk_ettx&refcode=em22_220323_psra_esrv_gq_act___dk_ettx&source=em22_220323_psra_esrv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220323_psra_esrv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

We have a responsibility to preserve the USPS for our seniors, veterans, rural communities, and our democracy, and the Postal Service Reform Act is a step in the right direction. I will keep working to defend this essential service to protect frontline workers and make sure mail is delivered on time.

It's an honor to serve you,

Derek Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: 12 years ago today...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43289879/336558099/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk815-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTAyZGI2YS1jYmFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XDy9N9aDXixHvhwZ9N8m297TkTFUElf1mIFDfwUgePM=)
Peter, 12 years ago today, President Obama signed into law one of the most significant pieces of legislation of our lifetimes: the Affordable Care Act. **Today, millions more can access the care, prescription drugs and preventative services they need.**
**But if Sen. Grassley had his way, he would take all of that away. He's repeatedly voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act – and to roll back the law 12 times.** His votes pose a direct threat to working class families, women and people with preexisting conditions who all count on the Affordable Care Act for fair, affordable coverage.
With Democratic majorities in the House and Senate, this essential law is safe today – but we cannot sit back and relax. **We have to keep on fighting to defend these victories _every single day_****or we could lose them.** Just look at the unprecedented onslaught of attacks against Roe v. Wade nearly 50 years after its ruling.
**Defending the Affordable Care Act starts with defending our Senate majority.[We can do that right here in Iowa, but the GOP is ready to spend millions to stop us. I _need_ you with me. clean_body: | | | = Peter, 12 years ago today, President Obama signed into law one of the most significant pieces of legislation of our lifetimes: the Affordable Care Act. Today, millions more can access the care, prescription drugs and preventative services they need. But if Sen. Grassley had his way, he would take all of that away. He's repeatedly voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act – and to roll back the law 12 times. His votes pose a direct threat to working class families, women and people with preexisting conditions who all count on the Affordable Care Act for fair, affordable coverage. With Democratic majorities in the House and Senate, this essential law is safe today – but we cannot sit back and relax. We have to keep on fighting to defend these victories every single dayor we could lose them. Just look at the unprecedented onslaught of attacks against Roe v. Wade nearly 50 years after its ruling. She has been named by members of the panel as a "central witness to the inquiry," and we believe that it's crucial that she tell the truth to the nation. Donald Trump, though, has come out and said that his children are being treated unfairly by the media and the select committee. Now, we need to know what you think: | | | Thanks, Team Never Again Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, Madison Cawthorn, Mo Brooks, Andy Biggs. Those are just a few of the Republicans in Congress that Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from. Help us hold them accountable by chipping in $5 or more today. Thank you for supporting Never Again PAC as we continue our fight against American fascism and corruption. We are building a war chest to vote out the nation's most dangerous elected officials and hold them accountable for their acts of treason. = Never Again PAC will hold these most dangerous and radical elected officials accountable by building a war chest to support ongoing rapid response efforts in 2022 and beyond. Through advertising, grassroots & digital organizing in targeted members’ districts, at a time in the cycle when other political organizations have historically not spent resources, will ensure our resources will in fact go further, our message will be heard more clearly, and our targets will feel the pressure immediately. = For generations people have risked everything seeking refuge on American shores to escape the very same sorts of political violence that took place at the U.S. Capitol on January 6th –– and every generation has an opportunity to make investments to protect this democracy –– it is time to do our part. = PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC Never Again PAC PO Box 2153 Purcellville, VA 20134 United States

name: Glenn Beck
subject: We’re rushing support to Ukraine. You can help.
body:
When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous. Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentime
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zc706iie51tuqumfn47kqno8nvhalp9lclv87lu0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1im2o76c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqncp1hcco7adtkmapbatdge8qe8sjgceqr8dtm6orb7cjhelpjadj1cjj62o5nmv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti61j78p5lm9jreor66lgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp2bs)
| | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhrlgdht597pndeqo9aoti9kpa9gs9i6ekfinhfo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1im2o76c5h2bs)
---
|
---
Fellow American,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zr0vkuqkv15le8hbcmcqe8tl7jtf67nentbeive0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1im2o76c5h2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsms1fmdur5najj8607d0rjac2l7j4tgjdtk1e0o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1im2o76c5h2bs)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zchj1nk1el3tbp491nmmtrpan6j2l722gijekpc8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1im2o76c5h2bs)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlplpq13q9d4jjf8nb2f23hu9sen4fi161g9ld30_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1im2o76c5h2bs)

Irving, TX 75014
