name: JazzLewis.com
subject: Team Jazz Newsletter for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_march?amount=&refcode2=logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_march?amount=&refcode2=logo]
Folks, I’m a legislator and candidate by day, and a daddy always.
https://www.instagram.com/p/CaxiTljFbjR/ [https://www.instagram.com/p/CaxiTljFbjR/]Thank you to Mom and our entire village for helping me out while Aurin got some much-needed time off to relax on a friend's trip earlier this month.
Running for Congress can be challenging, but I'm glad I have a team that makes sure I have the time to make the moments that matter most.
- Jazz
Change Can't Wait!
https://www.facebook.com/VoteJazzLewis/posts/402191538383538?__cft__[0]=AZUE99n4ub_AJZ5o_5aSW0PFTJd_2rLCYgTzqf7H47HFGZiNOO-0A7ZmUhiAM9jEAuhmrmgbIrN7uyWjgf6ZfRqtJpchXOM4zh8TOa9na0XCzCgbX-Lc9sdU54v5iZpBrTINDHxij_HkpeJZHKFVRDF_&__tn__=%2CO%2CP-R [https://www.facebook.com/VoteJazzLewis/posts/402191538383538?__cft__[0]=AZUE99n4ub_AJZ5o_5aSW0PFTJd_2rLCYgTzqf7H47HFGZiNOO-0A7ZmUhiAM9jEAuhmrmgbIrN7uyWjgf6ZfRqtJpchXOM4zh8TOa9na0XCzCgbX-Lc9sdU54v5iZpBrTINDHxij_HkpeJZHKFVRDF_&__tn__=%2CO%2CP-R]Jazz connected with primary voters at the Anne Arundel County Democratic Party HQ for their candidate meet and greet. It may have been snowy, but change can’t wait for good weather!
Justice for Immigrants
Last week, Jazz joined CASA and many other great advocacy organizations at a rally for immigrant justice. He was proud to take that energy onto the floor of the House of Delegates as an ally and advocate for Maryland immigrants.
https://www.instagram.com/p/CbK0W9-rpK0/ [https://www.instagram.com/p/CbK0W9-rpK0/]
Hear Our Voices Act
The Maryland House just unanimously passed Jazz’s legislation -- the Hear Our Voices Act -- to ensure every student in Maryland knows about and can access Title IX sexual assault protections. Jazz is fighting for legislation to address our biggest challenges, from climate change and transit equity to healthcare access and support for our teachers. If we work together, Jazz can be the effective progressive voice we need in Congress to deliver results, not rhetoric, for the families he represents.
https://twitter.com/JazzforMaryland/status/1505942759185829889?s=20&t=ab00i0xJILx5nlcGumuPYg [https://twitter.com/JazzforMaryland/status/1505942759185829889?s=20&t=ab00i0xJILx5nlcGumuPYg]
March 31 FEC Deadline
Our people-powered campaign depends on grassroots donors like you to make sure we can keep reaching voters with Jazz’s message and win this critical open seat for progress.
It’s up to us to do all we can to elect fresh, effective voices like Jazz to Congress to deliver results, not rhetoric, for the families he represents. But Jazz doesn’t come from money -- his family fought their way to the middle class -- and reaching voters is expensive.
We’re coming up on the most important fundraising deadline of our campaign so far on March 31. We will be legally required to report our numbers, and we’re counting on folks like you to give whatever you can to show the strength of our movement for the change that can’t wait. Rush a donation right away to help meet our big end-of-quarter fundraising goal to keep up our momentum >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_march?amount=&refcode2=body_link1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Give $5 now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_march?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=abx5] Give $10 now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_march?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode2=abx10]
Give $25 now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_march?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode2=abx25] Give $50 now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_march?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode2=abx50]
Give $100 now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_march?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode2=abx100] Give other now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_march?amount=&refcode2=abx-other]

Read Across America Day
For Read Across America Day, Jazz enjoyed Rep. John Lewis’s memoir Walking with the Wind . He’s also been working his way through Rick Riordan's Percy Jackson books en español to try to gain fluency. Life-long learning keeps you spry!
https://www.facebook.com/VoteJazzLewis/posts/396196372316388?__cft__[0]=AZV-Fb8NOUfVgMbPMxUKDl4wZNfTXSON3I2Drijh4IqXlK6VoUSgF3OSsvjk2Xq00-qma--1zwIDgFiMZfjRYwCoLHlhcCoJZ5SAvFunJHiKmN8meHlwctXayNT0i-LTQhMbvAm1mCbLRPy9M5nRuGJW&__tn__=%2CO%2CP-R [https://www.facebook.com/VoteJazzLewis/posts/396196372316388?__cft__[0]=AZV-Fb8NOUfVgMbPMxUKDl4wZNfTXSON3I2Drijh4IqXlK6VoUSgF3OSsvjk2Xq00-qma--1zwIDgFiMZfjRYwCoLHlhcCoJZ5SAvFunJHiKmN8meHlwctXayNT0i-LTQhMbvAm1mCbLRPy9M5nRuGJW&__tn__=%2CO%2CP-R]Jazz Lewis is an effective progressive leader running for the Democratic nomination in Maryland’s 4th Congressional District. A champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to health care access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus.
Jazz would be the youngest African-American ever elected to represent Maryland in Congress. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_march?amount=&refcode2=biobox_btn]
Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
Friends of Jazz Lewis
P.O. Box 7449
Largo, MD 20792
United States

name: Team Kaptur
subject: A major campaign deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress
body:
March is a very important month for this campaign.

52% of Democrats would flee America rather than stand and defend the country that has given us so much. We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=9719a56e2b444a1d9d5200d1345546ea&_e=c6N44OgJVnbc7Ib8n8bmYKxfYJHyWqlg628EDMQ63rHLojni76dTSw6u3T0ooR0p8EwJkWoE996yWVT3nHRVTIPg21roPH3piuxHnAIAR9OFgX9ld5uUjwQmhWsJPjJmps1wzYlLQDT8HOC2RqxunjSiW6dcVPjTVY2Bc0rrCejY-WRwKzissXd8ojI84qXAb4TGNc7Hwvv-4koxHkaAPD0UM6fi-nqG5X8bbXliJKSWpgt1E4HwACrj_MhAUzYvg9wgWbptxIdNPvNngwvwhJEvbpQOzwEluNwfgD6P7zoutzT1Cr5VBoOtns18MhFAAg0_DmgBuSA18oq-UnqjMoCiJCp2gRxKIvmcOCESZmtgrHhtGHsVzhVbgjQlEWmRR1-5LvJMNE5JqVuhSYO4qKxw2kBPYWS1f02Lj-1BUKUCQLl_KX6YtM7BjFhbTW9P)

_**“I never thought I’d live to see the day half of Democrats would toss the whole country to the wolves if given the chance.”**
- Matthew Hennessey_
Peter,

Did you see the Quinnipiac Poll that came out this week? If you didn’t read the headlines, **you’ll want to continue reading this email.**

The polling firm found that when asked _**“What would you do if you were in the same position as Ukrainians are now, stay and fight or leave the country?”**_

**Can you guess what percentage of Democrats said they would cut and run if the U.S. were invaded?** **_52%_**

Yep - 52% of Democrats - _**including grown men**_ - responded that they would flee America rather than stand and defend the country that has given us so much.

**How pathetic.** Makes me wonder how many Democrats in Congress would have answered in the affirmative if they were polled.

I can tell you one thing first: the day in 2015 that an Islamic terrorist armed with more than 270 rounds of ammunition decided he’d like to blow up a train killing hundreds of civilians, I didn’t waiver; **my friends and I identified the threat and neutralized it. We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission.**

[](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=9719a56e2b444a1d9d5200d1345546ea&_e=c6N44OgJVnbc7Ib8n8bmYKxfYJHyWqlg628EDMQ63rHLojni76dTSw6u3T0ooR0p8EwJkWoE996yWVT3nHRVTIPg21roPH3piuxHnAIAR9OFgX9ld5uUjwQmhWsJPjJmps1wzYlLQDT8HOC2RqxunjSiW6dcVPjTVY2Bc0rrCejY-WRwKzissXd8ojI84qXAb4TGNc7Hwvv-4koxHkaAPD0UM6fi-nqG5X8bbXliJKSoWLBU5TlCyuwjvh0Ke_WxaLXm7pFXXRcaDlVD_JatLHGLswuaO4g_6cZ6p1YQe2wQhtJpszAXJprM4OxPWfcAmw9qiShqPWKXoofGEad9M-gldo8sbw-NBqKBgV-ZZDVcYWqM2ET2Q9-HAuDNdaL6d4je3QWzB9alPH9S-ZiiuVRRXjhlG1elVACPO0Ypqvy7l96_aVV-KE-CM9YBnF63)
When push comes to shove, Democrats won’t stand up in defense of our freedoms. The Quinnipiac Poll proves that. [**They must not be allowed to continue to serve in the House majority.**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=9719a56e2b444a1d9d5200d1345546ea&_e=c6N44OgJVnbc7Ib8n8bmYKxfYJHyWqlg628EDMQ63rHLojni76dTSw6u3T0ooR0p8EwJkWoE996yWVT3nHRVTIPg21roPH3piuxHnAIAR9OFgX9ld5uUjwQmhWsJPjJmps1wzYlLQDT8HOC2RqxunjSiW6dcVPjTVY2Bc0rrCejY-WRwKzissXd8ojI84qXAb4TGNc7Hwvv-4koxHkaAPD0UM6fi-nqG5X8bbXliJKTOevIeoNp1Q1jQYruOlJlnFErg8JpD-o8OnKPHp3LSVbm3N_1TkO6RLESAjAKwWtRzrEa1aojrRe1taFSiTpwEJS3WF2amRhI9IdjtPbHY03Z_h6D6pdMGJYdEI-uxOmuc0UecjrlWKIkwZVsSjyKxTNG7ht6kENMPLBVld75_aWZQzGxH2IP-QEhV7BcFXovD0seBTeBcIR8vJSSh6SZh)

[**Will you make a donation of $5 or $10 or even $15 right now to make sure I’m able to defeat the far-left Democrat I’m facing in November’s election?**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=9719a56e2b444a1d9d5200d1345546ea&_e=c6N44OgJVnbc7Ib8n8bmYKxfYJHyWqlg628EDMQ63rHLojni76dTSw6u3T0ooR0p8EwJkWoE996yWVT3nHRVTIPg21roPH3piuxHnAIAR9OFgX9ld5uUjwQmhWsJPjJmps1wzYlLQDT8HOC2RqxunjSiW6dcVPjTVY2Bc0rrCejY-WRwKzissXd8ojI84qXAb4TGNc7Hwvv-4koxHkaAPD0UM6fi-nqG5X8bbXliJKRX6TF1UicZI6ulIapkHkAS-LcCsYsoXOfpK9bYKQSP8AmV4fxAO_WKxjL5_qjcuuc8WeSlGlKEG4OblxZ5YqWSkEWhcn97AzXdchcCh5u-a3pcELA_B4yPwGds9IJlzBcrF7KgWiYGxyIm-HTeEVOHulpolbqpazlFliS6oX_gn5WsHrb8h_L5i2MfJw1XoPFm8o1Yex4g1eyt292El5kT) I’m many things but one thing that I’m not is a coward - **I’ll NEVER waiver if asked to defend my country from terrorists foreign OR domestic.**

[**I’m in an extremely tight race against a progressive socialist - a race that is sure to be one of the most expensive in the nation, and any gift you can make today would be grateful appreciated.**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=9719a56e2b444a1d9d5200d1345546ea&_e=c6N44OgJVnbc7Ib8n8bmYKxfYJHyWqlg628EDMQ63rHLojni76dTSw6u3T0ooR0p8EwJkWoE996yWVT3nHRVTIPg21roPH3piuxHnAIAR9OFgX9ld5uUjwQmhWsJPjJmps1wzYlLQDT8HOC2RqxunjSiW6dcVPjTVY2Bc0rrCejY-WRwKzissXd8ojI84qXAb4TGNc7Hwvv-4koxHkaAPD0UM6fi-nqG5X8bbXliJKTgrqa7VsX3Mms-DswZE0gFY9iyLG9_DeKag_-OMbjjfiHDhVZqjAkUvTjQIjsuFU2kYNr9JDUaegWY4FdRYjxEgxiHUeozSHtCq_HAhkgSo3VMZea5ywzX2GhL9D56oel6eP5YOpmpqbL8AyGznmznoP5CMcCF9rHIr6Db-JtjVqtpu-VE_Z9QzbnppA5f-mMN15LogXTGzcJ_odJbSyql)

**I know what I stand for. And I’m willing to die for my freedom and yours any day of the week.**

[**I’m running for Congress and I’d be honored if you would make a donation to my campaign today.**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=9719a56e2b444a1d9d5200d1345546ea&_e=c6N44OgJVnbc7Ib8n8bmYKxfYJHyWqlg628EDMQ63rHLojni76dTSw6u3T0ooR0p8EwJkWoE996yWVT3nHRVTIPg21roPH3piuxHnAIAR9OFgX9ld5uUjwQmhWsJPjJmps1wzYlLQDT8HOC2RqxunjSiW6dcVPjTVY2Bc0rrCejY-WRwKzissXd8ojI84qXAb4TGNc7Hwvv-4koxHkaAPD0UM6fi-nqG5X8bbXliJKTTJvL6Sb8ZeraT7Sj0MpxbX_lIKR1rTuyfrKLkwrUs-5rZvH3E-2dz0Zx6MhYupv4GH0CGSzpNoLAq_TcO0LGr_cFlgbbhuHOZMcOgO4guezJlfPyopnKgu6Hx44Rz-9X7ctiNtVs5yfcHzhFFwMC91zPFLUWO6zw5N37il30RQBK0DFOxplGCS--fu3RSDB5eJ7nGOi6epA-t0phn4LkD)

clean_body: 52% of Democrats would flee America rather than stand and defend the country that has given us so much. We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. | “I never thought I’d live to see the day half of Democrats would toss the whole country to the wolves if given the chance.” - Matthew Hennessey Peter, Did you see the Quinnipiac Poll that came out this week? If you didn’t read the headlines, you’ll want to continue reading this email. The polling firm found that when asked “What would you do if you were in the same position as Ukrainians are now, stay and fight or leave the country?” Can you guess what percentage of Democrats said they would cut and run if the U.S. were invaded? 52% Yep - 52% of Democrats - including grown men - responded that they would flee America rather than stand and defend the country that has given us so much. How pathetic. Makes me wonder how many Democrats in Congress would have answered in the affirmative if they were polled. I can tell you one thing first: the day in 2015 that an Islamic terrorist armed with more than 270 rounds of ammunition decided he’d like to blow up a train killing hundreds of civilians, I didn’t waiver; my friends and I identified the threat and neutralized it. We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. When push comes to shove, Democrats won’t stand up in defense of our freedoms. The Quinnipiac Poll proves that. I’m many things but one thing that I’m not is a coward - I’ll NEVER waiver if asked to defend my country from terrorists foreign OR domestic. Help Me Stop Anti-American Democrats What happened to the men of this country - men like George H.W. Bush and Jimmy Carter - who willingly went to war in defense of not only their country, but for Democracy itself? What has happened to American Democrats in the 75 years since the end of WWII that has led to a majority of them to say that if a foreign force invaded the United States they would cut and run? I know what I stand for. And I’m willing to die for my freedom and yours any day of the week. And in case you were wondering – 70% of Republicans polled said that they would stay and fight. Thanks for your consideration, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress Help Me Stop Anti-American Democrats | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: We did it the RIGHT way
body:
When my family came to America, we did it the right way. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9776%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=xBk1gOIOn9KeoXMxzxOXGw&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26292%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=th4faXllUt40%2fmjtY4A7Yw&sysid=1) Fellow Patriot, When my family came to America, we did it the _right way_.

We didn’t smuggle ourselves in with drugs, guns, and criminals \- we obeyed the law, waited our turn, and when we made it here, committed ourselves to being the best Americans we could be.

_**For Republicans, our story is living proof of the American Dream.**_

_But to Democrats, we’re NOTHING._

The radical Left doesn’t believe in legal immigration anymore, Fellow Patriot. They’d rather let MILLIONS of criminals flood into our country - no matter who they hurt.

**If you have no respect for our laws, you have NO BUSINESS being in our country.**

[**Join me today if you want to ENFORCE our border laws and STOP dangerous illegal immigration.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26293%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JxigiRQLTLHvB83ljZuKZg&sysid=1) [**PITCH IN $10**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26294%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4fqJqaSyB7NnVZntc1qOkA&sysid=1) [**PITCH IN $25**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26205%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I%2b%2bGG3f7c9on6ABk6gkEqg&sysid=1) [**PITCH IN $50**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26206%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=O9XJyztd3voUJTWZAfOSEg&sysid=1) [**PITCH IN $100**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26207%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qFavapT1EoDf6vi93clo0Q&sysid=1) [**PITCH IN $250**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26208%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PZFXMvtTLO6FPLlsHmbMuA&sysid=1) [**PITCH IN ANY OTHER AMOUNT**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26209%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mtlxyR5PjlZmsIctHNaUfw&sysid=1) In Liberty, [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26292%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=th4faXllUt40%2fmjtY4A7Yw&sysid=1) Capt. subject: My plan to end infanticide
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEIL FOR ARKANSAS
body:
I have the strongest pro-life platform in America. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/jan6-5066245?e=eda539b26b)
---
| | [ ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=f63dcb1125&e=eda539b26b)
---
| | Fellow Patriot:

Over 60 million innocent babies have been legally murdered in our nation since _Roe v. Wade_.

This is a real holocaust, an unthinkable atrocity, and it will go down as America’s most grievous sin.

Every Republican politician tells you that they’re “pro-life.” But what have they done about it?

What have elected Republicans at the national level _ever _done to actually end the scourge of infanticide?

**_Nothing._**

I’ll give you an example at the local level: Benton County, Arkansas, proudly calls itself a pro-life county. Meanwhile, a Planned Parenthood opened up in Rogers just last year. I attended a protest when it opened, and several state legislators preened before the crowd, patting themselves on the back.

For what? They allowed a baby murder factory to open up on their watch.

The solution is simple: Anytime a medical facility goes up for sale, the state government should purchase it to ensure that it is not sold to Planned Parenthood or any other baby killer.

**I am the most pro-life candidate that America has ever seen, and I vow to introduce real, concrete legislation to protect our most vulnerable population: the unborn.**

I have the **strongest** anti-infanticide platform in history:

I want to totally criminalize abortion.

I want to strip abortionists of their medical licenses and prosecute them for murder.

I want to prosecute every single politician who has ever used our tax money for abortion as an accessory to murder.

I want to prosecute every corporation and other organization who ever donated to Planned Parenthood or any other baby murder provider as an accessory to murder.

Finally, I want to end the fetal organ traffic by criminalizing the handling of baby body parts as corpse abuse.

[Replace talkers with doers by electing a true champion of the unborn.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=de356681f9&e=eda539b26b)

**[_I will introduce REAL legislation to END the slaughter of our babies and put __every other Republican on the record_ _._](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=0df48fbf94&e=eda539b26b)**

[**_Help me defeat the Bipartisan Establishment_ _\-- Chip into my election campaign right away and show them the power of the America First movement_**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=47281f4b4b&e=eda539b26b) _._

_We need PATRIOTS who will**FIGHT** for the **AMERICAN** people, not limp-waisted frauds who never miss an opportunity to stab us in the back._

[_**Your contributions to my campaign will help me purchase TV and radio ads, yard signs, and other campaign materials so I can fight the worthless GOP, retire a weak RINO, and replace him with a fierce America First Warrior**_.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=6a349050c6&e=eda539b26b)

Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. ** [_**I know you're ready to replace these worthless RINOs with America First conservatives like me, and that's why I'm counting on your contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more today**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=d7996e47c7&e=eda539b26b)** _._**
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 NeilforArkansas.com, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
NeilforArkansas.comPO Box 652Bentonville, AR 72712-0652
[Add us to your address book](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/vcard?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=1a15bf667f)

You can [update your preferences](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/profile?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=1a15bf667f&e=eda539b26b&c=72ac1b09a0) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=1a15bf667f&e=eda539b26b&c=72ac1b09a0).

subject: Heads up!

body:
Peter,

Our March fundraising deadline is in just over a week, and it’s a big one.

With DeSantis fresh off of his authoritarian frenzy during the Florida session, Democrats across Florida and across the country will be looking to our campaign for hope — for a major show of strength.

That’s why we need your help, Peter. We can’t risk falling short of our goal, and we’re counting on our grassroots supporters to help us get there. Can you rush a $10 donation to keep us on track? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?refcode=323eom1]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=323eom1]

Since last summer, we’ve built an incredible grassroots team. Now, it’s time for us to show DeSantis, the Florida GOP, and people across the country that we’re not backing down.

Help us make March our BEST EVER month of fundraising and show DeSantis that his authoritarian agenda isn’t welcome here. Click here to chip in $10 now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?refcode=323eom1]

Thank you for your support.

— Team Nikki

name: Glenn Beck
subject: We’re rushing support to Ukraine. You can help.
body:
When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous. Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z91ed9222ub4i5s218q1ud39vuq57hgciaredh3o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1im1ob0cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s3iedi6fd5mc5p3csbgeoq3ad72msq65dli6dq38dj6elieecj1etg6fc70smoefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3appl61g74c36eljj6p77m2qmash5u)
| | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgrp47eu61n9rmbjvcgfhrfjoghs9rios585ncb8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1im1ob0cjh2bs)
---
|
---
Fellow American,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zce7n1vmeb4p647p8j0d59rhk3f6mjb9ku10btfo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1im1ob0cjh2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt02qpvp5tbgpkrtda645qkdit4qbvbrk8dooafo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1im1ob0cjh2bs)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrr6h0a13qbljprf85d1693vht9f1qpjsvu1ovs0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1im1ob0cjh2bs)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---

clean_body: When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous. Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes | | | | | Fellow American, When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous. Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do. We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens. Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid. Fortunately, we are not powerless. Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help. | | Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians. To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future. And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support. Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act. Laus Deo, Glenn Beck Founder, Mercury One | | | | Copyright © 2022 Mercury One, Inc., All rights reserved. Mercury One, Inc. P.O. Box 140489 Irving, TX 75014 Mercury One is a trusted 501(c)(3) non-profit | EIN no. 45-3929881 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Tim Ryan
subject: f*** the filibuster

body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9570?t=1007&amount=25&akid=2918%2E3611125%2E-Q-0p6 ]Tim Ryan GIF: F*** the Filibuster

I’ve had it with the filibuster, folks.

It’s outdated, anti-democratic, and it’s stopping us from passing popular
legislation that the majority of Americans support.

If we lose Ohio and fail to expand our Democratic Senate majority, we’ll
totally squash our chances of getting rid of the filibuster.

And even worse, if Mitch McConnell takes back the gavel, essential
legislation like the John Lewis Voting Rights Act and codifying Roe into
law will go down in flames.

All this to say, f*** the filibuster.

subject: How we keep Ketanji Brown Jackson OFF the Supreme Court >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Article III Project
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59923053:6LgXekojN:m:1:3317145305:8D60CDC47CE4EC18846693D22024EA0F:r)
---
| Peter,
Biden's Supreme Court nominee **Ketanji Brown Jackson** has spent her entire legal career **going easy on twisted child sex predators and child pornographers**.
Putting someone with the **broken moral compass of Ketanji Brown Jackson** on the Supreme Court **will put our kids in DANGER.[Article III Project is counting on your help to stop her.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59923053:6LgXekojN:m:1:3317145305:8D60CDC47CE4EC18846693D22024EA0F:r)**
**[Just $9 or more will:](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59923054:6LgXekojN:m:1:3317145305:8D60CDC47CE4EC18846693D22024EA0F:r)**
1. Ensure our team of **legal investigators** has the resources to keep **digging into Ketanji's radicalism** (we're already uncovering new bombshells DAILY),

2. **Get this information out to the American people** to turn public opinion BEFORE the final Senate vote,

3. **DEFEAT Ketanji's nomination** for good.

**[Pitch in just $9 or more to Article III Project to protect our kids, defend common decency, and keep Ketanji Brown Jackson OFF the Supreme Court>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59923054:6LgXekojN:m:1:3317145305:8D60CDC47CE4EC18846693D22024EA0F:r)** | | | | [STOP KETANJI WITH $9](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59923054:6LgXekojN:m:1:3317145305:8D60CDC47CE4EC18846693D22024EA0F:r)
---
Right now, the **Biden White House is****** relating to Ketanji's judicial positions and rulings. (Nearly 75% of all the relevant records they have.)

Likewise, Senate Democrats are **refusing to grant access to ANY records from Ketanji's time as Vice Chair of the U.S. Sentencing Commission** from 2010 to 2013.

It's not hard to guess why...because here's what we already know about **Ketanji's weird affection for pedophiles:**
* 25 years **fighting for LIGHTER punishments for child predators** , both on the Sentencing Commission and as a federal judge.

* 7 cases as a judge where Ketanji let **violent child porn consumers off with little more than a wrist slap**...including a creep she gave **just 3 months in jail** (even though sentencing **guidelines called for 10 _years_.**)

* Attempts to **eliminate mandatory minimums for child sex crimes** when she served on the U.S. Sentencing Commission...to make it **easier for child predators to avoid jail** altogether.

* Documents authored by Ketanji where lamented that the **sex offender registry would bring "stigmatization and ostracism" for child predators**...apparently not caring that the registry exists to keep our KIDS safe.

And look, Peter: that's just what the Article III Project and others have already uncovered. **With 48,000 more documents out there, this is the tip of the iceberg for Ketanji's radicalism.**

**[Article III Project WILL uncover the truth and block Ketanji's nomination, but ONLY if we can count on the support of the American public.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59923053:6LgXekojN:m:1:3317145305:8D60CDC47CE4EC18846693D22024EA0F:r)**

**[Pitch in $9 to Article III Project to uncover the TRUTH and STOP this nomination>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59923054:6LgXekojN:m:1:3317145305:8D60CDC47CE4EC18846693D22024EA0F:r)**
| | | [STOP KETANJI WITH $9](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59923054:6LgXekojN:m:1:3317145305:8D60CDC47CE4EC18846693D22024EA0F:r)
---
| | | [STOP KETANJI WITH $11](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59923055:6LgXekojN:m:1:3317145305:8D60CDC47CE4EC18846693D22024EA0F:r)
---
| | | [STOP KETANJI WITH $25](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59923056:6LgXekojN:m:1:3317145305:8D60CDC47CE4EC18846693D22024EA0F:r)
---
| | | [ANY AMOUNT HELPS](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59923053:6LgXekojN:m:1:3317145305:8D60CDC47CE4EC18846693D22024EA0F:r)
---
Thanks,

Article III Project

Friend, the first official public filing deadline of our election year is right around the corner, which means it's more important than ever for our grassroots fundraising to be strong. But I just popped in to ActBlue, and what I saw is NOT good.
**We expected this movement to ramp up its support as the stakes got higher – but the OPPOSITE has happened. We're just days away from our biggest deadline yet, and ActBlue shows our online fundraising is dramatically slowing _down._ Take a look for yourself:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43293650/336573923/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk507-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDAwZTg0OS1kN2FhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=waS_AvrD0vZ0cFkUINoEOSMzHm3PfWRzDc5OF6XXZfU=)
This is the political fight of our lives, and we cannot go into it halfheartedly. Experts at The Washington Post have made it clear: Replacing GOP extremists with Democratic governors is _the_ way to protect voting rights, education, health care and more. **Marco Lopez (D-AZ)_is_ the governor we need: He's an Obama administration alum, voting rights champion and small business owner – and he's ready to flip Arizona's governorship blue and defend our democracy.**
**But unless we turn our fundraising trends around before this first official quarterly deadline of the election year, we won't have the resources we need to fight back against GOP attacks and win this race. Politico has called this the _most_ competitive open-seat race of 2022, so we can't afford to fall short.**
**[So please, friend, with our deadline rapidly approaching, will you rush a donation to close our budget gap, flip Arizona blue and defeat GOP extremism once and for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43293651/336573924/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk507-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDAwZTg0OS1kN2FhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=waS_AvrD0vZ0cFkUINoEOSMzHm3PfWRzDc5OF6XXZfU=)**

* * *
**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, [please chip in to power our fight forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43293656/336573956/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk507-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDAwZTg0OS1kN2FhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=waS_AvrD0vZ0cFkUINoEOSMzHm3PfWRzDc5OF6XXZfU=) Thank you so much.
– Marco Lopez | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43293658/336573958/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk507-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDAwZTg0OS1kN2FhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=waS_AvrD0vZ0cFkUINoEOSMzHm3PfWRzDc5OF6XXZfU=)

name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: We did it the RIGHT way
body:
When my family came to America, we did it the right way. We didn’t smuggle ourselves in with drugs, guns, and criminals - we
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpi9es089iakcfgdfldulfqqr59j4m16rn1kabb8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf9o30coom7c9j6go70p74stgnfdbkssrbcc3ks8rm1pljejhjccrm6orr9dlnmsrt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqmed9gcup70phksapm9ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdgm1o33c1h6cp724no)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm0cbehavunmr0kh9johcj0o2ai3gl1gia94h0kg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1hm0oj6cjh2bs) Fellow Patriot, When my family came to America, we did it the _right way_.

We didn’t smuggle ourselves in with drugs, guns, and criminals - we obeyed the law, waited our turn, and when we made it here, committed ourselves to being the best Americans we could be.

_**For Republicans, our story is living proof of the American Dream.**_

_But to Democrats, we’re NOTHING._

The radical Left doesn’t believe in legal immigration anymore, Fellow Patriot. They’d rather let MILLIONS of criminals flood into our country - no matter who they hurt.

**If you have no respect for our laws, you have NO BUSINESS being in our country.**

body:
Did you get a chance to read the Daily Tar Heel Editorial about Valerie? If not, we recommend you do!

| | | _**Editorial: It’s time for more local faces in national politics**_
-The Daily Tar Heel
---
Peter,

Did you get a chance to read the Daily Tar Heel Editorial about Valerie? If not, we recommend you do! But in case you don’t have time, here’s the main message: all politics are local.

As the article notes, we need leaders like Valerie, who have put their community first throughout their careers. The ideas and accomplishments Valerie has employed on the local level have the potential to help those across the nation. [_**But first, she needs to get her foot in the door. clean_body: Did you get a chance to read the Daily Tar Heel Editorial about Valerie? If not, we recommend you do! | | | Editorial: It’s time for more local faces in national politics -The Daily Tar Heel Peter, Did you get a chance to read the Daily Tar Heel Editorial about Valerie? If not, we recommend you do! But in case you don’t have time, here’s the main message: all politics are local. As the article notes, we need leaders like Valerie, who have put their community first throughout their careers. The ideas and accomplishments Valerie has employed on the local level have the potential to help those across the nation. = | = | | “We need to advocate for local politicians whose platforms are fueled by experience and a sense of connection to their constituents — not outspoken displays of political extremity or allegiance to any one person.” More and more, we are seeing the importance of electing strong, moral community leaders. That’s why we’ve built our campaign on equity and years of deep ties to this community. Valerie has a lifetime of experience being an advocate for her community. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = We are grateful for your support in this campaign, we cannot do this without you! Thank you, Team Foushee * | | = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States | | ---|--- Email is a critical way for the Foushee campaign to stay in touch with you. body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43294014/336575866/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTdhNzNlMy1kOWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jlWXz4H32hyreGYPF4Rn2LXZNmNpSlKgqGBomWeM150=&emci=7e9be907-b7aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=617a73e3-d9aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=561582) | **WOW, friend, can you believe it’s been 12 years since the Affordable Care Act passed already!?** **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43294015/336575867/-338586715?refcode=E14688-20220323-12YrAnniv-graphic-Anniversary-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=12&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTdhNzNlMy1kOWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jlWXz4H32hyreGYPF4Rn2LXZNmNpSlKgqGBomWeM150=)** Since our founding in 2016, we’ve helped more than 875,000 people across the country access life-saving health care by expanding Medicaid under the ACA. We’re proud of the work we’ve accomplished, and we’re grateful to supporters like you for helping us make these life-changing policies a reality. [**Will you continue to support our work in 2022 with a donation today to help us win more life-changing policies this November?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43294016/336575869/-338586715?refcode=E14688-20220323-12YrAnniv-SL-Anniversary-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=12&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTdhNzNlMy1kOWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jlWXz4H32hyreGYPF4Rn2LXZNmNpSlKgqGBomWeM150=) [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43294019/336575870/-338586715?refcode=E14688-20220323-12YrAnniv-SB-Anniversary-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=12&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTdhNzNlMy1kOWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jlWXz4H32hyreGYPF4Rn2LXZNmNpSlKgqGBomWeM150=) **We’ve seen tried-and-true results in states that have expanded Medicaid.** More low-income families have been able to access health coverage. That means more people can access regular treatment for care — _especially for chronic conditions, preventative services, and screenings to catch ailments early on and keep you healthy._ **Medicaid expansion has helped the communities who have historically been denied the care and treatment they need. **It’s helped us to reduce the racial disparities in health care coverage and provide better access to rural hospitals and communities. **We’ve won campaigns in six states to expand coverage,_and now, we’re taking our fight to South Dakota._** [**In honor of the ACA’s 12th birthday, will you donate $12 or more today to help us win more life-changing campaigns like the one in South Dakota this November?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43294022/336575874/-338586715?refcode=E14688-20220323-12YrAnniv-SL-Anniversary-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=12&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTdhNzNlMy1kOWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jlWXz4H32hyreGYPF4Rn2LXZNmNpSlKgqGBomWeM150=) clean_body: | | WOW, friend, can you believe it’s been 12 years since the Affordable Care Act passed already!? = Since our founding in 2016, we’ve helped more than 875,000 people across the country access life-saving health care by expanding Medicaid under the ACA. We’re proud of the work we’ve accomplished, and we’re grateful to supporters like you for helping us make these life-changing policies a reality. = = We’ve seen tried-and-true results in states that have expanded Medicaid. More low-income families have been able to access health coverage. That means more people can access regular treatment for care — especially for chronic conditions, preventative services, and screenings to catch ailments early on and keep you healthy. Medicaid expansion has helped the communities who have historically been denied the care and treatment they need. It’s helped us to reduce the racial disparities in health care coverage and provide better access to rural hospitals and communities. We’ve won campaigns in six states to expand coverage,and now, we’re taking our fight to South Dakota. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks, team! Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. name: Shuwaski Young for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shuwaski Young for Congress
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/91271/images/Young%20Email%20Header.png]
Friend,
When we think of crumbling water systems, many people might not know about Jackson, Mississippi.
Last year, Jackson went without clean running water for over a month. It was a systemic breakdown: outdated pipes, a shrinking tax base, decades of negligence, and a surprising winter storm.
Think about that .
That’s the splash of a toilet flushed with a bucket.
Days on end without a shower.
No clean clothes.
Sinks filled with dirty dishes.
Brushing your teeth with water from a bottle. If you can find one.
Today is World Water Day. We must acknowledge the significant work needed to improve water access and equity in our communities in the 3rd Congressional.
These days of historic disinvestment can’t go on. When we talk about improving infrastructure, we need to prioritize the folks who never got it in the first place: many of whom are low-income residents or folks of color.
Chip in $15 to my campaign today if you agree: Access to clean water is a basic right [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/shuwaskiyoung?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=express_lane_water032322] .
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $15 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/shuwaskiyoung?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=express_lane_water032322]
Congressman Guest and Shuwaski don’t see eye to eye on this. If they did, Guest would’ve voted for the bipartisan infrastructure bill. $4.4 billion of this funding will repair Mississippi roads, bridges, and waterways for thousands across the state. And he would engage federal policymakers in fixing constituents’ above-average lead levels and making wastewater upgrades.
And he would increase investments in STEM and agricultural opportunities and small business ownership, boosting our tax base.
Except he didn’t. And hasn’t.
Our leaders need to put our best interests first.
Together, we can begin to build a better future. Pitch in what you can to help drive our campaign forward.
DONATE TODAY! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/shuwaskiyoung?refcode=em_water032322]
Can’t donate but still want to be involved? Check out our website and social media pages!
WEBSITE [https://www.shuwaskiyoung.com] FACEBOOK [https://www.facebook.com/shuwaskiyoungMS] TWITTER [https://www.twitter.com/shuwaskiyoung] INSTAGRAM [https://www.instagram.com/shuwaskiyoung]
Thank you for helping us make the Guest leave.
-- Shuwaski Young for Congress Team
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/shuwaskiyoung?refcode=em_water032322]
Paid for by Shuwaski Young for Congress
Shuwaski Young for Congress
PO Box 151
Jackson, MS 39205-0151
United States

body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/alansimsforcongress/9gmhty1yxf-6768065?e=bcd0e72a5a)
---
| | |
# Weekly Update 3.22.23
---
|
---
| | | |
---
**Friends: **This week we take a deeper look at Energy Independence and its vital connection to our national security. Current events are highlighting this critical relationship, prompting Republicans in Congress to support the “No Oil from Terrorists Act,” to ban Biden from buying oil from Iran. As former Director of Energy Policy for the Air Force at the Pentagon, one of my highest priorities in Congress will be to reestablish Energy Independence.

---
|
# **In this issue:**
* Recent Events
* Upcoming Events
* This Week in Congress
* Alan on the Issues

---
| **Recent Events:**

On March 17th, Alan was inducted into the **Rotary** **Club** of **Winder** during their weekly lunchtime meeting. Alan notes the Rotary Club motto - "Service Before Self" produces a similar feel and expectation he experienced in the Air Force, whose motto reads "Integrity first, Service before self, Excellence in all we do."
---
|
---
| With Winder Chapter Rotary President Julia Simpson
---
|
---
---
| Being pinned by Winder Chapter Secretary Beth McIntyre
---
| **Upcoming Events:**

**Meet and Greet at the Auburn Public Library****:** Come on out and meet Alan at the**** Auburn Public Library this **Friday, March 25th**, hosted by Auburn Mayor Linda Blechinger! We’ll be there from 5:30-7:00 pm with refreshments, ready to share Alan’s vision for the future of the 10th District and our great country! This is a free event and the public is invited to join us!
---
|
---
| **Saturday, March 26:** Join Alan at the **Taliaferro County Candidate Forum** from 3 pm- 5 pm at the Taliaferro County Senior Center, 119 Commerce Street NW, Crawfordville, GA.

---
|
---
|
**VOTE FOR ALAN MAY 24th in the Republican Primary**

---
| **This week in Congress:**
**Republicans propose H.R. 6969 **\- **'No Oil From Terrorists Act'** to ban Biden from buying Iranian energy:

The **Republican Study Committee**(RSC) wrote new legislation to block the United States from purchasing oil products from Iran, arguing the Biden administration needs to focus on boosting domestic energy supplies rather than funding terrorist regimes.

The lawmakers say Biden should restart the Keystone XL pipeline and allow new oil and gas leases on federal lands, rather than creating additional vulnerabilities by buying energy from hostile regimes.

The legislation, **"No Oil From Terrorists Act,"** is especially timely as President Biden announced a ban on Russian oil imports to the U.S. amid bipartisan pressure as Russia continues its invasion of Ukraine. Meanwhile, the United States is in active negotiations in Vienna to restart the Iran nuclear deal, which former President Donald Trump pulled out of in 2018.

---
| **Alan on the Issues:** **Energy Independence**

Energy is an essential requirement that fuels our economy and our way of life. Dependence on others to supply our energy requirements puts American sovereignty, security and prosperity at risk. Our nation is blessed with abundant resources, and government should promote energy independence to secure prosperity and safeguard our sovereignty.

**Key Takeaways:**
* Energy independence promotes U.S. national security and global economic stability
* America must be able to produce more energy resources than it consumes
* Energy independence is key to holding aggressive world powers in check
* U.S. policy should support the free market approach to regaining energy independence
* The Keystone XL pipeline must be restarted, and the Nordstream 2 pipeline shutdown

---

[_**Give $50, $100, $1000, or more to really make Brett’s birthday special!**_](http://url5297.votelindstrom.com/ls/click?upn=HTMZIboFmIG-2BMNluIWzOsBTM4DsVO5dYxx4wQHjUHXH9JmySPBcu9TB68NBIH9Pjl1qwoB-2BIu9euFdbpZBYCU7RdKldawP1wBVJiIbUpanc-3DYqsB_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6MqfV6LwsQxj97DaHLg55wMBqUe-2BcI-2FEpMnktjJ4d2GGZ1oOicocJSgCEmx0hGGGXhi2zojy8LX8JNKnDKnfyRtkPHdNmHtPNWkkoZdUetvGysqydVf1Hj42F5-2F4JUJc13YfSomSm2AWPhryvx-2Fa2QPTgNZ1V9-2F27Ifsj6EOoKIHpKQ8ying9ty4asLb8R-2F5JCFf-2B1gp02WtaMImgO-2BTXnTMnMxHq7PrEs9I9mnNTzvT9QDv-2FEB-2FcQVi5haxgU07zGvzVdLrd2aQcboksmpKGrXVfRWDOUZjCALHM0aKhDPu-2Byfs0FXVQJFEFGQ5kcxKi-2FvypoUX1ZlEORGuUZXg7MZMcrbD5aOhrlcPQkoBZXQZ8cy7HrhlbCa3FBRd4m5PeWzzoZe2tQA9d2pVgMTktDKsIicWK8zYUkcMqUPx6QXvWrOwCC9MInwTXOc9oqxIa655MDExoJZqFqvqpq91bvaLAA5UTa-2FLo55DX-2B8Jv96d4HO9rvth4BKJXLNX2g8Qq5z751jdHec6aUghsRP-2BtdTzWBsVFDW-2B8JhOGvtqMiFLlvrzDsVsuadvVQAo6fdNJHpTqFJ67tDoQt-2FodCCUNeke-2BLrPkAB3oq6wJx2mtd6i06aJxxhd88mpM2SIdr0ydQfeD7S0un2ff-2FdGiqi6eQnhZAtAvWWZX0Xa-2FfHzeF99ZBFw2jG0vLGwOopHibL6FRWeN66K0ls5JNI2wz0gCxUxAmIG5X7fSpix1iIy7qaSJcT9-2FHSdXKEJ6-2FJeGxTNE7mUgz-2BlPSZ7oA-2Fy4zKXqpym3uLmorXV4htQiNLn9PEN6R0r81umSmNyN7XgCqYPqTKCxWeDkqgyi6F2i1P5AeA-3D-3D)

Please keep this a secret until later tonight. I would hate to spoil the surprise!
All the best,

clean_body: | | | | I Need Your Help www.votelindstrom.com Friends, I have a BIG secret to share! TODAY is Brett’s 41st birthday. The kids and I have been wracking our minds for weeks trying to come up with the best birthday present and I think I have it – a special note from each of you and maybe even chipping in a few bucks for his campaign. Brett is a selfless and visionary leader. He spends all his time looking for opportunities to make things better – never settling for second best. That’s why I know he is the right leader for Nebraska. So many of you have seen him circling the state and have come to see his vision and work ethic firsthand. Nobody will outwork Brett. It’s time we show our appreciation for all of the heart and soul he puts into our great state. Thank you for joining with me to make this the best birthday yet for Brett! Please keep this a secret until later tonight. I would hate to spoil the surprise! All the best, Leigh Lindstrom | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- Paid for by Friends of Lindstrom Campaign - 2437 S. 130th Cir, Omaha, NE 68144

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeanine=20Lawson?=
subject: Big Tech censorship strikes again
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress")
body:
I don't want to live in a world where Big Tech is allowed to pick and choose what we're allowed to say | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2b57a90d71cd/big-tech-censorship-strikes-again?e=fc83fb200d)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=6722ab23a4&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")
---
| ,

When Big Tech uses their power to silence conservative voices, we should be outraged.

We've seen it time and time again, but this one is particularly infuriating to me.

This week, Twitter suspended the account of Reka Gyorgy. Reka is a Virginia Tech student who was prevented from competing in the NCAA Women's Swimming finals for 500 meter freestyle, because she lost to Lia Thomas.

Reka spoke out against biological men like Lia Thomas competing in women's sports, and within a day Twitter suspended her account.

---
|
---
|
She didn't make any threats, or even personal attacks. Reka's only crime was a [well-reasoned argument explaining the unfair position in which the NCAA has put herself and her peers.](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=6f2a91b5a3&e=fc83fb200d) She made this argument as someone who personally experienced the situation. That's all it took for Twitter to silence her voice.

I don't want to live in a country where Big Tech is allowed to pick and choose what we're allowed to say. Unfortunately, Democrat leadership is fully supportive of this censorship.

That's why it's so important that we reclaim the House of Representatives this November and put an end to the woke agenda of the radical left. Without Republican leadership, Big Tech will continue to silence speech that goes against the left's woke agenda.

[Will you consider making a small donation of $100, $50, $25, or even just $10 to help me reclaim a Republican majority and put an end to Big Tech censorship?](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=06da619711&e=fc83fb200d)
---
| [Contribute $10](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=46c80f1264&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $10")
---
| [Contribute $25](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=a27e38c5bb&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $25")
---
| [Contribute $50](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=6b6c53f512&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $50")
---
| [Contribute $100](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=a3629e2ab0&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $100")
---
| [Contribute any amount](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=68a703aaae&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute any amount")
---
|
These kinds of examples of Big Tech censorship serve to demonstrate why we need new leadership, but they also energize me to work that much harder to make it happen.

Let's work together to put an end to this insanity, restore commonsense, and protect the voices that are being silenced.

Thank you,

Jeanine Lawson
Candidate for Virginia's 10th Congressional District
---
|

|
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: She's a tax and spend liberal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
Democrats, like Michigan’s Governor Gretchen Whitmer are playing politics while our citizens suffer. | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Peter:

Americans are hurting. Only once in my lifetime can I remember inflation as bad as this. Rising prices are at a 40-year high.

And gas prices? Well, **you know the pain at the pump** right now.

**Yet Democrats, like Michigan’s Governor Gretchen Whitmer are playing politics while our citizens suffer.**

Whitmer publicly calls on Washington to suspend the federal gas tax, but when lawmakers in Michigan try to suspend the state’s gas tax she vetoes the bill.

That’s right. _Whitmer vetoed a suspension of the state’s gas tax_.

Then, she further confused the issue by saying she wants to pause the state’s sales tax on gas.

Cynical? Manipulative?

It’s time for leadership in Lansing, not politics.

**Yet, Gretchen Whitmer would rather play politics while our citizens are struggling to pay their bills.**

[When Whitmer was first elected she wanted to raise the gas tax an additional 45 cents per gallon. That _would have made Michigan’s gas tax the highest in the nation at**71.3 cents per gallon**_.](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=31f78efa49&e=0636b97700)

So it should come as no surprise that she would veto a suspension of the gas tax.

Whitmer and her liberal friends want gas prices high.

**That’s why she applauded when Biden cancelled the Keystone Pipeline.

And she cheered when Biden stopped new oil and gas leases.**

Then **Whitmer went even further by ordering the shut down of Enbridge Energy’s Line 5 pipeline** – a pipeline which supplies many Michigan residents with fuel and propane.

Her edict could result in the _loss of over 33,000 jobs_ and cause _$20 billion in economic damage_ to the Great Lakes region.

It would have a _devastating effect on Detroit Metro Airport_ which receives half of its jet fuel from this pipeline. That would be a massive blow to the aviation industry.

**We can’t let these radical Democrats further destroy our economy.**

Just two short years ago America was energy independent – and we were a net exporter of oil.

Now, _thanks to Whitmer, Biden and their radical cronies we are again dependent on foreign nations_ for oil and inflation is at a 40-year high.

**Peter, we have a real opportunity to stop them by flipping Michigan. We can turn the state from blue to red.**

Gretchen Whitmer’s popularity has plummeted because of her reckless policies.

She _devastated small businesses_ with her prolonged lockdown.

She forced Covid patients into nursing homes _needlessly increasing deaths_.

She closed schools and _forced masks on kids_.

She marched in a “ _defund the police_ ” rally and publicly stated her support for the “spirit of the defund the police” movement.

On issue after issue, Whitmer has shown she is out of touch with everyday Americans.

We can defeat Gretchen Whitmer and flip Michigan back to the red column, and _I need your help today_.

**Will you chip in to help? $10, $25 or $50 will go a long way in defeating the radical left Michigan.**
---

---
| [CHIP IN MORE TO HELP CAPTAIN MIKE](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=481a47eeda&e=0636b97700 "CHIP IN MORE TO HELP CAPTAIN MIKE")
---
| Peter, following my time in the Marine Corps, I’ve built a 34-year career in law enforcement in Michigan. I’ve excelled at putting together high-performing teams to solve challenging problems. That’s what I bring to the table.

[_I am a conservative_](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=754740ab98&e=0636b97700). I believe our government spends too much and taxes are too high.

That’s why [_I've signed the “Taxpayer Protection Pledge.”_](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=a081e70f45&e=0636b97700) I will oppose any efforts to raise taxes on Michigan’s citizens.

Will you join me in this campaign? _Let’s flip Michigan and send Gretchen Whitmer packing_.

Please make a generous donation today. Let’s stand together as we Fix Michigan and rebuild our nation.

Sincerely,

Michael Brown
Republican for Governor PS - In another cynical move, _Whitmer also vetoed legislation that would have lowered the state’s income tax_. Gretchen Whitmer is a tax and spend liberal and must be defeated. [Will you help today?](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=e665d880da&e=0636b97700)

clean_body: Democrats, like Michigan’s Governor Gretchen Whitmer are playing politics while our citizens suffer. | | | | | | | | Peter: Americans are hurting. Only once in my lifetime can I remember inflation as bad as this. Rising prices are at a 40-year high. And gas prices? Well, you know the pain at the pump right now. Yet Democrats, like Michigan’s Governor Gretchen Whitmer are playing politics while our citizens suffer. Whitmer publicly calls on Washington to suspend the federal gas tax, but when lawmakers in Michigan try to suspend the state’s gas tax she vetoes the bill. That’s right. Whitmer vetoed a suspension of the state’s gas tax. Then, she further confused the issue by saying she wants to pause the state’s sales tax on gas. Cynical? Manipulative? It’s time for leadership in Lansing, not politics. Yet, Gretchen Whitmer would rather play politics while our citizens are struggling to pay their bills. So it should come as no surprise that she would veto a suspension of the gas tax. Whitmer and her liberal friends want gas prices high. That’s why she applauded when Biden cancelled the Keystone Pipeline. And she cheered when Biden stopped new oil and gas leases. Then Whitmer went even further by ordering the shut down of Enbridge Energy’s Line 5 pipeline – a pipeline which supplies many Michigan residents with fuel and propane. Her edict could result in the loss of over 33,000 jobs and cause $20 billion in economic damage to the Great Lakes region. It would have a devastating effect on Detroit Metro Airport which receives half of its jet fuel from this pipeline. That would be a massive blow to the aviation industry. We can’t let these radical Democrats further destroy our economy. Just two short years ago America was energy independent – and we were a net exporter of oil. Now, thanks to Whitmer, Biden and their radical cronies we are again dependent on foreign nations for oil and inflation is at a 40-year high. Peter, we have a real opportunity to stop them by flipping Michigan. We can turn the state from blue to red. Gretchen Whitmer’s popularity has plummeted because of her reckless policies. She devastated small businesses with her prolonged lockdown. She forced Covid patients into nursing homes needlessly increasing deaths. She closed schools and forced masks on kids. She marched in a “ defund the police ” rally and publicly stated her support for the “spirit of the defund the police” movement. On issue after issue, Whitmer has shown she is out of touch with everyday Americans. We can defeat Gretchen Whitmer and flip Michigan back to the red column, and I need your help today. Will you chip in to help? $10, $25 or $50 will go a long way in defeating the radical left Michigan. | "CHIP IN $10 TO HELP CAPTAIN MIKE" | "CHIP IN $25 TO HELP CAPTAIN MIKE" | "CHIP IN $50 TO HELP CAPTAIN MIKE" | "CHIP IN MORE TO HELP CAPTAIN MIKE" | Peter, following my time in the Marine Corps, I’ve built a 34-year career in law enforcement in Michigan. I’ve excelled at putting together high-performing teams to solve challenging problems. That’s what I bring to the table. . I believe our government spends too much and taxes are too high. That’s why I will oppose any efforts to raise taxes on Michigan’s citizens. Will you join me in this campaign? Let’s flip Michigan and send Gretchen Whitmer packing. Please make a generous donation today. Let’s stand together as we Fix Michigan and rebuild our nation. Sincerely, Michael Brown Republican for Governor PS - In another cynical move, Whitmer also vetoed legislation that would have lowered the state’s income tax. Gretchen Whitmer is a tax and spend liberal and must be defeated. | | "CHIP IN TO HELP CAPTAIN MIKE WIN!" | Contributions to Michael Brown for Governor are not deductible for Federal income tax purposes. No corporate contribution checks or cash please. State law requires political committees to use their best efforts to obtain and report the name, mailing address, employer and occupation for each individual whose contributions exceed $100 in an election cycle. Individual contributors may donate up to the maximum of $7,150 during an election cycle. | | Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P.O. Box 23 • Stevensville, MI 49127 | | | "DONATE TO HELP MICHAEL'S CAMPAIGN" | | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:info@captainmikeformichigan.com | | Copyright © 2022 Michael Brown for Governor, All rights reserved.

name: Clark Bossert
subject: Calling All Volunteers!
body:
We are looking for volunteers! | | | [](https://engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=623b6e2b1c62bf31c0abfd80&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.clarkbossert.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D623a5fb3eb0e0643e852cc5a%26ss_email_id%3D623b6e2b1c62bf31c0abfd80%26ss_campaign_name%3DCalling%2BAll%2BVolunteers%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-03-23T19%253A00%253A20Z&w=60e4d983ac75935fc0b72056&l=en-US&s=-rU29tbEoarhxTT9d_eWm7jSvVk%3D)
---
| |
---
## IT’S TIME.
---
|
---
---
| | [](https://engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=623b6e2b1c62bf31c0abfd80&u=https%3A%2F%2Fclarkbossert.com%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D623a5fb3eb0e0643e852cc5a%26ss_email_id%3D623b6e2b1c62bf31c0abfd80%26ss_campaign_name%3DCalling%2BAll%2BVolunteers%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-03-23T19%253A00%253A20Z&w=60e4d983ac75935fc0b72056&l=en-US&s=QCaeDLwXj1xFDoUaFIkw-HH0CxQ%3D) |
---|---|---
|
---
### We are less than 12 weeks away from June 14, 2022...PRIMARY ELECTION DAY.
---
It’s time for us to get our walking shoes on and hit the streets to spread the **message of** **freedom** to every household in District 3!
---
|
---
Thank you for expressing an interest in helping Clark Bossert defeat Susie Lee and get to Congress. We really need **your help** in this last, and most important, leg of the race! We have split our district up into zip codes, and we really need your help to _knock on doors, hand out fliers, and invite people_ to meet Clark in their own neighborhoods.Will you join our **canvassing team**? We will be going out throughout the week in specific areas until early voting starts on May 28th. **Please respond** to this email, or click the link below, to let us know what your availability might look like.We are also expanding our **phone banking team**. Please let us know if you are interested in helping us contact voters through phone calls!
---
|
---
_**Most importantly**_ , we will be hosting our **onboarding meeting** for all of this information next **Tuesday, March 29th, from 6:30-8:00pm** to go over what our strategy is for canvassing and phone banking. If you are unable to attend but still want to volunteer in this way, please let us know in your reply. We will be sure to catch you up on what you missed.
---
|
---
Thank you for joining us in the fight for freedom! It’s time!
---
-Clark Bossert for Congress team
---
[_ _**YES! I WANT TO HELP!**_ _](mailto:info@clarkbossert.com?subject=I%20want%20to%20volunteer!&body=Please%20sign%20me%20up%20to%20volunteer!%0A%0AHere%20is%20my%20availability%3A%0A%0AI%20can%2Fcannot%20come%20to%20the%20meeting%20on%20Tuesday%2C%20March%2029th.)
---
|

name: Team Read
subject: Gov Kitzhaber joins the team!
body:
Governor John Kitzhaber has endorsed Tobias for Governor! It’s no coincidence that two former Democratic Governors are supporting Tobias.
---
| | Dear Peter, **Governor John Kitzhaber has endorsed Tobias for Governor!** It’s no coincidence that two former Democratic Governors are supporting Tobias. Governor Kitzhaber – like Governor Barbara Roberts – knows what it takes to lead Oregon, and that **new leadership is needed to shake up the status quo and invest in our future.** Governor Kitzhaber established the Oregon Health Plan and has dedicated his life to improving access to and quality of healthcare for every Oregonian. So he knows what he’s talking about when he says **“bold, outcomes-based leadership, unfettered by the status quo, is what Oregon needs and what Tobias brings to this race.”** It’s time for Oregon to have a real plan for tackling rising crime, homelessness, and education issues. Tobias is ready to lead on day one, and we’re proud to have the counsel and support of Governor Kitzhaber as we take on these tough challenges. Thanks,
Team Read
---

---

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43294566/336578756/429136084?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjhhNGY3YS1kYmFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WER4L3FZY1PAft3g7Bx0OMfdg3SH4XMUwzUlvaiBWoA=&emci=b7a23839-39a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=8b8a4f7a-dbaa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=12898431)
---
Friend,
Across the country, Republican officials are targetting LGBTQ+ students and their families with discriminatory bills. In one of the most extreme cases, **Florida Republicans are attempting to ban conversations about sexual orientation or gender identity in elementary school classrooms with the passage of the "Don't Say Gay" bill.**
Important voices, stories, and histories of our nation stand to be minimized or even erased, all while driving home a message of alienation and shame towards our LGBTQ+ students.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43294567/336578757/416963966?refcode=X_032222_Don%27tSayLGBTQ&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjhhNGY3YS1kYmFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WER4L3FZY1PAft3g7Bx0OMfdg3SH4XMUwzUlvaiBWoA=)
---

In the last month alone, Republicans across the country have introduced over 15 bills that aim to restrict and even penalize conversations about gender and sexual orientation.

Even as we continue to navigate the COVID-19 pandemic, it is clear we are also facing an epidemic of hate and discrimination that lurks within our own democracy.

Kirsten is ready to take on that epidemic and fight for our LGBTQ+ students and their families in Congress, but she's counting on your support to get there.

[**That's why we're asking you to chip in whatever you can today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43294568/336578758/416963966?refcode=X_032222_Don'tSayLGBTQ&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjhhNGY3YS1kYmFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WER4L3FZY1PAft3g7Bx0OMfdg3SH4XMUwzUlvaiBWoA=)

body:
|

Hi Peter,

There are many things that make Emilia the right person to represent OH-13 in Congress, such her stellar record as a member of the Ohio State House. **Today, we wanted to highlight just a few of her accomplishments:**
* Emilia’s HB1 bill, which strengthened protections for domestic abuse survivors, **was one of the first priority bills to be sponsored by a Democrat in years, and it resulted in Ohio changing its outdated domestic abuse laws.**

* In the face of voter suppression, Emilia organized a “Freedom to Vote” tour across Ohio in 2021, which gave Ohioans a platform to voice their criticism of unjust restrictions.

* Emilia is the youngest Black woman to serve in the Ohio General Assembly, and was the first woman elected under the age of 30.

* Despite serving in the minority, Emilia’s first year as Minority Leader saw the percentage of bipartisan bills passed nearly _double_ from each of the previous two legislative sessions.

[**If reading this got you fired up about having Emilia represent us in Congress, we hope you’ll chip into her campaign to keep it running. name: Glenn Beck
subject: We’re rushing support to Ukraine. You can help.
body:
When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous. Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentime
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf2b4b7rj6bebj0aq81nlhomkc58l1q4fhmru8o8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1hm4o31c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf8pjjmhojbc3k6lin9dbkm2qe6shnmhpbedhjeoom4dthm8q62tr3e9qnco9kssrt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8o6ct30mmomfdj4coqe1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmhh6btidvqnre8gv28bu5vb9m7ihkifevatp7qo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1hm4o31c9h2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5jftnfra4o8f513s30b7933rvhclpcdraubjja8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1hm4o31c9h2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv3ib6li7bq1fr1uhrrh72uo82bevaa9qi54f9l0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1hm4o31c9h2bs)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeababr8acdf7p23g7ka7o3ardkt4kgubdl6rs7g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1hm4o31c9h2bs)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcpsaa3djct4fdnn5iin6mabvsk0fv48qfaj0930_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1hm4o31c9h2bs)
| | | _Copyright © 2022 Mercury One, Inc., All rights reserved._ Mercury One, Inc.
P.O. Box 140489
Irving, TX 75014 Mercury One is a trusted 501(c)(3) non-profit | EIN no. 45-3929881

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3e0jr741lr4887jibvvrkam427oj80qpsjl28k8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1hm4o31c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Moms for Katie Porter
subject: Why this matters.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Hi Peter,
Can I take a minute to tell you more about or friend and inspiration Congresswoman Katie Porter , Peter?
Katie is a force to be reckoned with. She’s a fearless advocate for working families, and one of our champions in the fight for paid family leave. You do know about her white board, right?
She’s also at serious risk of losing her House seat.
Here’s why: The GOP listed her as a top target in the midterm elections. They are determined to retake the House majority and in order to do so, they need to flip Katie’s seat.
Can you please rush a donation to support her re-election campaign today? We promised her that Moms for Katie Porter could raise her $10,000 by the end of this month and we are so close. We are counting on you to chip in to help us close the gap. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatieporter?refcode=0920]
In 2018, Katie was the underdog and narrowly flipped her district blue. If she’s going to keep her seat next year, she’ll need supporters like you and organizations like us to power her campaign.
None of this work would be possible without you.
With gratitude,
Simona Grace

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: POLL: Making Daylight Saving Time PERMANENT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
My bill has been passed by unanimous consent. Read more >>>
| | | Peter,

Last week, the U.S. Senate approved a bill I co-sponsored to end Daylight Saving Time and make an extra hour of extra daylight in the evening permanent.

**I’m thrilled that this common-sense legislation was passed by unanimous consent!**

My phone has been ringing off the hook in support of this bill – from moms and dads who want more daylight before bedtime to senior citizens who want more sun in the evenings to enjoy the outdoors to farmers who could use the extra daylight to work in the fields.

Now, it’s up to the U.S. House to take action and move this forward.

Today, I want to get your opinion.
Do you support ENDING the Daylight Saving Time switch?

[**RECORD YOUR RESPONSE HERE >>>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/c303c3f6f0c4075d/c69ea3533dddeec0c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
\- Coach

| BREAKING: Ex-FBI Agent William Tisaby, Greitens Case Investigator, Pleads Guilty To Evidence Tampering
---
| St. Louis, MO -- Former Missouri governor Eric Greitens released the following statement as ex-FBI agent William Don Tisaby plead guilty to evidence tampering in Soros-funded prosecutor Kim Gardner's false case:
The truth prevails. Those who made false accusations against me have been proven wrong once again. Today, the Soros-funded, corrupt former FBI agent, who conspired with a Soros - funded prosecutor to push a false case against me, plead guilty. Soros and his team came after me, because I was fighting for you. It was evident from the beginning, this was nothing more than a witch hunt--funded by Soros, fueled by the media, and enabled by RINO cowards.
I am honored to continue to fight for the people of Missouri and the America First agenda.
