| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Press contact: [info@barnetteforsenate.com](mailto:info@barnetteforsenate.com) March 23, 2022

Barnette for Senate Announces Seniors for Barnette
The Kathy Barnette for Senate Campaign announces the formation of Seniors for Barnette. The effort will be coordinated by Ross Schriftman. His email is [ross@barnetteforsenate.com](mailto:ross@barnetteforsenate.com).
"Kathy has a strong commitment to American families and the generations that have made America an exceptional nation." Said Schriftman. "Kathy is a very special candidate who asks people important questions and considers their advice, which is rare in today's political environment."
Schriftman pointed out Kathy's well-thought-out positions on the issues which are posted on her website at [www.barnetteforsenate.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00116pOcwIdtOJFCP2TRByJwnP4Kb9B3FOJ4yUzrCqcBrqc-ZWaPYalF_q6eANhaShoR8_HCciWY-426mkLxCiF5ZeQg5L7HIkf-ZN8bjopSSnEy2BimUXTUpg-oYPfV_GrYiFIkme8wjeKOQZjrUoR9qsfVKBy-rU-&c=ciTvDgz_sucMxAs4TJXv5yjdhWRxe4jTw_hiTf89Xi_xmkypuzSbCQ==&ch=A39ga81yGC2yALF-AY4MFcVanqHUc4gJHOkcczmzfJK-LZ-wqTP0lA==). "In the policy section entitled Health Care, Kathy has addressed the need to preserve Social Security and Medicare through a growing and vibrant economy which generates the funds to maintain these programs." Schriftman pointed out. "She recognizes the experiences and ideas of older Pennsylvanians. She has also developed ideas that will provide choices for people to fund their care needs as they age."
Among the activities of Seniors for Barnette will be a "seniors to seniors" program where supporters will contact their friends and family to tell Kathy's unique story, her goals and her positions. The campaign is also recruiting volunteers to make phone calls, canvass their neighbors and help on election day. The tremendous growth of Kathy's grassroots campaign has just been demonstrated as volunteers gathered more than 12,000 signatures to place her on the May 17th Pennsylvania Republican Primary. In addition, thousands of Democrats and Independents of all backgrounds are changing their party registration to vote for Kathy in the Primary election.
To sign up for Seniors for Barnette send an email to [Steve.Eissler@barnetteforsenate.com](mailto:Steve.Eissler@barnetteforsenate.com) and include your full name, email address, best phone number, and what county you live in. Also indicate whether you would like to help Kathy's campaign with the following:
Phone calls - From your home, calls to registered Republicans to encourage them to vote for Kathy in the May 17th primary election.
Door Knocking - Hand out Kathy's brochure to your Republican neighbors
Yard sign - Place a Kathy Barnette for Senate sign on your lawn
Election Day volunteer - Hand out Kathy's brochure at your local polling location on May 17th. (4-hour shifts)
Donate \- the Barnette campaign needs donors to keep Kathy funded through election day. You can make an online donation [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00116pOcwIdtOJFCP2TRByJwnP4Kb9B3FOJ4yUzrCqcBrqc-ZWaPYalF7YLzYFSdJJE-H1V6TbCpiDcPhpIOTMbt5aaTAdFabOkarQx-TbByjyRMM4ZhWseRx-E_h9FFvbocVOrzNUcWy5LghaWMziXmxWjfnK3DyphjTBdSzISSYra5tYiUSARL2h_qfd_Ez4Y&c=ciTvDgz_sucMxAs4TJXv5yjdhWRxe4jTw_hiTf89Xi_xmkypuzSbCQ==&ch=A39ga81yGC2yALF-AY4MFcVanqHUc4gJHOkcczmzfJK-LZ-wqTP0lA==).

| | Team, Caucuses may be over, but there’s still a huge opportunity to show your support for Sonia at this year’s Democratic State Convention: Apply to be an add-on delegate! Add-on delegates have the same voting power as elected delegates — the only difference is [_**they just have to apply by the deadline on April 9th**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43285831/336537597/2040295928?ms=web-nav&refcode=web-nav&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGQyYzQyNC1iZWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I5s5ZJaa7-j6WSUxVtycjtIZ0nPTKFG9vd0Ebps6D-g=&emci=d761847e-b7aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=44d2c424-beaa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684840) and identify with one of the following categories:

I’ve said before, and I’ll say it again, friend. Our best chance to show the grassroots power behind this campaign is by showing up in full force at the Democratic State Convention in June, whether you join virtually or in person in Worcester. That’s why it’s critical that as many members of Team Sonia apply to be add-ons as possible.
[**If you’re interested in applying for an add-on spot, fill out our form, and a member of Team Sonia will help you submit your application with the Massachusetts Democrats. If you have any questions about this process, feel free to reach out.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43285834/336537599/2040295928?ms=web-nav&refcode=web-nav&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGQyYzQyNC1iZWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I5s5ZJaa7-j6WSUxVtycjtIZ0nPTKFG9vd0Ebps6D-g=&emci=d761847e-b7aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=44d2c424-beaa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684840)

clean_body: There’s still time to apply to be a delegate for Sonia. It’s as easy as filling out a form. | | | | | Team, Caucuses may be over, but there’s still a huge opportunity to show your support for Sonia at this year’s Democratic State Convention: Apply to be an add-on delegate! Add-on delegates have the same voting power as elected delegates — the only difference is and identify with one of the following categories: Disability LGBTQ+ Underrepresented Ethnic and Racial Groups Youth (16-35 years old) | I’ve said before, and I’ll say it again, friend. Our best chance to show the grassroots power behind this campaign is by showing up in full force at the Democratic State Convention in June, whether you join virtually or in person in Worcester. That’s why it’s critical that as many members of Team Sonia apply to be add-ons as possible. body:
She’s one of the only Republicans standing up to Trump!
| TEXT JOIN TO 50224 TO GET IMPORTANT ACTION ALERTS FROM VOTER PROTECTION PROJECT! [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/128?t=1&akid=1595%2E878179%2E5Ci_GB)

**_But you didn’t sign – and the MAGA Party is STILL lobbing BRUTAL attacks at Liz Cheney. We don’t know how much longer she can hold out!_**

[**So we’re reopening our petition for the next [2] HOURS. The GOP won’t stop attacking Liz Cheney to save Donald Trump. She needs our support more than ever! SIGN NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand_with_cheney/?source=VPP_20220323_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=1595%2E878179%2E5Ci_GB) | [**I STAND WITH LIZ CHENEY »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand_with_cheney/?source=VPP_20220323_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=9&akid=1595%2E878179%2E5Ci_GB)
---
**UNLESS WE HIT OUR 35,000 SIGNATURE GOAL ASAP, LIZ CHENEY COULD FOLD AND LET TRUMP OFF SCOT-FREE._SIGN NOW!_**
* * *
Here’s a quick reminder of Tucker Carlson’s attack:
[ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand_with_cheney/?source=VPP_20220323_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=1595%2E878179%2E5Ci_GB)
When Liz Cheney BRAVELY stood up to Donald Trump, her own party ATTACKED her & publicly PUNISHED Cheney in an attempt to _silence her._

We don’t always agree with Liz Cheney. **But our Democracy is hanging on by a thread, so we have to stand with her IMMEDIATELY.**

[**Please, our petition will only be open for another [2] HOURS. Don’t let Trump get off scot-free. Sign NOW to stand with Liz Cheney »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand_with_cheney/?source=VPP_20220323_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=1595%2E878179%2E5Ci_GB)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=1595%2E878179%2E5Ci_GB). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=1595%2E878179%2E5Ci_GB).**

name: Gibbons for Ohio
subject: We Will Fight The Swamp
body:
Check out our weekly newsletter...
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014EcvaD-dpUuYIkLs-DLzecgaCkAfwYWl4pTLSNPdR5rUM5r8pgs2eKQwJQbadTEyKBTS6z3LEi4f3wLqiUH0hOX1gyEl87y9Ns-ieZ3hbe-tfCawcCWrFpgmaPzHGR5nxHyEOMfMOtTCea3SrW2y7TjTq7voTpeCdnFeyROoILIYbJkurJdD2A==&c=TyxVEOA2OPAdD4Q1M1A-1Rtbgkuf11GggCsB0CWxL1xJCL7lHziaDA==&ch=FcKThNjZkS0e92dpYlbnDeb7nAWCoD_NCDcP5OwZUTH93Top1lyUQw==)
---
| Happy spring from #TeamGibbons!
I am working hard each and every day to fight for our shared conservative values across Ohio. We've had a big week on the road meeting with voters all over the state. The overwhelming majority of Ohioans I meet on the campaign trail are concerned with inflation, election integrity and our southern border and I plan to make these issues my first priority once in office.
In case you missed it, I have a new [TV and digital ad](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014EcvaD-dpUuYIkLs-DLzecgaCkAfwYWl4pTLSNPdR5rUM5r8pgs2eBH61pMhs23RkRRMIn2_WRLT1f2ipDxWq-SITOoJ0UjZGKaZChLfkZZfDgJH0WtbsBJ39dSjGZWQJ45to8QOrLLkFB7eywGg7C8kbLTV-LOt6EGUPAuqTie9EyB6grT2n1leCpSSJ6PBGq41Y9zTmHoTKenGDWefSvoVn_0OYz7R&c=TyxVEOA2OPAdD4Q1M1A-1Rtbgkuf11GggCsB0CWxL1xJCL7lHziaDA==&ch=FcKThNjZkS0e92dpYlbnDeb7nAWCoD_NCDcP5OwZUTH93Top1lyUQw==) that were launched today. You can check out our behind-the-scenes bus tour video below and get more details on the TV [ad series here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014EcvaD-dpUuYIkLs-DLzecgaCkAfwYWl4pTLSNPdR5rUM5r8pgs2eBj6IE19PfWZ-I_Vt5uLCuiNo3YU5t8QvBMovB57qJzkIouwta3WEhflKTZqywdP64mGBoh8LzXIDPFSzKXgFvxHTAv1fL2P-5xTu4fZGNgJkxb7mcvOk22fUhTAhqmpJ0UMbkc06QTQQAIeZK8DA1Pw0bnrAmUO4gjpYOK9kSfeMYKRJzEy1Ur4lk7aIYYJmg==&c=TyxVEOA2OPAdD4Q1M1A-1Rtbgkuf11GggCsB0CWxL1xJCL7lHziaDA==&ch=FcKThNjZkS0e92dpYlbnDeb7nAWCoD_NCDcP5OwZUTH93Top1lyUQw==)!
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014EcvaD-dpUuYIkLs-DLzecgaCkAfwYWl4pTLSNPdR5rUM5r8pgs2eBH61pMhs23RftFZy55UMDTMEZ6CzBXLEPPXoUxh-eu7g2irFcOK8VwH5RgATRKs2m7ysoTNyJyG22h-EcsuZfgk8snC-sWK9g==&c=TyxVEOA2OPAdD4Q1M1A-1Rtbgkuf11GggCsB0CWxL1xJCL7lHziaDA==&ch=FcKThNjZkS0e92dpYlbnDeb7nAWCoD_NCDcP5OwZUTH93Top1lyUQw==)
---
| | |
---
| It was great meeting this past week with voters in Champaign County, Miami County, the Cincinnati area, and Cleveland area! I believe I have what it takes to fight for conservative values with my life-long career in business and I know Ohioans agree.
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014EcvaD-dpUuYIkLs-DLzecgaCkAfwYWl4pTLSNPdR5rUM5r8pgs2eBH61pMhs23RntP9N8XV6ZBvZGLoIu24fBRnQ7e3SdeuJeWHgTaOvgge2RyuNW2qAZS_7ke_CxLktpQmIODfj16BVRvlm6kGAz_IeeyWHXJoEMLSwY71Ekzh2w2EPTjpADd7GKFoUHNY235Z_eh57DU=&c=TyxVEOA2OPAdD4Q1M1A-1Rtbgkuf11GggCsB0CWxL1xJCL7lHziaDA==&ch=FcKThNjZkS0e92dpYlbnDeb7nAWCoD_NCDcP5OwZUTH93Top1lyUQw==)

| Mike Gibbons wants to give [Ohio](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014EcvaD-dpUuYIkLs-DLzecgaCkAfwYWl4pTLSNPdR5rUM5r8pgs2eLVS_SiMCjUcmG4FwqbIYxFnXGPEOz1sjW4GlCaCKG-jWSgkpFObtqqvns84EjjPLzsLfuFTSDRE-aBbRX-AuXidMBzSm31Hak-JiGwgW4rCWtteRP8qYybCyVVTqdtK_LCCj5thF3EvwX4vwe4_bCA=&c=TyxVEOA2OPAdD4Q1M1A-1Rtbgkuf11GggCsB0CWxL1xJCL7lHziaDA==&ch=FcKThNjZkS0e92dpYlbnDeb7nAWCoD_NCDcP5OwZUTH93Top1lyUQw==) voters a behind the scenes look at his [Republican](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014EcvaD-dpUuYIkLs-DLzecgaCkAfwYWl4pTLSNPdR5rUM5r8pgs2eBH61pMhs23RrvY7cGY9armzX20XMZwftCdP9VMlgNahq4rIvZPQE7GzJenAM4Z6On7zg95oCG6SG1bolJsPyQhhXX1eMfo26zIQ1ZIn4Q1E_gCzOSuqx6hSX53W_yglcbXyMe_jpp1bY5DqPwh_3Js=&c=TyxVEOA2OPAdD4Q1M1A-1Rtbgkuf11GggCsB0CWxL1xJCL7lHziaDA==&ch=FcKThNjZkS0e92dpYlbnDeb7nAWCoD_NCDcP5OwZUTH93Top1lyUQw==) campaign for [the Senate](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014EcvaD-dpUuYIkLs-DLzecgaCkAfwYWl4pTLSNPdR5rUM5r8pgs2eBH61pMhs23RhnEvwMy0dAtT8jmgRPkVDW9wrC_SeOb4Z1oae2kljv7Y_hEjAifLzIeg8V6duD0hqbe8hO8NsjdMTtg-7iIFU-PmDH9uaNp5ndR-PJZo0z14A--LYKepAw==&c=TyxVEOA2OPAdD4Q1M1A-1Rtbgkuf11GggCsB0CWxL1xJCL7lHziaDA==&ch=FcKThNjZkS0e92dpYlbnDeb7nAWCoD_NCDcP5OwZUTH93Top1lyUQw==).

| | **Hello Friend,** **I am so proud to announce that the Honorable Joe Salazar has endorsed my campaign for Colorado's First Congressional District!** [](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=7c66c02157&e=e67cbb3f92) **Joe's tenacity has lead him to be on the forefront of the most important fights in Colorado. He is unwavering in his demand for human dignity and justice which is why I am so honored to have his support! Joe and I both understand the establishment money that we are up against and we need your help to overcome the special interests that are working to keep candidates like me down.**

[**Join Joe in supporting this people powered campaign by donating $25, $50, $100, or $250 today!**](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=a161ae05b0&e=e67cbb3f92)

**I am humbled by the trust that I have received from such an inspiring leader in the community and I look forward to taking the fight for justice to Washington DC.**
In Solidarity,
Neal Walia

name: Congresswoman Val Demings
subject: re: Judge Jackson's nomination
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Should the Senate vote to confirm Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson?
| | |
---
Friend: Right now, we're witnessing history unfold as the Senate considers confirming Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court – the first Black woman to be nominated to this position.
I couldn't be more proud of Judge Jackson's nomination. Just like me, she was raised in Florida and worked incredibly hard to get where she is today. She excelled at Harvard University, spent years as a public defender, and has more trial court experience than any other Supreme Court justice on the bench. She's one of the most qualified Supreme Court nominees ever.
**It's time we have a Supreme Court that truly represents the diversity of our country – and Judge Jackson's nomination is one step in the right direction. That's why I'm reaching out to you today, friend. As the Senate considers confirming Judge Jackson, I need to know where you stand during this historic moment: **
| | **LIVE POLL | DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M.**
---
**Should the Senate vote to confirm Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson?**
---
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43295912/336585621/-874324783?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2710-su-nd-v2&refcode=jtk2710-su-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTA2NTQ3Ni1lMmFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2GTMjhJecUdyNir99UbfK2tjrYV4OcP7oThiuVYOdCU=&emci=a0837fba-bbaa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=09065476-e2aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43295914/336585623/-874324783?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2710-su-nd-v2&refcode=jtk2710-su-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTA2NTQ3Ni1lMmFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2GTMjhJecUdyNir99UbfK2tjrYV4OcP7oThiuVYOdCU=&emci=a0837fba-bbaa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=09065476-e2aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100)
---
Judge Jackson has proven time and again that she's qualified to serve as a Supreme Court justice, but the Republican Party is trying to tarnish her credibility. Of course, Judge Jackson is no stranger to attacks like these – and neither am I.
I grew up Black and female in the South. I remember being told as a child that I wasn't the right color. I wasn't the right gender. I know what it feels like not to get the benefit of the doubt, to have to prove you're more qualified than everyone else just to be offered a seat at the table.
Still, not a day goes by that I don't fight for America's promise – the promise that if you work hard, you can accomplish anything, no matter your background. And the first step toward reaching the promise of America is electing leaders that truly represent the diversity of our country.
**It's critical that the Senate confirms Judge Jackson without delay – but Republicans are pulling out all the stops to block her nomination. As the GOP tries to undercut her experience, I need to know what you think:**
| | **LIVE POLL | DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M.**
---
**Should the Senate vote to confirm Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson?**
---

I couldn't be more proud of Judge Jackson's nomination. Just like me, she was raised in Florida and worked incredibly hard to get where she is today. She excelled at Harvard University, spent years as a public defender, and has more trial court experience than any other Supreme Court justice on the bench. She's one of the most qualified Supreme Court nominees ever. It's time we have a Supreme Court that truly represents the diversity of our country – and Judge Jackson's nomination is one step in the right direction. That's why I'm reaching out to you today, friend. As the Senate considers confirming Judge Jackson, I need to know where you stand during this historic moment: | | LIVE POLL | DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M. Should the Senate vote to confirm Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson? | | | | Judge Jackson has proven time and again that she's qualified to serve as a Supreme Court justice, but the Republican Party is trying to tarnish her credibility. Of course, Judge Jackson is no stranger to attacks like these – and neither am I. I grew up Black and female in the South. I remember being told as a child that I wasn't the right color. I wasn't the right gender. I know what it feels like not to get the benefit of the doubt, to have to prove you're more qualified than everyone else just to be offered a seat at the table. Still, not a day goes by that I don't fight for America's promise – the promise that if you work hard, you can accomplish anything, no matter your background. And the first step toward reaching the promise of America is electing leaders that truly represent the diversity of our country. It's critical that the Senate confirms Judge Jackson without delay – but Republicans are pulling out all the stops to block her nomination. As the GOP tries to undercut her experience, I need to know what you think: | | LIVE POLL | DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M. Should the Senate vote to confirm Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson? | | | | Thank you, Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. name: Gary Black
subject: Constitutional judges
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/bad9e275e86396fc/83b70853c087502cc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
# **Friend — One of the most important jobs in the U.S. Senate is confirming judges to the federal bench who will defend and uphold the Constitution. **

---
This week is a reminder, as we’re in the midst of a Supreme Court nominee’s confirmation hearing. **When I’m in the Senate, I will ONLY vote for judicial nominees who are committed to the Constitution. ** **I will not vote for ANY judicial activist who wants to write laws from the bench. ** That’s a clear contrast between Raphael Warnock and me. He has signed off on every extreme nominee that Joe Biden has put forward. **It ends when Republicans take back the majority — and we must win in Georgia in order for that to happen. ** [**If you agree that we should only confirm judges who will defend and uphold our Constitutional rights, I hope you’ll SIGN your name here and let me know.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/bad9e275e86396fc/2af9c1dddd7e709ac3d6b838967d376c/37793)

_**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $10 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.

name: VoteVets
subject: Did you see what Nate Silver's 538 said about VoteVets?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
“Notably, however, veterans endorsed by VoteVets do better than veterans the organization did not endorse (22 percent win rate).”
#
Derek —
We are writing to ask if you could make a $3 contribution to VoteVets before our FEC fundraising deadline comes to an end.
Why? Because we get results. This is from a previous election cycle’s analysis by Nate Silver’s 538:
_“Notably, however, veterans endorsed by VoteVets do better than veterans the organization did not endorse (22 percent win rate).”_
What makes this even more important is that our brand allows us to run ads in places other progressive groups can’t – think Missouri, Arizona, and a number of key House districts, as well.
That makes us central to the efforts to hold the Senate and retain the House in this election. But we can’t do it alone. We need you with us. So we have to ask:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to VoteVets before our critical FEC fundraising deadline comes to an end? This is a big one for us, and emails like this are how we generate almost all of our donations.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-pac-work?refcode=em220323-1-15&t=1&refcode2=4617_3013755_pZZzYl&akid=4617%2E3013755%2EpZZzYl)
We have received almost 30,000 individual donations already this year. So when we hold the Senate and the House and you see that we are key to that fight, know your contribution played a big part in that effort.
All our best,
The team at VoteVets

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Bernie's re-introducing Medicare for All
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, Bernie just
said he plans to re-introduce Medicare for All in the Senate.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/m4a_bernie_2022/?source=em20220323-22521&t=1002&akid=22521%2E1203867%2ERZwTzI ]Tweet from Senator Bernie Sanders that reads In the midst of the
current set of horrors – war, oligarchy, pandemics, inflation, climate
change, etc. – we must continue the fight to establish health care as a
human right, not a privilege. I will soon be reintroducing our Medicare
for All legislation.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/m4a_bernie_2022/?source=em20220323-22521&t=1003&akid=22521%2E1203867%2ERZwTzI ]We must stand with Bernie at this critical moment in the fight for
single-payer health care. Add your name in support of Bernie and Medicare
for All right now!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/m4a_bernie_2022/?source=em20220323-22521&t=1004&akid=22521%2E1203867%2ERZwTzI ]Add your name

We know the fight for Medicare for All won’t be easy — we’ve been at this
fight alongside Bernie and the Justice Democrats in Congress for years.
And it’s one of the biggest fights between the people and corporate power
in this country.

Tens of thousands of people die each year at the hands of the private,
for-profit health care system in America. If we passed Medicare for All,
and established health care as a human right, everyone would be able to
get the care they need.

Health insurance executives and health care companies spend millions
lobbying against Medicare for All, because they want to continue profiting
from our broken system. And corporate Democrats join Republicans to
endlessly smear M4A, because they all want to keep raking in campaign
donations from corporate health care PACs.

No matter how hard it gets, we must continue this fight. With Bernie
re-introducing Medicare for All soon, we must show the support
single-payer health care has across the country.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/m4a_bernie_2022/?source=em20220323-22521&t=1005&akid=22521%2E1203867%2ERZwTzI ]Add your name in support of Bernie bringing back M4A to the Senate and
our fight for single-payer health care. It’s time to put care ahead of
corporate profits!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/m4a_bernie_2022/?source=em20220323-22521&t=1006&akid=22521%2E1203867%2ERZwTzI ]Add your name

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1007&akid=22521%2E1203867%2ERZwTzI ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1008&akid=22521%2E1203867%2ERZwTzI ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220323-22521-footer&t=1009&refcode2=22521_1203867_RZwTzI&akid=22521%2E1203867%2ERZwTzI

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1010&akid=22521%2E1203867%2ERZwTzI

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Peter Franchot
subject: BREAKING: New Poll Confirms Peter Franchot is the Democratic Frontrunner
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
I have exciting news to share with you today: a newly released poll has once again confirmed that our movement is the frontrunner in the Democratic race for Governor.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/PollUpdate_March23_1200x1200.png]
The poll, conducted by Greenberg Quinlan Rosner Research, shows that we are the leading choice for Governor among 23% of Democratic voters, and that we have a strong eight-point lead over the second place candidate. It also confirms what we knew from the very beginning – that our campaign has wide appeal across race, age, gender, and geography.
To everyone who participated in this poll, I can’t thank you enough for your trust and support. This is yet another confirmation that our inclusive people-powered movement, built from the grassroots up by supporters right here in Maryland, continues to gain momentum.
As the Local Candidate for Governor, the people of Maryland know me, and I know them. If I’m blessed to lead, I’ll fight to lift our communities into the high quality of life that they deserve. Marylanders need less rhetoric and more results. As Governor, that’s exactly what I’ll deliver.
This is big news for our campaign, and we need your help to spread the word to all corners of Maryland! Use the following links below to share with your friends on social media.
Click here to view and reshare on Facebook. [https://www.facebook.com/photo/?fbid=538376190987780&set=a.422901372535263]
Click here to view and retweet on Twitter. [https://twitter.com/peterfranchot/status/1506649051579797512/photo/1]
Click here to view and reshare on Instagram. [https://www.instagram.com/p/Cbc2T4FsrNF/]
Together, we’re going to win the Primary in July, win the Governor’s Mansion this November, and redefine the promise and possibility of state government in the years to come.
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/b823015f-bbaa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/5ef2e657-c2aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWYyZTY1Ny1jMmFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ET_eIrppQBNKKzmKsLiy4erDV-AEljCJIE53sIdMsG8=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Reminder: Diehl challenges state lawmakers to forgo stipends and raises if they don't suspend the state gas tax
body:
| | | |
---
| DIEHL CHALLENGES STATE LAWMAKERS TO FORGO STIPENDS AND RAISES IF THEY DON'T SUSPEND THE STATE GAS TAX BOSTON, Mass. - Geoff Diehl, Republican candidate for Governor, issued a challenge to state legislative leaders today: if they are unwilling to suspend the state gas tax, then lawmakers should give up stipends they receive as part of their pay. "I think it's very simple," Diehl said. "Massachusetts residents are facing inflation rates of about 8 percent. That includes sky-high gas prices at the pump. They need a break. But, state legislative leaders have been unwilling to help them out. It's time to call out their hypocrisy and make them show whose side they're really on."
---
---
According to a recent Wall Street Journal poll, about half of people making less than $60,000 annually say they are feeling major economic pain due to inflation, while only about 13 percent of those making more than $150,000 a year said the same. "It's no wonder the Senate President and House Speaker, both of whom earn taxpayer-funded salaries of more than $175,000 a year, don't think it's important to suspend the gas tax," said Diehl. "They don't feel the sting. In fact, taxpayers fund their transportation costs through a pay stipend they and other legislators receive. I'm here to fight for the people of Massachusetts who are feeling pain at the pumps, the grocery store, and elsewhere due to higher prices." "The Senate President and House Speaker closed the Statehouse to the public for more than 700 days during the pandemic," Diehl continued. "During this time, many legislators weren't in the building. They weren't traveling into Boston for meetings with the public, because they couldn't meet in person. And yet, most continued to collect compensation stipends, in part to reimburse them for supposed costs of commuting into Boston from their home districts. Now, these same legislators are going to tell Massachusetts residents they're not going to use billions of dollars of excess revenue to give them a break at the gas pumps? That's outrageous!"
Diehl said he supports legislation (S.D. 3052) recently filed by State Senator Ryan Fattman and co-sponsored by many Republican colleagues in the House and Senate, that would suspend collection of the state gas tax through Labor Day. "If I were Governor, I would advocate for passage of this bill and sign it into law immediately," said Diehl. "And, if lawmakers refuse to pass it, I would call on them to forgo their stipend payments through the rest of this year, and refuse to accept any legislative pay raises. On behalf of the taxpayers of this state, I'm here to tell legislators that they can't keep having it both ways." Diehl has consistently called for suspension of the state gas tax in recent weeks. He is also widely credited with having led a 2014 ballot campaign to block automatic increases in the state gas tax tied to the rate of inflation.
---
| |
---

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Reminder: Statement of Amanda Orlando, Diehl for Massachusetts, regarding allegations of a delegate “scandal”
body:
| | | |
---
| Statement of Amanda Orlando, Diehl for Massachusetts, regarding allegations of a delegate "scandal"
BOSTON, Mass. - Amanda Orlando, Campaign Chair for the Geoff Diehl for Governor Campaign, issued the following statement today regarding allegations of a delegate "cheating scandal" alleged by the Doughty for Governor and Campanale for Lieutenant Governor Campaigns:--
"This past weekend, I attended a meeting of the Massachusetts Republican State Committee Credentials Committee on behalf of the Diehl for Governor campaign.
I find it sad that the Doughty and Campanale campaigns, one of which admitted to lying to the Credentials Committee, and the other who attempted to pass off an apparent registered Democrat as a delegate to the Republican convention, are arrogant enough to be accusing the Diehl campaign, which has been nothing but truthful and transparent, of wrongdoing.
The purpose of the Credentials Committee is to ensure the integrity of the party's nominating convention and the local caucusing process that elected delegates to serve. The Diehl for Governor campaign wholeheartedly supports and respects the Massachusetts Republican Party, the convention rules, and the delegates who have volunteered to serve at the convention. Case in point: Geoff Diehl is the only candidate for Governor who has thus far supported the convention by paying the $25,000 fee required to attend to be eligible for the primary ballot.
The MassGOP Credentials Committee found evidence, and presented it to both campaigns for Governor, that a certain multi-community caucus in western Massachusetts was organized without proper notice and was not run according to party rules.
Republican caucuses are the purview of local party committees, not statewide campaigns and are reliant upon specified rules being followed in order to insure voting integrity at the state party's annual convention. We support the Credentials Committee and its findings that notifications were not properly given prior to a handful of caucuses and I agreed, at the MassGOP Credentials Committee meeting, that those delegates had to be ruled ineligible.
These delegates were attempting to participate in good faith and we appreciate their efforts, which I also stated during the Credentials committee meeting.
It is the hope and intent of the Diehl for Governor campaign that all interested Republicans will have an opportunity to attend the nominating convention on May 21 as a way to unite our party and give a boost to our party's nominees for statewide office. Accusations of a "scandal" made today by the Doughty for Governor and Campanale for Lieutenant Governor campaigns are factually incorrect and inappropriate. The Diehl for Governor campaign calls upon those other candidates to retract their statements as they relate to Geoff Diehl and his campaign. Particularly since the representative of the Campanale campaign, Rep. Peter Durant, who attended the MassGOP Credentials Committee meeting on her behalf, admitted to lying to the group during the meeting about an inquiry related to Ms. Campanale's enrollment status.
Our campaign submitted evidence, undisputed by Mr. Durant, that Ms. Campanale changed her voting registration from Unenrolled to Republican on February 7, 2022 at the Spencer, MA town hall (the deadline to be a registered Republican for delegate eligibility is 12/31/2021.) The Credentials Committee will investigate the same and issue a finding, which our campaign will respect. I also introduced to the Credentials Committee evidence that Leslie Doughty, Chris Doughty's wife, who had registered to be a delegate, had previously been a registered Democrat, and asked the Credentials Committee to review her eligibility to serve as a delegate at the Republican convention."
###

subject: Did you see Mandel nearly assault me?
body:
My friend Senator Rand Paul once wrote a book, "Big Government Bullies." Josh Mandel proved himself to be a Big Government bully.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001du-nQYblhena9pMGUm6jut8pHK_Ggf4W7VGApLIxO3X7gragL2hRYAxTP8NYm5eD4B81r0lNgc6gyhx979LgdqQnLjwadzwBPmBee70GNGY2dvzMqETEx3FwgTWX25rXBIoWQSm00xK4xDd3AnRMTimm2CQ3qAm2xqbMdIdiTIe7grDg4ET8Ew==&c=I4SkvqiP5ZZvVV1mWdlBJr66-wxsL1woK_I_0Bu9YxXDuCfCjXCyXQ==&ch=ZYN8lZ7qJOVa28MB6Owi1B6pczP8jrfxJiz2nh0Vsg5BUwJjF-p9Ig==)

| Peter,
My friend, Senator Rand Paul, once wrote a book, "Big Government Bullies."
Josh Mandel is demonstrating himself to be one of those Big Government bullies.
At a FreedomWorks Debate, Mandel interrupted me and got in my face in a pathetic attempt to intimidate and silence me.
But I refused to back down.
He proceeded to sit down after realizing the mistake he had made. However, in a moment of weakness, Mandel got back up in my face again. He puffed up his chest, yelled, and threatened me in front of the audience.
Again, I refused to back down.
I let him know I wasn't afraid of him and that the America-First movement wouldn't back down over threats. [You can help me stand up to Big Government Bullies like Josh Mandel by clicking here and donating to our campaign today >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001du-nQYblhena9pMGUm6jut8pHK_Ggf4W7VGApLIxO3X7gragL2hRYAxTP8NYm5eD4B81r0lNgc6gyhx979LgdqQnLjwadzwBPmBee70GNGY2dvzMqETEx3FwgTWX25rXBIoWQSm00xK4xDd3AnRMTimm2CQ3qAm2xqbMdIdiTIe7grDg4ET8Ew==&c=I4SkvqiP5ZZvVV1mWdlBJr66-wxsL1woK_I_0Bu9YxXDuCfCjXCyXQ==&ch=ZYN8lZ7qJOVa28MB6Owi1B6pczP8jrfxJiz2nh0Vsg5BUwJjF-p9Ig==)

| Josh Mandel is unhinged, unfit, and flailing - because he's losing.
Why else would he resort to such school-yard threats like, "You're dealing with the wrong guy. You're dealing with the wrong guy. Watch what happens."
This child-like behavior isn't appropriate for candidates.
We need an adult in the room, and Josh Mandel has proven that he is not capable of being that for Ohioans. Mandel has nothing to run on, so he attacks the one person in this race who can beat him.
The America-First movement isn't afraid of bullies, RINOs, or politicians trying to save their careers from burning down in flames.
Peter, will you join me and stand up Josh Mandel, Ohio's Big Government Bully? Click below to show your support!

Fighting the good fight doesn't come without its consequences. Because of my lawsuits defending American energy independence, protecting our 1st and 2nd Amendments, and fighting for election integrity, these guys are COMING AFTER ME.
They'll be looking at our report as soon as it is public. But, if we can show a high enough fundraising number, they'll know they can't mess around.
That's why I'm reaching out to you today, Peter. I need your help!
We are still about $50,000 short of our big goals, which is why we are activating a **500% MATCH TODAY ONLY**. _But,_ you must _contribute by 11:59PM TONIGHT._
Can I count on your support by TONIGHT? clean_body: | | | | And let me tell you, the stakes have never been higher. Dear Peter, Our End-of-Quarter deadline is quickly approaching. And let me tell you, the stakes have never been higher. We need to show a MASSIVE amount of financial strength to stop Bloomberg, Steyer, and Soros from coming after me. Fighting the good fight doesn't come without its consequences. Because of my lawsuits defending American energy independence, protecting our 1st and 2nd Amendments, and fighting for election integrity, these guys are COMING AFTER ME. They'll be looking at our report as soon as it is public. But, if we can show a high enough fundraising number, they'll know they can't mess around. That's why I'm reaching out to you today, Peter. I need your help! We are still about $50,000 short of our big goals, which is why we are activating a 500% MATCH TODAY ONLY. But, you must contribute by 11:59PM TONIGHT. Can I count on your support by TONIGHT? | | | | | | Remember, ONLY the Attorneys General can block Biden's and Congress' illegal federal overreach right now. That's why this quarter is so important. We have to show strength or the far-left billionaires will hinder our ability to DEFEND AMERICA. Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey West Virginia Attorney General | Follow us on Social Media ****|****|****|****|** Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. body:
Whether it be some new conspiracy witch hunt or spreading misinformation about COVID and vaccines, he just doesn’t know when to quit it. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43296678/336591660/1638233481?refcode=EM_FR_220323FR_N_drj_60DA_6_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjIzYWMzZS1lNWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I_-y4oOgpKGzr0UNzYfTZGfit9jcGE8z6JL7w7o9csM=)

clean_body: Under President Trump, America was energy independent and gas prices were low. | | | | | | == | Friend, Under President Trump, America was energy independent and gas prices were low. Now, under bumbling Biden, America asks foreign dictators for energy and you're stuck paying over $4.00 for each gallon. The Radical Left shut down American jobs. They do business with dictators who hate America and are not interested in protecting the environment. It's time to stop the assault on the American energy sector. Biden needs to know that Americans are done with his anti-energy agenda. == | | | == | == | The Biden administration doesn't care that you and your family are having to choose between gas or putting food on the table. American oil is the gold standard of energy. Kat is working day and night to help make America energy independent again. body:
Join Future Generations & Justice Democrats on Wednesday, March 30th from 8-9 pm ET for a virtual fundraiser supporting Summer Lee in PA-12. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDIxeDWqAtfj4Fn87VuYfG4Xt4DQgNWFgDCOefFWaI9Dp_O6IxexNATE7cITP5W1rXb8BlbLHOFxWdi6Nh2hNxFp1kZwC200z8OdsT3_3o5NCEHmvD8Q0F5ynNBnAIhpw_xZ7g2qx7uCPASPZ5ht5RwWF4AY7zs6kHQKDtWEldr2l2q30Ons6RzKYEiIU5qUyRpnOTq6z-G_hYS_4jpR-PEE9WMPCgKesCpBiNruckHXgGL6lZnc8DjQP1Kjue_RluA/3kl/Ozd2F44vTXmDCQkWvmj-2Q/h0/frHBv2chRgvD4AhEFLW5JOJ5Rirr3oxgRhhP_kFnUlM)

Peter, Please join us for a virtual fundraiser supporting Summer Lee in PA-12. We will be co-hosting this event with Justice Democrats to benefit Summer's campaign directly. This is a strongly Democratic district in the important battleground state of Pennsylvania that recently opened up after the retirement of the 26-year incumbent. With no incumbent and a wide-open field, this is a race for the future of the Democratic Party. Summer embodies an effective, inclusive, and people-powered future centered in multiracial, multigenerational power for working people. ** ** Summer's final end-of-quarter deadline before her primary is coming up on March 31st. Please join us Wednesday, March 30th from 8-9 pm ET (5-6 pm PT) for a virtual fundraiser supporting Summer Lee.[ Click here to RSVP now](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ys-l_NERHW3a70F-71tId4jxrSFaTe6JfJhhgwIJSXd0BAwcnsq6X_d4lnNJaanPbVpFq2OjwW1VtKtwWc8arH4WeXTPACbLVgsabVQjMrwZ-ZhIiADpiUNLVJ_vIrJkLJ_tu6oUw9NuhcDC3nKerlukzI-nn3yY0wJagHjTfh3X5-SJQzXGwjjg35JPQ6N31_hW93hDZBpOUy6phD1OGBkRvDY0Em8iLaJcDl4_T2jxGBBC7lpUMooizVKwTsiHXTKV7gkSninbGM7oHySUjtxWiHTopg52-xYjmbeTg-76ZOHLt97e0jpJt5Qjpysjw/3kl/Ozd2F44vTXmDCQkWvmj-2Q/h1/INfKUVGTvPSIimcRO-xNGLzvly9UkFzV7vhv2aN--FM). Summer is an organizer, attorney, and the current State Representative for the Steel Valley, City of Pittsburgh, and the Mon Valley. Throughout her time in the legislature, she's fought for meaningful progress on union jobs and workers rights, environmental justice, affordable housing, health care, immigration justice and more. She led an initiative that stopped a corporate fracking proposal in its tracks, and drove the passage of police accountability measures in Harrisburg. She also became the co-founder and chair of UNITE, a grassroots group dedicated to building progressive power up and down the ballot across Allegheny County and the surrounding areas that has elected mayors, county council, judges, and more. ** ** If elected, Summer would again make history as the first Black woman ever to represent Pennsylvania in Congress. She is running to build a more reflective, accountable democracy; to tackle our big economic, racial, and environmental challenges with the urgency and courage people deserve; and to build a future where all working people can thrive. This is a huge opportunity for our movement and we don't want you to miss it. We hope to see you there!

Hi Peter, Tomorrow, I'm going head to head with far-right GOPer Joe Kent. This is the second time I'll debate him on The Lars Larson Show -- a hyper conservative talk radio show. You and I can both spend time imagining the number of wild claims and attacks I'll be up against, or we can build our resources to defeat my Donald Trump-backed opponent on the field where it matters. **Latest polling shows that I 'm in the lead in WA-03, but Kent is following behind me. clean_body: I’m going head to head with far-right Joe Kent | | Hi Peter, Tomorrow, I'm going head to head with far-right GOPer Joe Kent. This is the second time I'll debate him on The Lars Larson Show -- a hyper conservative talk radio show. You and I can both spend time imagining the number of wild claims and attacks I'll be up against, or we can build our resources to defeat my Donald Trump-backed opponent on the field where it matters. Latest polling shows that I 'm in the lead in WA-03, but Kent is following behind me. Donate now to keep me polling ahead. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: With dirty Trump-aligned money on his side, I will need you every step of the way. So before I get in front of the mic tomorrow, I need to ask for your support. body:
Peter,
We’ll keep this short. **We’re writing to you today with an urgent appeal, and here’s why.** In just over a week, our very first financial quarter of the Election Year will come to a close, and we will have to report out all of our fundraising numbers.
We’re proud to say that we have already done extremely well this quarter, but we’re still a ways away from our end of quarter fundraising goal, and it’s crucial we hit it. **The money we intend to raise goes toward supporting our core staff, our tech and data, and eventually our ground game. **
**[We need every Democrat we can get in the House in 2022, and Derek is exactly the leader the people of California’s 23rd need. Will you chip in today and donate whatever you can spare to support Derek’s campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43288533/336550980/1232707546?refcode=3-23&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWYzMjA4My1jNmFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pfVBTtEN2n5I3zB3pUfccFTdZoDRtM7EH2XD8qTcUhY=)**

Every month, we need to save more and more to ensure we can face off with Derek’s opponent and Trump-endorsed Republican Jay Obernolte and win. It’s critical we replace him and elect a true champion for the people. **And in the process, we’ll win back one more battleground seat for the Democrats in a midterm year when we need every victory we can get. **
Every donation we receive gets us one step closer to reaching our goals and allows us to shore up our resources before we launch our major field operations. **We’re less than $10,000 away from our end of quarter goal and your contribution of any amount will help us make up the difference. **

clean_body: Peter, We’ll keep this short. We’re writing to you today with an urgent appeal, and here’s why. In just over a week, our very first financial quarter of the Election Year will come to a close, and we will have to report out all of our fundraising numbers. We’re proud to say that we have already done extremely well this quarter, but we’re still a ways away from our end of quarter fundraising goal, and it’s crucial we hit it. The money we intend to raise goes toward supporting our core staff, our tech and data, and eventually our ground game. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Every month, we need to save more and more to ensure we can face off with Derek’s opponent and Trump-endorsed Republican Jay Obernolte and win. It’s critical we replace him and elect a true champion for the people. And in the process, we’ll win back one more battleground seat for the Democrats in a midterm year when we need every victory we can get. Every donation we receive gets us one step closer to reaching our goals and allows us to shore up our resources before we launch our major field operations. We’re less than $10,000 away from our end of quarter goal and your contribution of any amount will help us make up the difference. = = Thank you for all your support–folks like you keep this movement going. Let’s do this! In solidarity, Derek Marshall Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23 * = Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress. P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • tel:\(760\ 486-2416)

Friends,
Welcome back to the “Weekly Wyoming Wrap-Up.” Harriet had two town hall meetings in Casper this past week and one in Hudson. They were all well-attended. People are fired-up and want to talk about policy and our future. It is clear that Wyoming voters are concerned about the direction our country is heading and want to see real change in Washington, D.C.
Be sure to check below for our upcoming events! As we add more events across the state, you can find information at [_hagemanforwyoming.com/events_](https://u23309276.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=s0AEtEaIpshapt9Xu8LFfsDNvMm2mWEtLHGkZhNoK3cvuNBTqvBThnbTbbgvqhBs0sOT_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6MqfV6LwsQxj97DaHLg55wEkagzHpC6FbnGteolT5MOIZdMEFk6bk6-2Byy18rXCcmzoptvdRaV4cw9p9WyksvdRCDKJE66TKNPOi4JVonovchAhD5Q01tsDqryveHX-2Fi8VJahOhVTZ51qYLxh7rZCz7G3cH73V51-2FCclha7iJbrc-2FvcXjB3JgUdfqPNJ9FhPjFWnD51YQFlJuWIaXln-2FSwT8Psjs0BwHUeb62b4D5ljmQnpfu2NNniKy-2FAyJnITZb26DLHm-2FnNtE9-2BESBMaVQW2JOikH0QQzw7L2ZwLFDownE4tNYQH-2F-2BVu5sQDPcJhXP1qUzGF0XKUg3qFygQLvPY1uUoiHREBuehKFsJl9-2Bc2clgass-2Frn5oDexEvFTIZK-2BVIV5eCW5z3gwuvf-2BZ7bg1Lv48sZgf0pVWElYay7Rc2zwt5Z9NbIjHjdNCKqm-2FSBaSBt-2FOaEtAumBvMZFlcGqtz9vfT-2FUEnDtEALwatKhg2N-2BJx9QGKg9ufGHMMUUjMUdqw4IG4kljorInfC8llvjqob5PnL78uy4xLiC-2BdzQIQHlLdD3BNiNC0ROrapyjtjLZn-2BcsHBYbfbaxeho7QrRG1IzM64W5YmZXeAd-2FZhlmsEzlWkjy1LuVTW4guwsF8KyFY5CwQ3G4fyav6-2Bvs1hEpYQ4tuOV0-2Bq6pRX9bMU1DokSLx0w75y8seeRxc3uCS9DNm2Zo6tfyDAISUokHItoX35FGnBH0pM4-2B7RVUwHCbAEfNvJuRIZBTtUhmtgujrgMvKflwlxZdya-2FFbu5BDuUqD7Gx-2BfjHOTmPAxmgUoTxMic8SWFWAX1suyqDXAxRzypG) or on our Facebook page.

People are fired-up and want to talk about policy and our future. It is clear that Wyoming voters are concerned about the direction our country is heading and want to see real change in Washington, D.C. Be sure to check below for our upcoming events! As we add more events across the state, you can find information at or on our Facebook page. For Wyoming, Team Hageman | | Around Wyoming! subject: The ACA was signed into law 12 years ago today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Twelve years ago today, President Barack Obama signed the Affordable Care Act into law. This was historic legislation that made health care more accessible for millions of Americans. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43288633/336551673/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzk1NTliMi1jN2FhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sfempYNb85ncwDQ_rUZuSSTpXpWa2NPqFX9xG9qa3AU=&emci=5ad662ba-20aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=379559b2-c7aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Twelve years ago today, President Barack Obama signed the Affordable Care Act into law. This was historic legislation that made health care more accessible for millions of Americans.

As a pediatrician and person with type 1 diabetes, Kim saw firsthand how the Affordable Care Act helped her patients be able to receive and afford the care they needed. That's why when her own representative voted to repeal the ACA, she decided to run for office.

Since coming to Congress, Kim has fought to ensure everyone has access to the quality, affordable health care they deserve. She's worked to protect the ACA, lower the cost of prescription drugs, and expand access to care.

Today, a record breaking 31 million Americans receive health care coverage through the Affordable Care Act. Here in Washington State, we've seen our uninsured rate cut by more than half. But that hasn't stopped Republicans from continuing to attack access to quality, affordable health care.

**[On the 12th anniversary of the Affordable Care Act becoming law, will you add your name to join Kim in the fight to protect access to health care?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43288634/336551674/-192538435?ms=em22_220323_aca_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em22_220323_aca_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em22_220323_aca_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220323_aca_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=fUYAzpBWgwiF6FQHPGHuEW/0aSRBMPpP1eGVxhs9/xMU1QccPVPmELhOMXle8cTCl5/M+83Ag6T0QlSPXOcxpdOBRMGS8uFGtPDB5IEC+tZQAufJwGGUuKpoFc0n4hIUAyYNkU1tWws5+8rctnL+xKkGj7ZXyiYoNoGOtul7fZc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzk1NTliMi1jN2FhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sfempYNb85ncwDQ_rUZuSSTpXpWa2NPqFX9xG9qa3AU=&emci=5ad662ba-20aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=379559b2-c7aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15820338)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43288635/336551675/-192538435?ms=em22_220323_aca_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em22_220323_aca_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em22_220323_aca_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220323_aca_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=fUYAzpBWgwiF6FQHPGHuEW/0aSRBMPpP1eGVxhs9/xMU1QccPVPmELhOMXle8cTCl5/M+83Ag6T0QlSPXOcxpdOBRMGS8uFGtPDB5IEC+tZQAufJwGGUuKpoFc0n4hIUAyYNkU1tWws5+8rctnL+xKkGj7ZXyiYoNoGOtul7fZc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzk1NTliMi1jN2FhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sfempYNb85ncwDQ_rUZuSSTpXpWa2NPqFX9xG9qa3AU=&emci=5ad662ba-20aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=379559b2-c7aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15820338)

clean_body: Twelve years ago today, President Barack Obama signed the Affordable Care Act into law. This was historic legislation that made health care more accessible for millions of Americans. Peter, Twelve years ago today, President Barack Obama signed the Affordable Care Act into law. This was historic legislation that made health care more accessible for millions of Americans. As a pediatrician and person with type 1 diabetes, Kim saw firsthand how the Affordable Care Act helped her patients be able to receive and afford the care they needed. That's why when her own representative voted to repeal the ACA, she decided to run for office. Since coming to Congress, Kim has fought to ensure everyone has access to the quality, affordable health care they deserve. She's worked to protect the ACA, lower the cost of prescription drugs, and expand access to care. Today, a record breaking 31 million Americans receive health care coverage through the Affordable Care Act. Here in Washington State, we've seen our uninsured rate cut by more than half. But that hasn't stopped Republicans from continuing to attack access to quality, affordable health care. | Thanks, Team Schrier To hold the House majority, we must re-elect Rep. Kim Schrier in WA-08. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022? = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

Educators and Allies Educators and Allies, Out of control extremists are threating to take over school boards, but we can stop them in the next two weeks in Wisconsin's school board elections. One right-wing candidate proudly admits to supporting book banning, writing "For the record...Book banning, it should be on a book by book basis." In another district, Dr. Marquell Johnson, an educator and the only Black member on his school board, received a racist email disparaging immigrants and demanding the school district create a "Thank You White People Day." And finally, just yesterday, educator and School Board President Tim Nordin received a death threat, not just on his life but also on his family members'. Despite the attempted intimidation, he went to work last night and led the approval of a raise for hardworking educators in Eau Claire. [We're asking for your support to help Tim and Marquell and scores of great educators throughout Wisconsin tell their story of service.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43288848/336552891/2056930874?refcode=em_2022wisbrw_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3YTYxZTQwLWM5YWEtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4iTjT1U4R7ZVihBH7bYzU4RjWZUxYqcI6HfXNKmc9LM=) **** These educators deserve a chance to tell their story, and the people of their districts need to know who is on the side of students and educators, and who supports banning books and whitewashing history. name: Primary Sinema Project
subject: The reason 3.7 million children now live in poverty: Kyrsten Sinema
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC**
body:
Their decisions have consequences. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpHIgPjZTod5LVCLRGJ5EuVnvDHqljinnhSRx27Y-QsvG6M20ZQaQYFyLcafJBZA0q_5MYAQc37-Hezkm93t-hV9zx0pqQolSqEKFHCo8g3K05AoEM1Ku77Bl6RUmYlcMTClVC2uSUxNzhPyR-ByJlAZbwm2ka9fYZQm-DUf19QHklsyUa-ffWsB1Wt2sUAW58d_vrWwPOD5zkjTI0Np8UNKrB1Xvk3HabkXT1dkldtACBOLR0U3oUgoR1otOPD6SUMSe-FfznyXAcGnHZuopneWwBzCmThD1v-On-JnQHiXZRDtA6s6pb96FrONy9hgXznX8WOFF-ZuKeComv6Pb_rs/3kl/wThsIVZ4SkWoo28atIok0w/h0/H0NMnv3hdee3_yx4Qc1R3z4IHOhooKGBE2BqHGLp9kc)
Peter, It’s rare that a politician’s actions have such direct and dire consequences. But 3.7 million children fell into poverty because of Kyrsten Sinema, Joe Manchin, and all 50 Republicans in the Senate. Sinema, Manchin, and the Republicans blocked the extension of the Child Tax Credit, which made direct monthly payments to the families that needed it most, and lifted millions out of poverty. As a result, this crucial lifeline to families expired on December 31st — and millions of children are now suffering. Meanwhile, Sinema refuses to raise taxes on billionaires and corporations, which could fund the Child Tax Credit extension. **[This callous display of legislating is yet another reason why Kyrsten Sinema is unfit to be in the Senate — and it’s why we’re working hard to make sure she never serves another term. clean_body: Their decisions have consequences. | | | Peter, It’s rare that a politician’s actions have such direct and dire consequences. But 3.7 million children fell into poverty because of Kyrsten Sinema, Joe Manchin, and all 50 Republicans in the Senate. Sinema, Manchin, and the Republicans blocked the extension of the Child Tax Credit, which made direct monthly payments to the families that needed it most, and lifted millions out of poverty. As a result, this crucial lifeline to families expired on December 31st — and millions of children are now suffering. Meanwhile, Sinema refuses to raise taxes on billionaires and corporations, which could fund the Child Tax Credit extension. Read that again, Peter: Because of Kyrsten Sinema (and Joe Manchin), 3.7 million children are now living in poverty. All so billionaires don’t have to be taxed. It’s utterly repulsive. Sinema clearly didn’t take into consideration that Arizona's child poverty rate ranks 13th highest in the country. Or that expanding the original Child Tax Credit benefitted nearly 1.5 million Arizona children and their families. She’s only focused on the one thing that she’s proven matters to her, time and again: lining her campaign coffers with cash from whoever’s the highest bidder — billionaires, Big Pharma, private prisons, you name it. That’s no way to lead in the Senate, Peter — and we deserve so much better than what we’re currently getting. But if we’re going to oust Sinema once and for all and compete with her GOP mega donors, we need to keep growing our grassroots power. | Now, Sisolak just might be doing the same thing when it comes to our kids' education - he is NOW deciding to make comments in favor of school choice, saying that NV children "shouldn't be discriminated against based on their parent's bank account or their zip code."
One of the key proponents of Joe's campaign has been speaking up for school choice, and that is something he will never waiver in when elected the next Governor of Nevada.
Education needs improvement here in Nevada, and that's why Joe has vowed to empower parents as Governor by expanding charter schools, school choice, and opportunity scholarships.
It seems Sisolak on the other hand is just reading the poll numbers again, and trying desperately to gain favor with Nevada voters before the election.
We won't fall for his flip-flopping - instead, we're going to stand with a proven leader we can count on to be strongly in favor of standing with parents. Help Sheriff Joe Lombardo get to work by supporting his run for Governor below!

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: an update on this year’s progress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE
body:
Believe it or not, we are almost a quarter of the way through 2022.
Friend —
Believe it or not, we are almost a quarter of the way through 2022. Time really flies, doesn't it? Today, I want to give you a brief update on some of the things we've been working on.
This month, Senator Sherrod Brown and I introduced the _Arbitration Fairness for Consumers Act,_ which is much-needed legislation that will prohibit banks and other financial institutions from using forced arbitration clauses against consumers who want to seek restitution and justice.
Consumers who are ripped off by big banks or corporations should be able to seek fair redress, and I’m proud to join my colleagues in introducing legislation to protect consumer choice and ensure a more fair and transparent process for Americans seeking justice.
And just a couple of weeks ago, we passed the Omnibus Funding bill and I was pleased to secure over $104 million in direct investments for community projects all across Maryland in that legislation, which President Biden signed into law last week. These investments in our communities will help to spur opportunity, create jobs, and grow our economy.
I'm also proud that the funding bill we passed included funding to support Ukraine and reauthorized the _Violence Against Women Act_ (VAWA).
The substantial funds for military and humanitarian support for Ukraine show that America will not stand idly by during the vicious, unprovoked invasion by Vladimir Putin. And our long-overdue reauthorization of VAWA includes badly needed upgrades to this bedrock law that will help better protect and support survivors of domestic violence.
My top priority has always been to fight for the things that make a difference for our families, communities, state, and country, and I'm proud that our work so far this year has included many wins that people will be able to feel in their daily lives.
But it's been a busy year, and as we look ahead to November, things are only going to get busier and partisanship will likely get even more fierce.
I'm going to stay focused on fighting for progress, but that means I'll need the support of this grassroots team to make sure we're able to defend this Maryland seat and our Democratic Senate majority in this year's midterms.
That's why, before you go, I have to ask:
**[Could you please make a $3 contribution — or a contribution of any amount — to my campaign for re-election to the United States Senate today? Our next FEC deadline is quickly approaching, and your donation will help show the strength of this grassroots team.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43289464/336555821/-149995803?source=em220323-1-b&refcode2=6d9b96d6-caaa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=ht6B7LZkLrI025WwnRsp8iDY8XZ09Dz4mKXYh1Wi01wk24V9FZcqXecTpuPlNfv1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDliOTZkNi1jYWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CSZNsQaBIpY8jkxZVRf4G_TrWqbm6THtMnuI-QfUSHA=)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43289465/336555822/-149995803?source=em220323-1-b&refcode2=6d9b96d6-caaa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=ht6B7LZkLrI025WwnRsp8iDY8XZ09Dz4mKXYh1Wi01wk24V9FZcqXecTpuPlNfv1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDliOTZkNi1jYWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CSZNsQaBIpY8jkxZVRf4G_TrWqbm6THtMnuI-QfUSHA=)**
Thanks for being a part of our work to deliver real progress for families here in Maryland and across our country.
Onwards,
Chris

name: Cheri Beasley HQ
subject: Our opponents are debating their loyalties to Trump and Putin.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Frankly, it’s embarrassing and troubling to watch...
#

TV ads for both of our Republican opponents are up across the state right now, and frankly, it’s both troubling and embarrassing to watch.
The Republican primary is just constant back-and-forth attacks and mud-slinging between Ted Budd and Pat McCrory. They spend more time debating their loyalties to Donald Trump or Putin than anything else.
It shows us clearly what we should expect not only from them in this race but also what kind of leaders they would be in the U.S. Senate. We know they are focused on parroting a partisan agenda — not the people.
And at the end of the day, McConnell and his super PACs do not care who Republicans nominate. They just want a Republican to keep this seat. They know that FiveThirtyEight has rated this as one of 7 seats that will determine control of the Senate, and they will say or spend anything to win, no matter the cost.
[**So if you want to elect a real leader who will actually fight for the people, then please consider making a donation today to win this race and send Cheri Beasley to the Senate. It’s up to us to stop Republicans from buying this seat — and retaking the Senate majority.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-mar22?refcode=em220323-1-MA&refcode2=581.357359.HKlz30&t=1&akid=581%2E357359%2EHKlz30)

**Hi Peter! We’re Prince Henry and Bella. We call Michele Rayner our mom, but we’re hoping that you’ll call her your next Congresswoman.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43290901/336561856/1562563835?amount=3&refcode=MRFC_20220323_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzYzM2Y4Mi1jZGFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fczo4GNDPzCogR_4c3jZor2_9Di7o7nmYLGjojRLFXA=) We know you usually don’t hear from us, but today’s National Puppy Day, so it’s our moment to shine. We need to share a quick campaign pup-date, but first, our mom said we have to ask: [Will you donate $3 to Michele’s 100% grassroots (and dog-approved) congressional campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43290902/336561857/1562563835?amount=3&refcode=MRFC_20220323_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzYzM2Y4Mi1jZGFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fczo4GNDPzCogR_4c3jZor2_9Di7o7nmYLGjojRLFXA=) | [$20,000 END OF QUARTER GOAL: CHIP IN $3 TO SEND DOG-MOM MICHELE RAYNER TO CONGRESS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43290903/336561858/1562563835?amount=3&refcode=MRFC_20220323_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzYzM2Y4Mi1jZGFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fczo4GNDPzCogR_4c3jZor2_9Di7o7nmYLGjojRLFXA=)
---
In between taking us on walks and giving us treats, we see our mom, Michele, work all day long talking with voters and community leaders about the issues facing families across Pinellas County.

**We’re so proud to see our mom work so hard to provide strong leadership at a time when Florida families _(and their pets!)_ desperately need it.

But all this work takes a lot of money** _(money we’d love to see spent on treats but actually goes toward voter outreach materials like gas in cars, flyers, clipboards, yard signs, and more)._

[We hope we’re not barking up the wrong tree here: Will you chip in $3 today and help our mom raise $20,000? After all the love she’s given us, we want to show her our love back!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43290904/336561859/1562563835?amount=3&refcode=MRFC_20220323_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzYzM2Y4Mi1jZGFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fczo4GNDPzCogR_4c3jZor2_9Di7o7nmYLGjojRLFXA=)

clean_body: | = Hi Peter! We’re Prince Henry and Bella. We call Michele Rayner our mom, but we’re hoping that you’ll call her your next Congresswoman. = We know you usually don’t hear from us, but today’s National Puppy Day, so it’s our moment to shine. We need to share a quick campaign pup-date, but first, our mom said we have to ask: = | = In between taking us on walks and giving us treats, we see our mom, Michele, work all day long talking with voters and community leaders about the issues facing families across Pinellas County. We’re so proud to see our mom work so hard to provide strong leadership at a time when Florida families (and their pets!) desperately need it. But all this work takes a lot of money (money we’d love to see spent on treats but actually goes toward voter outreach materials like gas in cars, flyers, clipboards, yard signs, and more). = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = — Prince Henry and Bella 🐾 | | Paid for by Michele Rayner for Florida P.O. Box 35218, St. Petersburg, Fl 33705 www.micheleforflorida.com/ Please, consider making a =. Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and send Michele to Congress, make a=. to receive fewer emails. to update your information. Click here to . | | = =

name: Doug Gansler
subject: Re: This is why I'm proud to endorse Doug
body:
From crime, to the environment, to the economy and beyond — Marylanders are in desperate need of experienced leadership that will make our state a more safe, just, and strong place to live. | **I am honored to receive the endorsement of my dear friend and former Maryland State Senator, Art Helton.**
---
| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlYEBRuv3LZltPZnpT13Z_ZvnJe4nH_WOjWTJhkaafbzT91SIiHnGuAOZr40nHKfIwon9eWze_xIz7aG7-CLK7N25eddOyGRhFgAn7fQn0MC87kA0az0P6EaPM7EVa2sNCJDTioKOIfuwlAu5qyYyG11_ud042bd4qGyUihvt-l0jw4PRZh3cgC-FLNA5186SQM15VlZUrZiY8YhgkmHfWG-A6VdkyFxQqkPJRyQ4BA0R_hvcTxK6Hc4B4Dhkt6VuE/3kl/_lCAVXgwTf6Zv1MA3MgeYA/h0/h-H60RUPMulf-JQp9jnjALheFbUI23nhKmuYDmDhHcY)
---
Marylanders are in need of smart, sustainable and safe housing options, which Art has dedicated his career to providing. He's a phenomenal businessman whose company has created jobs and housing for countless Harford County residents. Even better, Art always respected the environment by renovating existing properties instead of developing new buildings. I couldn't be more honored to have him on our team. **Check out Art's message below[ and join him by signing onto Team Gansler-Hollingsworth today!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlYEBRuv3LZltPZnpT13Z_ZvnJe4nH_WOjWTJhkaafbzT91SIiHnGuAOZr40nHKfIwTTz_ZrrL5UILU0_jK4OkK5MdBfShigsKgg4RCtc9HBPo1yt9O_Hz9Ydljr8RUqG66TKve850Q-agf6WILhbELhmixANxky5qpTxYG7puLD9F_LYVBPah00w6aWTdDlMKbOVdpXxtSuyVtRF1gq4RXRKQalSBWMPKk8oKzzVACDYBtmdTR0Aa1_1n0aV6eBV8/3kl/_lCAVXgwTf6Zv1MA3MgeYA/h1/DN-GiCEfuY30S1aOw_lkR3MOwCGo6h7yzRbBsxAD2CI)** Thank you, Doug
---
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Art Helton**
Date: Tue, Mar 22, 2022 at 1:04 PM
Subject: This is why I'm proud to endorse Doug

Hi friends, I am proud to endorse my friend and former Attorney General Doug Gansler for Governor of Maryland. As Attorney General and Montgomery County State's Attorney, Doug proved that he has what it takes to keep people safe, and no other candidate has his proven record when it comes to public safety. Voters who are worried about crime should trust Doug to keep Maryland safe and to do so in a way that is fair and just. I'm also personally very concerned about the reckless, over-development happening in our communities. Doug was the 'Environmentalist Attorney General' and will tackle Maryland's need for more affordable housing through Smart Growth principles that will help our communities and our environment. From crime, to the environment, to the economy and beyond -- Marylanders are in desperate need of experienced leadership that will make our state a more safe, just, and strong place to live. Doug is the best-equipped to make real change. That's why I'm proud to support him -- but he needs YOUR support to win this race, Friend. **[Will you join me in endorsing Doug for governor today?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlYEBRuv3LZltPZnpT13Z_ZvnJe4nH_WOjWTJhkaafbzT91SIiHnGuAOZr40nHKfIwOQBzkkkfREDF34AgEJ53CbfpC13C5W_efNU4sqsEJYqDdTHCJGQkD7x2ildJeMpcdVFgAmkBI5HFul15AMdWkm2YbwFSMvO_eZYkG3UHyKePi3ah0yndDJFXtzBCauQ8E5x6uc8Iita4XjJjjsLqtiBTAQAcDYypi5iq3aRAkv-6Ceakr2jF_3p8BakzIVH0/3kl/_lCAVXgwTf6Zv1MA3MgeYA/h3/2TyJy5coQRD9Pj-pVf9nnuav7dchpWdTIb_XJ1Suq_M)**

He's a phenomenal businessman whose company has created jobs and housing for countless Harford County residents. I'm also personally very concerned about the reckless, over-development happening in our communities. ConEd is screwing over working families, Peter Willis.
Our utility bills are too high, and big companies like Con Edison are taking in record profits at the expense of families struggling to get by.
Just last week, **ConEd requested to hike rates _by nearly 20 percent_ while threatening shutoffs for thousands of New Yorkers unable to keep up.**
Over the weekend, Melanie held a rally with Jonathan Soto, candidate for New York State’s 82nd Assembly District in the Bronx, to fight back and demand a publicly-owned power grid for New York.
[**Can you add your support to call out ConEd and stand with us against corporate greed?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn6M2L4lcb-awdC-BLNjuQ_9XngGgdRcatJjoahlS1q4KyBbCFzG_HG-_n5hniF74U9hkIwcaXbkBfzANPk5n0eV8-7htskk_Y7MobcJNdl523aRaZSZ1CfSI6Zwjdp3Ljm7JwFltFvuolnD5rojuaupyOiEx94t7HbBZCxI9e9cggxHmui4q_SUmGI0L4reKftYmAkt5v-coTlA0OtRpy5ou5HdkOXDVo6NP7I5m-zk9O845k1c7x8s3JZ9EWIw-jn3EnsRf6dAapDSGTcLHXGOe6GgKQ-Vl_O_kvnvlQ4todzcip809aDyDWwAIM0kRdRi218zzIjabdc-jn6lpRI_bGNi1KEtSGxRNC-1CAjZw/3kl/kUjvJv6hQr-9LAoo07LaBA/h1/umNrELTIr9WHN5KnP8JRipRm3WuymKgYnuUwpP2BjRY)

More than 400,000 New Yorkers are at least two months behind on their energy bills — yet ConEdison was able to report billions of dollars in profits last fiscal year. Melanie and Jonathan are proud to be the only candidates in their respective races ready to take on ConEdison and fight for a more sustainable, equitable energy future.
_“As long as our energy is controlled by corporations, we won’t have any choice in how much we pay and what we’re paying for — which means that companies like ConEdison can continue ripping off New Yorkers and contributing to the climate crisis.**Publicly-owned power will drive costs down and keep the lights on, and it can set us on a path to a greener future.** ” — Melanie D’Arrigo_
---
