Our utility bills are too high, and big companies like Con Edison are taking in record profits at the expense of families struggling to get by. Just last week, ConEd requested to hike rates by nearly 20 percent while threatening shutoffs for thousands of New Yorkers unable to keep up. Over the weekend, Melanie held a rally with Jonathan Soto, candidate for New York State’s 82nd Assembly District in the Bronx, to fight back and demand a publicly-owned power grid for New York. More than 400,000 New Yorkers are at least two months behind on their energy bills — yet ConEdison was able to report billions of dollars in profits last fiscal year. Melanie and Jonathan are proud to be the only candidates in their respective races ready to take on ConEdison and fight for a more sustainable, equitable energy future. “As long as our energy is controlled by corporations, we won’t have any choice in how much we pay and what we’re paying for — which means that companies like ConEdison can continue ripping off New Yorkers and contributing to the climate crisis.Publicly-owned power will drive costs down and keep the lights on, and it can set us on a path to a greener future. ” — Melanie D’Arrigo Thanks, Team Melanie Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO (not by corporations or lobbyists) Friends of Melanie D'Arrigo P.O. Box 312 Port Washington, NY 11050 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Melanie D'Arrigo for NY-03, please .

name: Glenn Beck
subject: We’re rushing support to Ukraine. You can help.
body:
When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous. Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentime
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zu5d4mh626gdr60ta5rm2qlqg2dfqnm8l82gqja0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1jm8o31c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqct9hmcp7acdkmgprcd9m6kpr2sjk66pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t1im3i78dtjm6pmdclje2p71phgm9oj6orjejjb8o36c8qb1plm61h7adjictg6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup30pjkcaqr1ptmchj39o5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z960uqh3dvamvln0f5vbabmvnq52rsco51fdutv0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1jm8o31c9h2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zlce4a0eq7jj1dqcn65nvck9rkk10mqt6hcck020_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1jm8o31c9h2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zukb6un1kiogs1fhkrosfpbbb6lg1ej8m2oasmvg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1jm8o31c9h2bs)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z68gi8g5ovkvj50q32nvhveii02l1gprtsavo6t0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s1jm8o31c9h2bs)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One

name: Crystal Cavalier for Congress
subject: American Indian Women You Need to Know
body:
We cannot transform our society without the leadership of American Indian women.

| [ ](http://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/?e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=women_s_history&n=1)
---
Friend -- We cannot heal and transform our society without the leadership of American Indian women. Did you know that the early suffragists, in their fight for freedom and equality, modeled their movement after Haudenosaunee women? This [short film](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=oWuEpUh4tc8-2CTyEt7AW9PFW9s82TZc9sSzktuIFtzGScp8VTXL-CttXHKfDT2vcm-Zb1LqLeOyIYb96i0yGg&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=women_s_history&n=2) uncovers that untold history. Have you listened to the transformational music of American Indian elder, [Pura Fey](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRatVygcFLjDhANyMXN_ywjaJYWLnir9NodE7FTWowqROLQdYLaL8PeAkoG9_L8Ro6kviZsJlNplb5uyBfJDBmlEKCiXP-WTviETZoot2wADkQ&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=women_s_history&n=3)? Fey recently joined the extraordinary crew of leaders who stand with Crystal, saying **“I believe in her. She is amazing and she will represent _everyone_.”** Lumbee artivist Alexis Raeana will perform at the [Pleasant Grove BBQ](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nmUUukZrx1xgsPFq6NPPOVvOQ90lg0FPx-DmpHut9Ghrrqip3Y9r8_98IvLxo3z6g&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=women_s_history&n=4) for Crystal on SAT, APRIL 9TH, from 2pm-4pm. Check out and share the [official music video](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRaxw3aTjgDtcyMQdV-JLowl&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=women_s_history&n=5) for Alexis Raeana's "Keep My Memory" ft. Charly Lowry; dedicated to the Missing Murdered Indigenous Women [#MMIW](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNyB2IiEsbgWRSPDOQfd469ya5R289KDB-gb7MJlhAeof&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=women_s_history&n=6) Movement. [](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=RDcZDUOB5xo0RLGZuMRMKrSaVrnrxzF5M0ADzR7GpNcFBinPyM3h0XTuZsJF_h-MKL2N8L88okJENcDU5gdzjwaA3ztTPglbbfbptvmtzuM&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=women_s_history&n=7) We must continue to amplify the stories, voices and liberatory visions of American Indian women well beyond the end of Women’s History Month. If elected on May 17th, Crystal will be one step closer to becoming the first American Indian Congresswoman to represent NC. _Be a part of the change you want to see!_
* Bring your loved ones to an upcoming [District 4 event](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=wR9crmXCl7yvYlRWVEGnSj3f2frvjOvqNlNgudpExEN29jbwE0BkLLXfBIJn2f61&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=women_s_history&n=8).
* Circulate the [event calendar](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=FHnL8ikUv8WviObJjkW8kdWOxpTbWYtQKL0oAej53G0KDIIjdEZJ4DYjwmjCMsbk-w7VKdPzzwvPVe4yUlbkz_t80fihnvQpkUKVZY4lDdvYIJIJycVOrOO9kxkzJUIzqLyF7Nrxz1az80JQn3cpeT3FPWddklRBFLq83EBTgxkGkAiNeFuxS7U__FPkfJ_z&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=women_s_history&n=9) in your networks.
* Show your support by purchasing [t-shirts](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzuaR6_bKvvcNNAYJATVBmeayehpIy3PIVy7BJWiyaKYqw&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=women_s_history&n=10) and [lawn signs](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzumnz327EhaJPiOJS3vv6NB&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=women_s_history&n=11).

With hope and gratitude, Team Crystal Crystal Cavalier for Congress
[http://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/](http://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/?e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=women_s_history&n=12)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janice=20McGeachin=20for=20Idaho=20Governor?=
subject: Idaho Must Protect Free Speech Against Cancel Culture!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Janice for Idaho, Piercy Robinson Treasurer [unsubscribe](https://janicemcgeachin
body:
Governments and corporations alike are deplatforming and isolating those who dare to speak and act in a manner deemed politically incorrect. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/janicemcgeachin/03-23-22?e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=806a2cce49&e=823fa8e224)
---
| | Dear Friends,
---
| Free speech is one our country's most fundamental values. It is enshrined in the very first amendment to our Constitution, laying the groundwork for a robust republic in which everyone has a voice. **Today, some of the greatest threats to our free speech come from corporations and big tech** , in addition to those threats emanating directly from governments. You have probably noticed the trend in recent years for companies, especially large corporations, to become woke activists even when doing so alienates millions of customers and ultimately harms investors. Advocating radical political agendas is a problematic business strategy that threatens to undermine the free market. We have seen what happens when global corporations like Facebook and Twitter get to decide who has a voice. We recently saw Canada [weaponize the banks](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=a49486e82f&e=823fa8e224) to punish those protesting against tyranny. We know that an increasingly digital future provides an increased risk of governments and corporations alike using technology to deplatform and isolate those who dare to speak and act in a manner deemed politically incorrect. Mark Zuckerberg wants everyone to [live in his controlled and censored metaverse](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=45f8605e62&e=823fa8e224). Automobile companies and governments are conspiring to build vehicles they can [pull over and disable remotely](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=caafab5296&e=823fa8e224). Joe Biden wants [digital currency controlled by the government](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=0dc39bfdbc&e=823fa8e224). We don't have to watch Hollywood movies to see the makings of a dystopian future, where free speech may still be nominally legal but technology has rendered it obsolete. **Free speech requires that everyone gets to have a voice and no one has to fear banishment or deplatforming for using it.** In our ever more connected world, access to digital communication and payment platforms is essential to sharing information and doing business, and we must make sure that leftist corporations are not using their oligopolies to deny conservatives (and even neutral companies who are not sufficiently 'woke') access to essential systems and platforms. As your Governor, I will undertake a full review of Idaho's laws and rules to make sure that the companies and corporations doing business in Idaho are not engaging in unfair trade practices against those whose political views differ from their own. Protecting the free market requires opposing this new form of 21st century corporate fascism, which demands strict conformity to radical leftist views. Idaho must take a stand against this threat, and I am committed to making sure we are at the forefront of this fight to defend free markets and free speech.
---
|
#### Kootenai County Republican Central Committee Endorsement
---
| Last week, the [Kootenai County Republican Central Committee](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=a82f3b2e79&e=823fa8e224) voted **42-1** to endorse me to be Idaho's next Governor. I greatly appreciate their endorsement.
---
|
#### Conservatives of Bingham County
---
| We had a wonderful dinner and town hall meeting in Blackfoot last week. Great folks!
---
|
---
---
|
---
|
#### Hoff Time Report
---
| On Tuesday evening, I joined Wayne Hoffman to discuss the good, the bad, the ugly, and the very ugly aspects of the 2022 legislative session. You can watch the video [**HERE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=b0812786e5&e=823fa8e224).
---
|
#### It's less than two months until the Election!
---
| You know how critical this primary election is to protecting Idaho's future. Our individual rights, state sovereignty, and traditional conservative values are all in grave danger if we don't succeed! Please help us **Make Idaho Free Again** by [**Donating**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=8b1fa208c2&e=823fa8e224) [**$25**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=f2ba9d5842&e=823fa8e224), [**$50**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=ef1a9c4233&e=823fa8e224), or [**$100**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=1e2580a379&e=823fa8e224) today!
---
| [DONATE Today!](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=7d284df953&e=823fa8e224 "DONATE Today!")
---
| Sincerely,

Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor
---
| **P.S.** Please [**DONATE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=922add691e&e=823fa8e224) if you are able, [**VISIT OUR CAMPAIGN STORE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=e8b9a6305d&e=823fa8e224) to see our unique merchandise, [**LIKE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=025e438c24&e=823fa8e224) and [**FOLLOW**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=33720f472f&e=823fa8e224) us on social media, and [**VISIT OUR WEBSITE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=4041c5cdda&e=823fa8e224) to learn about some of the other ways you can get involved with the Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor Campaign.
---
| | | | | | [](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=603c970630&e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=5f27f9d333&e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=5ab06101f6&e=823fa8e224)
---
| [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=3b86cba80f&e=823fa8e224)

body:
Peter,

Imani has always been a proud advocate for marginalized communities, and she’s spent years fighting for Pakistani Americans and members of the Muslim community.

Today, we’re excited to announce that, because of her record of service and advocacy, the American Pakistani Public Affairs Committee has officially endorsed Imani! Click here to join them in supporting our campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?refcode=appac]

APPAC is committed to providing resources and support to the Pakistani American community and other marginalized groups across the country. They’re putting in the work, speaking out against injustice, and making sure that we eradicate hate, prejudice, and bigotry in all forms.

Imani has been a dedicated ally to the Pakistani American community and an unyielding advocate for human rights, and she’s more than ready to build on APPAC’s efforts as our next Congresswoman. Stand with APPAC by chipping in $27 today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?refcode=appac]

The Lincoln Project knows that Republicans are hoping that they can destroy our democracy without Democrats putting up a fight.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43299637/336603787/1955960298?refcode=BLU-BRP-20220323-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzgxNDE3Yy1mMmFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PWrrDzn8AAzxiKBxlfqi4zic5-LT4vX9czPiCoyuaVs=)

| Peter,

Democracy is at stake in November’s elections, and we need all hands on deck to save it. That’s why BACKROADS is partnering with the Lincoln Project to mobilize tens of thousands of volunteers to support Democratic campaigns across the country.

The Lincoln Project knows that Republicans are hoping that they can destroy our democracy without Democrats putting up a fight. But together, we can stop them. name: =?utf-8?Q?Emily=20Beach?=
subject: Coming after Planned Parenthood
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Beach for Congress
body:
The stakes just got higher | | | | [ ](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=f56de619c0&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| | |
Dear Peter,

**The stakes just got higher, right here at home. **

Congressional funding for Planned Parenthood, a respected, valued, and essential provider of women’s health services was cut – not in Texas or Florida, but right here in the Bay Area.
---
| [ ](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=dc9c6fccb2&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| As a captain in the U.S. Army, I fought for freedom abroad—so I’m NOT going to allow anyone to take away women’s access to reproductive freedom and healthcare here at home. [Will you join me in this important fight for our rights?](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=ba49bddeb8&e=de8b2615ea)

Planned Parenthood provides broad healthcare services, including safe access to abortion, to hundreds of thousands of women in the South Bay—more than half of whom are people of color and low-income.

Sadly, this news demonstrates why **we need more elected women fighting for our rights** to even the most basic of healthcare services. Today only 27% of our representatives in Congress are women. At this critical moment in history, we can’t afford to lose even more representation when Congresswoman Speier retires.

I’m the only woman in this Congressional race. I’m also the only candidate who served our nation in the armed forces, and who fought against opposition to successfully raise the minimum wage for hard working families — many of whom use Planned Parenthood as a healthcare provider. We need representatives in Congress who have the experience to take on tough fights and never let up.

**[Join us today by volunteering](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=b9fbed6170&e=de8b2615ea) or [making a contribution.](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=4ea6ce3d3f&e=de8b2615ea) We need your help to ensure no one in Washington will take away our rights here at home. **
---
| Onward,

Emily Beach
---
| P.S. [Please consider contributing $50, $100, or $150 today.](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=a4cbc2f21d&e=de8b2615ea) The stakes in this race just got higher and we can’t take reproductive freedom for ourselves or our children for granted.
---
| [Donate](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=b8635fdf80&e=de8b2615ea "Donate")

name: Demings, Val
subject: maintaining my momentum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
What a win in Florida could mean for our country
| | |
---
Friend, I just wrapped up a finance meeting, and the main point of discussion was this: How am I going to overcome the combined $116 million Marco Rubio and the Senate Republican campaign arm raised last year?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43299853/336604637/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2700-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmFhZmMyZS1mM2FhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y2JnXlQ8xI4fxOiAhHQlc3dm4TpcDzdSwm3klv3ymHM=)
My grassroots fundraising is drastically slowing down at the worst possible moment. **I still need to raise $7,534 to hit my midnight fundraising goal, friend.**
The Cook Political Report _increased_ my chances of winning. We're gaining ground, and the GOP is taking notice. That's why they're parachuting in to destroy that momentum: National Republicans committed another $10 million to keeping Florida red permanently. Missing my midnight goal makes it even harder to compete with that kind of investment.

**I am not giving up – b****ut Rubio has the advantage, and I am depending on _you_ to maintain my momentum and win. You see the hill I have to climb – and you know what a win in Florida could mean for our country, so I've got to ask: [Will you please make a contribution of $5 or more to win in Florida, defeat Marco Rubio and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43299854/336604638/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2700-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmFhZmMyZS1mM2FhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y2JnXlQ8xI4fxOiAhHQlc3dm4TpcDzdSwm3klv3ymHM=)**

clean_body: What a win in Florida could mean for our country | | | Friend, I just wrapped up a finance meeting, and the main point of discussion was this: How am I going to overcome the combined $116 million Marco Rubio and the Senate Republican campaign arm raised last year? = My grassroots fundraising is drastically slowing down at the worst possible moment. I still need to raise $7,534 to hit my midnight fundraising goal, friend. The Cook Political Report increased my chances of winning. We're gaining ground, and the GOP is taking notice. That's why they're parachuting in to destroy that momentum: National Republicans committed another $10 million to keeping Florida red permanently. Missing my midnight goal makes it even harder to compete with that kind of investment. I am not giving up – but Rubio has the advantage, and I am depending on you to maintain my momentum and win. You see the hill I have to climb – and you know what a win in Florida could mean for our country, so I've got to ask: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = So grateful for your support, Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. subject: SHOCKING Inflation Report:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress
body:
Inflation is at its highest in 40 years... driven by record energy prices. [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=94544cadb6bf45ae81b1b5d655837111&_e=IdLwndWO-68BjQ0S39Sabo4Mueodva6Nc_tW1Fu3N_R9RO1RJyIb-0a7OkE_eMLlUSWjfXs72grMDsVv0sh1UDQCfbJmG936AdEIY4HN08hSrRlKUTk-PsEZ1umh39ao7F5rR8lek25NaDhaivYABL5PPeCOiNN2L9UTgXPrfsxvzhaUVfY7CiVQ_T6Bxyr_ViqshpzZwJFYZ8kudGLcsp-NLydUkvkmJUDwgKKxFzeXQ9_TCdW9qIBpNnPoTwPQ_tGHeT_JacnuGLAJfRs4gw%3D%3D) Peter, Did you see the latest inflation report? In February alone, inflation increased 10% over the last year—the first******double-digit increase in 40 years**! Bad policy leads to bad consequences. And Biden’s inflation crisis is proof. [**POLL: ARE YOU CONCERNED ABOUT RISING COSTS?**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=94544cadb6bf45ae81b1b5d655837111&_e=IdLwndWO-68BjQ0S39SabgBZQZoUGJiw7iFhDP7loko4wADU-KkE7RB1WWHjECLbPm7pzpDrIsOu2OPuoVT6FOKxjY_aNWcj-cHawy2Hq2sU0Gj6NgQ9qML_4oiRTYqgc7ITWISm3famSY7BT7IT3AIbeNJrKv0jyXZ32daZUBTy9H0cbYSlsPcam8Niqxh3H-qufbAsk0dU6JIZTNspuj2K6vG-peBeNLfztMm0LwbJ6km-sDBKPyZf0oBzJNY62TD9Xnj3LeFufX3J5sFyVUTHRlD4mFh_81OShnJ2OOoJMEVLt_OJaPvn3hS5Y5mtfndj3fakJO74U5EGLFfHYrM30taawGyLozNb20Ev2IkTyUKVwYjjtgiEXuGm6EnCMX9UTtpRWPmh2ia4oMuqrE41J4AwsT5xQOXyHCfYolYN-EU80LRCGL4n2USVuJPltyjvFbz1UNCmIZjaQLGAHQ%3D%3D) | INFLATION REPORT |
---|---
Home heating oil | Up 77.2%
Gas | Up 60.6%
Consumer Products | Up 30.4%
Food | Up 13.7%
According to the Bureau of Labor Statistics: “Nearly **40% **of the February increase in prices for final demand goods can be** attributed to the index for gasoline**, which rose 14.8%.”*

_*NOTE: This report did NOT include price changes after Russia invaded Ukraine. So the numbers in next month’s report are bound to be even worse._
[**TAKE THE INFLATION POLL**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=94544cadb6bf45ae81b1b5d655837111&_e=IdLwndWO-68BjQ0S39SabgBZQZoUGJiw7iFhDP7loko4wADU-KkE7RB1WWHjECLbPm7pzpDrIsOu2OPuoVT6FOKxjY_aNWcj-cHawy2Hq2sU0Gj6NgQ9qML_4oiRTYqgc7ITWISm3famSY7BT7IT3AIbeNJrKv0jyXZ32daZUBTy9H0cbYSlsPcam8Niqxh3H-qufbAsk0dU6JIZTNspuj2K6vG-peBeNLfztMm0LwbJ6km-sDBKPyZf0oBzJNY6ye2o2FgL1VMYZRVVenmjt4NWM-sr-7vc9KC_VFPRJcQOWyS3xR922o4uACA3jbef3oSYWC0ENhDAPxBh5r5xX9ouD4jRLlEm9sr-5lRz4VpdtplP1SG4XM6eUBvzdqGRFf3n2Kop6_9TKiuXKIgnPwWbVvM2Te-1lja-HRIUEmh0Gs3DVmKwbjPiabCYPg3z5fDm3o2aa8zvGtpv4ErHTQ%3D%3D)
President Biden may blame others, but the reality is that the Left’s **war on American energy** is a major driver of today’s record inflation.

The Administration’s efforts to buy oil from hostile foreign powers instead of American producers is indefensible–and must be stopped.

American energy is abundant, cleaner, and cheaper. Buying from American producers would create good jobs at home, help rein in inflation...and won’t enrich foreign dictators.
[**SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=94544cadb6bf45ae81b1b5d655837111&_e=IdLwndWO-68BjQ0S39SabgBZQZoUGJiw7iFhDP7loko4wADU-KkE7RB1WWHjECLbPm7pzpDrIsOu2OPuoVT6FOKxjY_aNWcj-cHawy2Hq2sU0Gj6NgQ9qML_4oiRTYqgc7ITWISm3famSY7BT7IT3AIbeNJrKv0jyXZ32daZUBTy9H0cbYSlsPcam8Niqxh3H-qufbAsk0dU6JIZTNspuj2K6vG-peBeNLfztMm0LwbJ6km-sDBKPyZf0oBzJNY6tlZWSlE-lg9AR59GGhAHGkwgnE5sIAXIJQRqqqXFFRE3OHjMTbY_yEN3-eN5JUO0SvFjejL3fl6N6Y25-e9DVvO1gz8kcklcmwoU_hZ-H8L8Q6a5O-1dC2ZOgStuKKCZ3cnW--V7hWuDSsD8XbcnIz7Cqk4effb1LXWe0zz0pIqtw7_WO-ZAanC8a2MEHfB_zpU6h7j6WaBO1aFwvZ7WAQ%3D%3D)

Matt Jacobs

name: Pfaff HQ
subject: I just looked at your supporter record.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
Every donation that comes in the door today allows us to plan bigger for this fall and put more funding into our voter outreach programs.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43291714/336566548/-1995343361?refcode=abd_em_fr_2021.10.04_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.03.23_b1_sam-supporerrecord_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTQ2MjQxOC1kM2FhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eEiSSjQ2M97pB7DtGGq20TFKw7XxYMKd6-stEF53vsg=)
---
Friends, it's Sam, Brad Pfaff’s finance director.

I'm reaching out to give you an update on our end-of-month fundraising goal, **[and then ask for your first $5 donation before this month’s end-of-quarter deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43291717/336566552/-774467147?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.03.23_b1_sam-supporerrecord_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.03.23_b1_sam-supporerrecord_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTQ2MjQxOC1kM2FhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eEiSSjQ2M97pB7DtGGq20TFKw7XxYMKd6-stEF53vsg=)**

Every day, when Brad and I talk to our campaign's supporters, sometimes we get the question, "it's only March- why should I donate now?"

Well, if you knew that the money you invested right now would make a huge difference in the fall and allow us to talk to more voters and make sure they know we are running against a dangerous Capitol Insurrectionist, **[would you donate $5 before you closed this email?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43291720/336566555/-774467147?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.03.23_b1_sam-supporerrecord_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.03.23_b1_sam-supporerrecord_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTQ2MjQxOC1kM2FhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eEiSSjQ2M97pB7DtGGq20TFKw7XxYMKd6-stEF53vsg=)**

Because that's the truth. Every donation that comes in the door today allows us to plan bigger for this fall and put more funding into our voter outreach programs.

And that's why it's so important that we beat our end-of-month quarter. Not only that, but all of our numbers will be made public, so if we fall short, everyone -- including our opponent -- will know.

name: Letitia James
subject: I will not bow. I will not break.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43292737/336569784/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk367-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzNmYjRjZC1kM2FhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f02zzhz4JS1ZcUi1SXDhB-w8oe_DOUST2idVkwVD0Us=)
Peter,

In the last few decades, women have made astonishing strides in the fight for equality. We didn’t wait to be invited to the table; instead, we forced our way into positions of leadership, discovery, and success. And, because of the tireless determination of the women who came before me, we have never been closer to achieving equality than we are right now.

**But this fight isn’t over until every single person has equal pay, similar socio-economic opportunities, and the right to make decisions about their own body. **

I vow to never relent in my fight for equality, but I can’t continue to defend New York without your help. That’s why, in honor of Women’s History Month, my team set a goal to raise $20,000 before midnight on Friday.
[**Peter, will you rush $20 or more now to help me hit my goal and ensure that my re-election campaign has the resources it needs to win in November?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43292738/336569785/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk367-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzNmYjRjZC1kM2FhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f02zzhz4JS1ZcUi1SXDhB-w8oe_DOUST2idVkwVD0Us=)
| | [Make a contribution](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43292739/336569786/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk367-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzNmYjRjZC1kM2FhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f02zzhz4JS1ZcUi1SXDhB-w8oe_DOUST2idVkwVD0Us=)
---
We made history in 2018 when I became the first Black woman _ever_ elected to hold statewide office. And I vowed then to never stop fighting to defend the forgotten and vulnerable. It has been my _honor_ to not only fight for all New Yorkers – especially women of color and LGBTQ+ people – but also to give a voice back to those who have gone so long without one.

I’m running for re-election because my fight is far from over. Across the country, reproductive freedom, voting rights, and LGBTQ+ rights are under attack. And women of color are _still_ fighting for a place at the table.
**Peter, the battle for equality ahead will be tough, but know this: I will not bow. I will not break. Election Day is only a few months away, and I need your help defeating my Republican opponent.

[So please, in honor of Women’s History Month, will you rush whatever you can spare to help fuel my campaign before midnight on Friday?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43292740/336569787/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk367-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzNmYjRjZC1kM2FhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f02zzhz4JS1ZcUi1SXDhB-w8oe_DOUST2idVkwVD0Us=)**
| | [Make a contribution](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43292741/336569788/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk367-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzNmYjRjZC1kM2FhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f02zzhz4JS1ZcUi1SXDhB-w8oe_DOUST2idVkwVD0Us=)
---
Thank you for helping me make history again.

Letitia
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/106e4d80-1fa7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/673fb4cd-d3aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzNmYjRjZC1kM2FhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f02zzhz4JS1ZcUi1SXDhB-w8oe_DOUST2idVkwVD0Us=&id=128810098) James for NY

New York, NY 10034

Well, here's the deal – with so many vacancies on Pennsylvania’s federal courts, our U.S. senators have an opportunity to significantly change the makeup of the courts. This means that history is in our hands, and if our senators work to fill these vacancies, the future can be in our favor.
Strides have been made with the recent nomination of Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to the United States Supreme Court. Judge Jackson became the first-ever Black woman U.S. Supreme Court nominee, but our work to expand the electorate is far from over, and our nation’s courts continue to lack representation.
It’s time to demand change and fill judicial vacancies so that the makeup of the courts reflects the people they serve. **It is our responsibility to be the change we want to see in the world.**
We need our senators to stand up and do the job they were elected to do, to represent us and reflect our values for this monumental confirmation.
We have already seen where Senator Toomey’s priorities stand, especially on the issues of racial and gender diversity. But luckily, Senator Casey can work to be the voice of reason and reflect our values for this monumental decision.
**So, where do you stand? We want to know your opinion. Do you think Pennsylvania’s U.S. senators should work to fill these vacancies as soon as possible?**
[YES!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43292745/336569794/477443532?refcode=EM_FR_220323SixSeats_VR_KK_90DO_7_G_N_B1YES&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQwMzU3NGRhLWQzYWEtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AoDJoiss1ldP-ZHQxBrcYC8Wnb2LIL7ozOS-8HB4wJ4=) [no](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43292746/336569795/477443532?refcode=EM_FR_220323SixSeats_VR_KK_90DO_7_G_N_B2NO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQwMzU3NGRhLWQzYWEtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AoDJoiss1ldP-ZHQxBrcYC8Wnb2LIL7ozOS-8HB4wJ4=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jake=20Monssen?=
subject: ENDORSEMENT ALERT: Value In Electing Women PAC Endorses Jennifer Strahan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Strahan for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/78c2fea987e1/businesswoman-jennifer-strahan-announces-challenge-to-marjorie-taylor-greene-in-ga-8864153?e=daf3f68050)
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
Jake Monssen, jake@strahanforcongress.com
---
| | **ENDORSEMENT ALERT: Value In Electing Women PAC Endorses Jennifer Strahan**
---
| **DALLAS, Ga** : Today, the Value In Electing Women PAC (VIEWPAC) [announced their endorsement of Jennifer Strahan's campaign](https://StrahanForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=21a96cd50be879ed37d24b0ca&id=39f224de3d&e=daf3f68050) in Georgia's 14th Congressional District.

VIEWPAC's mission is to protect and increase the number of Republican women in the U.S. House and U.S. Senate. Over the last 25 years, VIEWPAC has been responsible for raising $25 million for Republican women running for office and is credited with electing the majority of the freshman class of Republican women in 2020.
---
|
---
| "Jennifer Strahan is a breath of fresh air for the Party. She is an entrepreneur, successful businesswoman, healthcare expert and a college professor. Jennifer’s experience and demeanor set her up perfectly to be an effective Member of Congress," **said VIEWPAC Executive Director Julie Conway**. "She understands the seriousness of the job and will be committed to finding real solutions to real problems. Jennifer is a no-nonsense conservative who is ready to serve the constituents of Georgia 14.”

"I am honored to have earned the endorsement of VIEWPAC. Their long history of supporting strong Republican women is something to be admired, and I am humbled to have my name added to their endorsements for 2022," **said Jennifer Strahan**. "VIEWPAC is a heavy hitter with the Republican Party, and I look forward to joining their list of victories on May 24."
---
| | Paid for by Strahan for Congress
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Strahan For Congress, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Strahan For CongressPO Box 2780Dallas, GA 30132-0047
[Add us to your address book](https://StrahanForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/vcard?u=21a96cd50be879ed37d24b0ca&id=9ca26a5c2f)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://StrahanForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=21a96cd50be879ed37d24b0ca&id=9ca26a5c2f&e=daf3f68050&c=90b06d7fe4) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://StrahanForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=21a96cd50be879ed37d24b0ca&id=9ca26a5c2f&e=daf3f68050&c=90b06d7fe4).

name: Robin Logsdon
subject: Here’s what’s happening:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Matt West for Congress
body:
It’s urgent. | I hate to come to you like this friend, but this is important:
1. Two Oregon Republicans JUST launched campaigns in our district, making our seat a hell of a lot more competitive.
2. If that wasn’t bad enough: an out-of-state billionaire is pumping hundreds of thousands of dollars into this race to help one of our opponents buy this seat.
3. **[We’re falling behind this month’s $3,000 end-of-quarter fundraising goal. Our grassroots campaign won't make it to November if we don’t raise another $750 before midnight TONIGHT. Can we count on your $6 donation to help Matt finish the quarter strong?>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43292949/336571055/763029335?amount=6&refcode=em_MW_FR_EOQ1_032322_op_L1&ms=ea.e539b77d-d4aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTM5Yjc3ZC1kNGFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RRRQHD_nDqYiQc43seNwB5aGVbbtcrpZDsrsNtbDBSI=)**

Look, I’ve worked for all sorts of political campaigns for years, and I can proudly say Matt West is the FIRST candidate I’ve worked with who has a true in-depth understanding of the issues: Matt’s not just a scientist who’s studied climate change (unlike most politicians in D.C.), but he’s LIVED through the record-shattering heatwave here in the Pacific Northwest. He knows the consequences of inaction. Matt’s traveled the district and met with Oregonians about today’s most pressing issues — the rise in inflation, homelessness, social security, and so much more. Matt’s not just paying you lip service but listening to your voice. And while politicians today kneel at the altar of billionaires and Corporate PACs, Matt rejects any donation that isn’t from grassroots supporters like you. He understands that real change comes from people-powered movements like ours. Friend, my point is Matt West is a genuine leader. He’s ready to serve Oregon and fight like hell for you. **But I really need your help to get him over the top in fundraising this quarter if we want to stand a chance against the far-right and clean_body: It’s urgent. | I hate to come to you like this friend, but this is important: 1. Two Oregon Republicans JUST launched campaigns in our district, making our seat a hell of a lot more competitive. 2. If that wasn’t bad enough: an out-of-state billionaire is pumping hundreds of thousands of dollars into this race to help one of our opponents buy this seat. 3. = Look, I’ve worked for all sorts of political campaigns for years, and I can proudly say Matt West is the FIRST candidate I’ve worked with who has a true in-depth understanding of the issues: Matt’s not just a scientist who’s studied climate change (unlike most politicians in D.C.), but he’s LIVED through the record-shattering heatwave here in the Pacific Northwest. He knows the consequences of inaction. Matt’s traveled the district and met with Oregonians about today’s most pressing issues — the rise in inflation, homelessness, social security, and so much more. Matt’s not just paying you lip service but listening to your voice. And while politicians today kneel at the altar of billionaires and Corporate PACs, Matt rejects any donation that isn’t from grassroots supporters like you. He understands that real change comes from people-powered movements like ours. Friend, my point is Matt West is a genuine leader. He’s ready to serve Oregon and fight like hell for you. But I really need your help to get him over the top in fundraising this quarter if we want to stand a chance against the far-right and super-rich donors. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thanks for your help, Robin Logsdon Campaign Manager = = PAID FOR BY Matt West for Congress Matt West for Congress PO Box 1926 Beaverton, OR 97075 United States Click here to

name: Fetterman HQ
subject: The people behind the emails
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Over 44% of everything we raised last quarter came in through our email program.
#
Derek,
With our end-of-quarter deadline just over a week away, we wanted to acknowledge that we’ve been sending you a few more emails than normal. We felt it was only appropriate to take a minute or two to explain why these emails are so important, and why donating to our people-powered campaign today would make a major impact.
**Our email program is a major source of the donations our campaign needs to function.** _Over 44% of everything we raised last quarter came in through our email program._
As a people-powered campaign, we rely on supporters like you chipping in $5, $25, or even $50 at a time. We don’t have billionaire benefactors, millions of dollars to self-fund, or corporate PAC funders.
There are real people who set our fundraising goals, write these emails (hi! 👋), and track our progress. And we know you are a real person, too. This is why we’ll never resort to the-sky-is-falling tactics to try and scare you into contributing.
But not all of our opponents can say the same...
According to the Pittsburgh City Paper, Dr. Oz was asking for donations online with a pre-checked box in the fine print, which can mislead people into giving an automatically recurring donation... _again and again and again._
This is an online fundraising tactic pioneered by — you guessed it — Donald Trump and the Republican party, who swindled some unsuspecting donors out of thousands of dollars. 🤢
**Let’s be very clear:** What Dr. Oz did is completely, 100% unethical. People deserve respect from the candidates running to serve them. That’s why from Day One, we’ve built our incredible people-powered movement by leveling with you about the stakes of this race. No fear-mongering, no "gotcha" fine print... just the truth about why John Fetterman is running for Senate and why supporting our campaign is so damn important.
**Pennsylvanians deserve so much better than a scam artist like Dr. Oz.[If you agree, will you chip in $5 or any amount you can today to help John beat him? We’re grateful for your support, and we’ll always put in the honest work to earn it.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45892?refcode=em20220323-5098&t=1&akid=5098%2E434096%2EnkRj77)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45892?refcode=em20220323-5098&amounts=5&t=20&akid=5098%2E434096%2EnkRj77)**
Building real relationships with you and your fellow supporters is so important. Thank you for your support, Derek -- it means the world.
–Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220323-5098-footer&t=21&refcode2=5098_434096_nkRj77&akid=5098%2E434096%2EnkRj77)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=22&akid=5098%2E434096%2EnkRj77)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=5098%2E434096%2EnkRj77)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

body:
This isn’t good...
| [](https://links.mariaforflorida.com/u/click?_t=693dccc005624731a29983963c1367ea&_m=8861e47bece746df862d42e4a156c673&_e=Ek2JYmgIYuFIW7iCCOcIDGDf0FJOqsa7yQpHuBYszZDcZxYAGemGb-3G8C5yhgYcN0vLH9LlnEIAhs9Facg2DS0KFOaKM2F_43MqGJqP1D-8P3r4oNWSL_IDeBEcBJ3NJfGF6yqlYPu2em5FT2C4fqphgz2FGXzO3AbcTgIIEekZC7sO0iEIwdAuLz-P0sC32G60DseP-9CiQkltplZQR6E3isILOoSdAeMoLyTMRKB0dzY74Ia3q5La5nRSi2XwgP48s6yQIOO5ECQn_YrXgbLU5DQeGnTu4nBvFqGWI1_hZ7NL6EX8Gi9epceikxnitkzd_jD2Z44uXAZ3k5RjwJsb2xjWfZ1mNYTWcBHglsoROcn7nwSgSSgo4_f8yzruhkIS6z9DbXzJnCwxQdrkFGMKOZeeeeLg8DXeJdMYMMoRRZnYLOo7LfMDEceI2_kKV4aY4ex6qVXEB0woZdnd-KKNEPsZZDyu301Eky2UEm0oPKL_vaB-K9k6hcdJhNPE)
---
Peter,
---
Nancy Pelosi’s DCCC hauled in another **$19.3 MILLION** in February, and they’ve got nearly $100 million in the bank.
---
**They’re going to spend a huge chunk of that war chest in my battleground Florida congressional district to try and replace me with one of Pelosi’s liberal puppets.**
---
_That’s why I’m calling on every grassroots supporter to give just $27 ahead of this pivotal FEC fundraising deadline so we have the funds we need to defend FL-27._
---
[**Please make a contribution of just $27 to help me fight back against the DCCC’s $100 million war chest and WIN Florida’s 27th Congressional District.**](https://links.mariaforflorida.com/u/click?_t=693dccc005624731a29983963c1367ea&_m=8861e47bece746df862d42e4a156c673&_e=Ek2JYmgIYuFIW7iCCOcIDGDf0FJOqsa7yQpHuBYszZDcZxYAGemGb-3G8C5yhgYcN0vLH9LlnEIAhs9Facg2DS0KFOaKM2F_43MqGJqP1D-8P3r4oNWSL_IDeBEcBJ3NJfGF6yqlYPu2em5FT2C4fqphgz2FGXzO3AbcTgIIEekZC7sO0iEIwdAuLz-P0sC32G60DseP-9CiQkltplZQR6E3isILOoSdAeMoLyTMRKB0dzY74Ia3q5La5nRSi2XwgP48s6yQIOO5ECQn_YrXgbLU5DQeGnTu4nBvFqGWI19krghGXowzh4ShkhNp58_hoY7La-pG1Z0sGQ1dmFNMRojfTLZFYQV3h9DuOEsyXomjCNL3-AjVqpawujg79aJqTEtcmg16h7mEgD3on1mfRECVVcpG5So3YREIRW6cftaN9ppTJHxJ8zTKehZgvtJtKgLe3LI8bs45McdCbUwg16PCYUtFVQ_yIj3vsKFdPCD8GPGz2cEVpylXkL4P-SUM)
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $27 to WIN FL-27](https://links.mariaforflorida.com/u/click?_t=693dccc005624731a29983963c1367ea&_m=8861e47bece746df862d42e4a156c673&_e=Ek2JYmgIYuFIW7iCCOcIDGDf0FJOqsa7yQpHuBYszZDcZxYAGemGb-3G8C5yhgYcN0vLH9LlnEIAhs9Facg2DS0KFOaKM2F_43MqGJqP1D-8P3r4oNWSL_IDeBEcBJ3NJfGF6yqlYPu2em5FT2C4fqphgz2FGXzO3AbcTgIIEenbQNnbGAb_0tIad6Uxa6kmxRTXUwZgaMkgVeU3kVpG5s6SETsbLHYN7q3zwku-yuY4ffiRy_sK_RtN5Fyf-NuW2mQqJdiidR1gX4gGiXvnVb9Y8rXxN2jp-HnndEsVndjs5YLlELsAjmYX_cpIB-Ztfm4ILZprUenpwJyDlHEtvoXN8_Ug2QMBjvItJexuCuL3_qNMKw0JI2pjpy6zeCjeqOsahZH6C2zH26qJUElqrar0CEkUyi55G7ZqjahMIGaC2zF58ovKKMlhx24JHWDgdfXazbjPXJD9pIp60xoCLkXycA19LPmm6BXthKl6T1YPpc4bpF2D2YFEBoLKGTcoRY2Ap70yEctAA_TND_JjpQ%3D%3D)**
---
I won’t sugarcoat things: Our numbers this month haven’t been as strong as we were hoping, and we finished just $43 ahead of our mid-month target.
---
**But with a flood of $27 contributions, I’m certain we can make up lost ground and blow our Q1 fundraising target out of the water.**
---
_I know $27 seems like nothing compared to the millions Pelosi has in the bank..._
---
But the best part about running a grassroots campaign is that it’s not about the size of the contribution.
---
_It’s about how many patriots step up to fight for liberty, individual rights, and the conservative values we all believe in._
---
Together, we’re strong enough to defeat Pelosi and her millions. We proved that in 2020.
---
But every conservative must do their part.
---
[**So please, make a contribution of just $27 to help me fight back against the DCCC’s $100 million war chest and WIN Florida’s 27th Congressional District.**](https://links.mariaforflorida.com/u/click?_t=693dccc005624731a29983963c1367ea&_m=8861e47bece746df862d42e4a156c673&_e=Ek2JYmgIYuFIW7iCCOcIDGDf0FJOqsa7yQpHuBYszZDcZxYAGemGb-3G8C5yhgYcN0vLH9LlnEIAhs9Facg2DS0KFOaKM2F_43MqGJqP1D-8P3r4oNWSL_IDeBEcBJ3NJfGF6yqlYPu2em5FT2C4fqphgz2FGXzO3AbcTgIIEekZC7sO0iEIwdAuLz-P0sC32G60DseP-9CiQkltplZQR6E3isILOoSdAeMoLyTMRKB0dzY74Ia3q5La5nRSi2XwgP48s6yQIOO5ECQn_YrXgbLU5DQeGnTu4nBvFqGWI18ml1sSDaWY2oQfIa2hk3-qB40ITq9dBW7S3QwF08oBGf14YJqNSce4KEDwoTsx31QxDINSekXKAMSsNXro9RyHWv05m-mcadXEFrQMIR28DyrPKMAU6Uxfg8_1xCIthmJIrgt1cxsaXA27pw-QI012VRtYqIUYKdGRii8p6PiUJFxyPE1uG-mgAjNA2GwuwLRWTw7p4CjlMLO2SBGb3qO_)
---
Thank you,
---

name: Jared Golden
subject: Will you support my re-election campaign in Maine’s 2nd district?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
I’m proud to be endorsed by Serve America | | | Hi there, Congressman Jared Golden from Maine’s Second District here. Serving our country is personal for me. After 9/11, I dropped out of college to enlist in the United States Marine Corps infantry and served combat tours in Afghanistan and Iraq. I then used my veterans’ benefits after completing my service to attend Bates College in my hometown of Lewiston, Maine. When I first ran for Congress in 2017, I made a promise to look out for Maine’s veterans and ensure that they have someone fighting for them in Congress as hard as they fought to defend our country. **It’s been the privilege of a lifetime to fight to improve the lives of our veterans and secure them the resources they need when they return home.** [**I am committed to fighting for our veterans in Congress, but I need your help to do that. clean_body: I’m proud to be endorsed by Serve America | | | Hi there, Congressman Jared Golden from Maine’s Second District here. Serving our country is personal for me. After 9/11, I dropped out of college to enlist in the United States Marine Corps infantry and served combat tours in Afghanistan and Iraq. I then used my veterans’ benefits after completing my service to attend Bates College in my hometown of Lewiston, Maine. When I first ran for Congress in 2017, I made a promise to look out for Maine’s veterans and ensure that they have someone fighting for them in Congress as hard as they fought to defend our country. It’s been the privilege of a lifetime to fight to improve the lives of our veterans and secure them the resources they need when they return home. = = The best way to honor our veterans is to help ensure that when their service to our nation is completed, they have access to the benefits they earned and the support they need. In Congress, I have put a strong emphasis on constituent services to help veterans in need, secured an increase in funding for long-term mental health care as part of the annual VA funding bill, and led efforts to push the VA to establish a permanent unity at Togus so that Maine’s veterans don’t have to leave the state for support. But right now, I’m facing my toughest re-election campaign yet. Kevin McCarthy and the GOP establishment are targeting my district, and dark-money groups have already spent over $2.5 million dollars to prop up my opponent. = Thanks for giving me the time to tell you about myself, and I look forward to having you on our team! name: Travis Bull Johnson for Congress
subject: Change IS possible, but not without your help. 👍 Let's do this!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Travis "Bull" Johnson for Congress Committee_
body:
|
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | |
---
**It's been a busy couple of weeks here.** Five weeks after redistricting there's _still_ no DFL candidate. Mark Lindquist, who was running as a left-leaning DFL candidate, dropped out of the race this week. He is on his way to work as a volunteer in eastern Europe, helping Ukrainian refugees. That leaves me and Michelle Fischbach. The fact that the DFL is going through their convention season without an announced candidate speaks volumes about their lack of commitment to this election – **leaving the door wide open for us to walk through it.** We planning to shoot a commercial early April, and again at the end of May. We will be working with Kowala Media (who supports our campaign) and is willing to do the work for $3500. That's a deal we can't refuse. For reference, and according to FEC reports, Mark spent $18,500 on his introductory video. Our video will be rolled out in the district through various social media channels. **CHANGE IS POSSIBLE, but NOT WITHOUT YOUR 💰 HELP! ** We need a $1,750 deposit by the end of the month to start shooting. _👉 At this time, we are still $1,100 away from that goal._ People are hungry for change and we have a great opportunity to advance the cause of Liberty here in CD-7, but we can't do it without your support. For once, the GOP and DFL can't use scare tactics to entice people to vote for one of the two major parties. **Third-party candidates CAN win. And, I'm ready to prove it! Are you?** Don't put it off any longer. If you've considered donating in the past, now is the time. Video is going to play a key role in disseminating our message throughout the district – and, changing our country... for the better!

| |
---

name: Extreme Republican Watch
subject: Is Mike Braun serious?!?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Braun says legalizing interracial marriage was a “mistake.”

| Peter,

Is Mike Braun serious?!? **😲**
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43300888/336609114/1614996473?refcode=BLU-FFP-20220323-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI4Y2Y0YWYzLWY2YWEtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CGkcG7UW9D8czreYvZl6BKuX-ddDJbaaiyRqOIvenJQ=)
| [FIGHT BACK ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43300889/336609115/1614996473?refcode=BLU-FFP-20220323-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI4Y2Y0YWYzLWY2YWEtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CGkcG7UW9D8czreYvZl6BKuX-ddDJbaaiyRqOIvenJQ=)

name: Dan Farough
subject: Why we need to meet our fundraising goal this week
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friend,

As the chair of this campaign, it’s my job to take a bird’s-eye view, and think about how to make decisions today that will put Jocelyn in the best possible position to be re-elected in November.

So when I heard that election extremists invited Donald Trump to our state for a rally to boost the Big Lie and attract his national network of conspiracy theorists, I knew that this could spell trouble for us come November.

Why?

Jocelyn’s opponents are trying to nationalize this race and turn it into a target for the conspiracy theorists who want to avenge the 2020 election. That means they will be dumping tons of money into our state in an attempt to spread the Big Lie and erode democracy right here in Michigan

My bird’s-eye view is this: our opponents aren’t waiting until November to kick this election into high gear, they’re inviting Trump into our state and doing it now. That means we need to respond with something big to let them know the pro-democracy movement is strong.
This week I set a campaign fundraising goal of ten thousand dollars. Meeting this goal will show that our movement has the resolve to fight for a victory in November. Donate now to help us meet it, friend. >> [secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=032222]

Dan

[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]

body:
Kathy heads to her 3rd debate while Oz skips AGAIN -

| Peter \-
---
| The Delaware Valley Journal will host their GOP Senatorial Debate on Tuesday, and Kathy Barnette will be there!
[Unlike Mehmet Oz, who claims to live in the Delaware Valley but has not participated in a single debate](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aNiTv3v0PXdfiJncA5w-GtvxbyfgN8NiKCFDzc8dAk57qsV6PlJdbjAVwClMHFH1LvGbidypTT7MFNIKDsAT3WafgFp7BdZjHgsc_85X4d6uZUMifp2Y4JoYLN15vWrCngeqqzqv5qOB2om2h56-bYoBqpO7ZTybaoQXORtZRvtsNX0I3S-webk9bIKql_yH&c=7EvNNgol0Xp7n9TT5VQkzvMl-f7HGVv0DyyVD0VI7eKwVQQuknwsMw==&ch=2xPNh0RyrXn_mX1alqKNjOrbi2fKePU-F10L51JRKqnQh1IDJhr-UQ==), Kathy is ready to stand in front of the Pennsylvania electorate and talk about the import issues facing them.
The candidates who show up will debate from 7-8 p.m. and the event will be live-streamed on [PCNTV.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aNiTv3v0PXdfiJncA5w-GtvxbyfgN8NiKCFDzc8dAk57qsV6PlJdbjAVwClMHFH1hAyvNwpBFrGYY7cRF5StK7B1xp0vOUr_LliDFp3ir6aTnUkpo_duritYU6UJGV5yjbaRF7Vm42s=&c=7EvNNgol0Xp7n9TT5VQkzvMl-f7HGVv0DyyVD0VI7eKwVQQuknwsMw==&ch=2xPNh0RyrXn_mX1alqKNjOrbi2fKePU-F10L51JRKqnQh1IDJhr-UQ==).

| With Oz and McCormick skipping EVERY SINGLE DEBATE so far, it's worth asking whether they are ready to lead for Pennsylvania. Kathy, on the other hand, has been traveling across the state at a clip of 1,500 miles per week to meet with as many of you as possible.
She can't do it alone, [so if you can show your support](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aNiTv3v0PXdfiJncA5w-GtvxbyfgN8NiKCFDzc8dAk57qsV6PlJdbjAVwClMHFH1LvGbidypTT7MFNIKDsAT3WafgFp7BdZjHgsc_85X4d6uZUMifp2Y4JoYLN15vWrCngeqqzqv5qOB2om2h56-bYoBqpO7ZTybaoQXORtZRvtsNX0I3S-webk9bIKql_yH&c=7EvNNgol0Xp7n9TT5VQkzvMl-f7HGVv0DyyVD0VI7eKwVQQuknwsMw==&ch=2xPNh0RyrXn_mX1alqKNjOrbi2fKePU-F10L51JRKqnQh1IDJhr-UQ==), Kathy will be extremely grateful.

clean_body: | | | | Pres. Trump & Kelly DO NOT | Peter, While you weren’t paying attention, Joe Biden announced his Supreme Court nominee...Ketanji Brown Jackson. President Trump and Kelly have made it very clear that they DO NOT support her for the nominee. While their opinions are clear, we now have to wonder which way Liberal Lisa Murkowski will vote. *Hint: She was 1 of 3 Republicans who voted to confirm Jackson last year at her current position. Will Liberal Lisa Murkowski support Joe Biden’s nominee for SCOTUS? Make sure to submit your answer before 11:59 PM tonight. We want to know your opinion. -Trump-Tshibaka Polling | | | | =

name: Jamal Raad, Evergreen Action
subject: [SIGN ON] We can fight climate change and authoritarianism at the same time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Big Oil's latest cash grab.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4294?t=2&akid=12958%2E53494%2E2dXBzT) Friend, In two weeks, top oil executives will have to appear in front of the House Energy and Commerce Committee to answer for an industry that "may be exploiting the war in Ukraine for its own economic gain." And worse yet, Big Oil's cynical attempt to cash in on the invasion of Ukraine isn't just despicable—it's also completely dishonest. Increasing our dependence on fossil fuels only exposes our country to greater risk while empowering oil-rich dictators the world over. [**_Instead, we must fight climate change and authoritarianism at the same time by transitioning to cheap, reliable, American-made clean energy. Sign on right now if you agree._**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4294?t=3&akid=12958%2E53494%2E2dXBzT) | [SIGN ON](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4294?t=4&akid=12958%2E53494%2E2dXBzT)
---
Domestic oil and gas producers are lying to our lawmakers, pressing them to roll back environmental protections and allow Big Polluters to snatch up even more public land.
**But here's the truth: Sky-high energy prices mean record profits for fossil fuel companies.** Plus, they have no interest in lowering costs for the American people—in fact, they're already sitting on 9,600 unused approved leases.
The only real long-term solution to protect Americans from price manipulation by fossil-fueled fascists is to accelerate the clean energy transition and free ourselves from the volatile oil and gas market for good.
[**_Sign on to raise your voice along with thousands of other climate activists: Investing in clean energy is our best option to secure affordable, reliable energy for Americans and weaken Vladimir Putin's grip on the energy market._**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4294?t=5&akid=12958%2E53494%2E2dXBzT)
Onward,
Jamal Raad
Executive Director, Evergreen Action
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4294?t=6&akid=12958%2E53494%2E2dXBzT)

name: MEMBERSHIP ALERTS
subject: Your membership has expired.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|

---

body:
Big Tech Censorship Hitting #LahmeyerForSenate Tonight, I received a notification and an email from Facebook that I will soon be "Unpublished" aka b
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5561198.4669.1.afdae5f76d1e6aa2d5d16748edaf5850) |
---
## Big Tech Censorship Hitting #LahmeyerForSenate
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5561198.4670.1.264218ddd57534ac8ac2c34e91a08d30)
---
Tonight, I received a notification and an email from Facebook that I will soon be "**Unpublished** " aka banned from the platform unless I get "_my act together_."
It appears that I won't be on Facebook for much longer.
Be sure to follow me on **TruthSocial**. My username is **@JacksonLahmeyer**
You can also follow me on [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5561198.4671.1.12f329cfbbf54a890571bed2783e5d09), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5561198.4672.1.af660d34d93568f2ff42f158dba41021), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5561198.4673.1.61d4ca6ffd68992d47c500bbf6393964), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5561198.4674.1.3feaef49a102316421f2c62a512da62b)).
I promise to FIGHT to Big Tech Censorship and **repeal Section 230** when I enter into the US Senate.
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
| | [ Support Fighting Big Tech Censorship ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5561198.4675.1.bce8a603131b5c7d9350ab1984108b23)
---
---
## Meet Eric Trump, General Flynn and others...
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5561198.4676.1.3991405b1b9edee8f2f611e47660adff)
---
We have **exciting news** to share:
We have a drawing for a **FREE** round trip to attend any one of the **ReAwaken America Tour** stops.
This trip includes a **VIP Ticket** to hear and potentially meet **Eric Trump** , **General Flynn** , **Roger Stone** , **Mike Lindell** and others. As well as **flight and hotel** to whichever city you choose.
Options:
May 13-14: Myrtle Beach, SC
July 8-9: Virgina Beach, VA
To enter into the drawing all you have to do is **make a donation of $25 or more** to the [#LahmeyerForSenate](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5561198.4677.1.d069e35209378238e17d359bc03d6375) campaign between March 1 through March 31.
For every $25 donated during the month of march that will result in one new entry into the drawing for the FREE ReAwaken America trip.
You can enter into the drawing by visiting [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/donate](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5561198.4678.1.c0d9f4ac0e02124673f1067f8a3b3945)
Winner will be announced on April 2, 2022
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5561198.4679.1.5d004adab9a88be07c95289bdb0c6a75)

name: Morgan Harper Volunteer Alert
subject: We need your help in Cresco
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220323-833-footer-ak&t=1002&akid=833%2E90090%2EZKBtT2 ]Morgan Harper

Hey 👋 —

Welcome to the Morganizing community digest. ✨This is a newsletter where
we’ll share ways that you can get involved in your community.

We hope you’ll enjoy these opportunities to get involved and help build a
strong grassroots movement to send Morgan to the U.S. Senate!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Cresco Community Opportunities:

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

— Canvasses near you 📋 —

We are knocking doors across the state to identify Morgan supporters, and
talk to undecided Democratic voters about the issues that matter most to
them and why Morgan is the best person to represent them in the U.S.
Senate. Closer to the election, we’ll also be reaching back out to
supporters to make sure they have a plan to vote! [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/21440?refcode=em20220323-833&t=1003&akid=833%2E90090%2EZKBtT2 ]If you would like to
get involved with this effort or learn more, please click here to find
canvasses happening near you.

[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/21440?refcode=em20220323-833&t=1004&akid=833%2E90090%2EZKBtT2 ]Sign up here »

— Other volunteer opportunities 🗂️ —

If there isn’t a canvass happening near you, please consider hosting a
canvass in your community or volunteering in another way! Regardless of
your location or experience level, we have plenty of ways that you can
support the campaign by volunteering – including opportunities to
volunteer remotely. [ https://act.morganharper.org/signup/mh-website-volunteer/?refcode=em20220323-833&t=1005&akid=833%2E90090%2EZKBtT2 ]Click here to fill out our volunteer form and we’ll
reach out to you with more information.

[ https://act.morganharper.org/signup/mh-website-volunteer/?refcode=em20220323-833&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1006&akid=833%2E90090%2EZKBtT2 ]Sign up here »

— Voter registration 🗳️ —

We
wanted to make sure you’re aware that the last day to register to vote in
the primary election in Ohio is April 4th. [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/29354?t=1007&akid=833%2E90090%2EZKBtT2 ]Early voting then starts on
April 5th. Please click here to register to vote.

Register to vote »

Thank you for everything you do,

Team Morganize

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Did you enjoy this newsletter? Please consider forwarding it to a friend
or sharing it on social media. That way even more people can find out
about Morgan’s progressive campaign for U.S. Senate and get involved. We
really appreciate your support! 🥰

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. To remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1008&akid=833%2E90090%2EZKBtT2

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio.

body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/alansimsforcongress/9gmhty1yxf-6768541?e=bcd0e72a5a)
---
| | |
# Weekly Update 3.23.2022
---
|
---
| | | |
---
**Friends: **This week we take a deeper look at Energy Independence and its vital connection to our national security. Current events are highlighting this critical relationship, prompting Republicans in Congress to support the “No Oil from Terrorists Act,” to ban Biden from buying oil from Iran. As former Director of Energy Policy for the Air Force at the Pentagon, one of my highest priorities in Congress will be to reestablish Energy Independence.

---
|
# **In this issue:**
* Recent Events
* Upcoming Events
* This Week in Congress
* Alan on the Issues

---
| **Recent Events:**

On March 17th, Alan was inducted into the **Rotary** **Club** of **Winder** during their weekly lunchtime meeting. Alan notes the Rotary Club motto - "Service Before Self" produces a similar feel and expectation he experienced in the Air Force, whose motto reads "Integrity first, Service before self, Excellence in all we do."
---
|
---
| With Winder Chapter Rotary President Julia Simpson
---
|
---
---
| Being pinned by Winder Chapter Secretary Beth McIntyre
---
| **Upcoming Events:**

**Meet and Greet at the Auburn Public Library****:** Come on out and meet Alan at the**** Auburn Public Library this **Friday, March 25th**, hosted by Auburn Mayor Linda Blechinger! We’ll be there from 5:30-7:00 pm with refreshments, ready to share Alan’s vision for the future of the 10th District and our great country! This is a free event and the public is invited to join us!
---
|
---
| **Saturday, March 26:** Join Alan at the **Taliaferro County Candidate Forum** from 3 pm- 5 pm at the Taliaferro County Senior Center, 119 Commerce Street NW, Crawfordville, GA.

---
|
---
|
**VOTE FOR ALAN MAY 24th in the Republican Primary**

---
| **This week in Congress:**
**Republicans propose H.R. 6969 **\- **'No Oil From Terrorists Act'** to ban Biden from buying Iranian energy:

The **Republican Study Committee**(RSC) wrote new legislation to block the United States from purchasing oil products from Iran, arguing the Biden administration needs to focus on boosting domestic energy supplies rather than funding terrorist regimes.

The lawmakers say Biden should restart the Keystone XL pipeline and allow new oil and gas leases on federal lands, rather than creating additional vulnerabilities by buying energy from hostile regimes.

The legislation, **"No Oil From Terrorists Act,"** is especially timely as President Biden announced a ban on Russian oil imports to the U.S. amid bipartisan pressure as Russia continues its invasion of Ukraine. Meanwhile, the United States is in active negotiations in Vienna to restart the Iran nuclear deal, which former President Donald Trump pulled out of in 2018.

---
| **Alan on the Issues:** **Energy Independence**

Energy is an essential requirement that fuels our economy and our way of life. Dependence on others to supply our energy requirements puts American sovereignty, security and prosperity at risk. Our nation is blessed with abundant resources, and government should promote energy independence to secure prosperity and safeguard our sovereignty.

**Key Takeaways:**
* Energy independence promotes U.S. national security and global economic stability
* America must be able to produce more energy resources than it consumes
* Energy independence is key to holding aggressive world powers in check
* U.S. policy should support the free market approach to regaining energy independence
* The Keystone XL pipeline must be restarted, and the Nordstream 2 pipeline shutdown

---
| [CLICK HERE FOR ALAN'S STATEMENT CONCERNING: Energy Independence](https://alansimsforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5abbc295c801dfce747b6d100&id=59d2e6368e&e=bcd0e72a5a "CLICK HERE FOR ALAN'S STATEMENT CONCERNING: Energy Independence")

name: Erica Smith HQ
subject: Bumping this to the top of your inbox
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US
body:
Your support right now will prove that there is a massive coalition behind Erica and our moral movement for bold, progressive change.
#
Hey, we wanted to bump this email from earlier this month to the top of your inbox. [**Erica is counting on us to have her back. Will you make your first contribution to Erica Smith for Congress before our public FEC fundraising deadline on March 31st?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/46073?refcode=em20220323-1022&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1022%2E3698%2ESkTSUp)
Our primary election is just under _eight weeks_ away, and this is a highly competitive race. Your support right now will prove that there is a massive coalition behind Erica and our moral movement for bold, progressive change.
— Erica Smith HQ
\----------Forwarded message---------
From: Erica Smith HQ
Date: Mon, March 7, 2022
Subject: Our *last* FEC deadline before election day in North Carolina
The FEC is already counting down the days until the end of Q1.
At the end of the month, Erica Smith will be required by federal law to report how much money our campaign raised over the past three months.
**This is our last FEC deadline before our primary election.** And once our numbers go public, everyone and anyone will make judgments about the strength and viability of our people-powered campaign for Congress in North Carolina’s 1st District.
But unlike other candidates, **Erica doesn’t have a rolodex of well-connected donors to turn to.** We don’t have millions in the bank, and we’re the only campaign in this race that has pledged to not accept a single dime of corporate PAC or fossil fuel money.
Instead, we’re relying on you.
[**You’ve never donated to our campaign before. Can we count on you to make your very first donation of $5 or more to Erica Smith for Congress? Your donation has a direct and immediate impact on protecting the House, electing one of the only Black women to ever represent North Carolina in Congress, and posting a strong fundraising number by the end of Q1.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/46073?refcode=em20220323-1022&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1022%2E3698%2ESkTSUp)
**[Donate Now](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/46073?refcode=em20220323-1022&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=41&akid=1022%2E3698%2ESkTSUp)**
Thanks for hearing us out,
Erica Smith HQ
Erica Smith is a single mother, educator, and three-term state senator, who grew up on her family farm and spent her life fighting for rural Eastern North Carolina. Now, she’s running to represent NC-01 — _her home district_ – in Congress, where she’ll fight for economic justice and workers’ rights, universal healthcare, voting rights, and more. **[Add a donation of $5 (or anything you can today) to help us file a strong Q1 report, protect this open U.S. House seat, and give power back to working people »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/46073?refcode=em20220323-1022&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=42&akid=1022%2E3698%2ESkTSUp)** **[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/46073?refcode=em20220323-1022&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=43&akid=1022%2E3698%2ESkTSUp)**
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220323-1022-footer&t=44&refcode2=1022_3698_SkTSUp&akid=1022%2E3698%2ESkTSUp)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=45&akid=1022%2E3698%2ESkTSUp)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=46&akid=1022%2E3698%2ESkTSUp)
