body:
Judge Brown and the terrible, horrible, no good, very racist GOP | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0a4ZLzkfrFqdtVKuNIuwQsn0c91jgEdSA5OANsq926BffC7faAQGaBY74u73WFJVk6QvK3gUgBrJdU7HeYCMrwpauJcOn66fUTy7dC6gSTFdOsEee8H-uVAziYzmXt2sp2GyoeRXSlqe1LIILOGEvQv0kPXcvrFOXXBkwUVVe4QMn6aEOfzG9RV9ub3RLsTy1ixTGqLzHryNnVdOT7qL-tPNPwo4y3gfk339QWODzGss0bAjfVOByinioFBpPHJWmz2ZkosVNkCwzKSDSJ51ljc-MvqDJh75xmmqilH7AxyRg/3kl/8wluW50XTIe4yZYDZMmcIA/h0/71el4n6Si9DUl500301EFvHM92kmqZ88R0tHHK04bzY) Team, this week we’re witnessing history as Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson sits before the Senate Judiciary Committee in her confirmation hearings to become the first Black justice on the Supreme Court of the United States. Let’s be clear: Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson would be the most qualified justice on the Supreme Court–period. [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESI9dekNQcqDaMhr3b1Af_ker6xnvKI55rqDUAAq5DTQ2tCzeGpzYbhOAuEZY8IbZ7eF2yAowG5rQqAYl7LSU1-fQDXZWgq8CdVoBQA9JIM2_72hGn27bWjjSkkOcedU4RRZ-gCMXsZ6EcYFBYXEgZW00b8Dp9rl7308yspMKADuPEusgHmPU59mJ5eyQnReFDmGNC_gWWtX23XVZ-krM8MEe3zENRTnlKgsKHpFcIZwfB48N9LV69ZxefVi4FoNMzvY1JghylgZ6xoznqH-HfCYaTM1eiRFs8mhyi_R61qds/3kl/8wluW50XTIe4yZYDZMmcIA/h1/NMRng2SfTMo5P-IIzyG-WDW_Sv4cEuMj736NyZg8jFk)**But Black women have to work twice as hard just to convince the world we deserve to be represented in the halls of power. It’s what we’ve been up against for this entire campaign, and what we are facing now, at the end of our last full quarter.** [**We have 8 days left. Will you donate $15 to help us prove Black women belong in every branch of the Federal Government?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESNXQhdVb8QK7PeDGo7NqwIBni6let4xI7PjmL7j_j0Wauv90XAFmyi9MQIOGiHE3Z5VFKxk0ZfeHeewAr1PDQH9ZbEGifC061bktCPq8ZRz21PJdyvt64Z0ZJu699_kF8b-qKiyTRKl-Q4RTipIxMpAgBP6LfAza4Fxzbev3Id6g-g8Sc_dGg8KWDCuXGIBmLDrN2ptwwfa65tZ5oAlZT396YBBspKKfDWqTPaTCb7b3uAIBirJOlyeoPI2_iADqvf-7JFlT9Pgo3LDJEcZUdCxBPnRQZtKJbkWK4cF1oajQ/3kl/8wluW50XTIe4yZYDZMmcIA/h2/Hg34ZkXvYZ4FDycZLv40KaohqZkeGRJRbEGDuQvYeOA) [Donate](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESn86gxn6cAA6ioKUzrSfAq45OppcWdKY5S9CKrX1kpGxJr3zDmDB5Gbloh5JGGYrWowkVxM_iOQ5msrprzf39E5-uohNoB7GQa0AFwihwOZXuOpEb0J2582G8C6VEgoB5cwSixgT0KpgcG3TCV54TLxZqBqAepkIv5jqC3RZusQD5R6_-U93dVeWCIXoFcN_OiKF0fXXvWAfLP6-Cb5q7tehAUhyoLE_Gl8t4DCijs-RbM7YoDLRzT3dGmGK91xHoVyejdZlQrMEJ1V9ml9gtoq14n5EA7sKfEnZ_vzhQAaI/3kl/8wluW50XTIe4yZYDZMmcIA/h3/6Is16XieDUW20JQhgWmMEt05LEpIjvHWxwLz9-0UcgI) As always, Black women are forced to prove that they are not just exceptional, but almost superhuman, just to deserve respect. Why else would every other Republican Senator ask Judge Brown about her positions on Critical Race Theory? Or allege that she is “soft on crime”? Senator Raphael Warnock put it plainly: “ _Would they be asking these questions if this were not a Black woman?”_ No. No they would not. These Republican Senators know how qualified Judge Brown is - that is why they pour all their energy into distracting us with racist dog whistles. Because the truth - that they don’t want someone in the Supreme Court who is willing to believe that Black lives do in fact matter, that our voting rights are the backbone of our democracy, and that our reproductive freedoms are our fundamental rights - is a far scarier reality. We deserve a Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson now more than ever because our most basic rights are being gutted by a right-wing Supreme Court. And guess what? No racist, Republican Senator can stop her. In solidarity, Kina Collins

clean_body: Judge Brown and the terrible, horrible, no good, very racist GOP | | | Team, this week we’re witnessing history as Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson sits before the Senate Judiciary Committee in her confirmation hearings to become the first Black justice on the Supreme Court of the United States. Let’s be clear: Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson would be the most qualified justice on the Supreme Court–period. Black women have to work twice as hard just to convince the world we deserve to be represented in the halls of power. It’s what we’ve been up against for this entire campaign, and what we are facing now, at the end of our last full quarter. As always, Black women are forced to prove that they are not just exceptional, but almost superhuman, just to deserve respect. Why else would every other Republican Senator ask Judge Brown about her positions on Critical Race Theory? Or allege that she is “soft on crime”? Senator Raphael Warnock put it plainly: “ Would they be asking these questions if this were not a Black woman?” No. No they would not. These Republican Senators know how qualified Judge Brown is - that is why they pour all their energy into distracting us with racist dog whistles. Because the truth - that they don’t want someone in the Supreme Court who is willing to believe that Black lives do in fact matter, that our voting rights are the backbone of our democracy, and that our reproductive freedoms are our fundamental rights - is a far scarier reality. We deserve a Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson now more than ever because our most basic rights are being gutted by a right-wing Supreme Court. And guess what? No racist, Republican Senator can stop her. In solidarity, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43294460/336578622/-766995749?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzhhNGY3YS1kYmFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DjqXdOJEDmcJd9d4JLaiiS0AuiPu5k8JZRlzC3dX4f8=&emci=a3df559b-b5aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=878a4f7a-dbaa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15639879)

Hi friends,

When this campaign started last year, I knew that I was setting out on a special journey alongside you, my supporters. I had to learn the ins and outs of running a campaign quickly, and I am proud of how far we have come. One of my favorite parts about this campaign has been hearing feedback from supporters like you – folks are **_REALLY EXCITED_** about WI-01 being a battleground district (and so are we!)

In March, we got the news that our district has been added to the DCCC's **"District in Play"** list. Our district is one of 22 across the country considered key districts that the Democrats will need to win to keep the House this November.

**This is a MAJOR win for our campaign.**

| | Folks,

I won my 2020 election by the smallest margin of any Congressional Democrat and thanks to you, we were able to keep our House majority. But with our new district map, I need your help more than ever.

We’ve been able to achieve so much with that narrow majority in Congress – the fastest job growth in American history, a historic decline in poverty, lower health care costs, and the biggest investment in modernizing America’s infrastructure in decades. Meanwhile, the Republicans are running with no governing agenda, while calling the violence of January 6th “legitimate discourse.” The contrast, and stakes, could not be more clear.

**To stay on track, we have to win tough races like mine. Everything we raise before our first FEC deadline of 2022 at the end of the month will help us go head to head with our likely opponent, Tom Kean Jr., for a second time and it will help us combat these constant attack ads from the GOP.**

Our margin in the House to continue passing progressive legislation is so narrow — and the GOP campaign to take back my seat continues to grow stronger, especially with this new district map. They’ve already spent millions of dollars on attack ads against me and it won’t stop there. Tom Kean Jr. — the same opponent who came within 5,000 votes of winning in 2020 — is back for a rematch and the most recent polls show us in a dead heat!

**That’s why all eyes are going to be on our fundraising numbers after this FEC deadline. Everything we raise is going to go public, and will be seen as a sign of whether we’re on track to win in November!**

The choice this year is clear: between the party of infrastructure and the party of insurrection; between those focused on creating jobs and those hell-bent on creating chaos. I look forward to running with a party that welcomes patriotic Americans of differing policy views while always putting our country first.

But to get that message out and defend our seat, I’ll be counting on you. I would be immensely grateful for your support in building a strong grassroots campaign that will win again in New Jersey’s Seventh District. [I'm hoping you will consider sending in a contribution of any amount today. Remember, all donations will be matched – for real, no gimmicks – until the Malinowski Matchers fund has been fully utilized!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43301971/336613850/-1267168962?amount=10&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_20220323_1_1_match&refcode2=79fdd6f9-fcaa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWZkZDZmOS1mY2FhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j4Wf8SmjIWuGx7dXVg9mpHM8WFiPUTE4pCw2YZ_heWI=)

Friend,

Can you believe it?

FIRST, it was DirecTV.

NOW, it's Time Warner.

I am disgusted that Time Warner, the owner of Fake News CNN, has just announced that they will be terminating a very popular and wonderful news network (OAN).

Between heavily indebted Time Warner, and Radical Left Comcast, which runs Xfinity, there is a _**virtual monopoly on news,**_ thereby making what you hear from the Lamestream Media essentially _FAKE_.

Don't you see it, Friend? The Left wants to SILENCE anyone and everyone who disagrees with the LIES they are pushing.

name: Team Beto
subject: [TONIGHT] Virtual organizing call with Beto
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

Hi — we wanted to make sure
that you saw Katherine's invitation to tonight's organizing call with
Beto.

You can read the entire email below, but if you're short on time, here's
what you need to know: We're hosting an organizing call with Beto TONIGHT
at 7pm CDT to discuss our plan to win and to share some upcoming volunteer
opportunities.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54079?utm_source=ema20220323-181736&t=1001&akid=181736%2E444211%2ES-e7yx ]RSVP now to join Beto, Katherine, and your fellow supporters tonight.

Hope to see you there!

— Team Beto

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Katherine Fischer, Beto for Texas
Date: Monday, March 21, 2022
Subject: You're invited: Virtual organizing call with Beto

We're building the biggest and best organizing program in Texas history.
Last month alone, over 56,000 volunteers came together to contact 4.5
million voters before the primary election!

But to defeat Greg Abbott, we're going to need to take risks and try
organizing strategies that no campaign has ever tried before. It's no
small task, so that's where you come in.

Beto and I will be laying out our plan to win on Wednesday's virtual
organizing call while also discussing how folks like you can get involved!
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54079?utm_source=ema20220323-181736&t=1002&akid=181736%2E444211%2ES-e7yx ]Can you join Beto on our organizing call?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54079?utm_source=ema20220323-181736&t=1003&akid=181736%2E444211%2ES-e7yx ]Beto for Texas Virtual Plan to Win Organizing Call
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54079?utm_source=ema20220323-181736&t=1004&akid=181736%2E444211%2ES-e7yx ]Wednesday, March 23
7:00 – 8:00pm CDT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54079?utm_source=ema20220323-181736&t=1005&akid=181736%2E444211%2ES-e7yx ]Get more info or RSVP

Most campaigns guard this kind of information under lock and key, but we
know we can't win without y'all. So I hope you'll join Beto and me on
Wednesday's call to learn how you can participate.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54079?utm_source=ema20220323-181736&t=1006&akid=181736%2E444211%2ES-e7yx ]RSVP now for Wednesday's call to learn more about how you can help
elect Beto and get Texas on the right track. Then, forward this invitation
to three friends — we want as many supporters as possible to be a part of
this movement!

Thank you,

Katherine Fischer
Organizing Director, Beto for Texas

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=181736%2E444211%2ES-e7yx

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Glenn Beck
subject: [URGENT] A personal request for Ukraine
body:
| | | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b64a4c1bcdcb4c3f89099af747e36acf&_e=g6lOqQphZ0xaHf_vKuSaSnEUJVDNnJse34CC0BoVmhmZAe9qMBz-vdAy7204Ygs70EI3ubbCSS7ZFxhILjRXhF6v4Txd3LYR9EudfbikC2I8iwQnUVrhPshxshSdovn-Xq1TGI8uEEKLIrIq5qKHYAq4rh9awmjyefSCIJIuPWzDJaqRBZquVsGRxDW4vkhTXwbbv-shJJVp5plEtz1Hs6NGahqM-OhoB_5gG8b0cSJRwtU4WYzatqsyOlnM1lP05DLv_iFta7ACecrKi6A17kimxSB7BqVHHTdRHQEW6Zqq8x8ut2rCaYMfSPeENpNluFXKIfkoQvAvnQwcVpC6qBhDjOZT9jYMQjjKkO5cndBXZrvq1V1JmZZZcjRGZSBWac9Gs-wY7m_0AP0Kzt5PfQ%3D%3D)
---
|
---
Friend,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b64a4c1bcdcb4c3f89099af747e36acf&_e=g6lOqQphZ0xaHf_vKuSaSnEUJVDNnJse34CC0BoVmhmZAe9qMBz-vdAy7204Ygs70EI3ubbCSS7ZFxhILjRXhF6v4Txd3LYR9EudfbikC2I8iwQnUVrhPshxshSdovn-Xq1TGI8uEEKLIrIq5qKHYAq4rh9awmjyefSCIJIuPWzDJaqRBZquVsGRxDW4vkhT7xKONQ2er_lTfM17jSzJMo1TpSahvWRYpysngL1FhinJcVQfAPGRvwiW878923MoKnSdNFRi3jJqduPHvIWqvMmIuNiIHRS-iXE9WA1mJJLtGM2325m3gu-5HaE233J5tNUlAcbvVOzynSzVSyFdJyFeDwU7648iiXQKNuR6v2UsIWRsGX6xjAN2JpoyYY2EazNTXUP5GhRT0VMXoa_NpQ%3D%3D)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b64a4c1bcdcb4c3f89099af747e36acf&_e=g6lOqQphZ0xaHf_vKuSaSnEUJVDNnJse34CC0BoVmhmZAe9qMBz-vdAy7204Ygs70EI3ubbCSS7ZFxhILjRXhF6v4Txd3LYR9EudfbikC2I8iwQnUVrhPshxshSdovn-Xq1TGI8uEEKLIrIq5qKHYAq4rh9awmjyefSCIJIuPWzDJaqRBZquVsGRxDW4vkhTpKsJBpInojvpbvEJRv6XmCKDfT_M6eKppVLunfHW_1HHffAliPJaYAgVN9vcvP0rRiCPWzuP7I0IGebnGUP9p3lbsq-5Ut2mI24gQQpoqL-FDIL94r2WajYwJ9-uV-3PmrIdhWM0fo27omowelWwtHts2Lc_7yKqKFqfAlsfIaJOBypO8vFiQOEA4P2I50TkyTDUa8QtOKDfE3Z3usP87w%3D%3D)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b64a4c1bcdcb4c3f89099af747e36acf&_e=g6lOqQphZ0xaHf_vKuSaSnEUJVDNnJse34CC0BoVmhmZAe9qMBz-vdAy7204Ygs70EI3ubbCSS7ZFxhILjRXhF6v4Txd3LYR9EudfbikC2I8iwQnUVrhPshxshSdovn-Xq1TGI8uEEKLIrIq5qKHYAq4rh9awmjyefSCIJIuPWzDJaqRBZquVsGRxDW4vkhTPYs8j8DRwzpVPJ58ll_8fdUTAByKCj7wbs3giCsNl14MKDENwaL87Z2PBJ4aFnaVq4sNR9CBPKYYOplOnnZvJP1xaJrG7rrX6Pn7BD5X30nwviDAUZIS_pc54OOutz3l1-cX13IRdVBwABV65n1bwd2L-kSWNPTR0LsuJIicfy-y8IcMb-rXkvZwle5ApqiKq65_5iFqSIzpdUw1AFIEWQ%3D%3D)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|

[DONATE NOW](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b64a4c1bcdcb4c3f89099af747e36acf&_e=g6lOqQphZ0xaHf_vKuSaSnEUJVDNnJse34CC0BoVmhmZAe9qMBz-vdAy7204Ygs70EI3ubbCSS7ZFxhILjRXhF6v4Txd3LYR9EudfbikC2I8iwQnUVrhPshxshSdovn-Xq1TGI8uEEKLIrIq5qKHYAq4rh9awmjyefSCIJIuPWzDJaqRBZquVsGRxDW4vkhTbLomeAD0ECoadANR3Bd_uDGGbsZRwrGwMmEzhGparxAUHaWSW8RGePyHJwAm7coMgG0E_vXg8cOz-L78MuGo9sFEF3sMIl0wkOdK3bC51SzSrV-06b1WxSkVCoprKt6CU2eSjHlVnqAmWZpk5Z-2uNiTgdvJc1XjC_HwZwgtFaHiJY6drc3-kpLc86WxIIfRrzcJWBAU3zCK8iRZdyKd_g%3D%3D)

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: This is our chance for change in Iowa.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa
body:
Sen. Grassley has lived in Washington for decades and turned his back on the interests of everyday Iowans
| | |
---
Hey, Peter. I'm reaching out to humbly ask for your support in my race for Iowa's Senate seat – because we set an ambitious goal that we need to hit by the end of March in order to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley and flip this seat blue.

Winning against a seven-term incumbent like Sen. Grassley – who will be heavily backed by Mitch McConnell and his allies – will take unprecedented grassroots resources. body:
I just want to write a short note to show my gratitude for my incredible grassroots supporters like you.

| I just want to write a short note to show my gratitude for my incredible grassroots supporters like you.

Because of folks like you, we continue to hit the goals our campaign sets out to and can continue to focus our campaign on supporting Lowcountry families—including recently on advocating to lower our gas prices.

The next few months until the election aren’t going to be easy. Our opponents are putting all their attention on pandering to Trump and his extremist base with Arrington going so far as to push a plan to eliminate the Department of Education.

I’m focused on helping our families and kids in the hospital and on the campaign trail—not on trying to get attention from a twice impeached president. But it’s not going to be easy. Our Federal Election Commission (FEC) quarterly filing deadline is coming up and we’ve got to raise at least another $15K to have a strong report.

**If you’re able, please double down on your support and chip in $10 today to help us close this budget hole.**

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: This ain't easy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Pennsylvania has never sent a Black person to the Senate, let alone a gay Black man
#

Folks,
This is going to be a long email but I'm hoping you'll bear with me — because I want to address the elephant in the room.
I know I’m not the typical candidate for U.S. Senate.
I’m traversing a path that's never been taken, to serve from a place that never envisioned including a person like me. A place still rarely sees folks like us.
I know I say this a lot, but it’s so important to have actual working people in government.
I don’t come from generational wealth — I grew up a poor Black gay kid in North Philly. My mom had to ration her insulin, and my family moved a lot to avoid eviction.
But here’s the thing: My story is not unique. Not at all.
Everywhere I go in Pennsylvania, I hear stories of good, hard-working people struggling to make ends meet.
The crushing weight of student debt. The skyrocketing cost of childcare and senior care. Postponed doctor visits and unfulfilled prescriptions.
I’m in this race because no one like me — like _us_ — has ever had a seat at the table in the U.S. Senate.
And it’s time for us to be in the room where decisions about our lives are being made.
In Harrisburg, I’ve fought tirelessly for solutions to the problems working people face every day.
But Pennsylvania has never sent a Black person to the Senate, let alone a gay Black man.
That means this ain’t easy.
This race is the most expensive Senate race in the country right now, and we’ve got some ambitious goals to hit before our final quarterly FEC deadline at the end of this month.
[So I need you now more than ever. If you’re able, will you make a contribution to support this campaign today? Any amount will make a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43295113/336581346/-358086307?refcode2=2b5bf44e-ddaa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220323-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjViZjQ0ZS1kZGFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BiXyBJAtNPEKXPn8ytsR23lX3S_iItDG-0mm5wedu8k=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43295114/336581347/-358086307?refcode2=2b5bf44e-ddaa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220323-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjViZjQ0ZS1kZGFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BiXyBJAtNPEKXPn8ytsR23lX3S_iItDG-0mm5wedu8k=)**
Thank you for everything,
Malcolm

clean_body: Pennsylvania has never sent a Black person to the Senate, let alone a gay Black man Folks, This is going to be a long email but I'm hoping you'll bear with me — because I want to address the elephant in the room. I know I’m not the typical candidate for U.S. Senate. I’m traversing a path that's never been taken, to serve from a place that never envisioned including a person like me. A place still rarely sees folks like us. I know I say this a lot, but it’s so important to have actual working people in government. I don’t come from generational wealth — I grew up a poor Black gay kid in North Philly. My mom had to ration her insulin, and my family moved a lot to avoid eviction. But here’s the thing: My story is not unique. Not at all. Everywhere I go in Pennsylvania, I hear stories of good, hard-working people struggling to make ends meet. The crushing weight of student debt. The skyrocketing cost of childcare and senior care. Postponed doctor visits and unfulfilled prescriptions. I’m in this race because no one like me — like us — has ever had a seat at the table in the U.S. Senate. And it’s time for us to be in the room where decisions about our lives are being made. In Harrisburg, I’ve fought tirelessly for solutions to the problems working people face every day. But Pennsylvania has never sent a Black person to the Senate, let alone a gay Black man. That means this ain’t easy. This race is the most expensive Senate race in the country right now, and we’ve got some ambitious goals to hit before our final quarterly FEC deadline at the end of this month. = = Thank you for everything, Malcolm * Paid for by Malcolm PAC Malcolm PAC PO Box 3254 Philadelphia, PA 19107 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but if you need to, to unsubscribe. name: Christy Smith
subject: I'm tired of writing emails like this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43302342/336615389/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTRlNTgwZS1mZmFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VgMuu60cHQCqi931x4GsGoK9yp70v5uQp_AOyP7Eml0=&emci=c219ddd2-f9aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=c14e580e-ffaa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=11385749)

Peter,

Over the weekend, the U.S. experienced its deadliest wave of mass shootings in over two years in 10 separate events across the country, including: Arkansas, Virginia, Texas, Wisconsin, North Carolina, and Florida.

Don't be surprised if you missed it though, as there were few national headlines about these tragedies. Because, the horrifying reality is that gun violence is all too common in the U.S., and tragedies like the 10 mass shootings over the weekend have become so normalized in modern American life that we barely flinch when these stories are reported.

You know what, Peter? **This isn't normal.** In the U.S., the firearm death rate per 100,000 people in 2016 was nearly four times that of Switzerland, five times that of Canada, over 10 times that of Australia and 35 times that of the United Kingdom.

What do these countries all have in common? To put it simply, **common-sense gun policies**

Tragedies like the ones over the weekend are not a foregone conclusion. There are practical, common-sense steps that Congress can take **_right now_** to save lives and prevent future tragedies.

**[As your next Congresswoman, I will do everything in my power to hold the gun industry accountable, and fight for bold policies to help prevent these horrifying mass shootings. Donate $5 or more to join me.>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43302343/336615390/946308265?refcode=em22_220323_GunPrevention-TestA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTRlNTgwZS1mZmFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VgMuu60cHQCqi931x4GsGoK9yp70v5uQp_AOyP7Eml0=)**

"Thoughts and prayers" are not remotely close to a sufficient response to mass death. We cannot continue to put our collective head in the sand and pretend like there's nothing we can do, that this level of violence is somehow just "the way things are."

But – despite one of the lowest approval ratings and diminishing influence of the NRA in Congress – the sad truth remains that the gun lobby, and far right-wing think tanks like ALEC have an unprecedented amount of power over Republican members of Congress that prevents any real meaningful action on even the most basic gun legislation.

**We must do better – lives depend on it.** It's clear, Republicans have no interest in giving up their gun lobby money, even if it means stopping gun violence and saving lives.

That's why it's so urgent to keep and expand our majorities in the House and Senate. There are several Democratic-backed bills in the House that would close gun show loopholes and create universal background checks, preventing people like Dylann Roof from ever obtaining any firearms.

**Republicans simply aren't going to get it done. They are too beholden to the gun lobby. We can do the right thing here, but we must protect our majorities in the House and Senate.**

[**Chip in what you can to make sure we hold our House majority so Democrats can finally enact common-sense gun policies that save lives. >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43302344/336615391/946308265?refcode=em22_220323_GunPrevention-TestA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTRlNTgwZS1mZmFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VgMuu60cHQCqi931x4GsGoK9yp70v5uQp_AOyP7Eml0=) [CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43302345/336615392/946308265?refcode=em22_220323_GunPrevention-TestA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTRlNTgwZS1mZmFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VgMuu60cHQCqi931x4GsGoK9yp70v5uQp_AOyP7Eml0=) I really hope one day I can stop writing emails like this one. Until that day comes, I will keep pushing and keep fighting for a world where not a single person is senselessly killed in these awful tragedies.

Thank you,

Christy

* * *
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you no longer wish to hear from us you can [unsubscribe here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/c219ddd2-f9aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/c14e580e-ffaa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTRlNTgwZS1mZmFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VgMuu60cHQCqi931x4GsGoK9yp70v5uQp_AOyP7Eml0=&id=113000550). Magic Mountain Pkwy

clean_body: | | | The first quarter of the 2022 campaign is almost over and we want to finish this quarter strong. = We are in for a tough fight this election. Congressional Republicans only need to flip five seats to take over the House of Representatives. The situation in the Senate is even closer: Congressional Republicans only need one additional seat to control the Senate. If they do manage to flip Congress, Republicans will spend the next two years revisiting their same obstructionist playbook. They will block nominations and legislation. And they will potentially even roll back the progress we have made over these past two years. We cannot allow the Republicans to flip Congress. = Instead, we are counting on grassroots supporters like you to carry us across the finish line. = See you on the campaign trail, Rick Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. ---|--- | This email was sent by . name: Jessica Mason, Barrier To Entry PAC
subject: I lost my election. But the fight isn’t over.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Barrier To Entry PAC
body:
Here’s what’s next for me, Peter. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wQTMJu9IZWurr0e1V7f1n0sODZ2FHKYLElcio5SYG9KhC0HwSvqXqszuJYgUL11SpTK6VktCdCO1xgr1ibVaks4FQOhe_ZptZY2Pt5T_OnLUIVFX-E7F_ZUJ72TvpSo_8UztbXWwO1UtbIoP0djnJJY9Ym7Hf2E_jpqPHIi3oNDSWAuojwHvw2Q4fCN6asTuMlaEUNOFZm4F0RUlUHAbBkz08TIYtFsQmwb-2oETIOaV8GcyLQTWkyfsR_boMJTOi86vZ07edZ8kPvSotDr2GBdwEycc6ehOL97AWosxs1nSfKRkvOaJnZzDwHCC4gwpUxiKxGX7BG_8AZ0lD4aIwE-dS5sFg47fn3SsEdet5K_xBA_13oKWINMpbW9w3BIXk4uGzkQeQ1GvUS9WF8-NJ2/3kl/Inqxz4H-RWmZ187wjd7qmg/h0/s07MhmBDj4bttHAWK0VaQzZRso9vBE7-QhELk--Mg-A)
Hello Peter!

This is Jessica Mason. As part of the BTE Team, you’ve probably heard of me. I ran for Texas’ 30th Congressional District as an endorsed Barrier to Entry PAC candidate.

Although we didn't get the results that we had hoped for in the primary election, I’m incredibly proud of the fight we fought together. I started from scratch without any major funding or campaign resources, and I lacked the advantages, the rolodex, the connections, and the mega-donors that others had. **But I had grassroots supporters like you and the help of Barrier to Entry PAC to run a bold, competitive campaign.**

Together, dollar by dollar, we built a movement that inspired the hearts and minds of working-class people across the country. We outraised the competition in individual small-dollar donations, which speaks VOLUMES of who our coalition was built and run by -- everyday people, like _you._

We were brave enough to demand ambitious, progressive solutions like universal healthcare, a Green New Deal, workers’ rights, and more. We called out corporate corruption and dark money. We lifted up the voices of the underserved and underrepresented and elevated their stories, OUR stories. **_We refused to be silent._**

And now, we will continue to fight — we will keep breaking socioeconomic barriers and work to build an equitable government that reflects people of ALL backgrounds and end the elitist culture of status quo corporate politicians.

**_That’s why I’m so proud to announce that I’m joining Barrier To Entry PAC as the new Director of Campaigns!_** I’m thrilled to have the opportunity to support low-income candidates like me who want to make an impact but lack the startup funds and resources to run for office. But we can’t do this without you.

[**The fight isn’t over, Peter. Please join us today in helping to dismantle barriers to entry and elect more working-class candidates by rushing a contribution to Barrier to Entry PAC right away clean_body: Here’s what’s next for me, Peter. | | | Hello Peter! This is Jessica Mason. As part of the BTE Team, you’ve probably heard of me. I ran for Texas’ 30th Congressional District as an endorsed Barrier to Entry PAC candidate. Although we didn't get the results that we had hoped for in the primary election, I’m incredibly proud of the fight we fought together. I started from scratch without any major funding or campaign resources, and I lacked the advantages, the rolodex, the connections, and the mega-donors that others had. But I had grassroots supporters like you and the help of Barrier to Entry PAC to run a bold, competitive campaign. Together, dollar by dollar, we built a movement that inspired the hearts and minds of working-class people across the country. We outraised the competition in individual small-dollar donations, which speaks VOLUMES of who our coalition was built and run by -- everyday people, like you. We were brave enough to demand ambitious, progressive solutions like universal healthcare, a Green New Deal, workers’ rights, and more. We called out corporate corruption and dark money. We lifted up the voices of the underserved and underrepresented and elevated their stories, OUR stories. We refused to be silent. And now, we will continue to fight — we will keep breaking socioeconomic barriers and work to build an equitable government that reflects people of ALL backgrounds and end the elitist culture of status quo corporate politicians. That’s why I’m so proud to announce that I’m joining Barrier To Entry PAC as the new Director of Campaigns! I’m thrilled to have the opportunity to support low-income candidates like me who want to make an impact but lack the startup funds and resources to run for office. But we can’t do this without you. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through instantly: | ****************** ""**************** | **************** ""**************** ---|--- **************** ""**************** | **************** ""**************** **************** ""**************** | **************** ""**************** In Solidarity, \-- Jessica EXPRESS DONATE to Barrier To Entry PAC: If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: ****************** ""**************** | **************** ""**************** | **************** ""**************** | **************** ""**************** ---|---|---|--- BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC supports candidates and campaign staff from working class backgrounds as they carve their paths in the Democratic political space. We also serve as a resource for individual mentorship and training to ensure candidates and their staff feel supported and equipped to enter the political space. This legislation has given tens of millions of Americans life-saving care (including tens of thousands of Delawareans). It has survived over a decade of Republican-led court challenges and efforts to repeal it. **LBR will continue to defend the ACA against the still-ongoing Republican attacks, and she'll keep working to strengthen it so that costs continue to go down and access continues to expand.**

So today, let's show that we stand on the side of progress! **[Join LBR and add your name to support the Affordable Care Act. If we can reach 5,000 signatures, we'll demonstrate that the American people want to build on the ACA – not take health insurance away from millions.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43302422/336615788/1009979870?refcode=em_pet_220323ACA_n_tlbr_actives_3_ng_n_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjY0MGQwOC0wMGFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gV1q3rHnUMjHW_mOHASffbrMtQIa8syCOFQN9J2bNl0=)** | | **[Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43302423/336615789/1009979870?refcode=em_pet_220323ACA_n_tlbr_actives_3_ng_n_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjY0MGQwOC0wMGFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gV1q3rHnUMjHW_mOHASffbrMtQIa8syCOFQN9J2bNl0=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chris=20Walsh=2C=20AlessandraBiaggi.com?=
subject: Our path to victory
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | Friend, it’s Chris, Alessandra’s campaign manager. Because this is such a crowded primary, voters often ask me — and our team — why Alessandra is the best Democratic candidate in this race, and what her path to victory looks like. So I wanted to take some time to sketch that out for you today. **The truth is that Alessandra is the only person in this primary with a clear record of delivering for all New Yorkers.** In 2018, when she saw that her state senator was working against progressive interests, she challenged him — and won, despite being outspent 10-to-1. When she was elected, she got straight to work passing bold legislation like codifying legal abortion and historic climate action bills. She’s the best candidate in this primary because of her history delivering for her community and the people of New York. Look, don’t take my word for it, ask her constituents who elected her for reelection in 2020. She even outperformed Joe Biden in her senate district by _four_ points. That’s why I know that Alessandra is the candidate to beat. But the other candidates know that, too, and they’ll throw ridiculous amounts of money into stopping her momentum. [**So please, make a contribution of $3 or whatever you can afford to Alessandra’s campaign today. Our first Federal Deadline is coming up in about two weeks, so your support is more important than ever right now.**](https://biaggi-2022.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bed072e078e3cd8d31941e23&id=d76bbcb783&e=57c71b3a41) [**CONTRIBUTE**](https://biaggi-2022.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bed072e078e3cd8d31941e23&id=5a1ade6731&e=57c71b3a41) Look, I wouldn’t be on Alessandra’s team if I didn’t believe in her and her ability to get things done for the people of NY-3. But no one, not even Alessandra, can win in such a crowded race without lots and lots of support from people like you chipping in small amounts of money when you can. Thanks for reading, Chris Chris Walsh
Campaign Manager [**CONTRIBUTE**](https://biaggi-2022.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bed072e078e3cd8d31941e23&id=a2866f3c82&e=57c71b3a41)
---
| |

name: Tom Barrett for Congress
subject: re: weekly update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM BARRETT FOR CONGRESS | [ ](https://mgcp02
body:
Find out what’s going on in the Barrett Brigade | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=623b753ed3b8ed7a2b0ac2fd&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D623b59ac8c136a30dfc9b4f5%26ss_email_id%3D623b753ed3b8ed7a2b0ac2fd%26ss_campaign_name%3Dre%253A%2Bweekly%2Bupdate%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-03-23T19%253A30%253A41Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=vU2EovnRrn3uymV-tYeqysgN2zQ%3D)
---
|
#### **Barrett Endorsed by Conservative Leadership Fund’s ‘Trailblazer Fund’**
I am proud to be one of six congressional candidates to receive the Conservative Leadership Fund’s ‘Trailblazer Fund’ endorsement. The CLF Trailblazer fund was set up to endorse and support key Republicans running in highly targeted swing seats. Momentum for our campaign continues to grow. CLF knows that all roads to a Republican majority run through Michigan’s 7th district, and I am excited to work with them to deliver results to the people of Michigan.See the story [here](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=623b753ed3b8ed7a2b0ac2fd&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1%2Fposts%2F413188530615559&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=TfCywHomY72jOAsssI8iL1W7m5k%3D).
---
| [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=623b753ed3b8ed7a2b0ac2fd&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1%2Fposts%2F413188530615559&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=TfCywHomY72jOAsssI8iL1W7m5k%3D)
---
#### **Americans Are Suffering From Inflation; Dems Deflect**
Inflation hit a 4 decade high of 7.9%. Economists predict that it’s going to get even worse. Instead of taking accountability for their disastrous policies, democrats continue to blame others. We need new leadership in Washington who will rein in out-of-control spending and be accountable to the people that they represent.See more [here](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=623b753ed3b8ed7a2b0ac2fd&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1%2Fposts%2F413812230553189&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=eyuXqjAi02OoRq3GKqUaZCVSmBE%3D).
---
| [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=623b753ed3b8ed7a2b0ac2fd&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1%2Fposts%2F413812230553189&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=eyuXqjAi02OoRq3GKqUaZCVSmBE%3D)
---
#### **Meeting Voters Throughout the 7th District**
The Barrett Brigade was out in full force meeting voters all throughout the 7th district. We braved the rain for a St. Patrick’s Day parade in Pinckney, I stopped by the Fowlerville VFW on Sunday for their monthly country breakfast, and I joined the Michigan Soybean Association for a farm tour in Dansville Monday morning.
---
---
| [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=623b753ed3b8ed7a2b0ac2fd&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1%2Fposts%2F411082677492811&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=mbpIJNyBzvCXcyloD6cbeDSOTZc%3D) | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=623b753ed3b8ed7a2b0ac2fd&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1%2Fposts%2F411931097407969&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=ef0muqHbJisw1ppHsHsf9O3N7Lo%3D) | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=623b753ed3b8ed7a2b0ac2fd&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1%2Fposts%2F412390470695365&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=p-QDRYCTQFzJDbMRuq3h89P8bdI%3D)
---|---|---|---|---
#### **Return Your Petitions by March 31!**
To everyone who has helped collect signatures to get Tom on the ballot, THANK YOU! We are nearly at our goal and we could not have done it without your help.**NEXT STEPS** If you still are collecting signatures for Tom, please return your completed petitions to the campaign by March 31st. You can reach out to [alec@tombarrettforcongress.com](mailto:alec@tombarrettforcongress.com) to coordinate a time to drop off, or mail, your petitions back to the campaign.

clean_body: Find out what’s going on in the Barrett Brigade | | | | Barrett Endorsed by Conservative Leadership Fund’s ‘Trailblazer Fund’ I am proud to be one of six congressional candidates to receive the Conservative Leadership Fund’s ‘Trailblazer Fund’ endorsement. The CLF Trailblazer fund was set up to endorse and support key Republicans running in highly targeted swing seats. Momentum for our campaign continues to grow. CLF knows that all roads to a Republican majority run through Michigan’s 7th district, and I am excited to work with them to deliver results to the people of Michigan.See the story . | Americans Are Suffering From Inflation; Dems Deflect Inflation hit a 4 decade high of 7.9%. Economists predict that it’s going to get even worse. Instead of taking accountability for their disastrous policies, democrats continue to blame others. We need new leadership in Washington who will rein in out-of-control spending and be accountable to the people that they represent.See more . | Meeting Voters Throughout the 7th District The Barrett Brigade was out in full force meeting voters all throughout the 7th district. We braved the rain for a St. Patrick’s Day parade in Pinckney, I stopped by the Fowlerville VFW on Sunday for their monthly country breakfast, and I joined the Michigan Soybean Association for a farm tour in Dansville Monday morning. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Return Your Petitions by March 31! To everyone who has helped collect signatures to get Tom on the ballot, THANK YOU! We are nearly at our goal and we could not have done it without your help.NEXT STEPS If you still are collecting signatures for Tom, please return your completed petitions to the campaign by March 31st. You can reach out to mailto:alec@tombarrettforcongress.com to coordinate a time to drop off, or mail, your petitions back to the campaign. | | PAID FOR BY TOM BARRETT FOR CONGRESS | | | | | | | | | mailto:info@tombarrettforcongress.com ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- PO Box 15221, Lansing MI 48901, USA

name: INDEMS
subject: Senator Mike Braun needs to be held accountable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter — **Yesterday, Senator Mike Braun claimed that SCOTUS should have left interracial marriage as a “states issue.”** This rhetoric is unacceptable for a person holding public office and an endorsement of the same dangerous white nationalist views that led to the Insurrection against the United States of America on January 6, 2021. His words and views have gained national and even international attention. Frankly, he is an embarrassment as someone who claims to represent Indiana in the U.S. Senate. He certainly doesn’t represent us. The United States Supreme Court has affirmed many times that marriage equality in our country extends to any committed couple regardless of sex, race, orientation, or religious affiliation, and to question that legitimacy questions the very fabric of America and its people. **If Mike Braun wants to question the legitimacy of anything, it should be his own standing as a United States Senator.** Mike Braun continues to use his platform to push white nationalist rhetoric instead of working on the everyday issues that matter most to Hoosier families. **The Indiana Republican Party's culture wars are continuing to diminish our nation's future and we must keep working to hold them accountable and protect the bright futures of Hoosier families.[Chip in today to help the Indiana Democratic Party keep up the fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43295677/336583781/405560545?refcode=idp-em-220323-braun&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjljMmM4My1lMGFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DpGZ3I3beN4OKPL8efxoZosfaQJG5O-2r4e6teLIo3o=)** — INDEMS | | | [Chip in! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43295678/336583782/405560545?refcode=idp-em-220323-braun&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjljMmM4My1lMGFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DpGZ3I3beN4OKPL8efxoZosfaQJG5O-2r4e6teLIo3o=)

name: Regina via Team Cisneros
subject: We’re growing our team
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JESSICA CISNEROS FOR CONGRESS** ](https://u1584542
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LR-ub1Ks_Aqk9-Fd-ejyFQk56A38KwPLIJv7BQE-9SA1mnYXq2pkEVdtuPVFE39zlnVTa05W9DkmdVdjGGz3D4lwDwPWCBKF4oL6vC1-ivVVN124h5peahLENPdLl6snVOLur4ZSV3o0uy0onsrSUK-HLOok1rEDwa90CwUjQ0Jscxv4sprP9fSxuV2x2GRI5BwE-sC9Nx72ncMeWYv9biuvMtj36g7y4Is7sJmqmPBcLgEx4PH-4bq6lGof2WUUpdc8q7IuShJKxV4mfZFGCbg/3kl/mVVk4bkTTpqYuJ957omdcg/h0/CCCAzr6Pveij83m3EF4Ra_VczQEReOqBFkBs1x6tAN8) Hi Peter — it’s Regina from Team Cisneros. Since the news broke that Jessica Cisneros is headed to a runoff against Henry Cuellar — a conservative Democrat who’s being investigated by the FBI — we have seen a huge boost of support from our grassroots supporters and an overwhelming response from the community. **With the runoff election in just 62 days, we’re expanding the team and looking to add more organizers, canvassers, and fellows to our grassroots campaign.** As our movement grows, we need staffers who’ll help us keep pace with our fundraising goals, find new dedicated supporters (folks just like you, Peter!), and coordinate the events that help us raise the grassroots money we’ll need to defeat Henry Cuellar. [_**We’re coming to you directly to ask if you can contribute so we can have the necessary funds to grow our team. Every dollar raised will make a difference in our ability to staff a strong team, and these new hires have the potential to be game-changers for our team!**_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCGfwmZ9UhNVA4S4-kF4TO7b4drOxeKbNWWxYylDVXUkX4ElSmsSil5IIky4dRbEg1V6JYAGxaF8oG1rZIb8iRQZrjr-2upXWmdSiYWRuk-LocCL9QE8RmdVTALU7m8I_NtjhXiDpBHMEeApudYKrYaYBejxCky-FxDuMRtfxWEU80WjooxRNq3scR73XP0cNJaHGOqLkD3kBjnoR4fSwohu2b5_AlNyR3f0-U3WOZgVcBSMlpt8ufd7wIOwrSx2FV3ogCiLkAEqo8nCi8s35VerpN_5NgQcarrX3BViaQmws/3kl/mVVk4bkTTpqYuJ957omdcg/h1/yE9vfsMc-RexqtVfxnUY8mL5ihOZtGxA4rn4OMH2tN0) [Contribute now »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCGfwmZ9UhNVA4S4-kF4TO7b4drOxeKbNWWxYylDVXUkUsMcFFlhwzWBLeteQLvUBuGX1uHP6EzXtiPg2GMX99gt6gI0K-vHemzQPF1ZMdsIXBlqgroQBVlAr7hASZgVI_bE84UCdf3n1gjj7kdaXpqHJTnIgxNY4a3tt2pNJbAm2mCToh9Wf-bCOkeYJNHpAp3lfjYnDlpE6PHcQEAQapJKNK8Rw_YzvI_ZQkVIz8CyQGDsAeZKP3dnRxh4lBUZFN1N-912HEN4fnqty8IefMerTQ4dF7CvxXWHNr-XLdudM/3kl/mVVk4bkTTpqYuJ957omdcg/h2/IeQDguw2UyvGIyHZ327fKBw005hcVtsow5OIfTCVCno) I can’t overstate how huge it will be for our campaign to have this added capacity on our team. And whoever we hire will be spending a lot of time with us, so we’ve been hard at work searching for quality candidates — people who are talented, committed to our values, and ready to hit the ground running to help bring progressive change to South Texas! The sooner we bring on new staffers, the better. Our opponent has taken millions in donations from corporate donors, and special interest groups. On top of his dark money history, Henry Cuellar has repeatedly stood in the way of life-changing legislation, such as the Women’s Health Protection Act, the PRO Act, and President Biden’s Build Back Better Act. [_**We know our movement has what it takes to unseat Henry Cuellar, but we need strong fundraising and a fully-staffed team to be as competitive as possible. clean_body: | | | Hi Peter — it’s Regina from Team Cisneros. Since the news broke that Jessica Cisneros is headed to a runoff against Henry Cuellar — a conservative Democrat who’s being investigated by the FBI — we have seen a huge boost of support from our grassroots supporters and an overwhelming response from the community. With the runoff election in just 62 days, we’re expanding the team and looking to add more organizers, canvassers, and fellows to our grassroots campaign. As our movement grows, we need staffers who’ll help us keep pace with our fundraising goals, find new dedicated supporters (folks just like you, Peter!), and coordinate the events that help us raise the grassroots money we’ll need to defeat Henry Cuellar. I can’t overstate how huge it will be for our campaign to have this added capacity on our team. And whoever we hire will be spending a lot of time with us, so we’ve been hard at work searching for quality candidates — people who are talented, committed to our values, and ready to hit the ground running to help bring progressive change to South Texas! The sooner we bring on new staffers, the better. Our opponent has taken millions in donations from corporate donors, and special interest groups. On top of his dark money history, Henry Cuellar has repeatedly stood in the way of life-changing legislation, such as the Women’s Health Protection Act, the PRO Act, and President Biden’s Build Back Better Act. Thank you for your dedication to this movement. It means so much. — Regina, Campaign Manager for Team Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: It’s National Chia (Pet) Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220323&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220323&amount=28]
Team,
Today is a special day for me, and I wanted to make sure you all were included. No, not end-of-quarter (we’ll get to that in a minute)... it’s National Chia Day. While I’m sure the seed industry had something else in mind, I’m taking it as National Chia PET day.
secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220323&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220323&amount=28]
S omething you may not know about me is that I have a rather extensive Chia Pet collection. As a child of the 80’s, I was given one at one point, and over the years have seemed to accumulate them. I sometimes refer to them as “my other pets” (please don’t tell Rocky and Boomer).
They’re a great, low-stress plant for someone like me with a crazy schedule, and they’re my favorite centerpieces when guests come to visit. I have a dog, a cat, a George Washington bust, and the strangest two (since they have no fur!) are a hippo and a frog.
I don’t really have much more to say other than in honor of spring, they make a lovely 80’s themed display in the yard. So, if you have Chia pets, or just a fondness for those commercials, as we approach our first end-of-quarter deadline of the year, I’m asking if you will chip in $5, $10, or $15 to help us grow our campaign and compete in the most competitive House race in Michigan. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220323&amount=28]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220323&amount=28]
Elissa

# [#]
About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkin] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]

P.O. BOX 244, HOLLY, MI 48442

name: Val Demings
subject: we need resources to compete with Rubio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Senate control is riding on what happens here
| | |
---
I'll be honest, friend – things aren't looking great. My Election Year membership campaign expires at midnight, but I'm still 513 members short of my goal.
Marco Rubio and the GOP know that if we win here, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to keep control of the Senate. That's why they're pouring money into Florida to try and buy this seat – no matter how much it costs.
**Right now, Marco Rubio is more vulnerable than ever – but we need resources to compete with him. With time running out before tonight's deadline, I see that you still haven't activated your membership. Senate control is riding on what happens here, so I hope I can count on you to give right now:**

[Please, activate your Election Year membership by donating $5 or whatever you can spare right now to help me win in Florida and expand our Democratic Senate majority!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43302853/336617875/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2736-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDQ3YjlmNi0wM2FiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XAszxAzjLJ1sq8xmvZNS6cnN_lPjfXIE-BHYTSaZmrA=)

Thanks,

Val Demings

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Why won't they comply?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
It's a mystery |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e7c8653cea&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
My name is Mark Finchem. I am the Election Integrity Patriot leading the vanguard of audits across the United States. We have put in UNPRECEDENTED work in uncovering election fraud and taking perpetrators to task.

**[I am running for Secretary of State in Arizona to make sure that Arizona is the GOLD STANDARD of Election Integrity!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=519ac1f723&e=44b8c466b0)**

Just recently, some disturbing news came across my desk...

AG Mark Brnovich put in a request to the Maricopa Board of Supervisors for documents.

_And they still haven’t complied._

**The request is a simple one. The AG’s office is requesting:**
* **Voter Registration Records**
* **Documentation and Communication Regarding Ballot Affidavit Signature Batching**
* **Public Records**

The office of the Attorney General has now requested this THREE times and they still won’t comply.
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ac48631422&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _Why won’t they comply?_

As far as I can reason, there are two principle, likely reasons for this continued non-compliance.
1. The first is that they are hiding key information and they want us to forget about election integrity.

**This is obviously problematic – and also treasonous, if true. We have done nothing but follow the Constitution and due process and now the Board of Supervisors won’t play ball. **

If they had nothing to hide, why would they hide it?

_These are simple questions that require simple answers. But they know that these “simple” answers would be damning, and they are doing everything they can to cover this up. _

**_This is egregious. And this is criminal._**
1. The second is that they do not feel enough pressure.

**This is unacceptable.

Due to main stream media’s silencing of the facts and perpetual onslaught and attacks on the Election Integrity movement, they simply do not feel enough pressure.**

We need to show them that we have the support of the people, and this isn’t just some piece of paper that they can casually and disrespectfully discard into their filing bin.

And one of the best ways to show the will of the people? Electing Election Integrity officials into office who will not stand for this!

In both cases, one thing is clear. Nothing is more important than this election in 2022. [And there is no way we bring Election Integrity back if I do not win my campaign for Secretary of State!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f1eb7c994d&e=44b8c466b0)

**And this is why we have such an ambitious fundraising goal for the first filing deadline of the year.**

[**_We desperately need to raise $43,120 in the next 9 days to make sure that we win and to make a noise heard around the world._**

**_Can you stand with me to show the Board of Supervisors and Liberals around the country that we mean business and we won’t stand for this?_**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6e818d688e&e=44b8c466b0)

Thank you for your support!
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=431f510a30&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of State15508 W Bell Rd.STE 101-423Surprise, AZ 85374
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=e2c1d7f96d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=e2c1d7f96d).
---

clean_body: My friend, Did you see last night's debate? There are serious challenges Americans are facing like record inflation, high gas prices and rising crime rates. Matt remains focused on discussing policy. As demonstrated in the debate last night, Matt's opponents are too focused on winning the 2020 election from two years ago, and not the one just months away. He believes it's time Republican leaders get in tune with the people who vote for them. This election is full of so-called conservative politicians scrambling over one another to make headlines but Matt is solely focused on Ohio. As he highlighted in the debate last night, Matt Dolan is the only one of those candidates who actually voted for Trump's policies. Matt has been traveling Ohio and discussing policy with voters about the challenges our country faces. Voters have been telling him it's time to move on from the 2020 election. Thank you, Kathi Team Dolan P.S. The clearly showed that Matt's opponents want to make this race about anything and everything other than Ohio. Matt's running to make our state and America stronger. As a candidate, and Ohio’s next U.S. Senator, Matt will never lose that focus.

Hey team,
Did you know that Otero County has spent nearly $50,000 of taxpayer money on the so-called “audit” of the 2020 presidential election? It’s ridiculous. The New Mexico Audit Force is going door to door, asking questions about how people voted. _This is an illegal attempt to harass and intimidate voters._
Maggie noted there is nothing legitimate at all about this process. New Mexico utilizes the gold standard post-election canvasses and audits. Enabling people with literally ZERO experience in elections or audits to conduct a wasteful audit does nothing more than damage trust in our elections. clean_body: This is unequivocally false. And none of it would be possible without you. = Hey team, Did you know that Otero County has spent nearly $50,000 of taxpayer money on the so-called “audit” of the 2020 presidential election? It’s ridiculous. The New Mexico Audit Force is going door to door, asking questions about how people voted. This is an illegal attempt to harass and intimidate voters. Maggie noted there is nothing legitimate at all about this process. New Mexico utilizes the gold standard post-election canvasses and audits. Enabling people with literally ZERO experience in elections or audits to conduct a wasteful audit does nothing more than damage trust in our elections. That’s why we’re fighting right alongside Maggie to save our democracy and defend New Mexico's access to the ballot box! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = What's more – this audit was authorized in part by Couy Griffin, who is on trial right now in DC for his involvement in the January 6th uprising and facing criminal charges for allegedly breaking NM's Campaign Reporting Act. These individuals clearly have no respect for the law. That's why supporting Maggie is vital in this critical election year. In her time as Secretary of State, she's made New Mexico's election administration among the top in the country. With your support, she can continue to deliver free, fair, and secure elections for all New Mexicans. With our end-of-quarter filing deadline rapidly approaching, we have to hit the gas pedal hard. We can’t do this without you. = = Let’s go! Dylan McArthur Campaign Manager Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence. She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy! Make a contribution today >> ___= Friends of Maggie PO Box 473 Albuquerque, NM 87103 United States | Paid for by Friends of Maggie Contributions or gifts to Friends of Maggie are not tax deductible. _

Team, we have a plan to clean up corruption in Illinois - and we’re getting started right now.| | |

Team, Team Sullivan is heading into the spring season with a focus on cleaning up Illinois corruption. Find out how we’re tackling the culture of corruption in our state! 🧹 **JUST LAUNCHED: OUR ANTI-CORRUPTION ROADMAP** We rolled out our "Clean Up Illinois" Anti-Corruption roadmap! Our 10-point agenda represents the strongest ethics reform package in Illinois history and serves as our standing commitment to make sure politicians work for people, not the other way around. **[Our campaign published a series of emails showing how former Dem House Speaker Mike Madigan's right-hand-man, Michael McClain, worked with senior staff in the Pritzker administration to lobby for job placements.](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=955c2cc10bf349278570902ad1fccf3a&_e=tyZx9eL7DcHyAF9wKKyP3nRxxwmwQT1-RbFSV7JxQc4ACA9DX1jnVkWuqi7vIgNpmXpaXt-shpPaF7eXQqFeQ2x2c0ZGKMFdJp45tXc1PAo79NiF-UK5LbcxDdD2zbGB6LZVSUqEoyRwHzaemGDP7kS7i4_0CpG8iQqOhZmJFzztiZMZF-EEz5YBbU_0hyYFGSLZnZuczTs8gX1_35ZCOrknieKEO2bMSbbbTKLelVbhXX4xa3JTpzOe3FuhezZstZoNZNCJ4KXlL08h5OcS4iAczOYLhbEQbjYtf5vTMRFoptx6ZK4AYQ5GJXiKLL36dpoZbJ9jg_oRKAy6o_yLZq4eYvU4UYZVlkjQe4Jr9_PlggQ-TzSwVSTXQYFlezIGU--kbWtHPwZb-MBG_v9GwoHT_H8PcAmd89KiD4XgdJwFFgjtaXTXA-lNO9jk3WNgcS2gdXtK7bNBs8IoBF9hPYWKNr31momWiQCqenTnV6I%3D) **We're calling for an immediate investigation into Pritzker's patronage hiring, and an end to his legal fight to remove a patronage hiring monitor.

Corruption is designed into this system. The Springfield swamp will never change it, because they reap its benefits. That's why Illinois needs a pair of political outsiders to #CleanUpIllinois. Find out how we’re tackling the culture of corruption in our state! 🧹 JUST LAUNCHED: OUR ANTI-CORRUPTION ROADMAP We rolled out our "Clean Up Illinois" Anti-Corruption roadmap! Our 10-point agenda represents the strongest ethics reform package in Illinois history and serves as our standing commitment to make sure politicians work for people, not the other way around. 🕵️♂️ TEAM SULLIVAN INVESTIGATES We’re not just planning on fighting corruption in the future - we’re getting to work on cleaning up Illinois right now. We're calling for an immediate investigation into Pritzker's patronage hiring, and an end to his legal fight to remove a patronage hiring monitor. Corruption is designed into this system. The Springfield swamp will never change it, because they reap its benefits. That's why Illinois needs a pair of political outsiders to #CleanUpIllinois. 👍 MAJOR ENDORSEMENT ALERT! Jesse Sullivan is proud and honored to receive the endorsement of former legislative inspector general,, in our race for governor. She has been a tireless advocate for the people of Illinois. Carol served as the state's LIG until Jan 6, 2022, when she resigned in the wake of ethics reform legislation that left her with “no real power to effect change or shine a light on ethics violations." He is energized to pick up the baton in this fight. ☘️ HAPPY ST. PATRICK’S DAY! St. Patrick's Day is always a special time in the Sullivan household. We love teaching our kids about their Irish roots, but also about how St. Patrick taught others about God. 📊 ILLINOIS FACTS OF THE WEEK Corruption costs Illinoisans $556 million per year. 🙏🏻 STRENGTH IN FAITH CHALLENGE Earlier this week we sent a prayer challenge for crime victims.**** In addition, this week’s challenge includes a prayer for families. We want to pray for mothers, and fathers. The role of motherhood and fatherhood in our society is so important and needs to be raised up again. Join us in prayer. Fellow American - I know what it's like to take on the Democrat elite.

I challenged California's celebrity governor, Gavin Newsom, in the recall election to stop the Democrats' radical agenda from spreading across the entire nation.

name: Team Sarah
subject: Ron Johnson says Republicans should try to repeal the ACA if they take back the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Here we go again: Ron Johnson and the GOP will try to take health care away from millions and end protections for pre-existing conditions if they take back the Senate majority. When Ron Johnson first ran for U.S. Senate in 2010, he ran on a self-serving agenda to get rid of the Affordable Care Act, which would take health care away from millions of Americans and gut protections for people with pre-existing conditions.

For over a decade, Republicans did everything they could to throw our entire health care system into chaos and jack up costs for families. Now, Ron Johnson says if they take back the Senate, they’re going to try to do it all over again.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43296580/336590543/1531032521?refcode=em22_220323_aca_fndd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220323_aca_fndd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2I3ODI5MS1lNGFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-UKSX78W0ZNMYikfjnexcqE67qfnlzw_6cOaG53tVr8=)
It’s important that you know Sarah Godlewski will fight like hell to protect health care in the Senate and stop ANY efforts that would allow insurers to go back to denying people coverage or driving up costs.

That makes her a target of those who want to take health care away from millions of Americans. But that's alright — because if we’re in this together, we can win.

**[Make a $3 donation to our campaign today as a way of saying that we want a U.S. Senator who will vote to protect and expand our health care, not take it away from the most vulnerable among us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43296581/336590544/1531032521?refcode=em22_220323_aca_fndd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220323_aca_fndd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2I3ODI5MS1lNGFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-UKSX78W0ZNMYikfjnexcqE67qfnlzw_6cOaG53tVr8=)**

Unlike Ron Johnson, Sarah believes health care is a right, not a privilege. She has already introduced two major policy plans to bring down prescription drug costs and expand access to affordable health care in Wisconsin.

But here’s the hard truth: All Republicans have to do is flip ONE seat to take back the Senate, raise premiums for families, and dismantle protections for pre-existing conditions. We can’t just stand by and watch it happen.

**[That’s why we need to elect Sarah to the U.S. Senate so we can protect and expand affordable health care. So if you’re ready to join us in this fight, please make a contribution to support our efforts today:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43296582/336590545/1531032521?refcode=em22_220323_aca_fndd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220323_aca_fndd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2I3ODI5MS1lNGFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-UKSX78W0ZNMYikfjnexcqE67qfnlzw_6cOaG53tVr8=)**

clean_body: Here we go again: Ron Johnson and the GOP will try to take health care away from millions and end protections for pre-existing conditions if they take back the Senate majority. When Ron Johnson first ran for U.S. Senate in 2010, he ran on a self-serving agenda to get rid of the Affordable Care Act, which would take health care away from millions of Americans and gut protections for people with pre-existing conditions. For over a decade, Republicans did everything they could to throw our entire health care system into chaos and jack up costs for families. Now, Ron Johnson says if they take back the Senate, they’re going to try to do it all over again. = It’s important that you know Sarah Godlewski will fight like hell to protect health care in the Senate and stop ANY efforts that would allow insurers to go back to denying people coverage or driving up costs. That makes her a target of those who want to take health care away from millions of Americans. But that's alright — because if we’re in this together, we can win. = Unlike Ron Johnson, Sarah believes health care is a right, not a privilege. She has already introduced two major policy plans to bring down prescription drug costs and expand access to affordable health care in Wisconsin. But here’s the hard truth: All Republicans have to do is flip ONE seat to take back the Senate, raise premiums for families, and dismantle protections for pre-existing conditions. We can’t just stand by and watch it happen. = | = Politicians like Ron Johnson refuse to lift a finger to help anyone but themselves or the wealthy donors and corporate PACs who fund their campaigns. It's time to replace him with someone who actually gives a damn about working families and is willing to get out there and fight for them. Since we are refusing to take a dime of corporate PAC money, we rely on small-dollar donations from people like you to help us run this campaign. So please, chip in today, and with your support, we can send Sarah to the Senate where she will fight for affordable health care. Thank you. — Team Sarah Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin

Joined by President Trump, Vernon Jones will attend a rally in Commerce, Georgia.
---
| |

Madison County, Georgia (March 23, 2022) - This week, Vernon Jones will participate in a rally and fundraising event hosted by President Donald J. Trump. President Trump will be joined by Jones and other Trump-endorsed, MAGA candidates. The event will take place Saturday, March 26th, 2022, in Commerce, GA at the Banks County Dragway.

"I look forward to welcoming President Trump to the great state of Georgia this weekend as we rally to usher in a new wave of America First Patriots to office and defeat the America Last Establishment!" Vernon Jones

|

|

| Vernon Jones is running for Georgia's 10th Congressional District. He is a former member of the GA House of Representatives (1993-2001, 2017-2021) and former Chief Executive Officer of DeKalb County, GA. A former Democrat, Jones officially switched parties in January 2021 after endorsing Donald J. Trump for President and speaking at the 2020 Republican National Convention. The proud Republican is now running in GA10, as a Pro-Trump candidate who will fight for free and fair elections, and always put Georgia and America First.

subject: Fox called Zelensky “pathetic"

Hello,
As bombs began raining down on Ukrainian cities, Donald Trump called into Fox News to blame – you guessed it – Joe Biden and Hillary Clinton.
As Russian tanks began pouring over the Ukrainian border, Fox News host Laura Ingraham had the gall to call Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky “pathetic.”
And if you tune into Tucker Carlson these days, you’ll see a show that might as well have been written and produced by Russian state media. **Fox News showcases the chasm between traditional GOP normative behavior and the fringe-right cabal now headed by Donald J. Trump.**
As the commander of military forces in East Africa, I asked the American Forces Network to replace Fox News during meal hours for troops. Why? Because they were harmful to America's outreach overseas. They put our troops in jeopardy and made my job harder. Today, they have accomplices.
Without Fox News, Trump would have only ever been a bungling celebrity who foolishly and laughably ran for president.
Real-time reckoning of lies needs real-time litigation. There is such a thing as gross distortions of fact and purveyors of such must pay a debilitating price. **My answer to Fox when I was an admiral in the U.S. Navy? I pulled the plug.**
If I defeat Chuck Grassely and turn Iowa blue this November, I will be the most senior military person ever elected to the United States Senate. And I think it’s about time we had more people in leadership who understand the true costs of war and media manipulation of facts, commonly called disinformation.
**The polls show we can win.** The pundits say we must win. And with your help today, we can fight back against McConnell’s Super PAC lies and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate.
**We need to raise $1,000,000 before our first FEC fundraising deadline of the year, but right now, we’re still falling dangerously short. If we’re going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, I need grassroots donors like you to give now:**
[**Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – every dollar you can spare before our first FEC fundraising deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43303395/336623062/-42398318?refcode=em20220323pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzc5YjliMy0wNmFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JF2GT2iMrFwRORRT31zswJ2hX1gJamF5EHq_fvySH78=)
