clean_body: Hello, As bombs began raining down on Ukrainian cities, Donald Trump called into Fox News to blame – you guessed it – Joe Biden and Hillary Clinton. As Russian tanks began pouring over the Ukrainian border, Fox News host Laura Ingraham had the gall to call Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky “pathetic.” And if you tune into Tucker Carlson these days, you’ll see a show that might as well have been written and produced by Russian state media. Fox News showcases the chasm between traditional GOP normative behavior and the fringe-right cabal now headed by Donald J. Trump. As the commander of military forces in East Africa, I asked the American Forces Network to replace Fox News during meal hours for troops. Why? Because they were harmful to America's outreach overseas. They put our troops in jeopardy and made my job harder. Today, they have accomplices. Without Fox News, Trump would have only ever been a bungling celebrity who foolishly and laughably ran for president. Real-time reckoning of lies needs real-time litigation. There is such a thing as gross distortions of fact and purveyors of such must pay a debilitating price. My answer to Fox when I was an admiral in the U.S. Navy? I pulled the plug. If I defeat Chuck Grassely and turn Iowa blue this November, I will be the most senior military person ever elected to the United States Senate. And I think it’s about time we had more people in leadership who understand the true costs of war and media manipulation of facts, commonly called disinformation. The polls show we can win. The pundits say we must win. And with your help today, we can fight back against McConnell’s Super PAC lies and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate. We need to raise $1,000,000 before our first FEC fundraising deadline of the year, but right now, we’re still falling dangerously short. If we’re going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, I need grassroots donors like you to give now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Fox News’ propaganda cannot go unanswered. But it takes significant funding to run a full-scale campaign and take on all of Grassley’s and McConnell’s lies. I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so whatever you can give today will go a long way. I am so thankful to have you on the team, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

name: MorganHarper.org
subject: Monday’s debate is scheduled
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
It’s official.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220323-834-footer-ak&t=2&akid=834%2E90090%2EG5mYh3)
It’s official.
Morgan will be facing off against Tim Ryan at the first Ohio U.S. Senate debate for Democratic candidates. [Click here to rush a contribution now to show Morgan you’re on her team ahead of the debate.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29621?refcode=em20220323-834&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=834%2E90090%2EG5mYh3)
It’s absurd that while Morgan has been ready to debate _for months_ , Tim Ryan has stalled on agreeing to a debate. This means that with just about 40 days left before the primary election, and with early voting to start in less than two weeks, undecided voters still haven’t had the opportunity to hear from their Democratic candidates on stage and in their own words.
**We finally have a debate on the books for next week, Monday, March 28 at 11:30 AM ET. This is Morgan’s time to shine so it’s essential that every Ohioan across the state knows to tune in on Monday to hear Morgan’s message and platform for the people.**
[But, to do so will take immense resources and support from our grassroots movement right now. Can you rush an urgent $5 contribution to help us spread the word about Monday’s debate?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29621?refcode=em20220323-834&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=834%2E90090%2EG5mYh3)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29621?refcode=em20220323-834&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=834%2E90090%2EG5mYh3)**
The debate will take place just 3 days before the end of this fundraising quarter – which will be our last reporting deadline before the primary, so we can’t fall short of our goal.
We’re still $17,967 away from hitting our digital goal for the quarter. Falling short would mean we’d have to make difficult decisions about our ad and organizing budgets, so a contribution from you **right now** will help get us to our fundraising goal _and_ ensure that we have the resources to spread the word about the debate ahead of Monday. [If you can afford it, please make your first $5 contribution here »](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29621?refcode=em20220323-834&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=834%2E90090%2EG5mYh3)
Thank you for all you do for our movement,
Team Morgan
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220323-834-footer&t=25&refcode2=834_90090_G5mYh3&akid=834%2E90090%2EG5mYh3)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.

The Democratic nominee dropped out months before the election.** **That all changes this year, because I’m a Democrat who’s running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene.** I’ve served this country on multiple continents, and I’m sick of watching Marjorie Taylor Greene fight to undermine our democracy and alienate us from the rest of the world. I’ll be honest: this isn’t going to be an easy mission. But my time in the service taught me that by working together and not giving up -- anything is possible. [**But, to do this, I’m asking you for help. name: Supreme Court Poll
subject: time is running out, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| |
---
Friend: **Time is running out before Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson's historic Supreme Court confirmation hearings wrap up in the Senate, but we're still missing 17 responses to our URGENT poll.**

subject: URGENT! 4 Hours or 4 Years?
body:
We Still Need Your Help!

| [ ](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=signatures&n=1)

Friend -- WE STILL NEED YOUR HELP! We are nearing 13,000 signatures with 15,000 being required. Everyone on this email list has been a tremendous encouragement and together, with God’s help, we are right at the **FINISH LINE!** It can be uncomfortable to talk with strangers at a post office about politics, but data in our research shows that spending 4 hours in front of the post office generates 30-50 signatures. Let me ask the question in another way- **DO WE WANT TO BE UNCOMFORTABLE FOR 4 HOURS, OR DO WE WANT TO BE UNCOMFORTABLE FOR 4 MORE YEARS?** On the other hand, if everyone on this email list obtains 10 signatures each, we will absolutely demolish our goal of 15,000! Your help is needed and appreciated!! We have extended the date for turning in petitions to 4/4/2022, **A WEEK FROM MONDAY!** Email me at adam@ralphrebandtforgovernor.com and we will send petitions immediately. **TIME IS OF THE ESSENCE,** Adam Rebandt, son of the Next Governor of Michigan, Ralph Rebandt 248-761-8342 Ralph Rebandt For Governor

Hey Peter,

Twelve years ago today, President Barack Obama signed the Affordable Care Act into law. This was historic legislation that made healthcare more accessible for millions of Americans.

While this legislation was a historic first step toward expanding affordable access to healthcare, we still have more work to do -- and Seth knows that starts with lowering the cost of prescription drug prices.

Congress can do more to lower the cost of prescription drugs, but Republicans in Washington are determined to stall any further progress. At a hearing just last week, one leading Republican Senator, Chuck Grassley even admitted that "If his party controls even one chamber of Congress after this year’s midterm elections, legislation to address the cost of medications almost certainly won’t pass."

In Congress, Seth will protect the Affordable Care Act and fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs to ensure Rhode Islanders across the district are able to afford life saving medications.

To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | [[PLEASE CONFIRM]]() | | | | The facts are clear: Donald Trump played an integral role in the atrocities that occurred on January 6, 2021. It's past time he faced the consequences of his actions. | | | We appreciate your input on this, Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. Friend, I'm bumping Phil's message because I just found out we need to raise another $2,331 before midnight tonight – or else we'll fall short of our fundraising goals at the worst possible moment, just before the first public filing deadline of the election year.
**We need to show our Trump-backed opponent just how strong this movement is, but falling short of goals like this will put our entire campaign in serious danger. [Can I count on you to donate so we can hit this official quarterly goal and flip Arizona blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43303635/336631806/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk529-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzBiZTgzYS0wYWFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oQGPejcQMbTD6CTWZndmoLEevmxCLiftaYaaoyJ9N8o=)**
The stakes are getting higher every day. This race is already ranked as one of the most competitive open-seat contests of 2022, and the worst of the GOP attacks are still yet to come. Republicans are desperate to keep Arizona red, and they'll spend _millions_ to hold us back. Defeating them has to start NOW. We can't wait until we are closer to the election.
**[So please, donate $5 or whatever you can spare before this crucial end-of-quarter deadline to help close our fundraising gap, defeat GOP extremism and flip Arizona blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43303636/336631807/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk529-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzBiZTgzYS0wYWFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oQGPejcQMbTD6CTWZndmoLEevmxCLiftaYaaoyJ9N8o=)**

Marco Lopez

Friend, the first official public filing deadline of our election year is right around the corner, which means it's more important than ever for our grassroots fundraising to be strong. But I just popped in to ActBlue, and what I saw is NOT good.
**We expected this movement to ramp up its support as the stakes got higher – but the OPPOSITE has happened. We're just days away from our biggest deadline yet, and ActBlue shows our online fundraising is dramatically slowing _down._ Take a look for yourself:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43303638/336631809/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk529-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzBiZTgzYS0wYWFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oQGPejcQMbTD6CTWZndmoLEevmxCLiftaYaaoyJ9N8o=)

Experts at The Washington Post have made it clear: Replacing GOP extremists with Democratic governors is _the_ way to protect voting rights, education, health care and more. **Marco Lopez (D-AZ)_is_ the governor we need: He's an Obama administration alum, voting rights champion and small business owner – and he's ready to flip Arizona's governorship blue and defend our democracy.**
**But unless we turn our fundraising trends around before this first official quarterly deadline of the election year, we won't have the resources we need to fight back against GOP attacks and win this race. Politico has called this the _most_ competitive open-seat race of 2022, so we can't afford to fall short.**
**[So please, friend, with our deadline rapidly approaching, will you rush a donation to close our budget gap, flip Arizona blue and defeat GOP extremism once and for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43303639/336631810/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk529-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzBiZTgzYS0wYWFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oQGPejcQMbTD6CTWZndmoLEevmxCLiftaYaaoyJ9N8o=)**

body:
| | | Hey Friend,

Hope you saw my team’s email below. _I recently signed the Americans for Tax Reform’s Taxpayer Protection Pledge and promised to NEVER vote for a tax increase._ My opponent John Boozman also signed the pledge, but he’s taken steps to increase the tax burden on the American people ever since. **Friend, will you chip in $5, $10, $25, $50 or more to help me defeat Boozman and bring real America First leadership to the U.S. Senate?** [**TAP or CLICK here to chip in >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8fef6bc01533e51d9c32df07ccef91c9/38553/95389f4402d39e01/fe66ac4929e283a2c3d6b838967d376c/38553) Thanks for your help!
\- Jake Bequette
---
|
---
To: All SupportersFrom: Team BequetteSent: Tuesday, March 22, 2022Subject: 🚨 Did you see the breaking news? 🚨
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8fef6bc01533e51d9c32df07ccef91c9/38553/95389f4402d39e01/9a7094ab988b2305c3d6b838967d376c/38553)
---
Friend,

**As one of Jake’s top supporters, we wanted you to be one of the first to know that Jake just signed the Americans for Tax Reform’s Taxpayer Protection Pledge, a pledge that highlights his commitment to ensuring taxpayers keep more money in their pockets.**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8fef6bc01533e51d9c32df07ccef91c9/38553/95389f4402d39e01/d3c5dc7afa042d27c3d6b838967d376c/38553)
---
Right now, Arkansans are being crushed by inflation, stagnant economic growth, and out-of-touch politicians who recklessly spend trillions of our tax dollars. _Sadly, John Boozman is part of the problem._ Boozman also signed the ATR pledge, but he’s spent the last two decades repeatedly taking steps to increase the tax burden on the American people._ _ Boozman sponsored legislation that would have raised the gas tax at the same rate of inflation. He voted to increase our debt ceiling over 10 times, adding $15 trillion to the national debt. And he even called for a state sales tax hike on all Arkansans! Fiscal liberals like John Boozman are hurting our state and our country. We desperately need leaders like Jake, who will fight to lower taxes for all Americans. [**Please chip in a generous contribution of $5, $10, $25, or $50 to help defeat RINO John Boozman and send Jake to the U.S. Senate!**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8fef6bc01533e51d9c32df07ccef91c9/38553/95389f4402d39e01/9b07582ac29f57aec3d6b838967d376c/38553)

I need you to hear this –
**A far-right multi-millionaire is eyeing a self-funded bid for New Hampshire's Senate seat.**
This news could not have come at a worse time.
**[Before I go any further, can I ask you to rush $5 to keep this seat and our Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43303658/336632238/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk855-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTBiZTgzYS0wYWFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cqU58qkf8bkFkcGh8fTpR6YECk0e20RCZR9oizYpi9M=)**
Election experts are reporting that "Republicans still stand a good chance of flipping [New Hampshire]," and this race was recently labeled a toss up.
**With the Senate split 50-50, we can't afford to lose a single seat.**
And to make matters worse, our fundraising has slowed to a crawl **right before our big, public FEC deadline.** This would be the worst time to get an extreme multi-millionaire opponent.
If we report weak numbers at the end of the quarter, it could tip the scales against us and invite another far-right opponent into the race.
**[I urgently need your help to get our fundraising back on track and show the grassroots strength of this campaign. name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathleen?=
subject: Republican Intolerance Takes Another Step Towards Tyranny
body:
"Don't Say Gay" Laws Threaten Us All | |
---
| | | [ ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=849a5bd676&e=4712f71bea)
---
| **Folks,**

Republicans in Florida are trying to beat Texas Republicans in a race to the bottom, and they might actually win.

Their decision to ram through their "Don't Say Gay" bill not only threatens young LGBTQ+ children in Florida, it marks another sinister step towards authoritarianism in the Republican Party.

I want to be clear: As your Representative, I will stand for every child's right to safety in their own school.

[_**Republicans like Ronny Jackson are clear where they stand too: for homophobia and hate.**_](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=edb1b97ab6&e=4712f71bea)

I won't take this threat to our children lying down, and I hope you won't either.

_**[Will you chip in $5 today to send a pro-safety, anti-hate Democrat to Congress in Texas?](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=4069212ebd&e=4712f71bea)**_

Thanks a lot,

Kathleen Brown
Democrat
TX-13
---
|

| Team, the AZ GOP is attempting to end almost all voting rights in Arizona, and the _AZ Supreme Court is reviewing the case RIGHT NOW._

Protecting voting rights is important, so the **Arizona Democratic Party, in partnership with the DNC, DSCC and DCCC, intervened in the lawsuit!** Now, we’re looking to build citizen support for protecting these voting rights.

**[Team, we’re looking for 2,000 people to sign on RIGHT NOW and say they support Arizona Democrats’ efforts to save early voting, PEVL, and more in Arizona.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnng6W7jRaf_MT40ubuVF_E0FnrTi-G9NX63hkQMC5Kkb2lBVGWmXeAE8teaUccq0RharF3otg3EVdc1ftdPdEYuTEWr9JB5knOvj8GmZAPVsTB6pjb3bLq7HSLSEhg5QDTnGaqyROMjS8ZpnmlFLANXQCA6pDc80YGaFocjuTEqO1tts_0YIb14OaIlaRsZYLJ9ls_e1196rh7dxMq0VKvIPt96_sBscVT4PqUJHe5xHs4lbQbzaj_Z8Im_TGOoJLcCJznLzvDDN7ldWSTRcTvx508hHo69_bia1JejGBK6QFjI_rWJRYa3uWKL56ar51HaeZwOV2xWaTP6XfvhUXOwz826MmK_Ebyo-oC4qpM3XHAnZ7sg1pB4eOdEbOphLUaL8myA_nk2v7W9sX1eglfCKWxNZUhyZIO4asaX5sTYm6SCe0h_9d09IVqGtCLakN9dkKOIBgQWu3v1Mn_Rzdb3/3kl/Bq0RP37JQPerrWUzcjIgEg/h1/cI3PwXgKtff44Kz1JqQ2lze87QnqiBFbZSD2AYlwYlU)** [
ADD YOUR NAME](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnng6W7jRaf_MT40ubuVF_E0FnrTi-G9NX63hkQMC5Kkb2lBVGWmXeAE8teaUccq0RharF3otg3EVdc1ftdPdEYuTEWr9JB5knOvj8GmZAPVsTB6pjb3bLq7HSLSEhg5QDTnGaqyROMjS8ZpnmlFLANXQCA6pDc80YGaFocjuTEqOwalLnaxwE8i66uSwhnYiKG7w-UT00GNhW3CivfPUMZf1558akrD4bHO1YaHhZtP-oD5LgEC7wcVWo2qi3UicCFAU3WCUSbm2e7eVLyUEGGhefiOQgzy99vMDy6_Zxlvpjptry1D_30EgerUEWwLFuED8kOGjHzJ1BIxPMoj2N4346efjfl3-QiP2KcMxYWgOo_2yJNwqMi2ydLtztdJI7ulpMzCO5mp-Au4ZsIxg3fsibAm258ixWtGUG0t100OoHSteoLtcCwigXpdvGXEp0Fws7NEiJLHwNOAOkGEFSXz/3kl/Bq0RP37JQPerrWUzcjIgEg/h2/8y7gZMpBBI6dKE9OU6yNtgKUKPUVXHNauQueDPMj2RA)
If the AZ GOP is successful, early voting, PEVL, mail-in voting – **_practically anything that is not in-person voting on election day – will be banned._**

While we fight this lawsuit at the Arizona Supreme Court, we need to show massive public support for voting rights. If this lawsuit is successful, it’s likely the GOP will use similar lawsuits all over the U.S. to try and end early voting in every single state.

**[Team, will you add your name to our petition to say that you support early voting and other important voting rights in Arizona? name: John Kennedy
subject: It Doesn’t Look Good, Folks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
Not Good At All

| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b694a9a7c9674260850177a19ca8c965&_e=K9SksGZzOusHlOE5wk5bE3nTEBRIK2BtGL8dMgOapv7xCc5LObd0PtR_bydsb-PJ6J64GKJ-XxQ1VQCCaAS7PwgBoWq-BmMKPPt0dglN7OLJkRZ4mFG90uA-GD2HfOvHliLukgM1FtAdLmkWs6hUBGW8MXzBbzxwEhPhRtG2LSIoe3gf2zuVL19yjVpPPv3HsF_lAA-t29GsAE2w0W48gIYeRqGNOJljWrsivh0TuCSe4qRzxULwDFziIOQZnLY0KPXOa7Y-nXr_Kdx880j-I45OdYp2c8f_FLwlITeeweQJaQhGB3HtirCmKSXEvci2QcYrWV57hedeRZsEv2_2R2_IquOE4jrFrCb2LNLuWpIGM6Scg3xuT4BJRUHkKPEr_hE8LZUyPID517hY31DHTeGgzW173Yyti7RZZZd17PX6whNqxRelf1E1Ehj57Izw0ANOhxLU1mLV5ixQyi_V3wp1lEVr8O7n1M6XfVkU7u1GWmO1pus5GkK1ne8tgs_-HDIhY1GTT0-8aQyYPadpsB3RJ0L8A83vQBrIvx7TVJM%3D)
---

Folks,

I am coming to you with an urgent plea.

My campaign is running out of steam for our fundraising push. It does not look good for us and, if I’m being honest, **it does not look good at all.**

I am reaching out to you specifically, because I know you would never leave me high and dry. You are always there when I need you the most.

**I need your help, now.**

| | | Hi there, [**I am the universal healthcare candidate in this race. Can you chip in to help me fight for Medicare for All in Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43303915/336638475/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjZkYzAyMS0wZGFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zGxtSJK58LJEWtLI6rI9EHOMZKSMvTYlOLqnxDqMjJo=) My corporate opponent refuses to support Medicare for All and has come out publicly against it, using Republican talking points to do so. No surprise then that, according to OpenSecrets, he’s taken $246,716 from pharmaceutical and health product corporations. [**My campaign can’t be bought. Unlike my opponent, I don’t take a single dollar from corporate PACs and I never will. That means I need your help, because I’m not lining my campaign coffers with money from the medical industrial complex. Please chip in here, because we need Medicare for All.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43303916/336638476/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjZkYzAyMS0wZGFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zGxtSJK58LJEWtLI6rI9EHOMZKSMvTYlOLqnxDqMjJo=) Unlike my corporate opponent, I also oppose the privatization of existing Medicare. name: Tina Kotek
subject: Why you should care about Idaho's abortion ban
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek P
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43297950/336596707/69228752?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDExMmNlNi1lYmFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pt-LI53ycC6Z-nSKkLqVhnMRP1nCC58QMwJWa0Ar9BA=&emci=b01cd5ca-4da5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=f4112ce6-ebaa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15353729)
---
Hi Peter,

Republican Idaho Governor Brad Little just signed into law an outrageous bill that greatly restricts a woman's ability to make personal health care decisions.

The bill bans most abortions after six weeks and allows a family member of the "preborn child" to bring legal action against the medical professional who performed the abortion. This is archaic, and it is a clear and direct threat to reproductive freedom for thousands of women.

Idaho's decision to enact a dangerous Texas-style abortion ban will have significant consequences – not only for Idaho residents, but also for Eastern Oregon residents who currently receive reproductive health care services from nearby Idaho health care providers.

**[This is unacceptable Peter. As Oregon's governor, I will fight to protect a person's right to choose. Let’s remember, everyone deserves the right to make personal health care decisions regardless of their zip code.

It is clear that reproductive freedom is under attack and is in dire need of protection. As House Speaker, I helped protect abortion rights for all Oregonians, passing the nation’s strongest abortion access law. **I'm honored to have the endorsement of Planned Parenthood PAC of Oregon.** When I become our next Governor, I will continue to be a fierce advocate and trailblazer for reproductive health care access.

# **Fight to Win **
**NEW PODCAST** This week on AMERICA'S MOMENT, Molly McCann explores how Joe Biden's reversal of a key Trump border security policy could lead to an even larger number of illegal immigrants entering the country. Also, Molly explains the difficulties of vetting strong candidates aligned with the MAGA movement. With Joe Biden safely in office, The New York Times admitted what Paige Willey and the rest of conservative America knew all along: that the Hunter Biden laptop was authentic, not "Russian disinformation." Listen to THIS IS YOUR COUNTRY to learn how the media & Big Tech colluded to kill the story and ensure Joe Biden's victory. **LISTEN NOW! **[Apple Podcasts](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bthtjkl-ihhjkhtyud-r/)[ ](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bthtjkl-ihhjkhtyud-y/) [Spotify ](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bthtjkl-ihhjkhtyud-j/) | **New Podcast **

**March 14th ** This episode explores media and big tech efforts during the 2020 campaign season to disguise Joe Biden's decades of failure in Washington and obfuscate his true policy stances on substantial issues--including foreign policy and energy. Now, the chickens are coming home to roost as the populace contends with the consequences of his regime of managed decline. [Watch Now](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bthtjkl-ihhjkhtyud-t/)

name: Kelly Hall
subject: Re: Celebrating 12 years of progress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43304050/336643683/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTA5OThkNi0wZmFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jJl6lfc8NAle2NCOqME0S9mFgM6ohXJ7WpSCknUXFjE=&emci=4c057728-d2aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=4a0998d6-0fab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=561582) | Dear friend, It’s hard to believe that the Affordable Care Act was signed into law 12 years ago already! To this day, I still consider this time spent working with colleagues to draft and pass the ACA to be one of the most foundational experiences of my career. Long before joining the Fairness Project team, I got my start on Capitol Hill. I worked under a number of influential changemakers, but it was under Rep. Allyson Schwartz that I had this opportunity. Congresswoman Schwartz was a health care advocate through and through. Largely because of her roots — she represented the greater Philadelphia area, a district made up of hospitals, academic medicine, and so much more. It was during my time working with her, the rest of the Ways & Means Committee, and their congressional staffers that I learned so little of what we do is about politics, and so much more of it is about diplomacy. Working with so many people who had their designated areas of expertise to put together a package that had to be so comprehensive that every single American would benefit from it was a truly formative experience. The perspective I gained here has helped shape my time with the Fairness Project. We’re living at a time when our politics are the most divided they may have ever been, and too many politicians care more now about what party they represent than making a difference in the lives of their constituents. Our team has won real change 23 times over because when we decide to run a campaign, we do so _comprehensively_ — we make sure that no matter your party or your ideals, __you_ benefit from this policy. _ It’s why we’ve won campaigns to raise wages, guarantee paid leave, enact policing reforms, and more in red, purple, and blue states across the country — because Americans _everywhere_ agree with common-sense reforms that improve our lives. And it’s how we’ve been able to leverage the ACA to expand Medicaid to over 875,000 people in America. [_**If you’re with us as we continue to enact life-saving policies across the country via ballot measure, will you support our work today, friend?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43304051/336643684/-999189595?refcode=E14699-20220323-ACAKicker-SL-Healthcare-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTA5OThkNi0wZmFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jJl6lfc8NAle2NCOqME0S9mFgM6ohXJ7WpSCknUXFjE=) [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43304052/336643685/-999189595?refcode=E14699-20220323-ACAKicker-SB-Healthcare-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTA5OThkNi0wZmFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jJl6lfc8NAle2NCOqME0S9mFgM6ohXJ7WpSCknUXFjE=) Thank you for your support,
Kelly

name: Eli Bremer
subject: Today is a dark day in Colorado
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eli For Colorado
body:
Today is a dark day in Colorado and it will be even darker if Governor Polis signs the Democrat’s extreme Abortion Bill into law. If signed into law, this will be the most extreme pro-abortion legislation to pass in any state.
|
---
Friend, Today is a dark day in Colorado and it will be even darker if Governor Polis signs the Democrat’s extreme Abortion Bill into law. If signed into law, this will be the most extreme pro-abortion legislation to pass in any state. This is what happens with one Party rule. In CO we need to restore balance so that extreme leftist policies such as these never reach the Governor’s desk for consideration. Not only am I vehemently opposed to this legislation, but I am also staunchly pro-life, and this is a very personal issue for me.
---
[ ](https://d2p4X504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/OR+113/d2p4X504/VWRk9B4SVBXFV33lY92MS28KW8rPchQ4H0BR4N1c6sr33q90pV1-WJV7CgFCwW6drBkk1t9KGXW811vNp7NHklBW4yJZj98b_NgSW6mKfTB25lN0WW7Gv38W3bT5x3W3xmMLn8xMyPYW7J4Xl35DcKsgW7ycSBz5Xcz5bN8S6zGwxC8YZW2XGgLd6s3v2vN7KfsVn-yvRBW7HV3KX4LzLnbW1yxv-S5sNRB3N3VP6BRbBfHBW92R_wP6H3_HKW6RVcH910NCWjW7hvgkB89V8n4W1Dq5Gf1C3XMGW2dk5qM7yZ302VxdvpJ6LLNGJW73lJCM5nNtV6W64pHKC7HsNpcN3sSXVTzYVyLW6bMmHm7pKd-9N7KfcfF_Lgw_W8L9CBv46FhJd3bY11)
---
My son, Struthers was born at 27 weeks, which is 3 months early. Today, he is a thriving 7-year-old. Under the Democrats bill, a woman may abort a baby at any stage of pregnancy. Including at 40 weeks, which would be 3 months after my son was born. I find it hard to imagine that most Coloradans would feel like this legislation is representative of their values. As a candidate for the U.S. Senate, I have talked a lot about state’s rights and local control to conduct business without the interference of the federal government ... ... and while it is the right of Colorado’s elected leaders to pass their leftist agenda into law, I do not believe that this type of policy reflects the constituents who put them in office. Friend, I am gathering signatures to share with Governor Polis to let him know that this policy is not Colorado’s policy. If you agree, please add your name here:
---
| [ **Add me to your list for Polis** ](https://d2p4X504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/OR+113/d2p4X504/VWRk9B4SVBXFV33lY92MS28KW8rPchQ4H0BR4N1c6sqN3q905V1-WJV7CgSdrW71FVy94lMjt6W5pg6d48BxQfLN3z0dnmbDPHYVLddpp2xjjx6W2dnWX14f3W5CW4P1tKj6ThPsCW5MHl8g2bl2Y9W8YcHYz3MvV0-V-3p5F7_c8CsW76d6Kp94-S4NW6BxxSj1_dnmqVZtsCB7ffh2gW5t8KfH6f-f_mW3wKK_58bfp35W3F2XYN19gS1ZW3ZpJ-22RXVN1W29fdGZ1QqmhCV9slz-249496W4rtGVM8DzLSJW5_yY968QsD-tW5MCPDR5WTLpVW5Fd7B26XSzs7W6nqHc-4c4YKRW6_z5Ys4FSmMF37Cm1)
---
Thank you,
---
---
Eli Bremer Air Force Academy Graduate, Olympian, Veteran, Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate
---

name: Ed Rollins
subject: Putin is a scum. Joe Biden is weak. And you’re paying because of it.

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Court Blocks Child Vaccine Law
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Round 2](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioqb7P6MKyOgi1te5SPn1wZy&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar_23_final&n=1) A federal court has found a D.C. law removing parental consent for the COVID vaccine to be unconstitutional. I’m calling for California’s similar bill, SB 866, to be withdrawn immediately. SB 866 is one of eight bills put forward by the so-called Vaccine Work Group. Another one, SB 1464, would “require” police to enforce mask mandates and other “public health” orders. Crime is soaring and this is our Legislature’s priority. Together, the bills form the most radical legislative package in the country. But I believe we can defeat each and every one. I’ll continue to update their status _[here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziork5ZF-Db2FgHzx4x8PytA9UEbomUzVaOctWj96zfeeYg&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar_23_final&n=2)_. I’m often asked if there’s any hope of turning California around. My answer is yes, but it won’t happen of its own accord. We have to make it happen. We have to take action. That’s what I’ve tried to do as a legislator in the super-duper minority: take action, force the issue, create pressure, move the ball forward. Use every tool in the toolkit – and some outside of it – to introduce accountability and induce change. That’s what we’re doing right now when it comes to suspending the gas tax. Tomorrow is Round 2: we’ll be forcing another vote on my bill during the Assembly’s morning session. Given the fallout from Round 1, I’m willing to bet it gets more votes this time. The time has also come to force another issue. Following the unspeakable and avoidable tragedy in Sacramento, I've introduced AB 1708 – a bill to end the Sanctuary State nightmare once and for all. [Become a Citizen-Supporter](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar_23_final&n=3) [Share this Post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAyWRP9JggYPnpd0riPfsk5-i_7KLwS75TW2J8clu-mnFw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar_23_final&n=4) Kevin Kiley
California Legislator
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar_23_final&n=5).

name: Charity Barry
subject: Marching On for Freedom!
body:
March is going great so far, but I still need your help
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015VnR-QfiqTBkzdw8BVoR-gYHgypucUFad7vXfj2dHCWcAtjYcHp8c7giRbIRGf-XQyz0JzUxQbttvsYFJp0-IrRJIfDNP2BDAEbTj4PVSE4XZ0Wfcypsrmw3cJzTzq-oiJGCDp1NOT4Ej6OKUEoEouVVi4eamUiT&c=qa_NzQxgXUy1qenO4_nFcxL5Z45uJ8UgufiK-yIpBo9aA2rE6xeskw==&ch=s-VQK-8lu0wCmjWeTHoy7g_CeX21PqEeSCYDCoD1VBvJNg65P8edfA==)
---
| |
---
| Greetings, Fellow Patriots!
March has been an amazing month on the campaign trail! We have been going all across the district! Here are some highlights:
---
|
* Pints and Politics with the Republican Party of Dane County

* Conference with the Yahara Pride Farmers' Group

* Fundraiser with a fired-up group of passionate Americans in Middleton (Don't ever let the Left tell you that Republicans are anti-immigration! Some of the most passionate Patriots are those who came from a place of Socialism)

* Turning Point USA UW Madison Chapter Meeting - we need to reach those students with the truth!!!

* Republican Party of Dane County Caucus

* Gun Show at the Harley Davidson Center in Madison

* Lafayette Freedom Coalition in Darlington - I will not forget the rural voters of my district!

* Visitation for the late Margaret Farrow, former and first female Lt. Governor of WI. What a wonderful example of caring and trailblazing - her sweet husband told me "We need more thoughtful women in politics. Men think, but women are thoughtful."

* Veterans' Roundtable Discussion - God Bless those who have served! And many thanks to the great men that were a part of our discussion, the first of many!

* Republican Women's Meeting in Green County - What a great evening! Thank you, Sue!

And I'm heading to a women's group in Waukesha tonight - because women across the state are excited for the opportunity to make history by being able to, even if they can't vote for me, support and volunteer even from outside the district, and elect the first-ever conservative Wisconsin woman to federal office!!!
And as the month of March draws to a close, I am looking forward to many more great events, including the Republican Women of Dane County, the Lincoln Day Dinner in Lafayette County, Pints and Politics in Dane, and more... And as the month of March draws to a close, I am looking forward to many more great events, including the Republican Women of Dane County, the Lincoln Day Dinner in Lafayette County, Pints and Politics in Dane, and more...
But I need your help!
WE NEED TO REACH OUR FUNDRAISING GOAL FOR MARCH, AND I NEED EACH AND EVERYONE OF YOU TO DO ALL THAT YOU CAN TO RETIRE POCAN!
Meeting with people takes gasoline, (as you may have seen on my Facebook [video](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015VnR-QfiqTBkzdw8BVoR-gYHgypucUFad7vXfj2dHCWcAtjYcHp8c0mPv401eeOD8-nC9wPaQwOVkdC2J0D7Zt-mOgd7YsbCO2gNncnx9G1uQkRzlKQBUKdnANWiiFFv6Bq80fDZvg93DBATpugPGaAQszCw1TzGmCygO2jmFZ7TThMpzvt3EBKOP16cUv0G4omZX-9fM7kHAdmOayoWJw==&c=qa_NzQxgXUy1qenO4_nFcxL5Z45uJ8UgufiK-yIpBo9aA2rE6xeskw==&ch=s-VQK-8lu0wCmjWeTHoy7g_CeX21PqEeSCYDCoD1VBvJNg65P8edfA==)), we are needing to print more flyers, my signs are flying out the door at every event...
Please join the fight to Retire Pocan!
VOLUNTEER TODAY!!! We need boots on the ground to get the message out to each and every voter! Sign up on the website to do doors, calls, get a yard sign, host a meet and greet, etc.
Thank you so much! Spread the Word!
See you on the trail, Charity Barry

body:
This has gone too far. **Mike Gibbons unleashed an unprovoked, personal attack on Josh’s military service record during last Friday’s debate.** Peter, **It was as shameful as political smears go.** He went so low as to **SMEAR** Josh’s service in the United States Marine Corps, claiming serving our country in the United States Military is not “ _work._ ” **The truth is Josh served honorably for two tours of combat duty in Iraq, something that investment bankers like Mr. Mike Gibbons would know**** _nothing_****about.**
Tell Mike Gibbons that American patriots **REJECT** his smears toward the U.S military. [**_Support Josh Mandel for U.S. Senate. >>>_**](http://links.joshmandel2022.com/u/click?_t=128ebb110d2d4fa293c540634a1733e0&_m=8fd33965e2754eb69b055baa3d8234d2&_e=rne1xqCO3va4k6S8f7KJAfyIYyhCBPoSoEgQkd0d33rD0NXxpwUxpS5UODGBzR2CEcc8jfQV7uhJW7hOFWqm6uS0JTmbOO-yxGpELPjO4dCFzP4XmQGOqhP4ySFNWcNpASLXDQnmfS1CWEyo6U4HaI-fFWniNywji2AKZl_de0xIm778p2DAxiv_ueUGPq817dljUg6zkPOv42TJu7rXvSIwRt2-iq07W4yM_CEXHC-SFdMEV0MIAAR-UWP52iqgbzK5X4PSK4gUED2OLK2gxu-t7U37onqgb_O0Gl1bTTCATEW5eyxpbdUzM1WMMpTwbuEJYN6rtv-EX0IceAdcL1viIN76XO7TFGpXui-a2_iR_8a_ynhJ4aiw4tJtOGu0tXaS3Kun51m3Wu-zOJjrN42cRHMCd40TI3FGD-1-nFkqL2rsXt_tSl9uVfOmWKq9GRiKlEEog6qCyvXBjbLoNt1ql57xn0sOAt86Jbd2HFI%3D) [**Stand with U.S. Marine Josh Mandel NOW**](http://links.joshmandel2022.com/u/click?_t=128ebb110d2d4fa293c540634a1733e0&_m=8fd33965e2754eb69b055baa3d8234d2&_e=rne1xqCO3va4k6S8f7KJAfyIYyhCBPoSoEgQkd0d33rD0NXxpwUxpS5UODGBzR2CEcc8jfQV7uhJW7hOFWqm6uS0JTmbOO-yxGpELPjO4dCFzP4XmQGOqhP4ySFNWcNpASLXDQnmfS1CWEyo6U4HaI-fFWniNywji2AKZl_de0xIm778p2DAxiv_ueUGPq817dljUg6zkPOv42TJu7rXvSIwRt2-iq07W4yM_CEXHC-SFdMEV0MIAAR-UWP52iqgbzK5X4PSK4gUED2OLK2gxmNh68pI_oLgAdk5G49yfHHVWAqaXhad_Bq0IV-CkWOMCpWaXxpQNWhBHKqTzR4V-4llkRm0NndtgVOBwg8M9d0vndpKwpbxEHT-Ik0UM-lzC-WuRpYeoMDl7bBgNVYzLALPfiHiIiA_npk5h_u66jzOI0t2slLyBYjsjPgzS2wtcSHOikQxrCx1bEGyLIE_z1hB1VzFuc3sIovgWlVDy0g%3D) If Mike Gibbons slanders the military, he is wrong for Ohio and wrong for the United States Senate. name: Team JB
subject: ACA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JB for Governor
body:
It's urgent we find out where you stand.
|
---
Friend — On this day in 2010, President Obama signed the Affordable Care Act into law, providing access to quality, affordable health care for millions of Americans.

Now, 12 years later, GOP politicians are _still_ fighting to repeal the ACA, which would eliminate health care coverage for over 1 million Illinoisans. JB and Juliana have made every effort to fight back and expand access to health care, but it's urgent we find out where you stand:

That's why they've built on the ACA's foundation and **expanded coverage to more than 130,000 Illinoisans** since taking office.

clean_body: It's urgent we find out where you stand. | Friend — On this day in 2010, President Obama signed the Affordable Care Act into law, providing access to quality, affordable health care for millions of Americans. Now, 12 years later, GOP politicians are still fighting to repeal the ACA, which would eliminate health care coverage for over 1 million Illinoisans. JB and Juliana have made every effort to fight back and expand access to health care, but it's urgent we find out where you stand: Will you help us fight Republican attempts to take away our health care? | | | | JB and Juliana know that access to health care is a right, not a privilege. That's why they've built on the ACA's foundation and expanded coverage to more than 130,000 Illinoisans since taking office. But with five major Republican opponents ready to undermine the progress we've made expanding access to affordable health care, we need to know if you're with JB and Juliana for the fight ahead. Please, if you haven't already, take our one-click poll now: Will you help us fight Republican attempts to take away our health care? | | | Together in this fight, Team JB | | Paid for by JB for Governor Want to update your email preferences or contact information? name: MarkKelly.com
subject: 12 years ago today
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Mark knows every Arizonan and American deserves affordable health care.
#

Friends —
12 years ago today, the Affordable Care Act (ACA) was signed into law.
It’s a transformative piece of legislation that has made sure millions more Americans have access to quality, affordable health care — especially for people with pre-existing conditions.
But Mark’s opponents want to repeal the ACA, which would kick nearly one million Arizonans off of their health care and put more than one million more at risk of losing their coverage — just because they have a pre-existing condition.
We can’t let that happen.
As the husband of someone who suffered a traumatic injury, Mark knows every Arizonan — and every American — deserves access to affordable health care they can count on when they need it the most.
That’s why Mark is working to strengthen the ACA by lowering premiums, lowering the cost of prescription drugs, ending surprise billing practices, and expanding health coverage.
We must keep Mark’s leadership in the Senate.
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to help Mark win re-election and ensure he can keep on fighting for access to affordable health care for everyone who needs it?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220323-1-7&t=1&refcode2=2413_6688874_dOicwO&akid=2413%2E6688874%2EdOicwO)

name: Rick Scott
subject: Will you be on this call?
body:
Peter,
Our plan to **Rescue America** is gaining traction, but now, we need to move onto the next phase of our plan: **putting our grassroots team into action.**

**As one of my top grassroots patriots, I want to personally invite YOU to join a call with me to discuss how we can turn our plan to RESCUE AMERICA into a reality.**

Our plan can’t work without you on my team, Peter, and I need to make sure you’re 100% in the know.

| | | **_Learn More About Chuck_**

---
---
| | | Family, hard work and community. These are the things that have defined me as a person more than anything else and are the things that make New Hampshire a special place. Several local Salem community leaders became role models and mentors and got me involved with helping our community. With their encouragement, I ran for Salem Selectman and won. I ran for Town Moderator and won. Then I ran for State Representative and served for two terms from 1998-2002. I was elected to the State Senate in 2002 and was appointed to the Finance Committee. My experience running a business, meeting a payroll, and keeping a conservative budget helped prepare me for the challenges of crafting a balanced state budget. I quickly became known as one of the state’s leaders in budgeting and tax policy. I took a step back from politics in 2006. My daughter was starting her junior year in high school and Susan and I spent most of the next few years traveling to her field hockey and basketball games. We were her biggest fans. In 2010, I was reelected to the Senate. When I returned to the Finance Committee, I found the financial mess that the Democrats had put our state in. The state had an $800 million deficit. We quickly turned that around and put the state’s finances back on a sustainable path. For my work, colleagues gave me the greatest honor of my life — electing me the Senate President in 2013. In 2020, I led Republican efforts to retake the majority in the State Senate. New Hampshire was the only state in the country that was able to flip a blue state legislature to red and it was largely due to our strong fight against the Democrats’ proposed state income tax. Last year, we passed one of the most conservative and fiscally responsible budgets that New Hampshire has ever seen. It is balanced, cuts taxes for small businesses, provides more than $300 million in property tax relief, bans late-term abortions, and prohibits the use of discriminatory teaching in our schools. It puts New Hampshire on a path to long-term prosperity. The work ethic, commitment to family and sense of community that I learned at a young age have stuck with me as an adult and drive everything I do. I still wake up at 4am every morning to work at our business before going to Concord to do the people’s business. More often than not, I still take my first phone calls of the day while driving a tractor. Washington, D.C. has enough silver-spoon, Ivy League lawyers. I believe that I am a product of all the best parts of New Hampshire — the spirit of freedom, sense of volunteerism and responsibility of giving back to the community that has helped shape me into the person I am today. I want to bring New Hampshire to Washington and makes sure our voices are heard. I want to bring New Hampshire values to a place that needs them now more than ever. I want to work for you and I hope you will consider electing me to represent you in the U.S. Senate.
_[The End of Quarter Deadline is coming up next week. Contribute here before March 31st.](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTEyNTg2MjcxNjMzNDQ3NTY0JmM9dDliNCZlPTAmYj05NDc1MDQ0OTMmZD1oNGE5ajFy.Tw4BQmNf89ZtW2-nZHg6skRxXFdWsEYhHD6VYHD5cw8)_

We are putting together a team across NH that will deliver victory in November. #NHPolitics #nhsen #603Way" | | | | | | @Morse4Senate: "Wonderful time in Lincoln meeting and speaking with Republicans from Carroll, Coös, and Grafton tonight - everywhere I go, Republicans are fired up and ready to take back our country this November! #NHPolitics #nhsen #603Way" | | | | | | @Morse4Senate: "Thank you to the @RockinghamCoGOP for hosting me Wednesday night in Atkinson! Happy to take every opportunity to speak with Granite State voters and connect with fellow Republicans and friends. #NHPolitics #nhsen #603Way" | | | | | | 🚨IN CASE YOU MISSED IT NEWS🚨 | | | I joined Chris Ryan on the NH Today radio show to discuss gas prices, Ukraine, and more! Check out the news: | | | | | | | | | | Learn More About Chuck | | | Family, hard work and community. These are the things that have defined me as a person more than anything else and are the things that make New Hampshire a special place. Several local Salem community leaders became role models and mentors and got me involved with helping our community. With their encouragement, I ran for Salem Selectman and won. I ran for Town Moderator and won. Then I ran for State Representative and served for two terms from 1998-2002. I was elected to the State Senate in 2002 and was appointed to the Finance Committee. My experience running a business, meeting a payroll, and keeping a conservative budget helped prepare me for the challenges of crafting a balanced state budget. I quickly became known as one of the state’s leaders in budgeting and tax policy. I took a step back from politics in 2006. My daughter was starting her junior year in high school and Susan and I spent most of the next few years traveling to her field hockey and basketball games. We were her biggest fans. In 2010, I was reelected to the Senate. When I returned to the Finance Committee, I found the financial mess that the Democrats had put our state in. The state had an $800 million deficit. We quickly turned that around and put the state’s finances back on a sustainable path. For my work, colleagues gave me the greatest honor of my life — electing me the Senate President in 2013. In 2020, I led Republican efforts to retake the majority in the State Senate. New Hampshire was the only state in the country that was able to flip a blue state legislature to red and it was largely due to our strong fight against the Democrats’ proposed state income tax. Last year, we passed one of the most conservative and fiscally responsible budgets that New Hampshire has ever seen. It is balanced, cuts taxes for small businesses, provides more than $300 million in property tax relief, bans late-term abortions, and prohibits the use of discriminatory teaching in our schools. It puts New Hampshire on a path to long-term prosperity. The work ethic, commitment to family and sense of community that I learned at a young age have stuck with me as an adult and drive everything I do. I still wake up at 4am every morning to work at our business before going to Concord to do the people’s business. More often than not, I still take my first phone calls of the day while driving a tractor. Washington, D.C. has enough silver-spoon, Ivy League lawyers. I believe that I am a product of all the best parts of New Hampshire — the spirit of freedom, sense of volunteerism and responsibility of giving back to the community that has helped shape me into the person I am today. I want to bring New Hampshire to Washington and makes sure our voices are heard. I want to bring New Hampshire values to a place that needs them now more than ever. I want to work for you and I hope you will consider electing me to represent you in the U.S. Senate. | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse | | | Friends of Chuck Morse | | PO Box 106 North Salem, NH 03073 | You received this email because you signed up on our website or made a purchase from us.

name: Team AOC
subject: Keeping AOC in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
With a crucial FEC fundraising deadline just a week away, we need all hands on deck to support Alexandria and her work in Congress.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220323-2888-header&t=1&akid=2888%2E2526796%2E9cpry0)
We are just over a week away from a crucial fundraising deadline for our campaign, so we want to take a moment to talk about why this month is so important.
At midnight on March 31, our campaign will submit a public report to the Federal Election Commission (FEC) detailing how much we fundraised in the last 3 months. **However, this will be our final report before the New York state primaries this June when Alexandria will be on the ballot.**
As one of the most heavily targeted members of Congress, Alexandria’s report will draw huge attention from political opponents, pundits, and powerful special interests who are hoping to see our movement lose its strength.
Here’s just one example of what we can expect:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220323?refcode=em20220323-2888-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2888_2526796_9cpry0&akid=2888%2E2526796%2E9cpry0)
**With the end-of-quarter deadline and the primary election fast approaching, we need all hands on deck to support Alexandria’s re-election and work in Congress.**
Alexandria has continued to show bold leadership this quarter: from pressuring President Biden to cancel student debt, to securing $7 million for community projects in The Bronx and Queens, to highlighting how the Ukrainian refugee crisis shows that we need a pathway to citizenship for _**all**_ those with Temporary Protected Status.
The number of contributions we receive – no matter the amount – sends an important message: **That Alexandria has strong support in her fight for systematic change from coast to coast.**
[What do you say? Can you make a $3 donation – or whatever you can afford – to support Alexandria and her re-election before this critical fundraising deadline?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220323?refcode=em20220323-2888-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2888_2526796_9cpry0&akid=2888%2E2526796%2E9cpry0)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220323?refcode=em20220323-2888-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2888_2526796_9cpry0&akid=2888%2E2526796%2E9cpry0)**
From the beginning, Alexandria has taken $0.00 from lobbyists or corporate interests. By putting people over profits, our movement relies on grassroots donors like you.
When hundreds of thousands of people chip in anything from $1 to $20, it all adds up to compete against the corrupt billionaires and corporations who have used money to rig the political system in their favor for far too long.
We’re relying on your support today to hit our goals and keep Alexandria in Congress fighting for progressive policies and strong solutions for working families.
[Can we count on you to chip in $3 or whatever you can right now to help post the strongest FEC report possible and power our movement forward?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220323?refcode=em20220323-2888-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=2888_2526796_9cpry0&akid=2888%2E2526796%2E9cpry0)
This work wouldn’t be possible without you.
Thank you for everything,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220323?refcode=em20220323-2888-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&t=24&refcode2=2888_2526796_9cpry0&akid=2888%2E2526796%2E9cpry0)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220323-2888-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&t=25&akid=2888%2E2526796%2E9cpry0)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=2888%2E2526796%2E9cpry0) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=2888%2E2526796%2E9cpry0) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=2888%2E2526796%2E9cpry0)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=29&akid=2888%2E2526796%2E9cpry0)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=30&akid=2888%2E2526796%2E9cpry0)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

clean_body: We need your help | Friend, An INCREDIBLY IMPORTANT DEADLINE is approaching, and we need your help. The end of March not only marks our campaign's End-of-Month deadline but also the end of the first quarter in 2022 when we have to disclose our finances to the FEC - the Federal Election Commission. In order to build the grassroots infrastructure needed to make it through the primary and get out the vote in November, we need YOUR HELP! My family and I can’t thank you enough for the support you have shown us so far. It means so much to us to know that we have support from true conservatives like you. Thank you, Yesli Vega Conservative Republican for Congress Virginia's 7th District | Military Wife. Mother. body:

Peter,

We’re fired up and ramping up. The countdown is on.

The May 24th primary election is now less than nine weeks away, and our FINAL major fundraising deadline before voters cast their ballots is coming up fast next Thursday!

It’s vital that we post strong numbers on our End-of-Quarter report. Jennifer’s opponents and the media will be poring over the details, looking for any sign of weakness.

We need to show them we’re building the grassroots momentum it will take to WIN.

We’re setting a $14,000 online goal, and we need EVERY supporter to step up and help!

Will you pitch in $14 – or any other amount – to help Jennifer defeat MTG? (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/e_eoq1_0322?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_eoq-1_20220322&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=eoq-1&utm_agency=PG&amount=14)

The polls show Jennifer’s support is growing. Common-sense conservative voters are sick and tired of MTG’s endless embarrassing antics.

Jennifer is running to RESTORE OUR VOICE in Congress and lead the charge to stop the disastrous Biden-Democrat agenda!

The funds we raise through this drive are critical to our efforts to share Jennifer’s message.

Please make your most generous possible contribution today >>> (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/e_eoq1_0322?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_eoq-1_20220322&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=eoq-1&utm_agency=PG)

I will fight tirelessly for energy independence [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=90c2010e00d94199a9fbe507feb2dbaa&_e=SPf-pK7uW4N1UdQ4OtLJCSdtg6AkXknRGnBM-nEJptWNuf908uxcnu5nFSSGw705YXEcB7aXtUWJh70FUzAaRgWBlTe0BRa1hgk_4lzqlftFien4JGdfWgY0aOD-AjIqh51f3OhythNATLhC-R8oPB9IDE2Uwzav1KcMshAvFDu983ynXH4GqRwQQd1D92C8Ovj8ixOY1pKZl-L9tT2uJS-N4LztgmWbVSS97nSrNuaZjgHjgNd1mtolyKCsiEi_kJC8c5moTx_bqheTCc2cOpYpRkyDuS00a79N-zSTmt9S6iFg2hGEa_FIyS-AZpkBWWtOv_vvJPjrVqp2fp1IztB3N6xu6P0Cs_BOvK12ZAb1azVUW8KWEedBdQvz-x4W) My friend, Joe Biden and Tim Walz have slashed America's production of oil and energy. **Now, you're stuck paying for it at the pump!** The national average for gas prices is sitting at an astronomical $4.30 a gallon! **We have had enough!** Contribute $5 to help me put an end to the Biden/Walz anti-energy agenda and bring our gas prices back to normal! The national average for gas prices is sitting at an astronomical $4.30 a gallon! We have had enough! Contribute $5 to help me put an end to the Biden/Walz anti-energy agenda and bring our gas prices back to normal! We must allow America to tap its natural resources so we can get back on track. I'm writing today to see if you'd be interested in helping me become the 4th Black Republican in Congress .. |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=c925a15f09924dbb8c9b7103781eeace&_t=7dbh6tWnLL_oNb9ovCTYbxNVJIra5dZf7XA7Rt1uTWujIDXBOQGXXTe7AHxES1RuDF8j8nPzuhoEN-cgAHs5H5y27OvPNwXWewodanDRIH4Whb7-0zh40oMWQq8tpP9DD7mPi2-1LouFx_l1VnKdn539E4Xcc-JZX0F0k7nLZ2Q%3D).

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c925a15f09924dbb8c9b7103781eeace&_e=ItC2f9n8fkuxjgZAf17J_18IbHHVIS8q0VZTokQ1-glRGEJj_cga8O5YQSPahBbOTUp-hG1s1FBfFEnzalOkY-e4qijLRloRxnUUl_MoOMQ8vwwaC39KBqmSJvS2MKlMCvwumMrxE_QIj_LkvAM1PtPuSDqgB5lrW9ZWX8bKN8EicxdsTkKuhJBK25i-lDtt3-g6Ynpn0KnvlTLLjOybN835SCKm9ptpvEBDCznIW1gye0jVpyme_U8_t5MDigs7qklrUINKFVsQ0L5GevLD5QsL5zAznKma6keLhvrckJoMu4KjXCc43bZufgo_fts2nfPkZQf4ghzGdrtsvdHCxPIXLlkGgot-78bzUwetxVWgxB7EkmADm7EHxKKBzYEuIst6-wcTUF0sYdMpR1BBTbRH98frTszSoMO1XYMDDwCxVCunM22ZmOYOeVYuS56ePc7-3s46BMrJcush8_GiCg%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

According to a WSJ poll out last week, “ _**support for a Republican candidate rose to 27% among black voters, up from 12% in November**_.”

This is **INCREDIBLE** , especially when President Trump went from receiving 6% of the black vote in 2016 and 8% of the black vote in 2020.

If Republicans end up getting even close to 27% of the black vote in 2022, Dems will have to do some serious introspection.

As a first-generation American and son of Haitian immigrants, I can attest to this: **America the beautiful doesn’t care about the color of one’s skin**. But for generations, Black Americans have voted for Democrats by default, falling in line with the voting patterns of our parents and our grandparents.

You don’t know me well, or at all, but today I’m coming to you with a simple request: **help me send a message to Democrats that come November, black Republicans won’t be a rarity in Congress anymore, but a real force to be reckoned with**.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c925a15f09924dbb8c9b7103781eeace&_e=ItC2f9n8fkuxjgZAf17J_18IbHHVIS8q0VZTokQ1-glRGEJj_cga8O5YQSPahBbOTUp-hG1s1FBfFEnzalOkY-e4qijLRloRxnUUl_MoOMQ8vwwaC39KBqmSJvS2MKlMCvwumMrxE_QIj_LkvAM1PtPuSDqgB5lrW9ZWX8bKN8EicxdsTkKuhJBK25i-lDtt3-g6Ynpn0KnvlTLLjOybN835SCKm9ptpvEBDCznIW1gye0jVpyme_U8_t5MDigs7xByTIaPCifHIgTBB3KVVHbmb1GzvX5qHGLNqWtReuA6opfSHQPDVF5ryqbPA8z04A1gNwcjnVT3CSWMXTdgpPzqzrdnJZA6l9ssY3-kZI6qrIsHhQROONSHvL0b7k20x3YyGEwWF8ovKh1e-jjm5BO7e_FHT6YkHS-6pKXQ-hjos0M8jT7_dy5CUgMNj6c-ycOcSFCLjbWMzni3w1v1uMg%3D%3D)

[**CHIP IN $4 to make me the 4th Black Republican in Congress**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c925a15f09924dbb8c9b7103781eeace&_e=ItC2f9n8fkuxjgZAf17J_18IbHHVIS8q0VZTokQ1-glRGEJj_cga8O5YQSPahBbOTUp-hG1s1FBfFEnzalOkY-e4qijLRloRxnUUl_MoOMQ8vwwaC39KBqmSJvS2MKlMCvwumMrxE_QIj_LkvAM1PtPuSDqgB5lrW9ZWX8bKN8EicxdsTkKuhJBK25i-lDtt3-g6Ynpn0KnvlTLLjOybN835SCKm9ptpvEBDCznIW1gye0jVpyme_U8_t5MDigs7fS0mPtr3oaXrl10HSu0XiSDR2W3qB_0wvfJqG6N-3OdsGMEq6u-koXcf44Qu38bjW_FzijFy87Yx4vGU3sZuYEliFtAEWu6m08-Td-Sgr7pJufXMk8fgPtc1dE5KGyNOd13tNFSZiarmXsxVvodWXwMjIfbms-6g-Wd_bDpT6Dxk8l1AMaOR5-aOD1kpfwn3UaqnLocmmxX8b3xMM01Mbw%3D%3D)

Before I ask you to help make me the 4th Black Republican in Congress, a few things about myself I’d like to share with you:
* I’m a military veteran (I joined at 17),
* I’m a lawyer (I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school)
* I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office.

**The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success.**

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c925a15f09924dbb8c9b7103781eeace&_e=ItC2f9n8fkuxjgZAf17J_18IbHHVIS8q0VZTokQ1-glRGEJj_cga8O5YQSPahBbOTUp-hG1s1FBfFEnzalOkY-e4qijLRloRxnUUl_MoOMQ8vwwaC39KBqmSJvS2MKlMCvwumMrxE_QIj_LkvAM1PtPuSDqgB5lrW9ZWX8bKN8EicxdsTkKuhJBK25i-lDtt3-g6Ynpn0KnvlTLLjOybN835SCKm9ptpvEBDCznIW1gye0jVpyme_U8_t5MDigs7h4JOZtpgrE5u3OFHNNnOatBCXYBxnLvgTGjm9XB0c4Lr0WYiZ-gu5BPFHXof3Hgm8bcUmvvcmGiLz3EEeDNnTurW-RwvzPvhIZSz9lGi1VASuRMIoMI0xXOnr68bLHBLPmWhNffAfqf63QBZE4Y5ZRRSN-yDri-XmFOS-gKVxJsooAowcSegsUpAR9LyxPts7Vp1L-bD5YTheO0rpjwbgA%3D%3D)

It’s been nearly 100 years since FDR passed the New Deal and picked up a legion of new faithful voters for the Democrat Party.**What worked for our communities then doesn’t work for our communities today**. I’m running for Congress as a Republican because I believe that every American – regardless of race – must stand on their own to make their American Dream. **If my parents could make it after arriving in Florida with no money in their pockets – from one of the world’s poorest nations (Haiti), then anyone can.**

[**CHIP IN $4 to make me the 4th
Black Republican in Congress>> **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c925a15f09924dbb8c9b7103781eeace&_e=ItC2f9n8fkuxjgZAf17J_18IbHHVIS8q0VZTokQ1-glRGEJj_cga8O5YQSPahBbOTUp-hG1s1FBfFEnzalOkY-e4qijLRloRxnUUl_MoOMQ8vwwaC39KBqmSJvS2MKlMCvwumMrxE_QIj_LkvAM1PtPuSDqgB5lrW9ZWX8bKN8EicxdsTkKuhJBK25i-lDtt3-g6Ynpn0KnvlTLLjOybN835SCKm9ptpvEBDCznIW1gye0jVpyme_U8_t5MDigs7prA-Ysk6HwGBkpMQk4gC9wHEt47U7tIHjkIeqiTjnvKwE1jWjWbJ26zxWLsc4jb9wdkDw98cki2ibQdUhO0YniWR2kI0DCvG-Ya6Ju9_zReIYtIMmnYcwMzlDwDb5ln1xCQjyI8HnWf3UTI7EI2HHDd0lcjfyycXb96DkJ0JnXeg_QtpN1XsMqqANJ87UeXzJzBuX6NfhaUsZIyMkuP4YA%3D%3D)
I’m asking you to take a chance on me and to consider supporting my campaign for Congress today. **[I’m running in a district that, while leaning Democrat, can be put into play with the right candidate and enough money to run a professional campaign](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c925a15f09924dbb8c9b7103781eeace&_e=ItC2f9n8fkuxjgZAf17J_18IbHHVIS8q0VZTokQ1-glRGEJj_cga8O5YQSPahBbOTUp-hG1s1FBfFEnzalOkY-e4qijLRloRxnUUl_MoOMQ8vwwaC39KBqmSJvS2MKlMCvwumMrxE_QIj_LkvAM1PtPuSDqgB5lrW9ZWX8bKN8EicxdsTkKuhJBK25i-lDtt3-g6Ynpn0KnvlTLLjOybN835SCKm9ptpvEBDCznIW1gye0jVpyme_U8_t5MDigs79s0DUbbWXznxn0akLzqUcYjBQ-eiW2CvK2-1j855lL-UoOW9K-jWkByq5X-Ma48cHsutT42-rN5Snw2Cl7j-B8m9hqNqgesVn4f_iwDpZMExa54wDlP0ntX8uznrVxN46mRxlHNj0j8x97iQyN8oMdfMUqW-Ni8o3rxQy8I1WIhyFtOhmBNdAhCDpB4U8XnB9eqJlcioVeL49940Bsr6ow%3D%3D)**.

I appreciate your consideration today,

Rod Dorilás

[** I'M WITH ROD >> **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c925a15f09924dbb8c9b7103781eeace&_e=ItC2f9n8fkuxjgZAf17J_18IbHHVIS8q0VZTokQ1-glRGEJj_cga8O5YQSPahBbOTUp-hG1s1FBfFEnzalOkY-e4qijLRloRxnUUl_MoOMQ8vwwaC39KBqmSJvS2MKlMCvwumMrxE_QIj_LkvAM1PtPuSDqgB5lrW9ZWX8bKN8EicxdsTkKuhJBK25i-lDtt3-g6Ynpn0KnvlTLLjOybN835SCKm9ptpvEBDCznIW1gye0jVpyme_U8_t5MDigs7xBe_70yiKS6ZJFmWko0C7U3sn7xn_udL3oTKPGGUQqVCHCVK_GZXMrtnY3t7ltodbRJ-dd_NHxv_6NNvIg_UHrSPMAG1cY_f5W4by0XvE8msZzXNmNV4z65PE3aidrTBQxGAO8sXt2hqgtih0imb3F8MxW3_c79P8ibu7LKqY-s6r-R5zOZFbEsRD-GcqVImlbhNV5X-cw_xPMuhLgbnBw%3D%3D)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c925a15f09924dbb8c9b7103781eeace&_e=ItC2f9n8fkuxjgZAf17J_18IbHHVIS8q0VZTokQ1-glRGEJj_cga8O5YQSPahBbOTUp-hG1s1FBfFEnzalOkY-e4qijLRloRxnUUl_MoOMQ8vwwaC39KBqmSJvS2MKlMCvwumMrxE_QIj_LkvAM1PtPuSDqgB5lrW9ZWX8bKN8EicxdsTkKuhJBK25i-lDtt3-g6Ynpn0KnvlTLLjOybN835SCKm9ptpvEBDCznIW1gye0jVpyme_U8_t5MDigs7tI5RJfKyjwcxNVmiJHSQ0LEcFB5lfwjAw4SJ-1bBgtXjux1PjpBs--fU0Zk7aSWkL730Ca-q3bsRPB4seqT8-vFcejAUm_YiaZvmbe1qONHEPtms2a3qBArXbnwQkX_VLpXC0_pf40nRLPLYceejp8Rirk973_SqHudY0QUJFHIQcY-0LbrJzDLJNRwlSdYzCPD7oIZ_o1zPGE1XWsKVNQ%3D%3D)
---

| Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
---

This message was sent to your email address ending in @gmail.com because it was listed as the best way to contact you.

However, if this is no longer the best way to reach you or you no longer want to receive any more of our emails...

We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=c925a15f09924dbb8c9b7103781eeace&_t=7dbh6tWnLL_oNb9ovCTYbxNVJIra5dZf7XA7Rt1uTWujIDXBOQGXXTe7AHxES1RuDF8j8nPzuhoEN-cgAHs5H5y27OvPNwXWewodanDRIH4Whb7-0zh40oMWQq8tpP9DD7mPi2-1LouFx_l1VnKdn539E4Xcc-JZX0F0k7nLZ2Q%3D).

name: Peter Welch
subject: I used to be a public defender. That’s one reason why I know we need Judge Ketanji Jackson on the Supreme Court:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
My Republican colleagues should be celebrating Judge Jackson’s credentials instead of trying to use them to disqualify her.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=147%2E61531%2EGedrT7)
Hello,
Despite being one of the most qualified nominees to the Supreme Court in history, Republican Senators have relentlessly attacked Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson this week for all kinds of ridiculous reasons. They’ve questioned her faith, injected critical race theory, even criticized her time as a public defender.
As a former public defender myself, that line of attack is so disappointing. Judge Jackson would be the first federal public defender on the Supreme Court, and we need that perspective. But we need to fight by her side against these ridiculous GOP attacks. [**That’s why I’m asking you to add your name to support Judge Jackson’s nomination right away.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-support-kbj?source=em_20220323_p_p_kbj&t=3&akid=147%2E61531%2EGedrT7)
I represented low-income clients as a public defender in Vermont. Our justice system is built on the right to counsel, and public defenders are crucial to leveling the playing field for those who can’t afford defense attorneys. Attacking Judge Jackson for serving the public—when she could have taken a far more lucrative job—is baseless.
I’ve known Patrick Leahy for a long time and he’s not one to get riled up easily. But even he called Republicans’ line of questioning outrageous and said he’s never seen behavior like this in his nearly five decades in the Senate.
We can’t let partisan politics get in the way of her confirmation. She would be an incredible justice and we need to do everything in our power to beat back the out-of-line attacks.
[**Please sign our petition to support Judge Jackson. She’ll bring exceptional experience to the Supreme Court—including her time as a public defender—and we won’t let Mitch McConnell’s allies stop her.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-support-kbj?source=em_20220323_p_p_kbj&t=4&akid=147%2E61531%2EGedrT7)
Thanks for being in this fight,
Peter

---
| [DONATE ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pwfv-em-22mar?refcode=em_20220323_p_p_kbj&refcode2=147_61531_GedrT7&akid=147%2E61531%2EGedrT7)
---

P.O Box 909
Richmond, VT 05477

| After watching our rights, freedoms, and prosperity taken from us by these crooks, I could no longer sit on the sidelines.
Instead, I'm rolling up my sleeves, getting to work, and running for Congress to Save Arizona.
My name's Kelly Cooper - Marine, entrepreneur, and restaurant/small business owner - and with your support, I'm going to make sure we protect this state and country. We're going to get OUR interests back on the menu in Washington, and put prosperity back on the plate for everyday working families!
[If that's a mission you can get behind, I welcome any and all support along the way. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AqSY-9Op4NnNerf4b3o4ef06RxY-XV8gDlL2PopMLBJzaHjZZktSPNoNiSQ7pr9Kam34oufzf2jiZvxFoti_fA-0la9mIySVLh296xpbIPBkaF2kpJwVnJ63QftO_Y-Du2EQGjsixWDFauFBbrLN4Qhst_5t5CrBXem-aqY3iij2DDKL58fPRTWhg9J5DDG22ETWsfCFo8IgmWgh_GGvFg==&c=npodk33rS2W5oTudQxldlt10L3Uqcre64gWcLFRnQJjW1naCrCMIBQ==&ch=MMqn6rUp0weDwPa_PKYdiqIVT5AXIselgs4CjIpfbi5YjcMQB2jMKQ==)
It's going to take a team to get this job done, so let's get to work - are you ready to help me Save Arizona?

| Dear Patriot, I have good news and bad news. **Here's the good news: my bill to eliminate mask mandates on planes and public transportation continues to gain steam.** As I told you last week, it passed the Senate by a vote of 57-40. And now, multiple Democrat members of the House have come out in favor of it. **That means, if the Republican caucus sticks together...** **...my bill would pass the House...** **...and the mask mandate on planes would be just one step away from being repealed.** But here's the bad news: Joe Biden has vowed to veto my bill and keep the mask mandates in place for as long as he possibly can. The reason he is saying this is clear: Biden intends to bring back the most repressive COVID restrictions. He sees that "cases" are rising once again and wants to take advantage of it for political gain. This means mask mandates, vaccine mandates, and vaccine passports are right around the corner, yet again. In fact, Fauci himself said this week that it may be "necessary" to "re-institute" COVID restrictions because of the rising cases. You and I have two crucial battles ahead of us. First, we have to pressure Joe Biden to change his position on this bill, or be faced with losing his Congressional majorities in the midterms this year. And then, if he vetoes the bill, we have to pressure Democrats in Congress to override the veto, or be faced with losing their seats at the hands of angry voters. The fact that several Democrats have already flipped shows that it can be done. You and I have an opportunity to show Joe Biden and his fellow Democrats that we mean business. **On March 31st, everyone in Congress will have to report their fundraising totals publicly.** If my number is low, the Democrats will think that we are weak. And they will surely ignore us, and vote to continue the mask mandate. But if my fundraising number is high, and I show strength, the Democrats will fear for their political careers. And many of them will flip, and vote to repeal the mandate. I need you to take action to put pressure on the Democrats to pass this bill. Or, if they refuse to pass it, to mobilize an army of angry voters nationwide to defeat them. The power is in your hands to make a real difference. [Will you make a contribution of $100, $50, $25, $10, or whatever you can right away, so that I can get this mandate repealed?](https://trk.klclick2.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3DneEs_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7PDTD-2BwYKXAFDqUqI7x4d8AQrC9JqyfTHmNeHKM7Zb4RlEDjZXxZygkEP1LfduMUXgdSYy8-2BnYjSAI0tk1fJvdx1HWylACttH63kNO9wSfKRN1-2BzaTH44mBQx-2Fk9651vK1wkoQg6gGBrDlxZdxHg7RSMBg9JJ-2BfgV8D8nsT4eKUjm7-2B09oPMXu-2FNlG1Ou782PjQDSVM0921NaGgqYxRNUE1KU7CdK4loBJsXoNyaX15frn4gid-2BQHfHQ7FqEoBTyFWlv-2F-2FSx3sWrmAWWvfb-2BQ7eh-2FrPBySj3pqwetXZjhTGR6Y-2BPGpMRbwquEjKPWK-2F9S-2BJVJRjoj-2BYuKIJkmSl6n-2BA-3D-3D) In Liberty, Rand Paul
