name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Breaking: Nancy Pelosi is backing Cuellar in the runoffs
body:
#

Nancy Pelosi: “I support my incumbents. I support every one of them.”

[Split a contribution with Justice Democrats and Jessica Cisneros so we can take on the establishment and defeat Henry Cuellar in the Texas runoffs. ](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/99145?refcode=em20220323-22533&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=22533%2E1203867%2E9fIwHf)
---
Peter,
**Nancy Pelosi just said she is backing Henry Cuellar 100% in the runoff against Justice Democrat Jessica Cisneros.[Will you rush a split contribution to help Jessica fight back?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/99145?refcode=em20220323-22533&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=22533%2E1203867%2E9fIwHf)
Henry Cuellar is against abortion rights, immigrant justice, union organizing, and climate action, yet Pelosi worked hard to re-elect him in 2020. Only for Henry Cuellar to directly fight the President and tank the Build Back Better plan.
**And now, despite the pending FBI investigation and Henry Cuellar’s opposition to the President’s priorities, Nancy Pelosi is still behind Cuellar’s re-election to Congress.**
[Jessica Cisneros is running to defeat Henry Cuellar, but she’s going up against powerful forces in the Democratic establishment. Will you split a $3 donation to Jessica’s campaign and Justice Democrats so we can fight back and elect someone who will actually represent the people in Congress?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/99145?refcode=em20220323-22533&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=22533%2E1203867%2E9fIwHf)
**[Fight Back](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/99145?refcode=em20220323-22533&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=22533%2E1203867%2E9fIwHf)**
Nancy Pelosi has now doubled down on her support for a “Democrat” who voted with Donald Trump 70% of the time. Cuellar opposes progressive policies like Medicare for All and action on climate change because he takes money from Big Oil, Big Pharma, and Wall Street.
We can defeat Henry Cuellar on May 24th but Jessica needs a major wave of grassroots contributions to go up against the support Cuellar receives from the establishment, corporate PACs, the private prison industry, and even the Koch Network. [Can we count on you to make a split contribution today?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/99145?refcode=em20220323-22533&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=22533%2E1203867%2E9fIwHf)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/99145?refcode=em20220323-22533&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=25&akid=22533%2E1203867%2E9fIwHf)**
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=26&akid=22533%2E1203867%2E9fIwHf) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=27&akid=22533%2E1203867%2E9fIwHf) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220323-22533-footer&t=28&refcode2=22533_1203867_9fIwHf&akid=22533%2E1203867%2E9fIwHf)**

name: Flip CA-27 Blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Quartey for Congress
body:
Access to health care is critical.
Team – Today marks the 12 year anniversary of the Affordable Care Act (ACA) being signed into law. This historic law expanded health care coverage, lowered costs, and secured life-saving protections for hard-working families. name: John Kasich
subject: Courage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
The exceptional thing about courage is that the natural human reaction when we see it is to come together in some way [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=f9dfae50c9144e1888bd18e07669c51f&_e=-6ERTn4lME5WF_XIom0lgZ0gtIVkUfOmXjIZuKm8v7GMjdWZxCH8gOlqLL7oG_GMJ9t2KLqm2BZMbR7PxeXV5Ry1ZlTeHzRFmVWMIJzDODCDWqHUhFgczxJhToiVWDSWnQ84EdPNf5vF6dE9nUaTeb4PF_0quO15WtgrKRsJDXDF2bj1iVyt-dFO_yiPp6TPDcf8WudlhC5wq0OwEg9j-ePGpullyacHlN6bnz6FWeggcNt1bmyfD2oj-vW2hhu_dkZGTJKNiIeIXuktuAT9Jw%3D%3D) Peter, in 1998, I wrote a book called "Courage is Contagious" and it profiled ordinary Americans whose courageous acts made a lasting impact on those around them. Rightfully so, we reserve the word "courageous" for those among us who put themselves in harms way to help others or those who put themselves out there, with nothing to gain personally, in an effort to improve the lives of other people. This has been on my mind in recent weeks as I look at the courageous acts of so many brave Ukrainians who are fighting to defend their homeland and their democratic values. Their very way of life is under attack by Russia's Putin and the defiance of Ukrainian President Zelensky has rallied the free world to their cause. It was hard to imagine even a month or two ago that there would be something that could rally America's leaders in both parties to speak with one voice about anything positive, let alone a powerful call to fight to defend democracy. That is the power of courage and we need more of it in America. Courage comes in all forms and any human being has the potential to make a positive impact. Just look at Ohio State college football player Harry Miller who stepped away from the sport to not only focus on his own mental health, but to share his story in the hopes that it will help others who may be struggling. [Take a look at this clip from his interview with the Today Show](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=f9dfae50c9144e1888bd18e07669c51f&_e=-6ERTn4lME5WF_XIom0lgSIT6FmQicF5fxCDy3JX80GWjQ-AWRaoXW5v4-c-tMkkDYTBb1xig1OQ3M2LGb8VpFR3IDrzOIPEC0Nx56J4EA3CT63ph7kCjqy-HKOQnSQYxBUx5JMu92NZiwFy8-VtB8SICRtQGINfsFba9fw775L_ZEqEQDv3V9hFNCaP_obT849k7NkP00c_KNaF5wlnww_Ba1g7iZKhwS_WiHWDi8O0_rWZUpzuMLOVuU8EgpzRG3UYGA2PV1iff7ER5a3NljgjFXSC3J93LjxjZgN9cOS2X0yxdwlC1JD8EkFBa17W9wublu4TyyIdsOt9yJ4B_A%3D%3D). The exceptional thing about courage is that the natural human reaction when we see it is to come together in some way. We are drawn to it instinctively and it can be such a powerful way to bring about positive change. Courage really is contagious and it's up to each of us to find a way that we can make a positive impact in our own communities. It's my hope that we can help our elected leaders in Washington understand how courageous acts can work to unite us instead of dividing us for political gain. I'm so proud to have you on the team and cannot thank you enough for all that you're doing to help heal America! -John | |
---

body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LR-ub1Ks_Aqk9-Fd-ejyFQk56A38KwPLIJv7BQE-9SA1mnYXq2pkEVdtuPVFE39zlnVTa05W9DkmdVdjGGz3D4lbwzGP9DnRtFQFA3f4aRE86fG76WLSlYuagvsHsyiGNS-pU6A9zYu1PwkzkcYRK65HMkV_CO-gBK43qJ4lUz9KEiweHN_9QgK8GYkggXSNbbw2-WVoJyI1j7e5msOrGe5ddnM3D2HC4_bUGNGajM-IDOa2fdNKFeSCWoO9Hlz2atMKNGXy9zBREFW-pxwh-u2veVmg4VYj1oN9FjUwRLBO/3kl/oENgUk6NQi-4YDc8mlq3YQ/h0/vqQMjsfqwzkYlTjZrGKRbDGZbUqQb53-UbKT7103Jqg) Peter, Henry Cuellar is reportedly distancing himself from the Koch Industries after they decided to continue doing business in Russia, despite the country’s ongoing war with Ukraine. But here’s the deal: **Henry Cuellar never should have taken money from the Koch Industries’ PAC in the first place.** He’s the top Democratic recipient of Koch Industries PAC this cycle so far. And he’s already cashed their checks for his campaign. name: =?utf-8?Q?Ingrid=20Centurion?=
subject: Guess Who's Giving Men an Unfair Advantage?
body:
RINO Mace wants Transwomen to beat women in sports | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/webvortex/its-official-shes-off-and-running-8860773?e=bb02dd73bf)
---
| | | [ ](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=6073c863f3&e=bb02dd73bf)
---
| | | [Please Donate](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=b6b5001bfa&e=bb02dd73bf "Please Donate")
---
| Hi D. P.,

**Rabid anti-Trump RINO Nancy Mace must go!** She’s a woke extremist fighting for trans rights and fighting against Trump. We deserve a true conservative fighting for us!

I’m just disgusted how the Left have declared war on women—by letting men claim to be women and compete in women’s sports.

Lia Thomas crushed his female competitors and won a women’s National Championship. That’s unfair and disgusting.

This isn’t a woman. And its unfair to let him compete as one.

**I’m a former NCAA athlete.** I played basketball at Arizona State, a D-1 school in a power-five conference.

It would have been completely ridiculous and unfair to let a man compete against us, claiming to be a woman. Biological men have a steep natural advantage against women because of their skeletal and muscular structure.

**This isn’t a controversial opinion. It’s just science.** The Left are desperate to re-write scientific facts because it doesn’t conform to their twisted world view.

I’m going to fight for women by banning biological men from competing in women’s sports.

**My opponent RINO Nancy Mace is a trans activist who wrote a bill, greatly expanding trans rights in Congress. She’s loud and proudly flying the extremist LGBTQ agenda. **

[That’s why I need YOUR help replacing her in Congress! Will you help me fight for women by removing this trans activist from Congress?](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=a6c624e53d&e=bb02dd73bf)

Lia Thomas spent 21 years of his life as a man.

He started competing against women in swimming this year and became a national champion.

Our daughter’s sports are not a plan B for failed male athletes.

**Lia Thomas failed out as a male athlete, became a woman, and now is the fastest woman on earth in a swimming pool? **

The Olympics has banned biological women from competing because of their testosterone levels. How is this in any way fair to women?

Simple answer—It’s NOT. I’m not afraid to say that.

**RINO Nancy Mace has wrapped herself in the rainbow flag and embraced the woke narrative on trans issues. **

RINO Nancy Mace claimed to be a conservative to get elected and now votes with the Socialist Left and openly supports transgenderism!

_RINO Nancy Mace supports openly transgender ideas like putting kids on puberty blockers and allowing them to receive transgender surgeries. _

She’s sold out our Christian values and principles to the swamp.
Here’s what she said in an interview with the media:
* **"I strongly support LGBTQ rights and equality," Mace told me. "No one should be discriminated against."**
* "I have friends and family that identify as LGBTQ," she explained. "Understanding how they feel and how they’ve been treated is important. Having been around gay, lesbian, and transgender people has informed my opinion over my lifetime."

That is RINO Nancy Mace in her own words. She’s NOT a conservative. No one should be discriminated against who wants to compete fairly in sports or block a child's puberty based on their feelings!

[That’s why I need your help to replace her.
Help me take back this seat from RINO woke Nancy Mace by donating today? ](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=a6fa1c68eb&e=bb02dd73bf)

We have an end-of-quarter fundraising deadline at the end of the month and we only have a few days left to hit it! Will you help us by donating today?

Thank you and God Bless,
---
|
---
| **Ingrid Centurion
Republican Candidate for Congress, SC-01

_America First conservative Republican.
Entrepreneur, Army veteran, wife & mother_

_P.S. -- We need Republicans who speak, act and vote in the House the same way they campaign!_**
---
| |
